5 ) apne gunaah aur khata (mistakes) per nadim (regret) hokar aansu bhau aur ro, (do cry on your gunaah and mistakes)

6 ) aaj ka kaam kal per mat dalo (don't procrastinate, don't put away today's work for tomorrow)

Jisne bhi ye gumaan kiya ke woh aalim hae, dar haqeeqat mae woh sab se bada jahel hae

Allah taala hum ko tawfeeq de ke hum ye jaa'ne ke hum jahel kitne hae, aur us jahalat ko dur karne Ilm hasil kare

اللهم هب لي قلبا تقيا، وحكما مستقيما، ولسانا صادقا، وعقلا يعقل عنك جميع الخطاب

Ae Allah humko mutaqi dil de, sahi hikmat aur faisle ki quwat de, sachi zabaan ata kar, aur aisi aqal de jis'se tammam khitab (kalaam) ko sahi samjhe (to understand what is told)

🌹🌿🌹🌿🌹🌿🌹🌿

10/3/15, 7:22:25 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salwatullah alahe ka kiya hi behtreen Qol hae

Aap farmate hain ;


لا تخلفن وراءك شيء من الدنيا فاتخلفه لأحد رجلين،أما رجل عمل فيه بطاعة الله سبحانه  فساد بما شقيت به واما رجل  عمل فيه بمعية الله سبحانه فكنت عونا له علي المعصية وليس أحد هذين حقيقة أن نواثره علي نفسك

Tum apne maut per, duniya ka maal,  wa daulat kisi ke liye bhi mat chodo,

Agar tum apne waris (heirs) ke liye daulat chode, to do (2) baatain mumkin hae

Pehli agar tumhari aulad usko ache kaam, khair ke kaam, nek kaam mae kharch kiye, to log ye khenge ke tumhare pas itni daulat thi aur tum ne usko kharch nahi kiya, aur Allah bhi naraz hoga ke tum ne kanjoosi ki, khair ke liye kharch nahi kiya, Allah per tawakul (bhrosa rely) nahi kiya, aur tum is baat se gunehgaar honge

Aur tumhari aulad buri huvi to woh bure aur khraab kaam mae kharch karenge, aur is baat ke bhi gunehgaar tum hi honge, kiyunke daulat tumhari thi, tum khud ache kaam nae kharch karsakte the

{Don't leave your worldly possessions behind you when you die, because you either leave them to one of the two persons, a person who uses them in obeying Allah taala and uses the money for good causes, the hard earned money for which you had toiled

         Or

A bad character, a person who uses them for sinful deeds, so in that case you helped him to sin, none of this two should be preferred over yourself,

The Imam means to says that, don't leave your worldly possessions behind you, when you die, either someone inherits it and uses it for good deeds, in that case you will be judged in the aakherat for sin of keeping your money idle, and not using it yourself for good deeds,

or someone who inherits it and uses it for bad and sinful deeds, and in that case you have actually helped that person to do the sin by leaving behind your money  

So in either case you shouldn't leave behind your wealth, spend the money yourself for virtues deeds in your lifetime, and gain the sawab yourself

Allah taala Koran kareem mae irshad farmaya hae ke jab tum inteqal ke khreeb ho to apne maa baap, khrabatdaar (near ones) ke liye خير الوصية achi behter wasiyat (will) chodo

Maal wa daulat mae marne wale ko 1/3 (of his inheritable wealth) mae wasiyat ka Haq hae, balkeh Moulana Ali farmate hain ke us se behter hae ke 1/4  mae wasiyat karo, aur us se bhi behter hae ke 1/5 mae karo, aur baqi maal tum Allah ke hukum per chod do jo Allah taala ne wirasat ka khanoon (inheritance laws) banaya hae uske hisaab se taqseem hogi

{ Nothing can be given to the waris from the wasiyat, as he gets his share from the shari wirsa (his part of inheritance) }

Rasulullah ne, aur tammam Imam ne, deeni maamle mae hi wasiyat ko ziyada ahmiyat di hae, jaisa keh;

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe ne farmaya, ke Rasul e khuda ne mujh ko wasiyat karne ka hukum farmaya tha, aur aap ne sabse pehle apne hathyaar (arms) aur kitabaun ke liye wasiyat farmai

Phir aapne Imam e Hasan ko farmaya, ke tum mere khatal ke maamle mae ikhteyar rakhte ho, tum chaho to mere khatil (killer ibne Muljim) ko khatal kardena, ya chaho to maaf kardena

Phir Moulana Ali ne Duniya mae hone wale tammam badshah ke naam, aur Qiyamat tak hone wale tammam Duwaat ke naam aur duniya ki muddat se waqif karwaya

Phir aap'ne tammam faraez deen Namaz, Roza, waqaera ke anjaam dene ki wasiyat ki

Phir aap'ne farmaya ke Rasul e khuda ne mujhe hukum diya tha, tum apne haath se neki ka hukum karo burai se roko, ye nahi karsakte to zabaan se roko, aur ye bhi nahi karsakte ho to Dil se roko,

Khabardaar tum kisi ki qeebat (backbiting) na karna, us'se a'maal saqit (gira diye jate hain) sille rahmi karo, Namaz ko waqt per padho,

Tum takabur mat karo, bilashak, (without any doubt) takabur karne wala malaun hae, aur tawazu karne wala Allah ke pas bulund martabe wala hae,

Tum 'Kibar' aur 'qaroor' na karna, kiyunke takabur Allah ki chadar hae, (he only deserves it) jo us chadar ko khenchega, Allah taala usko para para kardega (into pieces)

Tum apne Nafs ke saath jahad karo, wohi tumhara sab se bada dushman hae, jaise ke Allah taala Koran mae farmata hae

ان النفس لإمارة بالسوء إلا مارحم ربي

Bas Ye tumhara Nafs hi tum ko khaeshat aur bure kaam ki taraf ubharta (incite) hae, siwae uske jis per mera Rabb rahem farmata hae, woh mehfuz rahta hae.

Nafsani khaeshat ki taraf mael (incline) hona unki paervi karna wohi gunaah ki pehli manzil hae,

Tum Allah ka khoof rakho aur duniyadari ki taraf raqbat na rakho, duniya hi tammam khrabi ki jadd hae, (root cause) aur aakhir mae duniya hi tabah hone wali hae

واتقوا الله وقولوا قولا سديدا يصلح لكم أعمالكم ويغفر لكم ذنوبكم

Tum Allah taala se daro, aur sach baat kho, us ki wajeh se tumhare a'maal durust honge aur tumhare gunaah maaf hojainge

🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸

10/5/15, 12:27:26 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Uloma e Islam wa tariqdan (historians) mae ek bahut bada ikhtelaaf (difference) hae ke Adam Alehe Salaam ko kis Jannat mae basaya (settle) gaya tha ?  

kiya woh, wohi jannat hae jiska wada Allah taala apni kitab mae momineen ke saath, unke is duniya ke ache a'maal ke ajar wa sawab mae dene ka wada kiya hae

Aam tor per Koran e majeed ki tafseer karne wale yehi kehte hae ke, ye wohi jannat hae jo saatwain aasmaan per hae, aur uski daleel is baat se woh lete hae ke jab Adam aur Hawa ko unke khata (mistake) ki wajeh se saza mae jannat se nikala gaya, to is baat ko koran ne in alfaz mae kha

اهبطوامنها

Yahan se neeche giro

Magar hamare uloma aur awaam ke bhi mohaqeqeen (research scholars) kehte hain ki Adam wa Hawa ke waqae mae jis jannat ka zikar hae woh zameen per hi thi, ye woh jannat nahi hae jo mommin ko uske sawab wa ajar ke badle, aakherat mae wada kiya gaya hae

Pehli baat ye hae ke koran sirf ye kha hae اهبطوامنها niklo yahan se, yane ek muqam se nikalna aur doosre muqam per jana, jaise ki doosri jagah koran mae Musa ki qom ko kha hae اهبطوامصرا tum Egypt ki taraf jao

Ek daleel ye bhi hae ke agar ye sawab wali jannat hoti to Iblees fareb dene, (decieve) dhoka dena wahan pohunch hi nahi sakta tha aur phir ye baat na kehta

هل ادلك علي شجرة الخلد والملك لا يبلي

Kiya mae tum ko aisa jahad (tree) bataun jo kabhi fana na hoga aur aisi badshahat jo kabhi khatam nahi hogi, is baat se sabit hae ke ye jannat woh nahi hae jo abadi (eternal) hae, agar woh jannat abadi hoti to Iblees Adam ko us jahad ki taraf nahi bulata

Ek aur daleel ye hae ke jo jannat mae dakhil huva usko phir wahan se nikala nahi jaega jaisa koran khud farmata hae

وما هم عنها بمخرجين

Woh log wahan se yane jannat se nahi nikale jainge, aur Adam wa Hawa ko to Jannat se nikala gaya

Iblees ne jab sajda dene se inkar kiya to woh mal'un ملعون huva (lanat kiya huva) to phir woh jannat e khuld (eternal jannat) ki taraf wapis nahi jasakta tha

Aur Allah taala ki ye hikmat nahi hae, uska mansha nahi hae ki baqaer kisi amal ke kisi ko jannat e khuld mae paida karde, Allah taala kisi ko bhi baqaer uske kisi amal ke jaza ya sawab nahi deta

Tammam Islam ke uloma is baat per ek hain ke Adam ko zameen per hi paida kiya gaya, jaisa ke koran keh raha hae ke

اني جاعل في الأرض خليفة

Allah taala farmata hae ke mae zameen mae ek apna Khalifa qayam (appoint) kar raha hun, ye nahi kha ke ke jannat mae qayam (appoint) kar raha hun

In tammam daleel se saaf waze hota hae ke Adam ke waqae mae jo Jannat ka zikar hae, ye woh jannat e khuld nahi jahan insaan ko maut ke baad apne ache a'maal aur sawab ke badla bheja jaega

Ye koran ke tammam waqeat ki, sahi haqeeqat aur sachai, sirf aur sirf ahle Haq, hamare Uloma hi bata sakte hain

Koran kehta hae

وأتوا البيوت من أبوابها

Woh gharaun mae darwaze se aate hain, ya yeh ke ghar mae uske darwaze se dakhil ho

Aur woh darwaze se dakhil hona woh hamara Ahde e shareef hae, jis'se hum sab khreeb mae hi dakhil huve hain

Magar hamara dakhil hona hi kafi nahi hae, ye aisa hi hae jaisa sahi aur durust raaste per aakar khede to hogae hain, magar us raaste per chalna bhi zaroori hae, raasta bata diya gaya hae, manzil malum hae magar hum chalte nahi hae to faida kiya

Hum sawal to bahut karte hain, aeterazaat bhi bahut karte hae, Bahes bhi bahut karte hae, magar hum kabhi qor nahi karte hain ke hum khud kitna jante hain, hamare deen ke basic malumaat sahi nahi to ek aalim e deen humko kaise samjhaega

Hum Duniya ki taleem ke liye kitna waqt dete hain aur deen ke ilm ke liye kitna, shaed hi kuch fractions ka waqt duniya ke muqabil

Allah taala hum sab ko tawfeeq de ke hum deen ke ilm ke liye ziyada se ziyada waqt de, jo deen wa duniya dono ko behter banane wali hae

🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃🍃

10/8/15, 11:20:00 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
جمعة مبارك

Kitab Daem ul Islam mae bayan kiya gaya hae ;
 
Imam e Jafar e Sadiq, riwayat karte hain Rasulullah se

Char logoan ko apna amal naya shru karna chahye,

Mareez jab woh apni bimari se shifa hasil karleta hae

Mushrik jab Emaan laye,

Jab insaan Namaz e Jumua se lo'te, palte

Aur Haji jab woh apna Haj pura ada karle,

(Kiyunke ab uske bahut se gunaah maaf hogae)

Rasulullah ka irshad e mubarak hae ke tum jumua ke din mujh per Durud ziyada se ziyada bhejo kiyunke us roz amaal ka sawab ziyada kar diya jata hae

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain ke Jumua ke roz Namaz aur Sadqa ziyada se ziyada karo kiyunke us roz sawab dugna kardiya jata hae

Jo mommin mard ya aurat Jumua ki raat (jumerat wa jumua ki darmiyani raat) inteqal karta hae usko azaab e khabar se mahfooz rakha jata hae

Aur jo Jumme ke din mae inteqal karta hae usko jahanam ke azaab se mahfooz rakha jata hae

Jumme ke pu're din Namaz padh sakte hain kiyunke is roz jahanam ki aag bujha di jati hae (fajar se asar tak)

Jumme ki shab, (Jumeraat Jumma ki darmiyani raat) Allah taala hukum karta hae ek farishte ko, woh shru raat se awaaz lagata hae aur doosre dinaun mae ek te'haie 1/3 raat guzarne ke baad aur kehta hae

" koi maangne wala hae jisko mae ata karu, koi toba karne wala hae jiski mae toba ko qabool karu, koi maqferat talab karne wala hae jiski mae maqferat qabool karu."

"Ae khair ke talab karne wale aage aa, (come forward) aur ae shar ke talab karne wale baaz aaja mohtaat hoja".(beware)

Moulana Imam e Mohammed e Baqar se riwayat hae aap farmate hain ke Namaz Jumua farz hae, aur woh bhi Imam e Aadil ke saath, jisne bhi teen jumua choda usne teen farayez choda, baqaer kissi uzur (problem) aur illat (reason) ke siwae Munafiq ke koi bhi Namaz e Jumma nahi chodta hae

Jumme ke din khushbu (perfume, ittar) lagana chahiye ,aur zawal se pehle gusul lena sunnat hae

Imam Mohammed e Baqar farmate hain ke jumua ko khushbu lagana aur acha libaas pehn'na chahye, jumua ke roz ek aisa waqt (time) aata hae ke mommin ki koi bhi hajat ho Allah taala ata karta hae, aur woh waqt zawal se leker namaz ki nida tak hae (azaan tak)

Hafte (week mae) 35 namaz (5×7) Rasoolullah ne farz ki hain, inme ek Namaz aisi hae jo kissi ko nahi chodna chahye siwae in paanch ashqaaz ke, bacha, aurat, bimar, musafir aur gulam ke aur woh Jumua ki Namaz hae

Rasulullah ka irshad e mubarak hae ke Jumua ki Namaz mere ummat ke mohtajaun (needy) ka Haj hae

Moulani Ali Ibn Abi Talib Namaz e Jumua ke liye nange pau (bare feet) ja'te baye haath (left hand) mae aap apni chappal utha lete, aur farmate ke ye Allah taala ki ibadat ka raasta aur jagah hae, yeh aapka amal inkesari, tawazu wa tazeem ke khatir tha, koi wajib baat nahi, insaan sawaari per bhi Namaz e Jumua ke liye ja sakta hae

Jumua ki Namaz ki fazilat ahmiyat aur barkat ki riwayatain bahut hain inshallah ainda zikar hoga

Surah Jumua mae Allah tabaraka wa Taala is had farmata hae

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا إِذَا نُودِيَ لِلصَّلَاةِ مِن يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ فَاسْعَوْا إِلَىٰ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ وَذَرُوا الْبَيْعَ ذَٰلِكُمْ خَيْرٌ لَّكُمْ إِن كُنتُمْ تَعْلَمُونَ

O you who believe ! When the call is proclaimed to prayer on Friday (the Day of Assembly), hasten earnestly to the Remembrance of Allah, and leave off business, That is best for you if you but knew !

🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀

10/11/15, 9:07:56 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁

          السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
                 بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم  

Kitab Daem ul Islam, Jihad ke bayan mae kiya hi behtreen nasihat Ameer e Qom, (leader) sardar e lashkar (Army commander) ko ki gayi hae

Ae woh insaan jo aaj Sardar bhi hae, Badshah bhi hae aur mamluk (slave, servant) bhi hae

Tu mazi (past) ko mustaqbil (future) ke liye daleel (pointer) bana, aur sab se pehle apne aap ko nasihat kar, apne pehle ke ghaltiun ko dekh kar ainda ke liye mohtaat hoja (be warned)

Tujh per, kiya farayaz a'ed hote hain aur tere kiya, kiya, huquq hain (duties, rights and privileges) un sab per qor wa fikar kar

Apne mamlaat mae aur apne Nafs ke mamlaat mae Allah ka khoof rakh.

Allah taala ne jo tujh per jo farayez wa zimedari
(responsibility) rakhi hae usper Allah ko nigraan samajh, aur Allah taala ko hazir wa nazir jaan (He is always present and keeps a watch on you)

Tu Allah ki ibadat, inkesari aur a'jisi (humbleness & humility) ke saath kar, wohi Allah hae jis ne tujhe is martabe aur muqam (rank & position) tak bulund kiya.

Inkesari, tawazu, ajisi ye tammam baatain Allah taala ki bandagi ki qasiyat hain, aur qaroor wa kibir (pride & ego) woh Allah taala ki sifat aur nishani hae, woh usi ko zeb deta hae.

Yaad rakh keh aise muqam (position) ki talab na kar jo tera Haq nahi, woh tujhe mayana ravi (just path) se hata dega
 
Aur Allah ne tujhe naimatain ata ki hae woh tujhe Allah ke hudood aur bandaun ke huqooq ki taazim (respect) se qafil na karde

Allah taala ka Haq uski azmat ke aetebar se, be'inteha hae, aur yaad rakhna keh jo Allah taala ne tum ko izzat wa karamat di hae us se tum per jo Allah taala ke huquq, farayaz aur ahkamaat a'ed huve woh tum se hargis saqit (exempted) nahi hote

Agar tum aisa samjhoge to yaqeen karlo ke tumhare Dill per mael (dirt) jam jaega aur jo amal tum kar chuke ho uska anjaam bhi bura hoga

Qor kar ae Badshah, ae Va'li, ae Haakim, jo Allah taala ka adna banda aur mamluk (gulam) bhi hae

Kah'an (where) hae woh tere a'ba wa ajdad (father & forefathers) aur ka'han hae unki aulad aur shahzade jinko bade, bade, alqab (titles) aur badi izzat aur karamat di jati thi, aur ka'han hae unke jism jinko woh badi rahat pohanjate the aur aram se rakhte the, kiya ab un mae se koi tum ko nazar ata hae

Aaj tu bhi wohi nizam chalata hae jo pehle woh chalate the (earlier rulers), kiya tum ko koi unki nasal (heirs) mae aaj nazar aata hae

Aur yaad rakho keh tumhare naseeb per tumhare nafsani khaeshat qalib na aane pae

Apni aulad ki mohabbat aur unper shafaqat aur narmi, tum ko unke liye maal aur daulat jama karne per na uksaye, aisa na ho keh yeh tumhara faisla, Allah taala ke faisle ke khilaaf ho

Ae Va'li (ruler) tum maut ko apne per jald nazil hone se apne aap ko mehfooz na samajhna, aur duniya ke zawal hone ko, khoob yaad kiya karo

Inqelab e zamana aur duniya ke badalte rang ko dekho aur ibrat hasil karo

Tum ne badshahaun ko dekha, unke be inteha saza'un (torture & punishment) ko bhi dekha aur raham aur karam ki raah ko chod dene ko bhi dekh rahe ho

Apne ma'tehtaun (subordinates) ke saath zulm, jaur aur zabardasti karne ko bhi dekh rahe ho

Aur unka apne khud ke anjaam ke ba're mae kam qor wa fikar karne ko bhi tum ne dekha

Unka, khud ki maut ke liye qaflat mae padhe rahne ko
aur shehwataun (carnal desires) mae khoob raqbat (intrest) rakhne ko bhi dekha

Allah taala ke inteqam ke bare mae bhul jana aur qor wa fikar na karna, yane Ibrataun se kam faida uthana

Unper guzarte huve halaat se faida na uthana aur sabaq na lena

Sirf maal wa daulat wasul karne ki khaesh, aur jo doosraun ka Haq banta hae, jo wajib hae, woh nahi dena, ya kam dene ko bhi dekha

Kamzooraun per sakhtiyan karna aur khud ye khaesh rakhna keh doosre esaar (sacrifice) kare aur khud jama karte jae aur nazrane (monetary offerings) lete jaein

Jo kuch khud ne bure amal kiye, usko mamuli khyal karna aur jo unper per wajib farayez aaed kiye gaye the usko zaye (ignore, waste) kardena

Tum un badshahun ki, in tammam baataun ko bura samajhte the ya nahi ?

Agar tum in afaal (deeds) ko bura kaam aur aeb (bad qualities, vices) samajhte ho, to tum ko chahye ke tum apne aap ko nasihat karo aur in baataun se bachu aur apne aap ko dur rakho

Aur agar tum un badshahun ke aeb, burai aur ghaltiyaan, sirf is wajeh se nikalte the aur bura kehte the, keh tum un se rashk aur hasad (jealous, jalte) karte the, to phir tum yaad rakho keh tumhare pas Allah ki qudrat,  ta'khat aur insaaf se bachne ka koi raasta nahi, koi zareeyah nahi

Kiya tumhare pas bhaag kar jane ki koi aur jagaah hae, jahan tum Allah ke azaab se bach sako'ge

Ya tumhara koi aur Allah hae jo tum ko panha de (protection), aur sahara de sa'ke

Kiya tum mae, Khuda ke azaab ko bardasht karne ki qudrat aur taqat hae

Kiya kisi ki qudrat hae keh tum ko Allah ki qudrat se nikal kar, kissi aur ki qudrat ke supurd karde

Arre tum doosraun ke haal per nazar rakhte ho, jaan lo ki issi tarah log tumhare haal per bhi nazar rakhte hain

Tum jis tarah doosraun ke mutaliq bolte ho waise hi log tumhare mutaliq bhi baat karte hain

Tum nafe aur nuqsan (gains and losses) ke hisaab mae, apne nek amal (good deeds) ko sab se ziyada mehboob aur qabil e bhrosa khazana samjho (most reliable asset)

Tum apne nek amal zohod wa taqwa aur parhezgari ko sab se afzal tareen khazana aur daulat samjho

Wohi aankhun ki thandak, sukun wa itmenan, aesh wa araam hae

Allah taala hum sab ko in behtreen nasihataun ko samajhne ki aur unper amal karne ki tawfeeq ata farmae

         وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم

🍁🍂🍁��🍁🍂🍁🍂

10/13/15, 2:04:40 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Janab Ibrahim bin Adham
se rivayat hae jab log aap se daryaft kiye ke Koran kareem mae irshad e mubarak hae

 بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

وَقَالَ رَبُّكُمُ ادْعُونِي أَسْتَجِبْ لَكُمْ

اور تمہارے پروردگار نے کہا ہے کہ تم مجھ سے دعا کرو میں تمہاری (دعا) قبول کروں گا

Tum mujhe pukaro mae tum ku jawab daunga aur tumhari Dua qabool karunga

Aur hum dekhte hain ke hamari bahut si Duain, Allah taala qabool nahi karta.

Aap ne farmaya, dus (10) baataun ne tumhare Dil ko maar'dala hae yaane murda banadiya hae, tum mae ahsaas nahi hae, issi liye tumhari Duain qabool nahi hoti.

Allah ka irfan rakhte ho (jaante ho) magar uska Haq ada nahi karte (yane uski Ibadat nahi karte)

Allah ki Kitab, koran majeed padhte to ho, magar usper amal nahi karte

Shaitaan ko bura to samajhte ho magar us'se dushmani nahi rakhte aur usse mu nahi modte.

Rasulullah ki mohabbat to dil mae rakhte ho, magar unki sunnat per nahi chalte.

Jannat ki khaesh to rakhte ho magar uske liye tayari (preparation) nahi karte, amal nahi karte.

Maut ko Haq mante ho magar uske liye tayar nahi rahte, har lamhe insaan ko tayar rahna chahye maut kisi lamhe bhi asakti hae

Doosraun ke aeb (shortcomings) nikalte ho aur khud ke aeb ko nahi dekhte

Allah ki di huvi rozi (risq) khate ho magar Allah ka shukur ada nahi karte

Tum apne mauta (dead) ko dafan (bury) zaroor karte hain magar ibrat nahi lete (sabaq nahi leta ke tum ko bhi ek roz jana hae)

Allah Tabaraka wa Taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum in 10 ghaltiyun ka ahsaas kare aur apne aap ko durust kare, takeh hamari har Dua Allah ke bargaah mae maqbool ho

●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●

10/15/15, 12:45:25 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
□□□□□□□□□□□□□□□□□□
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
جمعة مبارك

Muqtalif kitabaun mae zikre  Jihad aya hae, uska khulasa (summation) ye hae ke jihad do kisim ke hae

Pehla Jihad woh talwaar se Allah ke dushman, deen ke dushman se jung karna hae, Allah ki raah mae, Imam waqt ke, ya unke muqrar karda Duwaat ke hukum se Jihad karna hae

Doosra Jihad jo ziyada  bada jihad hae, jisko Rasulullah ne Jihad e Akbar, yane bada Jihad kaha hae, woh apne "Nafs e Ammara bis su" se Jihad karna hae, yane apne khrab Nafs jo humko bure aur khraab kaam ki taraf uksata hae, us'se apni Aqal aur Allah ke ahkaam aur Rasulullah ki sunnat ke zareeyah se ladna hae, aur us per qabu pana hae, usko control mae rakhna

Aulia Allah ne is Jihad e Akbar ko batini jihad bhi kha hae aur uske bhi 2 do kisim bayan ki hain

Batini Jihad ke ek kisim ye hae ki mommin apne Mabda wa Maad ko samjhe, yane woh ka'han se aya hae, kaise aya, kiyu aya, aur hamari is duniya ki jismani zindagi ka maqsad kiya hae, humko shariat e Mohammedi ki pabandi kiyu karna hae ? aur phir aakherat ki taraf hamare palat kaise hogi ?

Maad; yane apne aakherat ke maamlaat ko samjhe, maut ke baad ke maamlaat ko samjhe, jannat aur jahannam ki haqeeqat ko ja'ne

Doosra batini Jihad ye hae ki, apne ache aqlaq aur kirdar se logoan ko sahi deen ki taraf dawat kare, rahnumai kare, Jis tarah se Imam e Jafar Sadiq ne ek waqt farmaya tha ke tum khamosh rahkar hamari maddad karo, hamare deen ki taraf dawat karo

Jihad mae bhi 7 saat faraez hain aur 12 bara sunnat hain

Farz ye hain ;

Mushrik buth parast (Idol worshippers) se jung karna,

 Esai (Christian) se jung karna,

Roman Christians se jung karna

Yehudi (Jews) se jung karna

Majusi (Parsees) se jung karna,

Munafeqeen se jung karna

Baqi Musalmaan (Muslim rebels) se Jihad karna

12 sunnat ye hain ;

Apne jism ko Nafsani khaeshat ki paervi (to obey & follow) karne se rokna

Nafs ko hidayat ki taraf rahnumai karna

Mutaqi parhezgaar (pious) logoan ki iteba karna (to follow)
 
Aalim aadmi ki izzat karna,
jo tum ko Haq wa Sadaqat aur najaat ka raasta batae,

Allah ki taat mae, aur uske hukum ko man'ne mae, har takleef aur musibat per sabar karna

Bewaqoofaun se agar takleef pohenje to usko bardasht karna aur jitna bhi mumkin ho unko samjhana, aur gusse (anger) ko har halat mae control karna

Har halat aur musibat mae apne aap ko khabu (control) mae rakhna aur Deen e Haneef per har mushkil ke ba'wajud qaem rahna

Har musibat mae bhi Allah ka shukur ada karna, jaisa keh tum rahat aur aaram mae shukur ada karte the

Quwat aur taqat (power and strength) rakhne ke bawajud kissi ko takleef na dena, khususan zaef, budha aur kamzoor logoan ko (specially week and elders)

Takaburi aur dikhawe (pride & pretension) se apne aap ko dur rakhna

Bad'kari (bad and character less deeds) aur bakhalat wa kanjusi (stinginess) se apne aap ko dur rakhna

أن المجاهد نفسه علي طاعة الله وعن معاصيه عند الله سبحانه بمنزلة بر شهيد

Allah taala ki taat mae, uski hukum ki pabandi mae, aur uski nafarmani se bachne aur doori ikhteyar karne mae jo apne Nafs se Jihad karta hae woh Shaheed ke barabar hi hae  

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

10/17/15, 6:57:17 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💧💧💧💧💧💧💧💧💧

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

ليلة النصف من شعبان الكريم أپ سب کو بهت مبارک ہو

Nisf e Shabaan ki raat un teen mubarak raat mae shammil hae jiske liye Nabi e kareem ne farmaya, pehli Rajab ul murajab, 15 wi Shabaan e kareem aur 23 shab Shehrullah e mubarak, aur us mae bhi shammil hae jiski Fazilat Moulana Ali ne farmai thi, pehli Rajab, 15 Shabaan aur do Eidain ki raat, aur Kisi muqam per Hazrat Ziaali saheb ne 27 wi Rajab ko pehli Rajab ke badle shammil kiya, Allah behter janta hae kiyu aap ne likha hae

Is mubarak raat, Moulana Ali ghar se ibadat ke liye nikle aur raaste mae Nof bin fizaam se farmaya;

Khush khabri us ke liye hae jo zohod زهد ko ikhteyar kiya, Koran ko apna sheyar (path) banaya aur Dua ko odhna banaya,

Ae Nof to shayer (poet) na ban, shart baaz (betting) na ban, gaane wala (singer) na ban, qibat (back biter) na ban, shatranj (chess) khelne wala na ban,

Is raat rozi ke liye Dua maangne ke liye khaas raqbat dilai gai hae, aaj ki raat uski qubuliyat bahut ziyada hae    

Dua ke sharaet (requirements) aur lawazimat (conditions) bahut hain, insaan ke sab kuch karne per bhi kabhi kabhi, Dua qabool nahi hoti, aakhir kiya baat hae, uski kiya wajeh hae ?

Imam e Jaffar e Sadiq farmate hain, jab kabhi bhi koi Musalman Dua karta hae, to Allah taala uski Dua ko yaqinan qabool karta hi hae, aur Dua ki barkat se uski Dua se badhkar, bla (musibat) aur pareshani ko us'se dur bhi kardeta hae,

aur kabhi Allah taala uski Dua ko aise waqt ke liye utha rakhta hae jab ke uski woh Dua uske liye ziyada faida mand ho, magar shart yeh hae ke uski woh Dua zulum ki, ya khatte rahem (breaking of blood relations) ki Dua na ho

Aap ne farmaya ke Qaza wa Qadar (taqdeeri mamlaat, maut aur hayat wa hadesat aur insaan ki rozi) ko paltane ke liye Allah taala ke pass sab se ziyada mehboob sawal woh Dua hi hae

Har khair ki kunji Dua hae, har hajat mae kamiyabi Dua se hi hae, Allah taala ki bargaah se agar kuch hasil karna hae to sab se behtreen zareeyah Dua ka hi hae

Rasulullah ka irshad hae ke har mommin ki Dua mustajab (accepted) hae, yaqinan qabool hoti hi hae, sirf ye hae keh ujlat (jald bazi) se kaam ne le

Logoan ne pucha jald baazi se kiya matlab ?

Imam ne farmaya ke, log Dua karne per jab Dua ka asar nahi dekhte hain to kehdete hae ki meri Dua qabool nahi huvi

Imam kehte hae ke Allah apne wade mae sacha hae, baat yeh hae ke Allah taala jitna chahta hae jald Dua qabool karleta hae aur baqi aakhrat ke liye utha rakhta hae, aur jab mommin un duaon ke azeem us shan inam aur sawab ko maut ke baad aakhrat mae dekhega to kehega ke "kash Allah taala hamari duniya mae koi bhi Dua qabool na kiya hota aur sab hi aakhrat ke liye utha rakhta"

Baba Hazrat muqaddus kehte the, hamari ye halat hae ke humko to hamare liye kiya acha hae aur kiya bura hae uska bhi Ilm nahi, hum us nadaan bache ki tarah hae jo khilone ki awaaz aur rang dekhkar khush hota hae, usko kiya khabar ki kiya maange aur kaisa maange, agar Aulia Allah hamere liye Dua karke na batate to hum kiya maangte siwae is duniya ke adna aur arsi chezaeu ke

Allah taala jo karta hae wohi hamere liye sab se behter aur acha hae, insaan ko sabar se kaam lena chahye, yaqinan har mukhlis Mommin ki Dua Allah taala ke bargah mae maqbool hae

Dua ke Arkaan, Asbab, Bazu wa Awqat bhi hote hain

Arkaan e Dua woh huzoor e qalb yane dil ki puri tawajohi (concentration), khushu wa qusu ke saath ho

Uske Bazu (support) sidq wa sachai hae (honesty & truthfulness)

Aur uske Asbab woh Rasoolallah aur aapki Aal e pak per Durood wa Salaam bhejna

 اللهم صلي على محمد وعلى آله

Uske Awqat woh fajar ka waqt qabal e tulu hae (before sunrise)

Iske alawa Dua ke aur bhi sharaet wa lawazimat bayan kiye gae hain

Dua ache lahan mae aur sahi alfaz ke sath ho, aur Rab e Subhanahu ke bargaah mae ajisi wa inkesari ke izhar ke saath ho

Dua karne wala qibla rukh hokar baithe, aur apne dono haath Allah taala ki bargaah mae bulund kare,

Rasulullah ka qol hae keh jab banda apne dono haath Allah ke bargaah mae bulund karta hae to Rab e Subhanahu ko un haataun ko khali lotane ke liye sharam aati hae

Dono haataun ko chehre per masah karna sunnat e Rasoolallah hae

Allah taala ka irshad hae

    ادعوا ربكم تضرعا وخفية

Tum Allah taala ko tazaro zari aur maqfi tor per pukaro (in a soft tone, in seclusion with a sorrowful heart)

Irshad hae keh tum Allah taala ko inkesari ajisi aur apne aap ko uske muqabil zaleel karte huve pukaro

Bande momin ko chahye ke puri ajisi wa inkesari ke saath Dua mae puri tarah koshish kare, aur Dua karte waqt Allah taala se Dua ki qubuliat ki puri umeed rakhe, Aur Allah Tabaraka wa Taala ki Rehmat se kabhi mayus na ho, kiyunke woh jiski bargaah mae Dua kar raha hae, woh ek zaat e kareemana hae
 
Allah taala se multaji hun ke humko dua karne ke sahi tareeqe se waqif karae, takah hamari har Dua uski bargaah mae qubuliat ka darjah hasil kare

Aap sab se haqeer wa ahle khaandan ke liye Dua ke liye multaji hun

وآخر دعونا والحمدلله رب العالمين

💧💧💧💧💧💧💧💧

10/17/15, 6:57:18 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍃🌾🍃🌾🍃🌾🍃🌾

سلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم  

Ek roz qabal 14 Shabaan e kareem Hazrat Moulana Muqaddas Mohammed Hussain ibne Mulla Shamsuddin saheb ka youme wafat hae, aap 1360 Hijri qable namaz e Nisf e shabaan inteqal farmae

Aap be'inteha mutaqi aur parhezgaar the, aapka wara wa taqwa, zohod wa ibadat, Ilm wa amal bemisaal tha

Aapki paedaesh Satara Maharashtra ki thi, aapke walid wa dada Mulla Shamsuddin wa Mukaram Saadullah saheb mukhleseen e Dawat se the jinka zikar Duwat ke aksar musharafat mae milta hae,

Hazrat Moulana Mohammed Husain saheb, "Mulla saheb" se bahut ziyada maroof (known) mashur the, aap shru se hi taleem ki taraf bahut raqbat rakhte the, aapke walid ghreeb the, ghar mae light ka intezam bhi barabar nahi tha aap sadak ki roshni mae baith kar padhte the

Aapke zindagi ka kuch waqt Barode mae bhi guzra aur ziyada tar waqt Mumbai mae hi rahe

Taleem ke baad aap Anjuman E Islam High School mae ustad ki naukri karliye, school mae aapki ba wiqar shaqsiyat, aur aala kirdar ki wajeh se shagird to shagird, ustadaun yane teachers mae bhi aapki badi izzat aur hurmat thi

Aapki ahle baet se mohabbat ka ek bahut hi diljasp waqea hae keh aap ke ek shagird ne, jo aapke maslak (religious beliefs) ko jaanta tha ek kitab pesh ki jisme teeno Khalifa ki badi tareef thi aur Moulana Ali ki mazamat thi, woh ladka aap se kuch badtameezi bhi kiya, aap ne pehle usko samjhaye aur tambeeh ki, magar us bache ne aapse dobara badtameezi ki to aap uski woh kitaab narazgi mae phek di, woh ladka us zamane ke mashoor ahle baet ke dushman khandaan Qazi Kabiruddin ka fard tha, usne Hazrat qibla ke khilaf adalat mae case kardiya

Us waqt Hazrat Moulana Ziaali ibne Sheikh Ibrahim saheb muqaddas Bambai mae tashreef rakhte the, aap ne khetwadi ki khadeem masjid mae Jumua ki namaz ke baad Mohammed Hussain saheb ke liye dua karne ke liye farmaya, "ke Allah taala aapko court ki zillat se mahfuz rakhe"

Us waqt badiwale Vakil Janab Ameeruddin Tayabji saheb bhi masjid mae the unhune ne Hazrat ko itmenaan dilaya ke, mae khud court ki karwai karunga, magar Allah ka karna, jab aap court mae gaye to judge aapki buzrugiyat aur shaqsiyat ko dekhkar hi itna mutasir huva ke ussi waqt muqadame (case) ko kharij (dismiss) kardiya aur aapko puri izzat aur takreem ke saath wapas bhej diya

Syedna Dai Moulana Gulam Hussain saheb ne 5 ziqada 1355 mae aapko mansubiat se nawaza, aapko us roz chend ikhwan ke saamne ghar se dawat e shareef ke kamre mae bulaya, jab Syedna Dai ke saamne hazir huve to topi utarne kha aur apna Amama pehnaya aur Nas e Shareef haath mae dedi, jisme likha tha ke aapka wara wa taqwa, deen mae aapki khidmat aur koshish ne aapko is martabe Azeem tak phunchadiya Allah aapko, aur tammam momineen ko mubarak kare

Us waqt aapki umar shareef 87 saal thi aur Syedna Dai se aapka ek aaj saal ka faraq (difference) tha

Aapke Barode ke qiyam ke zamane mae aap fajar ki "Ratib" ke waqt al hadd ul fazil Musa bin Taj ki ziyarat ke liye roz jaate aur namaz khatam hone se pehle wapis bhi hojate, ek waqt aap wapis ho rahe the ke kisi ne aapke kandhe ko mara, aap palat kar dekhe koi nahi tha, aap kehte ki is waqae ke baad mujhe "jinnat" nazar aane lage, yeh aapki karamat thi ke yeh chezain aapko nazar aati

Aapki di huvi taweez aur duain bahut mujrab (effective) thi aur logoan ko bahut faida hota, aap ka Arabi khat (writing) bahut khubsurat tha aap ne bahut si dawat ki kitabain naqal (copy) ki hae, aapki jama karda duaon ka Sahifa bahut hi nayab hae, aapne bahut hi shaandar duaen muqtalif duwat ke sahifaun se jama ki hain,

Aapki roshan zameeri (far sightedness) ke bahut se waqaet hain, aap momineen ko bahut si batain hone se pehle agaah (warn) kardete, aur kai waqt aisi bataun ka inkeshaf (express) karte jo baad mae barabar hokar rahti

Aap ne itni badi umar mae bhi bahut khubi se Dawat ki zimedari uthayi, waaz wa nasihat karte rehte aur ilmi ifada hamesha jari rahta, logoan ki aur jamaat ki badi khidmat ki, aakhri waqt tak namaz ba jamaat se khiyam kiya

Aap 14 Shaban ke roz ache the, ghar mae kisi se kuch kaam ke liye kha, aur phir kha mae kal se takleef nahi donga aur aap ne khushi ka ishaar kiye aur hanse (laughed) bhi

Aap us roz 14 Shaban kareem 1360 Hijri dophar ka khana bhi nahi khaye, aur sogaye, teen baje ke khreeb aap is Dar e fani se Dar e baqa ki taraf kuch kiye (duniya se aakherat ki taraf inteqal kiye)

Aapka mansubiat ka dor 4 saal 8 mahine raha aapki umar inteqal per 92 saal thi,

Aapko Bambai ke kabrastan mae Syedna Dai Gulam Husain saheb ke basu dafan kiye gaye

aapki waise aulad bahut huvi magar sab hi aapki zindagi mae hi inteqal ki, sirf do betiyaan aapki hayat rahi

Allah taala ki rehmatain ho aapki khabar mubarak per aur aapke nazraat aur barkaat nazil ho hum sab per

kal ke "Dua" ke mazmun per bahut se log Dua ke mutaliq muqtalif sawalat kiye

10/17/15, 6:57:18 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
جمعة مبارك

Aaj 18 Shabaan e kareem, youm e wafat hae, ek Dai azeem Syedna wa Moulana Faiz e Ali bin Syedna Sulaiman bin Syedna Hasan bin Syedna Yusuf Qadasalahu arwahuma ka

Aapki paedaesh 12 Jamadil awal 1000 Hijri ko huvi aur aap ka inteqal 18 shabaan e kareem 1088 Hijri Ahmedabad mae huva

Aap Syedna Jaffar bin Syedna Sulaiman ke baad Dai huve aur aapka muddat e Infrad 38 saal 4 maah raha (Dai ki haisiyat se qiyam karna)

Aap ka naam,aapke walid Syedna Sulaiman saheb ne us waqt ke Imam Moulana Ali bin Ahmed ke naam ki munasebaat se Faiz Ali rakha, jiske adad 1000 hote hae yane numerological value hoti hae, jo aapka paedaesh ka saal bhi hae

Aapki shaqsiyat (personality) bahut hi shaandar thi isliye aksar kha gaya keh aap per woh ayat sadiq aati hae (stands true) jo Yusuf Nabi ke liye Zuleqa aur unke jama kiye huve saathi aurataun ne kha tha jisko Koran kehta hae

ما هذا بشرا أن هذا إلا ملك كريم

Ye to insaan nahi hae balke ek kareem farishta hain

Aap ka hulya (sketch) mubarak ke taluq se bayan kiya gaya hae ke aap darmiyani khad (medium height) ke the, duble (lean) the, bahut hi khubsurat gol chehra tha, badi badi surmayi (black) aankhein thi, lambi naak (nose) surq haunt (reddish lips) aur dant (teeths) anar dane ki tarah the, dadhi ghani thi, magar sar per baal na the, aapki shaqsiyat aisi thi ke hazaraun mae aap dikh kar aajate the, aur qaer log (non muslims) aapko kabhi mahatma kehdete, aur kabhi bhagwan ke avatar kehdete,

Aapki chal bahut tez thi, aapki qiza (diet) bahut sada thi, aam tor per aap khichdi khate aur roti bhi pasand karte, meetha pasand nahi tha, aur mewa (fruits) mae aapko mauz (banana) bahut ziyada pasand tha

Aap momineen per be inteha Shafiq the, hamesha ikhwan ki khidmat mae rahte, aap ghar se bahut kam baher nikalte aur nikle to Dawat ke kaam ke liye nikalte, ya phir marizaun ki ayadat (bimar ki misaaj pursi) ya ziyarat ke liye aksar jate

Aapka routine tha ke aap masjid, ya jahan bhi namaz padhte ek ghanta pehle aajate aur tilawat e koran ya tasbeeh wa duaon mae waqt guzarte, aur kehte ke namaz ka intezar karna bhi namaz hi hae, is masrufiat ke alawa jo bhi waqt aapko milta aap Kitabaun ki tasneef wa taleef (writing & compiling books) mae guzar dete

Aapka sab se bada maujisa (miracle) khain, ya karamat, woh aap ka apni zindagi mae 377 kitabain tasneef karna hae, yane (authored the books) jinme baaz kitabain itni zakhim (thick voluminous) hae ke 700 se 800 pages ki hain, aur aksar unme se aala haqaeq ke uloom mae hae, jo ek insaani fitri taqaze se bahut ziyada hae (much beyond a normal man's capacity) aur aap ne in kitabaun mae baaz aisi baataun ka inkeshaf (brought to light) kiya jo keh siwae Imam e zamane ke tayid (roohani help) ke na mumkin tha, aur woh bhi aise saqt wa dushwaar zamane mae jab ke, ek taraf dawoodi logoan ka satana tha to doosri taraf sunni moghul badshah Aurengzeb aapke peeche pada huva tha, aap aksar us zamane mae fakhirana darweshi libaas phen kar baher nikalte takeh log aapko na pehchane, aur aksar aap dushman ke khoof se kai kai roz tak ghar ke andar tehkhane (sort of bunker) mae rahte sirf raat ke waqt baher aate

Aap ki apne pehle ke Duwaat se aqeedat is khadar thi ke aap har kitaab ki ibteda mae, apne se pehle ke Duwaat yane aapke walid Syedna Sulaiman, aapke bhai Syedna Jaffar aur unke mustauda Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad jo aapke ek lehaz se walid bhi hote the (aapki waleda ne Syedna Sulaiman saheb ke inteqal ke baad Syedna Mohammed bin Fahad se nikah kiya tha) in teeno ka aap wasila hamesha lete, aur likhte ke mae ye Syedna Jaffar ki tayid se likh raha hun

Aapki kitab ki karamat haqeer ne bhi dekha hae, Waqae ye huva tha ke haqeer walid e muqaddus aur waleda ke saath plane se Karachi se Multan (jazeere Sindh) ja raha tha us waqt plane ka hydrolic system fail hogaya aur pilot ne crash landing ka announce kardiya tha,crash landing ke sarre intezamaat hochuke the, us waqt walid ke haath mae Syedna Ali saheb ki mashhoor haqaeq ki kitab "Shua ul Anwaar" thi, aap ne hum se farmaya ke koi fikar ki baat nahi, mere haath mae Syedna Ali saheb ke haath ki likhi kitab hae aur inshallah is Kitab ki barkat aur unke nazraat se hum mehfuz rahinge, us waqt aap ne haqeer ko Azaan dene kha aur "Ashab e khef" ke naam ko wird (tasbeeh) karne farmaya, aapke kehne ke mutabiq aisa hi huva aur Syedna Ali ka maujisa tha ke hum hifazat se land kiye, aur doosre roz tammam pakistan ke aakhbaraun mae (news papar) mae ye heading thi  

"Lahore se Multan jaane wala hawai jahaz moujisana tor per baj gaya", aur English news papar mae "A miraculous Landing" heading thi.

Aap ki awaaz bhi bahut achi thi aur Koran e kareem aap behtreen lahan mae padhte, ke sunne wala sunte hi rahjata, aur aapke Ilm ki ye kaifiyat thi ke ache se acha aalim aapke daleelaun ke saamne haar maanjata

Aap baher nikalte to itna ziyada khair khairat karte ke log hairat mae padh jate aur kehte ke aapke pas Ilme kimiya (alchemy) hae aur aap tambe ko chandi aur sona banate hain  

Aapke maajis (miracles) bhi be hisaab hain, ek waqt ek jyotishi aapko dekhkar, aapka haath dekhne ki khaesh ki, aap ne muskurakar haath de diya, jab usne aapka mubarak haath dekha to kha, "mae ne apni zindagi mae kabhi aisa haath nahi dekha ye to bhagwan ke avatar ka haath hae" foran haath ko chuma aur sajde tazime (bowed with respect) mae jhuk gaya.

Ek waqt, apne ek momin bhai ka Jawan ladka saqt bimar huva, woh khreeb ul maut tha, woh shaqs aapke pas bhaag kar aya aur apna Amama aur jalaya (saya) utarkar aapke khadmaun mae rakh diya,  khadam se lipat kar zor se kehne laga  

انت المحي وانت المميت
 
Aap hi marne wale hae, aur aap hi zindagi dene wale hain, to us waqt Syedna Ali ne kha ke tum
باذن الله

Ba izinillah kho, yane Allah ke hukum se zinda bhi karsakta hun aur maar bhi sakta hun, aur phir aap uske sirhane baith kar 4 ghante tak duain karte rahe, uske chand hi ghante baad woh bilkul sahet mand hogaya

Ek jumua ki majlis mae ek bhai jinka naam Lateef tha Aungh (drowsing) rahe the, aap ne unko farmaya ke ae Lateef, waqt ki qadar karo, ghaflat ki neend se be'dar hojao, kiya tum jante ho ke ainda jumua tak tum zinda rahoge, aur ittefaq dekhiye ke woh aadmi paanch roz baad achanak inteqal kiye

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum bhi apni ghaflat ki neend se bedar hojain, aur har aane wale din ko hamara aakhri din samjhe aur aakherat ke liye amal kare

🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿🌿

10/17/15, 6:57:18 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Aaj se taqreeben 29 saal qabal hamari Hyderabad ki Masjid ke saamne ke hisse ko tausi (extend) kiya gaya

Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb muqaddus ne pehli shabaan 1407 Hijri ko tausi shuda masjid ka iftetah farmaya tha

Nabi kareem ne sab se pehli Masjid jo tameer ki thi woh masjid e Quba thi, waqt e Hijrat Madine munawara se 3 miles baher ek choti si basti thi jisko "Aali" aur "Quba" kehte the, Rasul e maqbool is basti mae 14 roz guzare aur aap ne bezaat e khud ek choti si masjid ki bina (foundation)  dali aur aap ne uska naam masjid e "Quba" rakha

Nabi e kareem ka Qol hae, keh ek mommin ke liye Masjid se behter tafreeh ka koi muqam nahi, kaash ki hamari naqis (incomplete) aqal is baat ko samajh sakti, kiya masjid se ziyada hamare liye sukoon wa itmenan ka koi muqam hae ?
Ye baat wohi samajh sakta hae jo masjid mae namaz ka paband hae

Hamari ahle haq ki Hyderabad ki Masjid ka zikar karna hae, jiska mubarak naam "Muzzaffer ul Masajid" hae

Is Masjid ki buniyad (foundation) Moulana al Mansoob Ikram Ali bin Hasanali saheb ne rakha, aap Hindustan ki dawat e Hadiya ki tareeq mae sab se kam umar (youngest) mansub the, jo 26 saal ki kam umri mae is jaleel ul qadar mansab (position) per qaem huve (appointed)

Hazrat Moulana Ikram Ali Saheb ne 1259 Hijri mae taqriban 179 saal pehle yane angrazi hisaab 1840 AD mae, Masjid ko banaya aur "Muzaffar ul Masaajid" woh uska tariqi misra bhi hae, Allah tabaraka wa Taala aapko masjid ke qaem karna ajar e azeem ata kare,

Rasul e kareem ka qol bhi
 
من بني لله مسجدا ولو مثل مفحص قطاة بني الله بيتا في الجنة  

Jo shaqs Allah ke liye Masjid banaega agarche ke woh chudiya (bird) ke ghonsle (nest) ke jitni hi kiyu na ho, Allah taala uske liye jannat mae ghar banaega

Syedna wa Moulana Dai Gulam Husain Saheb muqaddus ne aapke dor e mubarak mae is Masjid ko dobara tameer (construct) karne ka hukum diya, aur Hazrat Almansub Moulana Ishak saheb ke haath per 1357 mae dobara Masjid banai gai, jisme ek upar ka manzela (first floor) aurataun ki Masjid ka bhi banaya gaya, jo ke pehle nahi tha,

Masjid ki tameer (construction) mae Hyderabad ke us waqt ke Prime Minister Mulla Sir Akbar Hayderi jo ikhwan e jamaat se the, deendar aalim aur buzrugaane deen se aqidat rakhne wale the unki bahut maddad rahi, aap ne Masjid ke liye kafi badi raqam (amount) hukumat e Nizam se manzoor (sanction) karwai

Masjid ka naqsha (plans) us zamane ke mashur architect Nawab Zain Yar Jung saheb ne banaya tha, aur structural plans Chief Engineer of Hyderabad state Janab Fayazuddin saheb ne diya tha, jinke naam se Hyderabad ki bahut si mashoor buildings hain.

"Muzaffar ul Masaajid"  ki jab pehli tausi wa tarmeem 1359 mae (expansion & renovation) huvi us waqt uske buniyaad (foundation) mae ye chezain rakhi gai thi

taweez

Hukumat e Nizam ke sikke (coins)

Us zamane ka Urdu akhbar  "Rahbar e Deccan"

Ek kagaz jis per likha tha
"Ye Masjid firqe ahle Haq ki hae "

Masjid ki doosri tarmeem wa tausi Hazrat Moulana Nasrallah saheb muqaddus ke dor mae 1391 Hijri 1970 AD mae huvi aur Masjid ke sidhi janib ek kaman (arch) ka isafa kiya gaya jis se Masjid ki capacity 150 mard aur 150 aurat se badhkar 200 mard wa 200 aurat hogai

Aakhri tarmeem aur tausi (renovation & expansion) Hazrat Almansub Moulana Ziaali saheb ke zamane mae huva jab ki Masjid ke saamne ka hisa isafa kiya gaya, pillars se Mahraab ki taraf ka area badhaya gaya aur side mae ek kaman ka bhi isafa kiya gaya jis se Masjid ki capacity badhkar 350 mard aur 350 auratain hogai aur jumla area 55 ft × 55 ft hogaya, yaane approximately 3000 Sq ft hogai jab ke 1359 hijri mae 950 Sq feet thi, aur 18 saal pehle 1391 mae uska area 1252 Sq feet tha

Kha jata hae ke Masjid ki zameen sab se pehle Moulana Almansub Hazrat Qassam Saheb muqaddas ki aulad, Mulla karamulla saheb se li gai thi Allah taala is baat ka unko aur unki aulad ko behtreen ajar de, aur Hazrat moulana Ziaali saheb ke waqt extension ke liye Janab Mukaram Marhum  Abdul Hameed saheb ke makan ko liya gaya, aur Janab Mulla Qassam saheb ne bhi apne makan ka kuch hissa masjid ke liye hadiya diya tha

Moulana Almansub Ikram Ali saheb ne jab Masjid tameer ki to do gol patther (round stones) per ye korani ayaat apne haath se likh kar lagai thi, aur har extension per usko waisa hi baqi rakha gaya aur aaj bhi woh  Mahrab ke dono janib (side) per lage huve hain

قل كل يعمل علي شاكلته

QUL KULU YAMALU ALA SHAKELATEHI

Ae Rasul aap keh dijiye, har shaqs apne niyat ke mutabiq se amal kar raha hae

Allah Subhanahu wa taala un tammam Manaseeb karaam ko Muqaddas kare aur unko unki khidmataun ka behtreen ajar ata kare aur humko hamari is Masjid mae ibadat karna ka ziyada se ziyada moqa ata kare takeh uski barkataun se faiz hasil karsake ...

.Ameen !

✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨

10/17/15, 6:57:18 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💢💢💢💢💢💢💢💢

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Jis kisi ne bhi apne tammam mamlaat ko Allah ke supurd kardiya, woh apni zindagi mae befikri ikhteyar karliya aur sukoon ki zindagi guzarega, ab usko ek hi fikar karna hae aur woh, Allah taala ke mamle mae karna hae

Rasulullah ka Qol e mubarak hae, ke Allah taala ne mujhe jo bhi diya, aur jo bhi mamla mujh se kiya usse mae khush aur mutmaen hun, Allah tabaraka wa taala mere saath pehle bhi acha hi kiya, jo Haq tha, aur sahi tha, aur ainda bhi woh acha hi karega, mujhe usper pura itmenaan aur bhrosa hae.

Moulana Ali kara'mallahu waj'hohu ne bhi apne ashar mae kiya hi behtreen baat farmae hae

رضيت بما قسم الله لي
وفوضت أمري الئ خالقي
كما احسن الله مما مضي
كذلك يحسن فيما بقي

Mae us baat per Razi raha jo Allah taala ne mere liye maqsum (fixed for me) kiya

Mae apne tammam mamlaat Allah taala ko supurd kardiya

Jis tarah Allah taala ne pehle bhi mere saath acha hi kiya

Ussi tarah woh ainda bhi mere saath acha hi karega

Allah taala ne bhi Koran e kareem mae, ek mommin jo aale Firoun (Pharaoh) se tha, unka qol bayan kiya aur unke liye farmaya

وافوض أمري الي الله أن الله بصير بالعباد فوقاه الله سيئات ما مكروا وحاق بآل فرعون سوء العذاب

Mae ne apne tammam mamlaat Allah taala ke تفويض supurd (entrusted) kardiya, Allah taala bandaun ke mamlaat per behtreen nigah rakhne wala hae, Allah taala ne usko, Firaun ki burai, aur jo unhune sazish aur makar kiya us'se mehfooz rakha, aur Allah taala ne Aale Phiraun (the people of Pharoah) ko saqt bure azaab mae mubtela kiya (daldiya)
 
tafweez  تفويض  mommin ki ek khaas sifat hae, yane mamle ko supurd karna, kisi ko entrust karna (Allah ke hawale karna) yeh 5 harfi lafz (5 lettered word) hae, aur har lafz ke peeche ek takid hae, ek hukum hae,

Lafz e TA ت woh ترك تدبير ka hae, duniya ke tammam mamlaat mae tadbeer ko tark kardena hae, aur sirf aakherat ka khyal karna (yane duniya ke mamlaat mae bhi deen wa aakherat ko nazar mae rakhkar karna, yaane shariat ke ahkamaat ka pura khyal rakhna, misaal ke tor per halal wa haram ka har kam mae khyal rakhna

Lafz e FA ف woh  فناء fana ka hae, Allah ke siwae har fikar ko, har khyal ko chod dena hae, khatam kardena hae

Lafz e WOV و  woh  وفاء العهد wafa e ahad ka hae, aur Allah taala se diya gaya waade ko sachane ka hae, ahad wa misaak ko pura karna hae

Lafz e YA ى woh ياس yaas ka hae, yaane na umeedi ka hae, yane tum apne nafs se mayus hojao, magar apne Allah per pura bhrosa aur aetemaad rakho

Aur lafz ZAAD ض woh ضمير zameer ka hae, ke Allah tabaraka wa Taala ke liye zameer ko pak aur saaf rakho, aur apni zaroorat ke liye ussi ki taraf rajau karo (look forward only to Allah)

Jis kisi ne bhi apne tammam mamlaat Allah taala ko supurd kardiya, woh yaqinan tammam aafaat wa baliyaat se saalim aur mehfuz rahega, aur uska har naya din acha hoga, aur har raat apne deen ki panah aur hifazat mae guzarega

اللهم يا ميسر كل عسير يا جابر كل كسير ويا مونس كل وحيد وياصاحب كل غريب يسر علينا كل عسير يامن العسير عليك يسير فإن تيسيرالعسيرعليك يسير

Ae woh (Allah) jo har mushkil ko asaan karne wala hae, har tute (broken) huve ko jodne wala, har ek, ke akele'pan mae unsat dene wala (companion in their loneliness), ae woh jo har ghreeb (jiska koi nahi, destitute) ka saheb hae, saathi hae, asaan kar hum per har mushkil ko, tujh per har mushkil ko asaan karna bahut hi asaan hae.

بحق سيدنا محمد وعلى آله الطيبين الطاهرين

💢💢💢💢💢💢💢💢

10/17/15, 6:57:18 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌾🍁🌾🍁🌾🍁🌾🍁

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته     🌿

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم      🌿

جمعة مبارك        🌿

Islamic history per yun to kitabain bahut likhi gayi hae,  Arabi Urdu aur uske alawa duniya ki sab hi zabaan mae,  magar ;

Hamare Dai ud Duwaat Syedna wa Moulana Qazi un Nauman ibne Mohammed, in awaam un- naas ki kitabaun ke taluq se likhte hae ke, awaam ke Sunni aqeede ke aur doosre bhi moreqeen (historians) ne Islam ki tariq (history) ko bilkul hi ghalat bayan kiya hae (had distorted the history)

Woh, na hi Rasulullah ke ajdad (ancestors) ko sahi muqam diye hae, aur na hi Aale paigambar (Aulad e Rasul, yane nasal e Fatema) ko unka sahi aur Aala muqam ata kiya.

Paigambar ke ajdad (ancestors), na sirf mommin the, balkeh bahut hi buzrug aur aala rutbe ke log the, balkeh woh Aima (Imams) the, aur woh sab hi, sahi deen per the, pakke muwaheed, Allah taala ki sahi towheed karne wale the

Jaisa ke awaam un-naas ka ghalat aqeeda hae, ke Rasulullah ke chacha Moulana Abi Talib ibne Abdul Mutalib, kafir the aur emaan nahi lae the, is aeteraz ko Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain saheb ne bahut hi shidat (forcefully) ke saath sabit kiya hae, ke Moulana Abi Talib, walid e Moulana Ali, na sirf mommin the, balkeh aapka bahut hi bada, buzrug aur aala rutba tha, balke woh bhi Imam hi the

Issi tarah woh awaam ke historians ne Aale Rasul, yane aulad e Fatemat us Zehra, wa itrat e Rasul, jinse Imamat ka silsila chala, jinki mohabbat aur waliyat ko Rasulullah ne "Rooh e walayat" qarar diya, unhi per zulum kiya, unke Haq ko chihna (snatched) aur aulad e Fatema Salawatullah Aleha ko Rasulullah ki aulad hi tasleem nahi karte, kehdiya ke Aal wa aulad bete se gini jati hae beti se nahi, woh aulad e Ali to zaroor hain, lekin aulad e Rasul nahi

Jo log ye baat kehta hae ke hasnain aulad e Rasul nahi woh to khud hi kafir hogae, kiyunke Koran khud kehta hae "Ae Rasul jo ye kehte hae ke aap ابتر "Abtar" hae woh khud hi abtar hain, yane dum Kate (without a tail, meaning without a progeny, descendent)

Rasulullah ka qol e mubarak hae

اني تارك فيكم الثقلين كتاب الله، وعترتي أهل بيتي أن تمسك بهما لن تضلو بعدي  

ke mae tum mae do bahut hi khimti (most valuable) chezain chod raha hun, ek woh Allah ki Kitab hae (Koran e kareem) aur doosra meri Itrat (ahel wa aulad) jab tak tum mere baad in dono se ju'de rahoge (stay connected) tum kabhi gumraah nahi honge

Aur us waqt aap ne ye bhi bataya, dono haath ki kalme ki ungli jodkar kha, ke ye dono is tarah saath jode rahinge, na ek doosre se aage hoga, aur na hi peeche, aur na hi ek doosre ka saath chodenge, yahan tak ke woh Qiyamat ke din Hauz e Kausar per mujh se aakar milenge, is Hadees ko to mita (erase) nahi sake, magar lafz e "Itrat" ko hi badal diye aur usko "Sunnat" e Rasul kardiya, ye unka buqs, kina, hasad aur ahle baet ki dushmani thi

Un mufasereen aur mauraqeen (koran ki tafseer bayan karne wale, aur tareeq e Islam bayan karne wale) ka kehna hae ki Rasul ke Aal wa aulad Moulatena Fatema Salamullah Aleha se nahi gini (consider) jasakti, kisi ke bhi descendents unke ladke, yane male child se hi tasleem kiye jaate hae,

 jabkeh ;

Koran se khud sabit hae
Hazrat e Maryam ke bete Essa alehe salaam ko aulad e Hazrat e Ibrahim alehe salaam mae shammil kiya gaya hae

Ye tammam duniya janti hae ke Janab e Ibrahim alehe salaam ke theek 2018 saal baad Ibrahim alehe salaam ki nasal ki ek ladki Jinka mubarak naam 'Maryam' tha unse 'Essa' alehe salaam paida huve, aur Koran ne Essa ko aulad e Ibrahim mae shammil kiya hae, jaisa ke farmaya

ووهبنا له إسحاق ويعقوب كلا هدينا ونوحا هدينا من قبل ومن ذريته داود وسليمان وايوب ويوسف  وموسى وهارون وكذلك نجزي المحسنين وزكريا ويحي وعيسى واليأس كل من الصالحين

Is ayaat mae tammam nasal e Ibrahim ke ambia wa saleheen ko shareek kiya hae, aur us'me Hazrat e Essa bhi shammil hae,

Jab ke do hazar saal baad 'Essa' farzand e 'Maryam' ko Allah taala ne aulad e Ibrahim mae shammil kiya to phir Rasulullah ki beti Fatema, jinke aur Rasul ke darmiyan koi faasla hi nahi tha, to phir Fatema ki aulad ko Rasulullah ki aulad mae kiyu nahi shummar kiya ja sakta

Awaam un'naas ki seerat ho ya tafseer ki kitabaun mae aise be'hisaab ghaltiyaan moujud hain,


humko chahiye ke hum pehle ahle Haq ki, ahle baet aur Duwaat se jo kitabain ayi hae unko padhe, takeh humko malum ho ke sahi kiya hae aur ghalat kiya

Aulia Allah ne bahut si Kitabain seerat mae likhi hae, Duwaat aur manaseeb ne bhi likha hae, hudood e kiraam ki Majalis, mazameen wa bayanaat bhi hae unko padhe,

Syedna Jaffar ne "Minhaj ud Deen" likha hae jo Roohani Alam se leker jismani aalam ke hudood yane Duwaat e Tayabi ki puri history likha hae, aur issi tarah, Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain saheb ne "Qutrun Nida" ek behtreen tariq likhi hae, aur aap'ne awaam ke bhi mashoor historians ke reference bhi diye hain, aur ye bhi bataya hae kaun kidhar ghalat hae, aur ye dono kitabain Mukaram Alamil Moulvi Ameeruddin saheb muqaddus ne Urdu tarjuma bhi kiya hae

History hamare deen aur aqeede ki buniyaad banti hae, Allah humko tawfeeq de ke hum hamari buniyaad ko sahi rakhe aur masboot banae  

Ameen !  🌿

🌾🍁🌾🍁🌾🍁🌾🍁

10/17/15, 6:57:18 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■

Salaam Alaikum !

Maah e Ramzan ul mubarak ki aamad aamad hae,

Imam Moulana Mohammed e Baqar salwatullah alehe farmate hain ke is maah ko sirf Ramazan nahi kehna chahye, balke is maah ko puri tazeem, takreem aur izzat dena hae, ya to shaher e Ramazan kho, ya Ramazan ul mubarak kho, ya phir Ramzan e shareef kehna chahye

Jab maah e mubarak khreeb ho to humko uska isteqbal karna hae, aur woh is Dua se hae

اللهم انه قد حضر شهر رمضان فإذا قد بلغتناه فاعنا عليه وتقبل منا

Ae Allah, shaher e Ramazan hazir hogaya hae, aur jab to usko hum tak pohuncha diya hae to maddad farma hamari is baat per ke hum uski puri izzat wa hurmat kare aur isteqbal kare

Is maah ki barkat ye hae ke is mahine mae jo koi bhi neki ka kaam karega uska sawab wa ajar ek FARZ ke ada karne ke barabar hae, aur jis ne ek Farz is mahine mae ada kiya uska sawab aur ajar usko 70 guna (times) ziyada milega

Ye Allah taala ka wada hae, aur Allah se badhkar wade ka sacha kaun hosakta hae

وهو أصدق القائلين

Kaun itna na'daan aur jahel hoga, jo aisa moqe ka faida nahi uthana chahega

Walid e muqaddus kehte the ke Iska, ek ek, lamha bahut hi khimti hae qadar karo guzra huva waqt kabhi wapas nahi aata

Hamara musha'heda (observation) hae ke, ek zamana tha naukri pesha log (salaried employees) apni salana chuti (annual leave) is maah mae hi lete the, takeh is mahine mae ibadat e ilmi wa amali ka pura faida utha sake

Hum ne ye bhi dekha hae ke koran e kareem ki tilawat itni kasrat si ki jati ke aksar log 3 se 5 Mukamil koran is maah mae khatam karlete ya shaed is se ziyada bhi padhte the, aur phir Iske saath tammam tatawaat ki namaze har raat padhte the, jo aaj shaed sirf Shab e Qadar mae hojati hain,

mae ne to baaz navjawanau ko, ye bhi kehte huve suna hae ke "hum ko to ilm bhi nahi tha ke ye namaze roz bhi padh sakte hae, hum ne to ye khyal kiya ke sirf Shab e Qadar mae hi padhi jati hain"

Kehte hain ke khadeem mae, ilm ke shoq ka ye aalam tha, ke Ramazan ul mubarak mae Hazrat Moulana Fathullah saheb ke pas raat "Nisf ul lail" ki namaz ke baad bhi sabaq hota the aur Alhamdulillah kafi log shareek bhi hote, Allah taala aapki khidmataun ka aapko behtreen ajar ata farmae

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de, hum ko ibrat lena hae, un muqadduseen wa marhumeen se jo us mushkil, tangi, aur takleef ke zamana mae bhi aisi ilmi aur amali ibadat se qiyam kiye karte the

Yaqinan aur yaqinan woh humse bahut ziyada aqalmand, samajhdar aur hoshyaar log the, jo sahi man'nau mae fani chez ko chodhkar baqi ko hasil karliye

Allah taala hamare buzrugane deen ko aur tammam momineen ko sahet wa aafiyat se rakhe takeh hum in tammam faraez e deen ko is maah e mubarak mae puri tarah anjaam de sake

وآخر دعونا والحمدلله رب العالمين والصلاة والسلام على رسوله الكريم وعلي أله ألطيبين الطاهرين وسلم عليهم أجمعين

■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■

10/17/15, 6:57:18 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💦💦💦💦💦💦💦💦

سلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

رمضان المبارك کی آمد آپ سب کو بہت مبارک ہو


Allah Taala ne hum per yeh maah mubarak warid (bestowed) kiya hae, Allah ka lakh, lakh, ahsaan hae, ke humko aur ek moqa hamare gunahaun se maqferat talab karna ka mila hae

Maah e Ramazan ul mubarak badi fazilat aur saadat liya huva hae, issi maah mae Koran e Majid nazil huva hae,

Allah Taala is maah e mubarak mae bandaun ki taraf nazre karam se dekhta hae, toba ko qabool karta hae aur maqferat farmata hae

Is mahine ke Roze jahanam ki aag se bachane wali dhal (shield) hae

Is mahine mae Namaz e faraez wa tatawaat se qiyam karne ka bada sawab hae, Namaz Allah taala se sab se ziyada khreeb karne wali chez woh namaz hi hae

Issi maah mae, Allah taala bandaun ki roziyaan (risq) taqseem farmata hae,
Is maah e mubarak mae Allah taala ki khidmat mae ek wafd (delegation) hazir hota hae (Haj ka khafila Allah ke pas likha jata hae)

Is mahine ki ibadat e Ilmi wa Amali har mommin ke Nafs mae umda (excellent) fazilat paida karti hae, aur hamare Nafs ko sab se ziyada faida issi maah ki tammam ibadataun se milta hae

Is mahine ke wajebaat Namaz Roza Zakaat ko puri tarah ada karne wale ko Allah taala ki qurbat (closeness) hasil hogi, aur agar insaan is mahine ke baad mae nifil ke shawal ke 6 roze bhi rakhe, to woh uske Nafs ki najat ke liye behtreen maddad gar sabit honge

Roze ke be hisaab faide hain;

Sab se pehla to tu Allah taala ka ek bada fariza ada hota hae

Allah taala ki qurbat hasil (nearness) hoti hae

Haraam kamau ke irtekab (involvement) se bacthe hain, aur us'se hamara Nafs afeef (pak saaf, pure) banta hae, haram kamaun se humko mehfooz kardeta hae (it protects us from all vices)

Insaan Roza rakhne se jhut, khiyanat, lalaj, aur uske jaise tammam bure aur khrab kamau se rukta hae, aur usme achi qaslat (habits) aur ache aqlaq paida hote hain

Is maah mae humko hamare Aulia Allah, Hudood kiraam aur Aima salwatullah alehe ki marefat naseeb hoti hae

Jo is mubarak maah ke Roze rakha, aur tammam Ibadat se qiyam kiya to Allah taala usko fitnaun se amaan dega aur balaun se najat dega

Moulana Hasan Al Hakim Be'Amrillah salawatullah alehe farmate hain

"Tum is mahina mae apne Nafus (nafsani khaeshat) se jahad karo, is mahine mae Allah ki taraf se rozi taqseem ki jati hae, aur maut bhi issi mahine muqarar ki jati hae, is mahine mae Allah ki taraf jane wala ek wafd (delegation) muqrar kiya jata hae, jo Allah ki qidmat mae hazir hoga" (Haj ka khafila)

Aur issi maah e mubarak mae, woh mubarak tareen raat bhi hae ليلةالقدر jis per amal karna hazar mahinaun mae amal karne se behter hae

Allah taala ka bada ahsaan wa karam hae ke, jisne bhi is ek mahine mae koi bhi neki ya khair ka kaam kiya to usko itna hi sawab milega jitna ke usko doosre mahine mae faraez ke ada karne se milta hae

Aur Ramazan ke mahine mae jisne ek farz ada kiya to usko doosre mahine ke faraez ada karne ke muqabale 70 gunah ziyada sawab hasil hoga

Allah taala hamari maddad farma ke hum is mubarak maah ka, kama haqa (what this month deserves) pura Haq ada karsakein, apne aaza (limbs) ko gunahaun se rokkar, unko Allah taala ki ibadat mae istemal karein jo uski khushnudi (acceptance) ka baas bane

وأعني علي وفاءها وتمامهابكف الجوارح عن معصيك واستعمالها في عبادتك وما يرضيك يآارحم الراحمين

Allah taala maddad farma hamari, uske tammam ibadaat ko puri tarah ada karne per, hamare tamman aaza ko gunahun se mehfooz rakhkar, un aaza ko teri ibadat mae istemal karke jis'se to Razi rahe, Ae " Ar'hamar Rahemeen !"

💦💦💦💦💦💦💦💦

10/17/15, 6:57:19 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
 
جمعة مبارك   🌹


Allah taala ne Ramazan e shareef ko sabar ka mahina banaya hae aur sabar ka ajar woh jannat hae

Yeh hamdardi, khlus wa mohabbat wa bhai'chargi ka mahina hae

Is maah e mubarak mae har mommin ki rozi mae isafa kiya jata hae

Is mahine mae Rozedar ko iftar karane ka bada hi sawab hae, uske gunaah maaf honge aur jahannam ki aag se azad kiya jaega aur Rozedar ke ajar mae bhi koi kami nahi ki jaegi

Har shaqs apni taqat ke hisaab se iftar karae agar ek ghunt doodh aur ek khajoor hi kiyu na ho aise shaqs ko Allah taala jannat ke houz se aisa sharbat pilaega ke woh phir kabhi piyasa na hoga

Ramazan e mubarak ka pehla hissa woh REHMAT hae, darmiyani (middle) hissa, woh MAQFERAT hae aur aakhri hissa "ITQE MIN NAR NAAR" dozaq ki aag se azaadi hae

Insaan ko chahye ke apne khadim, naukar, gulam se is mahine mae kaam kam le, jo aisa karega Allah taala usko maaf karega aur jahannam se azad karaega

Is mahina ki char qaslatain hae, do se tum apne Allah ko razi karoge aur do tum chod nahi sakte, do jis se Allah taala tum se razi hoga woh kalema shahadat
                 لااله إلا الله
ka padhna aur doosra Allah taala se isteqfar ka talab karna hae

Do batain tum nazar andaz nahi karsakte (cannot do without) woh tumhara jannat ka sawal karna hae aur jahannam se bachne ki ilteja karna, aur yehi Hamari Shehrullah Ramazan ki tasbeeh hae

لااله إلاالله أستغفر الله اللهم إني أسألك الجنة واعوذبك من النار

Hum kaleme shahadat padhkar Allah taala ki toheed karte hain, phir isteqfar yane maafi talab karte hain, aur Dua maangte hae "Ae Allah hum tujh se sawal karte hain jannat ka aur panah maangte hae jahannam se"     
Jis shaqs ke shaher e Ramazan mae gunaah maaf na huve, to ab uske ainda saal Ramazan tak maaf hona ka imkan nahi, siwae iske ke woh Haj per jae aur Arafat per jaane ka moqa mi'le

Rasul e khuda ne farmaya ke har chez ki zakat hae aur badan ki zakat woh Roza rakhna hae

Moulana Ali salwatullah alehe ne farmaya ke saat 7 chezain aamal ko aage badhane wali hain tum usse hamesha wabasta (connected) raho

1) Kalme shahadat
لااله الا الله محمد رسول الله
   Ka padhte rahna

2)  Ahle baet e Rasul se mohabbat karna

3) garmiyuan ke dinaun mae Roze rakhna

4) saqt sardi mae kamil wazu karna

5) panch waqt namaz ki pabandi karna (Masjid aur imamat ke sawab ko bhi hasil karna)

6) Baitullah al haram ka Haj karna

7) Allah ki raah mae jahad karna

Rasulullah ne janab Asama bin Zaid ko nasihat farmate huve kha "tum Jannat ka raasta ikhteyar karo aur idhar udhar mat hato" Asama ne arz kiya ke ye jannat ka raasta kaise tae (cover) kiya jae ?

Rasulullah ne farmaya uska asan tariqa ye hae, keh garmi ke dinaun mae piyasa rahna, yane Roza rakhna, aur apne Nafs ko duniya ki lazataun se dur rakhna, Ae Osama, Roza rakhna jahannam se bachane wali dhal (shield) hae

Allah taala ka bada ahsaan hae keh hamare gunahun ki maqferat ke liye itne asbab aur zareeyeh Allah taala ne  banaye hae aur itni sahulat ata farmai

Sirf Rozedar ko hi sawab ka musthaq (deserving) nahi qarar diya, balkeh rozedar ko iftar karane wale ko bhi uske sawab mae shareek kiya, baqaer (without) Rozedar ke ajar ma koi kami kiye

Allah taala ka shukur aur ahsaan hae ke usne hamare liye Ramazan e kareem ka mahina banaya hae, aur usme Rozaun ko rakha jis'se hamare Nafs wa jism ki safai hae, Ae Allah tabaraka wa Taala humko rozaun ke liye maddad farma, ke hum apne tammam azaa (limbs & organs) ko gunahun se bach'ain aur un azaa ko sirf teri khushi mae kaam mae lae

Hum apne kanaun (ears) se koi laqo (useless) behuda aur bekaar baat na sune, aankhun (eyes) se koi buri aur haram chez na dekhein, roki (stopped) huvi haram chez ki taraf haath na badhaein, aur koi buri jagaah khadam na uthain, jis'se hum ko Allah Rasul aur shariat ne manna kiya huva hae, aur hamara kalaam sirf teri farmabardari aur taat mae hi ho

Hamare tamman aamal mae, na riyakari ho, na dikhawa ho, na shohrat (popularity) ki qarz ho, balkeh sirf aur sirf Allah taala ki khushi, razamandi aur uski taraf irada ho,

Ae Allah Humko taqat aur himmat de ke hum is mahine ko, teri ibadat se bhar'dain, uske awqat ko teri hi farmabardari aur taat mae besar (spend) kardain, din mae Roza rakhne ki taqat de aur raat mae ibadat ki, aur teri bargaah mae ajizi, aah wa zari, khushu wa khuzu ke saath pura karein

Ae Allah mujhe, susti, kaheli, ghaflat, bezaargi, aur uske jaise tammam bataun se mehfooz rakh, takeh mae puri khushdili aur itmenan se teri ibadat karsaku   

اللهم ارزقني قيام ليلها وصيام نهارها صبرا وإيمانا واحتسابا واجعل ثوابي علي ذلك الجنة  

🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳

10/17/15, 6:57:19 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ⚫🔴🔵⚫🔴🔵⚫🔴🔵

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

الله تعالی آپکو شہراللہ کی برکتوں سے نوازے

Kehte hae ke neend suli (gallows) per bhi ajati hae, neend ko Rasulullah ne maut ki bhen kha hae, neend woh maut hae, jis'se be'daar hone ki umeed rahti hae, jab ke maut woh hamesha ki abadi neend hae, Isiliye koi bhi Insaan apne aap ko na chahte huve bhi maut ke hawale kar hi deta hae

Shaher e Ramazan ul mubarak mae jo hamari sab se ziyada mutasir hone wali chez hae, woh neend hi hae,  raat, din ho jati hae, be waqt sona aur jaagna hota hae, mukhtasar mukhtasar (small durations) tukdaun mae neend ka lena hota hae

Raat mae jaag kar ibadat ke liye Rasul e Khuda ka ek qol hae, baad Salaat al Isha, raat ke khane ke baad, kuch hissa sokar (sleep) phir uske baad uthkar ibadat karna, woh bahut afzal aur aala hae, banisbat musalsil jaagne ke, jo keh niya'hat hi mushkil kaam hae

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain keh tum معتبرين yane hoshyaar wa ba'hosh (alert) rakhne wali neend lo, غافلين gafeleen ki tarah na so (sleep), jaisa ke log be'sudh be hiss, deen wa duniya ki parwah kiye baqaer neend lete hae

Yaqeen, wa marefat ke saath sona, halat e shak mae namaz padhne se bahut behter hae, afzal hae

Insaan ko apni jismani thakan utarne ke liye sona chahye, duniya se ghafil, susti wa kaheli ki wajeh se, ghafil aur beniyaz nahi sona chahye

Rasul e Khuda ka irshad hae ke meri aankh soti hae, Dil nahi sota

Imam farmate hae ke tum apni neend se, tumhare nigehbaan "Malaeka" jo tumhare amaal (deeds) ka hisaab rakhte hain, unke bojh (work) ko halka karte ho, kiyunke tum neend ki halat mae apne nafs ko shehwataun se bacha lete ho, tum neend ki wajeh se gunaah se bach jate ho, is tarah un farishtaun ka kaam bhi halka hota hae

Imam farmate hain ke neend bahut behter hae ke tum jaag kar burayaun mae, ghalat aur haram kaam mae padh jao, aap kehte hae ke tum zabaan ko bura bolne se rok sakte ho, haath pau ko bhi khabu mae rakh sakte ho, magar kiya tum kaan (ears) ko burai sunne se rok sakte ho, is lihaz se neend behter hae

Moulana Ali salwatullah alehe kiya khoob farmate hain, ke neend kitni buri chez hae, jo choti si Khaleel (limited) zindagi ko aur kam (reduce) kardeti hae, aur saath mae ek bahut bade ajar aur sawab ko bhi khatam kardeti hae [yane neend na lekar jaag kar Allah ki ibadat karke, bahut bada ajar aur sawab hasil karsakte the]

Imam farmate hain ke tum neend se is baat ko jano, ke tum apni kisi baat per bhi qudrat nahi rakhte, na harkat per, aur na sukoon per, tum aajis ho, zaeef ho, sirf Allah taala ka hukum aur uski taqdeer hi tum per chalti hae

Tum neend se maut per daleel lo, aur ghaflat se be'daar hojao ke ek din woh ghaflat ki neend (maut) bhi tum per warid hokar rahegi

Jo bhi Insaan apne faraez, sunnat aur nawafil ke ada kiya baqaer so gaya, woh ghafeleen ki neend liya woh bade nuqsaan mae raha

Aur jisne bhi apne faraez sunnatain aur wajebaat ko ada karke soya woh neend uski achi neend hae, Mehmood neend hae,

Imam farmate hae ke bahut kam log hain aaj ke zamane mae jo Mehmood (pasandida) neend leta hain, yane apne tammam mamlaat, faraez waqaera ko puri tarah ada karke neend lete ho

Aur jo shaqs deen ki, apne faraez wa wajebaat ki, parwah nahi karta, uske liye to, uski neend hi behter hae, is lihaz se ke woh neend mae, woh gunaah se to bach jaega jo woh jaagte huve be'dari mae kar guzarta (would have indulged in the vices, if he was awake)

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain ke ziyada neend ziyada pene (drinking excess liquids) se paida hoti hae, aur ziyada piyas ziyada khane se hoti hae, aur ziyada khana aur pina Nafs ko Allah ki taat se dur kardeta hae, aur shehwat (forbidden desires) ki taraf lejata hae, dil ko saqt banata, fikar aur soch ko khrab karta hae, aur insaan ko khushu aur khuzu se dur kardeta hae

Tum apni har neend ko apni aakhri neend khyal karo, tum Allah taala ka zikar ziyada se ziyada karo, apni Zabaan se aur apne Dil se bhi

Jab tum apni neend se hoshyaar hote ho to shaitaan tum se kehta hae ke "arre, abhi tum sote raho (keep sleeping), abhi raat bahut lambi hae, bahut baki hae" is se uska maqsad sirf ek hi hae, ke tum ko woh استغفار بالاسحار yane fajar aur fajar se pehle ibadat karne, Dua maangne, Allah ki bargaah mae munajaat karne se rokna hae, jiske liye Allah se darne wale, khoof e khuda rakhne wale, bande shoq karte hain

Rasul e khuda ka qol hae ke rozedar ki neend bhi ibadat hae, is baat mae ek bareek nukta (point) hae, aur woh ye hae, ki Roza din mae kiya jata hae, raat ko to jaag kar Allah taala ki ibadat karna hae tatawaat se qiyam karna hae

Rasul e khuda ka ye qol ki meri aankh soti hae Dil hamesha jaagta hae usper yaad aya, ke walid Hazrat muqaddus farmate the keh;

Hazrat Ishak Saheb jab bhi neend lete aur kehte ke mae 15 minute mae, ya 20 minute, neend lekar uthta hun, to aap hamesha bilkul sahi us waqt per bedaar hojate, aur raat ki neend ka bhi yehi aalam tha, ke aap barabar jo waqt kehta wohi waqt hoshyaar hojate, aur aapke inteqal per bhi, aapko 'brain heamoraege" huva tha, unconscious the, hoshyaar hone ki, bedaar hone ki, doctor ke nasdik koi umeed aur imkaan na tha, magar jab Hazrat Ziaali saheb bambai se ae, aur aapko awaaz diye aap hoshyaar huve, sab ahle khaandan se mile, baat bhi kiye, wasiyat kiye aur ikhwan se Khudahafizi kiye

Ye kaifiyat to hamare Duwaat wa Manasib ki hae, Aima, ambia, Aulia Allah ki kaifiyat kiya hogi us ka andaza hum nahi karsakte, ye woh log hae jiske khabse (control) mae maut hoti hae.

Humko in bataun ko samajhne ke liye hamari ghaflat wa jahalat ki neend se bedaar hona hoga, hoshyaar hona hoga, aur is maah e mubarak se behter aur badhkar aur kaunsa moqa hosakta hae, Allah hum sab ko tawfeeq de ke hum neend bhi waise le jo Allah, Rasul aur Aulia Allah ne humko bataya hae

Inshallah, neend ka zikar aur bhi hae.........

⚫🔴🔵⚫🔴🔵⚫🔴🔵

10/17/15, 6:57:19 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Hakim e ummat Rasulullah ne kiya hi hikimana qol neend ke liye kha hae

Meri aankhein soti hae magar dil jaagta hae, aur aaj science bhi yehi kehti hae ke Dil wa Dimaag neend mae bhi chalte hae,

Rasulullah farmate hae ke neend bhi saat kisim ki hae

1] Ghaflat ki neend, woh neend jo koi shaqs, jhan Allah Rasul ka zikar ho raha ho, Ilm wa Hikmat ka bayan ho raha ho us majlis mae ghafil so jata hae
 
 2] naum us shaqawat نوم الشاوة woh saqt dili ki neend hae jo insaan Namaz ke waqt, Allah taala ki ibadat ke waqt mae lete hae

3] naum ul laanat نوم اللعنت jo subah Fajar suraj nikalne ke baad sota hae, unper Allah taala ki laanat hae.

4] naum ul uqubat نوم العقوبة yane Fajar ki Namaz ke waqt per sote rahna, woh saza aur azaab ka mustahaq hae, (deserves severe punishment)

5] naum ul rahat نوم الراحت waqt e Qailula ke, yane dopher ke khane ke baad chand minute ke liye sona (short nap after lunch)

6] Naum ul ruqsat (permitted) نوم الرخصت yane us waqt sone ki ijazat hae, aur woh namaz e Esha ke baad ka waqt hae

Aur aakhri kisim hae

7] naum ul hasrat نوم الحسرة yane khaesh ko puri karne ki, umeed ki neend, miya wa biwi ke qurbat (closeness) ki khaesh, jiske liye jumua ki raat tarqeeb (preferred) dilai gai hae

Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain saheb ne panch kisim ke sone se manna farmate hae

* Suraj ke nikalne ke baad

* bilkul maghrib se pehle

* adhe dhup aur adhe chaun mae (half sunlight half shadow)  

* Namaz e Esha se pehle

* kisi darwaze ki chaukhat (threshold) per

Syedna Dai ne kiya hi Hikmat ki batain neend ke taluq se chahel sabaq mae farmai hae,

Ziyada khana aur pina neend ka ziyadati ka sabab banti hae, aur neend ki ziyadati insaan ko sust aur zahen ko khrab karti hae

Insaan jab bister per sone ke liye lete (lie down) to apne tammam din ke kaam aur ahwaal per qor kar'le, jo kaam usne Allah ki na khushi mae kiye, ya insaani aqlaq wa adaat ke khilaf kiye hain, usse toba kare, isteqfar kare

Insaan ko sote waqt miswaak (tooth brush) karna chahye, aur wazu karke sona chahye is baat ke be hisaab fawaed (benifits) bayan kiye gae hain

Hukoma wa atiba (philosophers & doctors) ne ye bhi kha hae ke insaan ko suraj nikalne se, kam se kam do ghante pehle uthna chahye, aur yehi fitrat hae, yehi baat natural hae, isiliye tammam parinde, wa haiwaan us waqt hi bedaar (rise) hote hae, isi baat ki pabandi na karne se hum khrab asraat hamari jismani sahet per, aur zaheni fikar mae, pareshaniun ki haisiyat se dekhte hae

Allah, Rasul wa Aulia Allah ne bahut hi tafzeel se neend ke taluq se ahkamaat, adaab tor tariqe bayan farmadiye hain

Aaj science bhi apni jagaah per research kar rahi hae, polysomnography (study of sleep & it's disoders) aur EEG electoencephalography study of brain waves during sleep, agar aap in tammam science ke results dekhe, to woh bhi ussi natije per aaj pohunch rahi hae jo Rasulullah ne 1400 so saal pehle khe chuke hae

Science apne experiments or observation se neend ko samajh rahi hae, jo kabhi conclusive nahi honge kiyunke woh sirf physical activity ko study karsakte hae, roohaniyat, aur nafsaniyat ka tasawur hi nahi hae aur na malumat hae, na science usko samajh sakti hae

Hamare uloom dono ko cover karte hae, woh uloom Khaliq e Kaenat (creator of universes) ke pas se wahi ke zareeyeh hasil huve hae, woh final hae, us'me koi shak wa shubhe, ya ghalat hone ka imkan wa gunjaesh hi nahi.

Moulana Ali ne apne khutbaat mae, hamare Nafs ke saath neend mae kiya mamlaat guzarte hain, usko bayan farmaya hae aur Duwaat ne uski bahut tafseel bayan ki hae,

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum us neend wa bedaari ke ahkamaat per amal kare, jisse hamari neend bhi ibadat ka darjah hasil karle

⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

10/17/15, 6:57:19 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍂🍃🍂🍃🍂🍃🍂🍃

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
جمعة مبارك

قال الله تبازك و تعالى في كتابه العزيز الحكيم
 
Allah taala Koran e Majeed mae irshad farmaya

وان الساعة آتية ﻻريب فيها وان الله يبعث من في القبور

Tahqeeq keh Qiyamat aane wali hae, is baat mae koi shak nahi, aur Allah taala, unko, jo khabraun mae hae yaqinan uthaega

Aur Nabi e kareem ka irshad e mubarak hae ke

كل ما هوآت قريب

Har aane wali chez khreeb hae, aur har aane wali chez mae Qiyamat bhi shamil hae, to Nabi e Kareem ke irshad ke mutabiq Qiyamat bhi khreeb hae.

Nabi e kareem ko ye baat kehe 1400 saal se ziyada guzar gaye, magar Qiyamat aati nahi, asal baat ye hae ke hum apni umar ke lihaz se waqt aur mudat ka khyal karte hain, magar Allah ke pas ki muddataun ka hum hisaab nahi kar sakte, duniya ki umar aur usper guzarte huve zamane (periods) lakhun croroe saal ke hae, us hisaab se chand sau saal idhar udhar bahut kam muddat hae, balke fractions hain

Aaj puri duniya cheekh uthi hae, ke woh Qiyamat ka waqt kab aega, puri duniya baechain hae, aur tadap rahi hae, Allah taala farmata hae

ان الله عنده علم الساعة

Beshak Qiyamat ka ilm Allah hi ko hae, aur bahut se jagaah Allah taala ne rasekhuna fil ilm (who has indepth knowledge)

الراسخون فى العلم

Rasekhuna fil ilm ko bhi Allah ke saath jod diya hae

Nabi e kareem ka ye bhi irshad e mubarak hae

 اقتربت الساعة ولا يزداد الناس علي الدنيا الا حرصا ولا يزداد عنهم الا بعدا  

Qiyamat khreeb aa'chuki hae, aur logoan ki hirs wa lalaj duniya ke liye badhti hi ja rahi hae, aur jitni duniya ki lalaj badh rahi hae, utni hi duniya un se dur (away from reach) hote ja rahi hae,

Aaj hum sab dekh rahe hae ke duniya ki talab jitni badhte ja rahi hae utni hi duniya unse dur hote ja rahi hae

Aur phir Nabi e kareem ka irshad hae, jab Qiyamat khreeb hogi

       ولا يزدتد الا شدةولا الدنيا الا ادبارا ولا الناس الا شحا

Jitna log apne mamlaat mae shidat ikhteyaar karenge utna hi unke kirdar aur aqlaq (character & manners) mae pasti (downfall) aur buqul aur kanjusi badhte jaegi, aur aaj mamlaat apni shidat per pohuch gaye hae, extremes per pohuch gaye hai, chahe woh duniya ke mulkaun ke ho, ya phir apas ke bhai bhen, miya biwi, ya aulad ke ho

Aur ye duniya ki pasti (downward trend) aqlaqi pasti, hirs, lalaj, aur nafsa nafsi (self centeredness) ki wajeh se, kanjusi, bukhul (greed & selfishness) aam hochuke hain

Aaj hum pereshaan kun halaat, (extemely disturbed conditions) takaleef, aafatain, aur pareshaniya dekhte hain to foran kehte hain, ke yeh Qiyamat ke a'saar (signs) aur nishaniya hain, aur is baat mae koi shak nahi ke bahut hadd tak sachai hae, magar haqeeqat mae in a'saar aur nishaniyun ko Nabi kareem ne bahut pehle hi b'ta chuke hain, aapka ek irshad hae

    اول ما يرفع من هذا الامة الحياء
والامانة

Sab se pehli chez jo is ummat e Mohammedi se ja'egi woh 'sharm' wa 'haya' aur 'amanat dari' hae (purdah modesty), aur sharm wa haya ka direct taluq woh aurataun se hi hae, aur aaj be'hayai aur be'sharmi aam baat hae, aur amanat dari, aap sab jaante hi hain ki kitni baqi rahgai hae, aur jis tarah Nabi e kareem ne pehli chez jo Qiyamat ke khreeb khatam hojaegi kha, woh haya wa amanatdari hae,

 aap hi ka ek aur irshad hae

 وآخر ما تفقدون من دينكم الصلوة

Aur sab se aakhir mae jo tum apne deen se kho doge woh Namaz hae, kiya ye Ahadees aaj hi ke zamama ke misdaq nahi (suits today's time)

Aaj puri duniya, har mazhab, har qom, Qiyamat ka, ek hisaab ke din ka, intezar kar rahi hae, aaj ki thaki hari, pereshan, takaleef mae ghri ye duniya us tasavur se, us Qiyamat ke intezar se, sukoon hasil karti hae, aaj ke insaan ki bechaini, pereshani, be itmenani, alfaz nahi keh uska izhaar karsake, chand hi lamhe mae ghreeb amir hojata hain aur ameer ghreeb, chand hi lamhe mae baadshahat khatam hojati hae hukumatain badal jati hae, kiya kisi aur zamane mae kabhi itni tezi se, itni tabdiliyaun (changes) hote kisi ne dekha hae, insaani aqal hairan hae

Aur Nabi kareem ne farmaya ke, agar logoan per bura zamana aya to ye na samjhna ke yeh bahut bura waqt hae, balkeh har aane wala zamana aur ziyada bura hoga, aur jaisa keh ahadees aur Aulia Allah ke aqwal mae aya hae, jo Qiyamat ki nishaniyaun bayan ki gai hae, aurtaun ki mardaun per kasrat, barish mae garmi, garmi mae barish, mausam ki bade paimane per tabdili, bachau ka ma baap ke liye baas e ranj wa ghum hona, kamine aur khrab log, nek logoan ke kaam karna, mard aur aurat apne hum jins (same sex) se jinsi (sexual) taluq rakhna, zalzale toofan sailab, waqera waqera....

Jis chez ka intezar ziyada hota hae uska zikar bhi ziyada hota hae, Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib farmate hain

اكثروا ذكرالموت ويوم خروجكم من قبوركم

Tum apne maut ka zikar ziyada karo aur apne khabraun se uthae jane ke din ko bhi ziyada yaad karo, yane Qiyamat ke din ko bhi ziyada yaad karo

Allah taala hum momineen ko in Qiyamat ke aafataun se, balaun se, Aulia Allah ke wasile se mahfooz rakhe

  لا حول ولا قوة الا بالله العلي العظيم
 
°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°
Ye mazmoon Hazrat moulana Ziaali saheb muqaddus ne aaj se 60 saal pehle "Zia ul Emaan" ke parche (magazine) ke liye  "Asaar E Qiyamat"
Signs of Qiyamat ke unwaan (heading) se likha tha, usko mukhtasar aur asaan karke likha hun

Allah Taala aap ke Nazrat hum per jari rakhe,

Ameen !
 
°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°

🍁🌿🍁🌿🍁🌿🍁🌿

10/17/15, 6:57:19 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●●
Salaam Alaikum!

Allah ka Ahsaan hae ke shehrullah ka pehla Dahika (10 days) mukamil huve
 
Aaj 11 Shehrullah youme wafat hae 'Fateh Uloom' Hazrat Moulana almansub Fathullah saheb ibne al mansub ul kareem Moulana Farhat Ali saheb muqaddus ka

Aapki paedaesh 3 shabaan e kareem 1281 hijri Barode mae huvi, aap apne buzrug bhai Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain saheb muqaddas se umar mae 10 saal chote the
