Rajab ul Murajab ke maane hi taazim (given respect) diye gaye ke hae, jiski izzat aur hurmat humko hamari ibadataun se karna hae

Ye kamil 30 din ka mahina hae naqis 29 ka nahi, Islami mahinaun mae jo 30 din ka hota hae usse kamil (complete) kehte hain aur jo 29 din ka hota hae usko naqis kehte hain (incomplete)

Yeh char hurrum ke mahinaun mae ek hae, Rajab ul haram, Ziqadatul haram, Zilhaj'jatul haram aur Moharrum ul haram, aur in mea Rajab ki infradiat (uniqueness) hae teen mahine saath hain,  magar Rajab ul asab woh akela hae jo ek khaas baat ki taraf ishara hae

Ayaam e jaheliyat (period before Islam) mae bhi is mahine ki badi fazilat aur hurmat thi, isiliye us zamane mae bhi jahel Arab jung ko rok dete the.

Is mahine ki pehli shab ki fazilat ke liye Moulae kaenat Moulana Ali Ibne Abi Talib ne farmaya hae Ke mae mard e mommin ke liye, ye chahta hun ke woh in char raataun mae duniyavi mashaqil (worldly activities) se alag hojae, Pehli shab Rajab ul murajab,15 vi shab Shaban e Kareem, aur do Eidain ki raat, Idd ul Fiter, wa Eid ul Adha

Pehli raat mae Noah alehe salaam ka safar shru huva tha, aur aapne apne tammam saathiyaun ko us din ka Roza rakhne ka hukum diya tha

Is mahine ki ek makhsus Dua hae jo aam tor per hum fajar ki namaz ke baad padhte hae, jiska ek khaas jumla hae keh "Allah taala hamare budhape (old age) per jahanam ki aag ko haram karde"  (jahanam ki aag se bachae)

Is mahine ki tasbih bhi khaas tasbih hae jiska karte rahna bada hi fazilat ka baes hae

استغفراللہ يا ذالجلال والاكرام من جميع الذنوب والاثام  

Umrah kissi waqt bhi kiya ja sakta hae magar Is mahina ka Umrah karne ki badi fazilat hae jisko  Umrah Rajabia kehte hain

Is mahine ka pehla Jumua tammam saal ke jumua mae sab se ziyada fazilat wala hae, jiske liye Syedna Jaffar farmate hain;
 
"Khair ki baataun ko jama karne wala hae aur barkataun ki barish lane wala hae"

Rajab ul murajab ki 15 tareeq "Salatus Zawal" jo salaat e "umme Dawood" bhi khelati hae, Imam Jaffar e Saddiq se riwayat hae us din ka roza rakhkar zohar wa asar ki namaz ke baad dus surat padhkar dua karne mae badi fazilat hae, aur saath mae 13 aur 14 ka Roza karne mae bhi fazilat hae

Is maah ki 27 tareeq mae bahut badi fazilatain hae
Us roz ki subah Rasulullah mabus huve yaane Nabi banae gaye, jiski namaz wa ibadataun se qiyam ka sawab 20 saal ke aamal ke barabar hae

Moulana Ali Ibne Abi Talib ki paidaesh bhi ussi roz huvi thi

27 ke roze ki bhi bahut ahmiyat hae uske iftar ki bhi khaas Dua hae jo "Moti us sawalaat" ki Dua kehte hain us din ke Roze ka karna 60 saal ke gunahu ka kafara Allah taala kardega, uske karz ki adaegi hogi aur uske mazaleem se usko darguzar kiya jaega

Is mahine mae Imam e Jaffar e Saddiq se riwayat hae keh jis ne bhi is maah ki kissi bhi budh (Wednesday) roza rakhkar chawal aur shakkar (Rice & sugar, curd is not mentioned) se iftar kiya to Allah taala uski rozi mae barkat wa kushadgi dega

Is maah ki ek badi fazilat yeh bhi hae ki Moulana Ali farmate hain ke, jis kissi ne is maah ke ek saal roze rakha, us'se aag e jahanam ek saal dur ki jaegi, jo do saal rakhega us'se do saal dur ki jaegi, aur is tarah jo 8 saal kiya usper jahanam ke darwaze band kardiye jainge aur jannat ke darwaze khol diye jainge aur jisne 9 saal kiye usko kaha jaega ab tumhara pichla hisaab khatam, ab naya amal shru karo

Allah taala humko in fazilataun ki batini marefat bhi ata kare takeh hum is maah e mubarak ki kama'haqa khadar karsake aur uski barkataun ko puri tarah hasil karsake

Haqeer Aap sab se Dua ke liye khaas multaji hae,

Allah taala aap ke, aur hamare naqis amaal ko qabool farmae

وآخر دعانا والحمد لله رب العالمين والصلاة والسلام على رسول الله وعلى آله وسلم

🌿🌱🌿🌱🌿🌱🌿🌱🌿

11/13/15, 8:52:37 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
 
Ilm e seerat (knowledge of history) woh ilm hae, jisko padhne se aur jan'ne se guzishta (past) qom aur ashkhas (civilization and personalities) ke halaat e zindagi malum hoti hain jis'se humko bahut kuch sikhna aur samajhna milta hae
 
Syedna Jaffar bin Syedna Sulaiman qadasallahu arwahuma, hamare Qaemi dor ke azeem Dai hae, aur aap 28 wae Dai hae Moulana Imam Tayab ke baad ke Duwaat ke silsile ke

Aapki paedaesh 20 Zilhaj'jatul haram 994 Hijri peer (monday) ke Roz subah huvi, Woh mubarak ghadi sixth sa'at (hour) thi Zohra (Venus planet) ki, aapki wiladat Yemen mae qasar e Sadaan jo ek imarat (building) thi, Yemen ke Hamdaan shaher mae, aur aapka inteqal 55 saal ki umar mae 29 Rabiul awal 1050 mae Taeba Yemen mae huva

Aapki Shaan bahut hi azeem hae, aapki paedaesh per Syedna Hummam ki khushi ki koi inteha na thi, aap jab Farzand ki wiladat ki khabar sunkar tashreef laye, aur jab Syedna Jaffar ko dekha to aapka chehra roshan hogaya aur aap ne farmaya

أبشروا يا مومنين فإنه قد ولد في يومكم هذا صاحب دعوتكم

Khush khabri hae tumhare liye ae momineen, basharat hae ke aaj tumhara Saheb e Dawat yane Dai paida huva, ye Syedna Sulaiman Saheb ne jab kha tha ke jab aap khud bhi Dai nahi huve the

Nabi e kareem ne farmaya hae

اتقوا فراسة المومن فإنه ينظر بنورالله

Mommin ki gehri nazar (depth of vision, danayi, wisdom) se dadu (beware) kiyunke woh Allah ke noor se dekhta hae, aur ye to aqa (master) e momineen Dai e Azeem Syedna Sulaiman bin Syedna Hasan keh rahe the

Syedna Sulaiman ne apne farzand Syedna Jaffar ke liye unki wiladat per jo ashar (verses) khe hain woh aapke bulund martabe aur muqam ko waze karta hae

Aapne ashar mae farmaya hae

Tum mujhe poochte ho ke mae Jaffar se itni mohabbat kiyu karta hun, to sun'lo Jaffar ka martaba mere pas bahut bulund hae, woh lub e lubbab (jist) hae, woh mere Qalb (Dil) ka khulasa hain, woh meri rooh hain, woh ek chuppa huva khimti moti hae, woh pak pakeeza ghar mae, taqwa per uski zindagi ka paya rakha gaya hae, aur woh mera BETA hae

Ae logoan tum Jaffar ko na bhul jana unki mohabbat meri jus (part) e rooh hochuki hae, aur uska jism shifa dene wala hae, Allah meri arzoo usme puri kare, uska wajud meri rooh aur dil dono ke liye baas e masarat (a thing of joy) aur aqal aur aankhaun ki thandak hae, aur Jaffar haqeeqat mae ek nayaab moti hae (a very precious pearl)

Syedna Jaffar khud apni autobiography "Nuzhat ul Azhaan wa Bhejatul Ikhwan" mae apne zindagi ke ahwal mae chauthe (fourth) saal ke zikar mae likhte hae ke

Meri zindagi ke char saal mukamil huve aur meri tarbiyat mae Qamar (moon) ke char saal mukamil huve, aur astrologers ke hisaab se saat 7 kokab (7 planet) mae se har ek ka asar ek khaas muddat (time period) tak insaani zindagi per rahta hae, uska hisaab aisa hae

Paedaesh se 4 char saal tak yane bachpan mae chand, Qamar (moon) ka hota hae

4 Char saal se 17 satra saal tak tarbiyat ka waqt hota hae usper Atarad (Mercury) ka asar rahta hae

17 saal se 21 saal tak jawani ke saal hote hain jisper Zohra (Venus) ka asar rehta hae

21 se 31 saal tak Riyasat wa Siyasat (organising & settling in life establishing) usper Suraj yane Shams (Sun) ka asar rahta hae

31 se 38 woh uske shujaat aur himmat (courage &struggle) ke saal hote hain aur usper planet Mireeq (Mars) ka asar hota hae

38 se lekar 50 tak uske zahadat wa wara yane parhezgari, ibadat wa riyazat ke saal hote hae aur us waqt usper Mushtari (Jupiter) ka asar rahta hae

Aur zindagi ke aakhri dor (lap) mae yaane 50 se lekar 65 ki umar tak wo waqt, intezar e maut ka hae aur us waqt usper Zohal (Saturn) ka asar rahega, maut apni girift tang (tightens the grip) karti jati hae, aur agar insaan ki umar us se ziyada bhi ho to uspar uski maut tak zohal ka hi asar rahega

Syedna Jaffar farmate hae ke ye kokab (planets) ka asar janeen (embryo) per tarteeb mae ulta (reverse) hota hae jab wo maa ke paet mae hota hae, sab se pehle asar karna wala planet woh Zohal (Saturn) hota hae aur sab se aakhir woh Qamar (moon) ka asar rahta hae

Zodiac signs aur planetary effects ka hamare duwaat ne bahut tafseel se apni likhi huvi kitabaun mae zikar farmaya hae,

Hamare 9 wae Imam, Ahmed bin Abdullah Salwatullah alehe ne apne "Rasael e Ahmediya" jisko rasael e "Ikhwan us safa" bhi kehte hae usme 51 rasael (books) mae ek risala (book) sirf (astronomy aur astrology) per likha hae, issi tarah hamare khreeb ke Mansub Moulana Ikram Ali Bin Hasan Ali Saheb ne bhi apni mashoor kitab "Munawar ul Jinan" mae bhi Astronomy aur Astrology per bahut hi tafseel se likha hae

Jis baat ka koran ne zikar kiya hae, jo hamare deen ka ek ahem jus (part) hae, jo hamare Ilm e mabda maad (theory of creation) ka ek ahem hissa hae,

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum us pak wa saaf Ilm ko sahi jagaah se hasil kare

وما توفيقي الا بالله العلي العظيم

🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂

11/13/15, 8:52:37 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): ▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
جمعة مبارك

Mukarram wa Mohtaram, Mansub ul Muqaddas,
Hazrat Moulana Shakir saheb "Zia" ka aaj youm e wafat hae, aapki ki kuch seerat e mubarak pesh hae

Aapki paedaesh e mubarak 17 Jamadil aakher 1307 Hijri Barode mae huvi, aapke waledain ne Shakir Ali naam rakha jo "Nadwa atul Olema" (university of Arabic & Islamic Studies lucknow) madrese ki padhai ke dauran Mohammad Shakir hogaya

Hazrat Moulana Shakir saheb ne apne haath se apna shajra (family tree) likha hae woh ye hae;

Hazrat Almansub Moulana Mohammad Shakir saheb ibne
Mulla Vali Mohammad saheb Ibne
Alhaj Mulla Turab Ali saheb
Ibne
Miya Khan saheb
Ibne
 Al Hadd ul Fazil Sheikh Imran Ibne
Sayedi Almansub Sher Mohammed ibne Abdul Khaliq

Aapke jad'de aala (great grandfather) Almansub Sher Mohammed saheb  1126 Hijri mein Syedna Hibatullah bin Syedna Ibrahim ki taraf se jazeere Sindh ke Mansub muqrar huve the aur 4 Rajab ul murajab 1146 mae Sindh mein hi inteqal kiye aur Muradpur ke gaon mae Syedi Yusuf bin Ali Khan ke mazar mubarak mae dafan kiye gae, aap ke bhi Arabi mae Qasaed bahut hain, aapke haath ka Arabi mae likha huva Sahifa bahut shandar hae

Aapke jadde aala Sheikh Imran bin Sher Mohammed saheb Dawat ke bahut bade hudood kiraam mae se the, aapko bhi Arabi zabaan per bahut zabardast ubur (mastery) tha, aur aap behtreen shaer bhi the, aapke arabi zabaan mae Hamd naat, manqebat aur munajaat bhut mashur hain, aapka bhi haath ka likha Sahifa bhi bahut mashoor hae, jisme aap ne bahut hi nayab Duain munajaat aqwal jama kiye hain aapka inteqal 17 Ramzan ul mubarak 1210 Hijri mae Surat mae huva, aap Al Mansub Mulla Karamulla saheb aur Almansub Abdul Raheem bin Saleh bin Ahmed ke dor mae khidmat e dawat ki hae

Hazrat moulana Shakir saheb ki ibtedai taalim 10 saal ki umar se 1317 se 1322 tak ke panch saal madrese Ahmediya, Ahmedabad mae Syedi al aalim Mulla Yakoob Ali saheb muqaddas ke pas huvi, usse pehle aap 8 saal ki umar mae Koran e majeed khatam karchuke the aur Sahifatus salaat yaad kar liye the

1310 Hijri mae Moulana Almansub Hazrat Farhat Ali saheb wa Hazrat Ziaali saheb ne Hyderabad mae ek madresa qaem kiya jo Dai waqt Alfakhri Abdullah bin Ali ke naam per "Al Fakhriya" rakha tha 1322 mae dono Manaseeb ne talib e ilm (students) ke inteqab (selection) mae Hazrat Shakir saheb ko chun liya, aap 1322 se 1324 Madrese Fakhriya mae Syedna Gulam Huaain Saheb aur moulana Fathullah saheb ke pas taalim hasil karte, aur dono manaseeb Moulana Farhat Ali saheb wa Moulana Ziaali saheb ke pas bhi istefade hasil karte rahe

1324 mae Hazrat Moulana Ziaali Saheb ne Moulana Shakir Saheb aur Moulvi Shabbar Hussain (aamil Bambai) ko awaam ke bhut mashur madresa "Nadwa" lucknow taalim ke liye bheja

Us waqt ke Dai ne, apne Musharaf mae ye likha tha ke Allah taala se hum dua karte hain ke in dono (moulana Shakir saheb aur Moulvi al aalim Mulla Shabbar Husain saheb) ko Allah taala barkat de, un ko hidayat ata farmaye, aur unhe zakawat aur zahanat bakhshe aur un ki basirataun (vision) ko munawar kare, aur Syedna Mohammed wa aale Mohammed ke tufael unko sirat e mustaqim per sabit khadam rakhe

Lucknow mae taalim ke dauran Hazrat Moulana Shakir Saheb ne mashur shaer Pyare saheb Rasheed se shaeri ki bhi taalim hasil ki jisse Hazrat ki shaeri mae nikhar paida hogaye

Aap us zamane ke mashur aalim aur historian Janab Shibli Naumani se bhi sikha, jo ke Syedna Gulam Hussain saheb ke milne walaun mae se the, is tarah aap ne zaheri uloom ko apni mehnat aur mashaqat se hasil kiya aur "Dar ul uloom Nadwat ul olema" se Moulvi "Aalim" ke imtehanat kamiyab kiye, aur 1327 mae aap hyderabad wapis huve,

Aap jab 1327 mae "Nadwa" lucknow se wapis huwe to Moulana Ziaali saheb Deolali jo Nasik ke khreeb muqam hae wahan qiyam kar rahe the, Hazrat Shakir saheb bhi aksar aapki qidmat mae wahan rahte the aur aala batini uloom wa mareef se istefada hasil karte aur aapki batini taleem ka silsila jari rahta

Phir 1335 Hijri mae Hyderabad ke madrese "Dar ul uloom" Hyderabad se "Fazil" ka imtehan kamiyab kiye, ye awaam un naas mae deeni taalim ka system hae jo taqreeban 10 se 14 saal ka waqt leta hae, jiski grading, Moulvi, Aalim, Fazil, kamil hote hain, ye degree's hain, magar asal batini uloom e taweel wa haqaeq, hamare pas Mukaram Mohtaram Moulvi Yakub Ali Saheb aur uske baad moulana Almansoob Ziaali saheb wa Moulana Farhat Ali saheb, aur phir Syedna Gulam Hussain saheb muqaddas aur moulana Fathullah saheb muqaddas ke pas hasil kiye

1330 mae Hazrat Ziaali saheb ka inteqal huva aap hyderabad mae moujud the aur 23 saal umar thi

Hazrat Moulana Shakir saheb 1331 Hijri mae Bankok safar kiye aur apne mamu janab Faiz Mohammed Abdul Ali ki dukan "F A Siamwala" mae Manager muqrar huve

Aap ke Bankok rawana hote waqt Syedna Dai ne aapko namaz ki fushat ata farmai, balkeh aapko Aamil muqrar kiya aur tammam deeni umur, Asbaq, majalis waqaera ki ijazat ata ki, us waqt aapki umar 24 saal th, us waqt Bankok ki hamari jamaat bhi bahut badi thi  

Aapki shaeri ka aqaz (beginning) mount Abu ke muqam se huva 1322 Hijri ke aas pas jab Hazrat Ziaali Saheb kuch waqt ke liye mount Abu tashreef legaye the aur Hazrat Shakir Saheb bhi madrese Ahmediya ki padhai khatam kar chuke the, Hazrat ki qidmat mae rehna gae the, us waqt Hazrat Ziaali saheb ne aapka shaeri ka shoq dekh kar kha ke tum ne kuch taqalus (pen name) bhi rakha hae kiya ? us waqt Hazrat Shakir Saheb ne farmaye ke abhi to, kamtar ne SHAKIR rakha hae, us waqt Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb ne kha ke tum koi teen harfi (three lettered word rakho) jaisa WAFA, SABA to doosre roz Hazrat Shakir saheb ne Moulana Ziaali saheb se farmaya ke agar aap ijazat de to mae apna taqalus "ZIA" rakhta hun, yeh sunkar Moulana Ziaali Saheb muskura diye aur Hazrat Moulana Shakir Saheb ki zahanat ki daad diye aur khushi se ijazat ata ki

1334 mae aap 3 saal Bankok mae rahkar Hindustan wapas hogaye us waqt aap ka qiyam Bambai mae raha, Bambai mae bhi namaz, asbaq aur majalis aap hi qiyam karte

1342 hijri 1924 mae ek qafila Hazrat Fathullah Saheb ki qiyadat (leadership) mae hijrat ke liye Syedna Dai Moulana Ali bin Mohsin ki khidmat mae gaya, us qafile mae char log the, Hazrat Moulana Fathullah saheb moulvi Yakub Ali Saheb Hazrat Shakir Saheb aur Haji Khurshid Hasan saheb us waqt Hazrat Shakir Saheb ki umar 35 saal thi aur aap char mahine Dai ki Hazrat mae rahkar Ilm hasil karte rahe

Hazrat Moulana Shakir saheb ke walid Mulla Vali Mohammed saheb Japan mae V H Turabali ke naam se ek firm kholi thi, Hazrat Shakir Saheb apne Bangkok ke qiyam ke dauran kafi tajruba hasil karchuke the, aapke walid ne aapko Japan bulaliya aap apni ahliya ke saath Japan chale gaye aur taqreeban dus saal tak wahan rahe aur is dauran 3 waqt Hindustan aaye, aap ne karobar ke saath deeni khidmat bhi anjam di, aap ek aalim ki haisiyat se awaam mae bhi bahut mashoor the, is'tarah aap ne Japan me "Kobe" shaher mae ek Masjid bhi banwai aur Japan mae ek Indians ka organisation tha "INDIA CLUB" uske do waqt president bhi muqrar huve

Japan se 1937 wapis aane ke baad aap Barode shaher ke lehripur ke area mae apne bhai Mulla Salahuddin saheb ke saath ek dukan kholi thi jiska naam "BOMBAY SHOP" tha  magar ek waqt ke baad ye karobar khatam kardiya, aap darmiyan mae Calcutta mae bhi do saal karobar ke liye rahe
 
Bangkok aur Japan mae kuch saal guzar kar Hindustan apne watan Baroda aap lot aae, aur apni ilmi khidmat aur Dawat hadiya ke kaam mae masruf hogae

1355 mae Dawat Hadiya mae bade inqelabat aaye  Syedna wa Moulana Dai Ali bin Mohsin Shabam ka Rajab mae inteqal huva aur Syedna Dai Gulam Husain Saheb Dai e munfarid huve, magar sirf do mahine baad Syedi wa Moulai Fateh uloom Almansub Moulana Fathullah saheb ka bhi inteqal hogaya

Phir Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain saheb ne Hazrat Moulana al Mansub Mohammed Husain saheb per mansubiat ki nas kardi

1357 ke safar ki  21 tareeq ko Syedna Dai falsuf e zamana Gulam Husain saheb rehlat (left for heavenly abode) farma gaye aur unke muqam per Syedna Dai Moulana Alsharfi Husain bin Ahmed Dai muqrar huve, aur aap ne Hazrat Moulana Ishak Saheb ibne Mukaram Ibrahim saheb ko Mansubiat per fayez farmaya

1359 mae Hazrat Moulana Shakir Saheb ko Hazrat Ishak saheb ne Barode ka aamil muqrar farmaya, amalat ke sath aap madresa ki taleem mae ustad ki haisiyat se qidmat bhi anjam dete, aap is dauran Muslim girls school mae farsee (persian) teacher ke bhi faraez anjaam diye, aur phir "Dar ut Tulaba" ka bhi kaam kach aur padhai ka nizam aap ne hi tarteeb diya

Aap qidmat Dawat ke saath saath apni ilmi masrufiyat ko bhi baqi rakha, shaeri ka shoq tha bahut se ashar aap ne kehe, aapki shayeri Koran wa Hadees ahle baet ki mohabbat aur Aulia Allah ke aqwal aur nasihataun per mabni (based) hote, kehte hae ke us zamane mae aap Syedna Sulaiman Saheb ki puri sawane umri (biography) ko ashar mae likh rahe the, aap ne iske alawa Dawat ki kai kitabau ka Arabi se Urdu mae tarjuma kiya, iske alawa, aapke be hisaab mazameen, majalis aur ilmi adabi bayanat hae aur kuch tasnifat (authored books) bhi hain

1376 Hijri 11  muharram ul haram 1957 mae Hazrat Moulana Ishak Saheb ka, 18 saal Dawat ki khidmat karne ke baad Inteqal huva, jab Hazrat Moulana Shakir saheb ko hazrat Ishak saheb ki alalat (illness) ki khabar mili aap sunte hi Hyderabad tashreef le aaye aur inteqal ke baad mae Hyderabad mae hi tashreef rakhe, us waqt tammam hudood dawat mae aap sab se fauq (senior) the, isliye tammam Dawat ke kaam Dai ki nas aane tak aap ke zimme the
 
Pehli Rabiul awal ko Syedna Dai Ali bin Husain Almakrami ka likha musharaf (letter of Dai) Hindustan 15 safar ko mila jisme Syedna Dai ne Hazrat Moulana Shakir Saheb aur Hazrat Moulana Nasrallah saheb Muqaddas per "Nas e Shareef" farmai thi

Aap dono Manaseeb ke dor e saadat mae bahut se kaam huve pu're bilad mae Masajid ki tarmeem, repairs and expansion, jamaat khanau ko wasi kiya gaya, Hyderabad mae naya Jamaat khane ka hissa banaya gaya, sab jagaah madresaun ko naye sire se tartib (organise) diya gaya, bade peimane per rozaun ko repair kiya gaye, urdu libraries ko naye kisim se tartib diya gaya marhum Muzaffer Ahmed Saheb Hakim ki taraf se diya gaya kutub khana ka iftetah kiya gaya, Barode mae Jamali building banai gayi

Syedna wa Moulana Sulaiman bin Syedna Hasan Saheb ki khabar e mubarak ko marmar (marble) se naya banaya gaya aur roze ki nai jali banai gai

Tammam bilad (cities) mae bahut se tamiri (construction) ke kaam anjam pae, jisse mommineen ke halaat mae bahut behtari huvi, dono Manaseeb ka bhut hi behtreen ilmi dor tha, majalis e Moharrum ka bhut hi ahtemmam kiya jata, Manaseeb aur hudood e Dawat ke pas asbaq ka barabar silsila rahta, Ilmi wa adabi mehfilain barabar hote rahti, Sahife adiya (sahifa of duas and salaat) ki tajdeed (published with additions) ki gaye, pocket size Sahifa nikala gaya, mansak e Haj bhi naya nikala gaya

Hazrat Moulana Shakir Saheb muqtalif bilad ka dora karte logoan ko ilmi faiz pohunchate majalis waaz wa nasihat karte, Kuwait mae aap ne kafi waqt qiyam kiya, Sindh wa Karachi ka dora kiye, Bangkok bhi tashreef le gaye aur wahan ke ikhwan ki maddad se qabrastan ki zameen khreedi.

Aap teen waqt Haj se musharaf huve pehli waqt Hazrat Ishak Saheb ke saath tashreef le gaye doosri waqt aapki Mansubiat ke baad dono manaseeb ke saath ek bahut bada khafila Haj per gaya aur Haj ke baad aapko Syedna Dai ki Hazrat mae kafi mahine tak hijrat ka bhi moqa mila, aur teesri waqt aap 1385 mae ek bahut bade qafile ko leker kuwait se Haj per tashreef le gaye the

Aap ke mubarak dor mae Syedna Dai Hindustan tashreef laye, aap bimar the aur Syedna Saheb ke saath dore mae shareek na hosake

Hazrat Moulana Shakir saheb Qirat e Quran ke maher (expert) the, aur tajweed mae aap ne sanad (certificate) hasil ki thi, Arabi zabaan per bahut zabardast ubur hasil tha, aap ne pehli Hijrat mae Najran mae navjavan bachau ke liye ek behtreen Arabi Tarana likha tha, aap aksar Korani ayaataun ki fasahat wa balaqat per roshni dalte huve maarif'e Korani aur rumus e rabani ko waze karte (deeper & hidden meaning)

Aap ka mutalea (self study) bahut vasi (wide) tha, aur aap ke paas ka kutub khana ek ilmi maqzan (treasure) tha

Aap ibtedai umar se postal stamps jama karte the, aur usko tarteeb aur tanzeem (organise) karte aur logoan ko unki malumat bhi dete mulkaun ki tareeqi (historical) aur siyasi (political) haalat se waqif karwate, aap bahut ache swimmer bhi the

Aapki mashur tasneef (authored book) ZIA UL IMAAN FI SEERAT E SYEDNA SULAIMAN hae jo aap ne Syedna Gulam Husain saheb ke kehna per likha hae jo bahut hi tafseel se puri tareeq Syedna Hummam likhi hae,
Doosri kitab aap ne Syedna Sulaiman Saheb ke isbat (proof) mae likhi hae woh "BARAHEEN E SULAIMANIA" hae ye kitab aap ne Syedna Sulaiman Saheb ki pedaesh ke 400 saala jashan (celebration) per likha tha

Issi tarah aap ne ek kitab KANZ UL ILHAM nazam mae likhi hae jisme Korani ayaataun ke maane wa mafhum urdu mae likha hae

Ek kitab jo Syedna Mohammad bin Fahad ki likhi huvi hae NAVADER UL AKHBAR doosri jild (second volume) jo bahut hi zakhim (thick volume) hae usko aap ne Arabi mae hi mukhtasar kiya hae

Moharram ke bara 12 majalis ko bhi aap hi ne bahut hi asaan urdu mae Qutrun Nada se tarteeb diya aur Syedna Moyad ki chand majalis ka bhi tarjuma kiya hae

Aap kafi waqt tak aleel (bimar) rahe, Syedna maalik ka aap ke naam bimari mae ek musharaf 7 jamad'usani 1393 Hijri ko mila, woh Hazrat Nasrallah saheb ne padhkar sunaya jab ki aap neem behoshi ke aalam mae the, magar jaise hi musharaf padha gaya aapke chehre mubarak per khushi wa inbesat ke aasar nazar aane lage

6 Rajab ul Murajab 1393 Hijri, 4 august 1973 Baroda Dawat Shaeeef ke makan mae aap ne subah 7/17 minute ko Dai e ajal ko labaek kha (inteqal farmaya)

Aapke gusul, kafan wa dafan se Hazrat Moulana Nasrullah saheb aur dosre hudood e dawat ne qiyam kiya

Aapka janaza maghrib se ek ghanta pehle uthaya gaya, magar janaze mae itne ziyada log the ke mommin bagh pohunchne se pehle hi maghrib hogai, maghrib ki namaz ke baad aapki tadfeen amal mae aei, aapko aapki wasiyat ke hisaab se Syedna Ali bin Husain bin Ahmed Zul Jaddain ke roze mubarak mae dafan kiya gaya

Aap taqreeban ek saal Saqt bimar rahe, aapki ahliya mohtarama, aur damaad Mulla Naseer Halim, aur Aapke Farzand Sher Mohammed saheb ne khidmat ki, aur apne liye da'rain (duniya wa aakherat) ka sawab hasil kiya, jaisa ke koran kehta hae

أن احسنتم احسنتم لأنفسكم

Jaise ke koran farmata hae, ke tum unper ahsaan kiya karoge, arre ye to unka ahsaan hae ke tum ko khidmat ka moqa diya

Allah taala Hazrat muqaddus ki rooh e pak ko muqaddus kare, aur aalae ilieen mae bulund se bulund maratib ata kare, aur hum sab per aapke nazrat jari rakhe

Aapka dor e mansubiat 17 saal aur kuch mahine raha

Aap kai (many) zabaan per ubur (mastery) rakhte the, Arabi Farsee aur Urdu mae to maharat rakhte the aur in teeno zabaan mae shaeri bhi karte the, iske alawa aap English Japani aur Gujrati bhi bahut achi bolte the

Aapko Koran e majeed per zabardast ubur hasil tha aur Arabi "sarf wa naho" (grammar) per puri tarah havi the, shaer wa shaeri ka shoq bachpan hi se tha shaeri ke har sanaf (kind) mae shaeri ki hae, nazam, rubai, marsia, qasida, masnavi, qatat hata keh tazmeen bhi ki hae, aapka kalam Koran hakim aur ahadees e nabavi ka aina, wa tafseer hae.

Aapke mulaqatiun mae bade uloma e Hind aur shora (plural of shaer) shammil the, jinke saath aapki baithak aur mulaqatain huva karti thi

Kiya khoob shaer ne aapki shaan mae kha hae
 
ان کے اوصاف کیا کیا هو مجهه سے بیان

سچ جو پوچهوتو قاصر هے میری زبان

پر خلوص وخلیق وفهیم وذکی

 مجمع هاے صفات اپ کی ذات تهی

آپ دراصل تهے جان علم وادب

جمع تہے اپ میں نیک اوصاف سب

مخزں علم دین عالم با عمل

جان شعر وسخن شاعر بے بدل

قوم کے رهنما عابد وپارسا

نیک خو متقی وناءب مصطفئ

ان کا هر شعر تفسیر قران کی

ان کی هر بات والله ایمان کی

آپ صابر بهی تہے،آپ شاکر بهی تهے

آپ طاهر بهی تهے، آپ ذاکر بهی تهے

رحمت حق کا هر وقت سایه رهے

نور حق کا لحد میں اجالارهے

شافع حشر کی هو شفاعت نصیب

رحمت حق سے هو قصر جنت نصیب

که دو عاشق، یه بے جا نهیں، هے بجا
بزم شعر وسخن کی ضیاء تهے ضیاء

 Aap ke kin kin khubiyun ka zikar kare aap ek aise Jame sifaat ke hamil the ke aap ka zikar kabhi mukamil nahi hoga

Aapke Ilm aur Hilm, Sabar aur Shukoor, zohad wa taqwa, hamari zabaan qasir hae aapke sahi taraf kare

Sirf ek hi khubi per agar hum qor kare ke kin ustad ke aap shagird rahe, aapne Syedna Hussain bin Ahmed wa Syedna Ali se Ilm hasil kiya phir Syedna Gulam Hussain saheb ke shagird rahe, aur phir Moulai Yakoob Ali saheb muqaddas Syedi Almansoob moulana Ziaali Ali saheb, Syedi Almansoob moulana Farhat Ali saheb Syedi Almansoob moulana Fathullah saheb, bahut kam ko aise honge jinko aise mufeed ki sohbat naseeb huvi hogi


Allah tabaraka wa Taala aapke nazraat wa taedaat hum sab per jari rakhe, aur aapke khabre mubarak per Rahmat wa barkaat hamesha nazil hote rahe
 
▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

11/13/15, 8:52:37 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🍃🐾🍃🐾🍃🐾🍃🐾

Salaam alaikum !

Ahle Haq ke mujahed , jo Ahle baet se ilm hasil kiye unke daleelae bhi bahut masboot hoti hae, aur aise hi haq ke mujahed mae ek naam Hazrat Moulana Shakir saheb muqaddus ka bhi tha

Bahut hi behtreen andaz aur misaalaun se mushkil se mushkil masle ko hal farma dete,

Aap ke ek waqae ka zikar karna hae jo Mount Abu ke Jamme masjid mae pesh aya tha, jab keh aap masjid ke ek kamre mae ro'ke huve the

Musalmanaun ki ek bahut badi jamaat yeh manti hae keh Rasoolallah inteqal nahi kiye, woh zinda aur hayat hae ahadees se bhi ye baat sabit hoti hae

jab hum Rasoolullah per durud bhejte hain to aap apni khabar mubarak se rehmat aur barkaat ki barish hum per bhejte hain

baaz log kehte hain keh aap ki namaz e janaza nahi huvi kiyu keh aap ka inteqal hi nahi huva, is baat per bahut lambi lambi bhes hote rahti hain

Ahle haq ke pas inki tafsilat aur bahut hain, magar baat yaha Hazrat Moulana shakir saheb muqaddus ke behtreen andaz se samjhane ki hae, jo wahan ke ek moulvi saheb ko samjhaya tha

Moulvi saheb budhe aadmi the, bahut hi ajisi aur ahteram se Hazrat moulana Shakir saheb muqaddus se pucha, kiya hamare Rasool ki namaz e janaza huvi ya nahi ? aur agar huvi hae to kaun namaz padhaya

aur agar namaz e janaza huvi hae, to phir Rasool ki hayat (yane inteqal na karna) kaise sabit hoti hae

Moulana Shakir saheb muqaddus ne jawab diya keh meri tahqeeq yeh kehti hae ke Rasoolallah ki namaz e janaza huvi, magar imam koi nahi tha, dus, dus, log aate aur Rasoolallah ke kamre ke baher namaz padhte

Rasoolallah ka qol hae, ke aap, apni zindagi mae bhi, aur maut ke baad bhi ummat ke imam hain aur tum is tarah se namaz padhna

Ab sawal yeh keh agar namaz e janaza huvi hae yeh sabit hae to Rasoolallah ki hayat yane zinda hona kaise sabit hosakta hae

Hazrat ne farmaya keh Quran e majid kehta hae

لا تحسبن الزين قتلوافي سبيل الله امواتا بل احيا عند ربهم

Jo khuda ki raah mae shaheed huve tum unko hargis murda na khyal karna balkeh woh Allah ke pass zinda hae

Aap ne farmaya hazrat e Humza jung mae shaheed huve woh is ayaat ke bayan se zinda hain, magar Rasoolallah ne unki namaaz e janaza padhai

Moulana Shakir saheb ne phir farmaya ke woh sab shaheed log, aur Rasoolallah, dono bhi zinda hae magar
  عندا ربهم

Inda rab'behim yane Allah taala ke pass

Hamare aitebar se

 انك ميت وانهم ميتون

Ae Rasool tum bhi marne wale ho aur woh sab log bhi marne wale hain

Ab sawal yeh hota hae keh ek hi waqt mae Rasool zinda bhi hain aur murda bhi, yeh kaise mumkin hae

Moulana muqaddus ne kiya hi achi misaal dekar is baat ko samjhaya

Aap masjid se apne masjid ke kamre mae jahan thede the ja rahe the

Aap ne moulvi saheb se kha keh agar mae is darwaze se kamre mae jata hun to masjid ke log khenge ke ja raha hun (I am going), aur jo log kamre mae hain woh log mujh ko dekhkar khenge ke mae aaraha hun (I am coming)

Ab aap ne farmaya ke, mera kaam to ek hi hae, mae masjid se nikal kar kamre mae ja raha hun

Kamre wale khenga aaraha hun (he is coming)

Masjid wale khenga jaraha hun (he is going)

Theek issi tarah aap khyal ki jiye ke hamare aetebar se Rasool inteqal kar gaye, magar Allah taala ke pass zinda hain ahya inda rab'behim
 احيا عند ربهم

Jab keh ek shaheed Allah taala ke pass hai حي zinda jaega to phir Nabi to un se bahut aala aur afzal hain, woh to yaqinan Allah ke pass zinda hae

Budhe moulvi saheb Hazrat ke haath chum liye aur kha ke aaj tak kissi ne yeh masla itni aasani se nahi samjhaya

Allah taala Hazrat Moulana Shakir saheb "Zia" ko muqaddas kare aur unke nazrat hum per jari rakhe

الحمد لله والصلاة والسلام على سيدنا محمد وعلى آله وسلم

🐾🍃🐾🍃🐾🍃🐾🍃

11/13/15, 8:52:37 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🔴🔵🔴🔵🔴🔵🔴🔵🔴

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Deen e Islam mae jahan 7 Faraez e Deen ka zikar hae, wahan 12 sunnat e Deen bhi hain, aur Islam hi ek aisa mazhab hae ke, in roz marra ke (daily routine) zindagi ke mamlaat ko bhi ek ahem jus (part) e deen qarar diya, jisme Ifsha us salaam, yane salaam ka bil jaher kehna (to express loudly) yaane ba awaaz kehna, uska baad agar ahmiyat batai gai hae to woh

برالوالدين

"Bir ul Waledain"
Yaane Maa aur Baap ke saath nek suluk karna, acha bartau rakhne ki hae

Ye zabaan ka nuqs hae, kami hae, keh koi bhi Arabi lafs ka sahi tarjuma duniya ke kisi bhi zabaan mae nahi kiya ja sakta, issi tarah se BIR, ka bhi sahi tarjuma mumkin nahi

Bir ul Waledain ke bhi 7 faraez aur 12 aadab hain

Allah taala Irshad farmata hae ;

ووصينالانسان بوالديه احسانا حملته كرها ووضعته كرها

Hum ne insaan ko wasiyat (made it must) ki hae ke woh apne Maa Baap ke saath ahsaan ke saath sulook kare, aur is ayaat shareef mae, Maa ka apni aulad ko takleef per takleef uthate huve paida karne ka khaas zikar kiya hae, aur issi tarah doosri jagaah bhi Maa ki takleef ka phir zikar farmaya

ووصينالانسان بوالديه حملته أمه وهن علي وهن

Hum ne insaan ko apne waledain ke liye wasiyat ki hae, uski Maa usko, hamal (pregnancy) ke dauran takleef uthate huve uska bojh per bojh uthaya hae, koran ne dono jagaah bhi Maa ka, bache ko paida karne ke role ko badi ahmiyat di hae, aur jab Koran ne ahmiyat diya hae to Moulana Imam Maad al Mustansir Billah apne majalis mae farmate hae ke, Maa ko ziyada karamat dena uska khyal rakhna hum per aur ziyada wajib hojata hae

12 sunnat e deen mae, jisme Maa Baap ke saath nek sulook karna hae us taluq se bayan farmaya hae

Maa Baap ke qiyam gaah, unka makan unki baithak, unki jagaah ko karamat de

أن يكرم مثواهما

Jab unko aata huve dekhe to foran khade hojae aur unko izzat dete huve unki har awaaz per 'labaek' khe kar foran jae

Unke saamne apni awaaz hamesha neechi rakhe dhimi rakhe (soft & low voice)

Unko puri tazeem de, puri respect aur obedience se pesh aye unse kabhi bhi jhidak kar battameezi se baat na kare

Unke liye apne dono bazuan ko puri tarah jhuka de, yane unke har zaroorat ke liye apne aap ko pesh, pesh rakhe

ويخفض لهما جناح الذل من الرحمة

Apne aap ko kamtar karle jhuk jae, zaleel karle unke saamne rehmat ke saath pesh aye

Noor (light) mae unke aage na chale aur zulmat (darkness) mae unke peeche na rahe, yane din mae unke peeche chale takeh unki tazeem wa takreem ho, aur raat ke andhere mae unke aage aage chal kar unko raasta bataye aur unki hifazat kare

Unke kisi bhi hukum ki khilaf Warsi na kare, jaisa ke koran su're Luqman mae farmaya hae ke siwae is baat ke keh Allah ke saath shirk karne khe to us waqt woh, maa baap ki baat na mane aur unki taat se inkar karde

Unko kabhi bhi kisi halat mae bhi koi saqt Lafs na khe, jaise ke koran ka hukum hae

ولا تقل لهما أف ولا تنهرهما وقل لهما قولا كريما
 
Tum unko "uff" tak na kho aur na jhidko, aur agar kuch kho to bahut hi kareemi ke saath kho yane puri izzat aur narmi ke saath kho  

Aur baujud unki za'eefi ke aur badi umar ke, aur kitne bhi unke bimar rahne ke, har halat mae unki darazi e umar, lambi umar, aur sahet ke liye Dua kare, jis tarah se, ki woh tumhare liye, tumhare bachpan mae har halat mae tumhari darazi e umar aur sahet ke liye Dua karte the, aur Dil se khaesmand rahte

Walid e muqaddus farmate the is baat ka sab se ziyada humko khyal rakhne chahye kiyunke aksar hum apne Maa baap ki saqt bimari aur takleef ki halat mae ye jumla keh dete hain "Allah Rahem kare, yane Allah unko maut de, yane duniya ki takleef se najat de" ye baat aur kalemat aulad ko kabhi bhi apne maa baap ke liye nahi kehna chahye, woh Allah aur Rasul ke hukum ki nafarmani hae

Aur unki har choti aur badi baat aur zaroorat ko khush dili se, teeb e khatir (clean pure heart) puri kare, jis tarah woh tumhare bachpan mae tumhari, jitna unse mumkin hota khaesh ko puri karte, aur behtreen andaz se tumhari tarbiyat kiye hae

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum, Bir ul Waledain ke ahkamat per puri tarah amal kare, aur Waledain ka Haq pura ada kare

Nabi e kareem ka irshad e mubarak hae, aap ne Moulana Ali Ibn Abi Talib salwatullah alehe ko farmaya tha

أنا وأنت يا علي أبوا هذه الامة

Ae Ali mae aur tum is ummat ke Maa aur Baap hain, aur aap ne waaze bhi farmaya tha ke Ali tum "Maa" hae aur mae "Baap" hun, aur agar is lehaz se hum dekhe, to koran ne Maa ke liye maqsoos takid farmai hae, uske mehnat aur mashaqat se hamal ko uthana aur phir aulad ko paida karne ki wajeh se, uski badi ahmiyat hae, uska khaas khyal rakhe

Agar Rasul aur janab e Ali Maa Baap hain to phir ye ahkamat unper kis tarah baithte hae, uski taweel kiya hae aur phir uske Haqaeq yane asal batin ke lihaz se kiya hae, uski ae Allah humko marefat ata kar

Aur woh marefat humko jab hogi, jab hum za'heir mae, usper puri tarah amal karenge

وقل رب ارحمهما كما ربياني صغيرا

Aur tum unke Haq mae hamesha ye Dua karte raho;

Ae mere parwardigaar, jis tarah unhune (waledain) ne bachpan mae mujhe Pa'la hae, to bhi unper Rahem farma

🔵🔴🔵🔴🔵🔴🔵🔴

11/13/15, 8:52:37 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

کتنے خوش نصیب ہیں جو کہ ایک اورجمعہ هم کو ملا تاکہ ہم اپنے نیک اعمال میں اضافہ کرسکے
 آپ سب کو جمعہ مبارک ہو

قال نبي صلي الله عليه وسلم ؛
من سره أن يسلم فليلزم الصمت

Jo salaamti chahta hae usko chahye ke khamoshi ka paband rahe
 
Imam e Jaffar e Saddiq farmate hein ke khamoshi us insaan ki aadat aur tareeqa hota hae jo mohaqeqin hote hain, jo duniya ki haqeeqataun se waqif hochuke hote hae (who knows the realities of creation and the creator)

Khamoshi har rahat wa aaram ki kunji (key) hae duniya mae bhi wa aakherat mein bhi, aur khamoshi mein hi Allah taala ki khushnudi aur razamandi hae,

khamoshi se gunaahun ke hisaab mae kami hoti hae aur khata (account of your deeds) aur laqzish (errors & mistakes) se hifazat hae

Allah taala ne ek jahal ki jahalat ke liye khamoshi ko purdah banaya hae aur ek aalim ke liye zeenat dene wali chez (silence is a veil for the ignorant & adornment for man of knowledge)

Aur khamoshi se insaan, nafsani khaeshat se bach sakta hae, apne nafs ki achi tarbiyat karsakta hae,

khamoshi se ibadat ka lutf (enjoyment) hae, khamoshi dil ki sakhti ko dur karti hae, aur khamoshi hi mae khyalat ki pa'ki hae aur aqlaq wa kirdar ki bulundi hae

Tum apne zabaan ke darwaze ko band rakho jab tak ke tum kalaam karne ke liye majboor na hojao (when there is no way out)

khusasan tum us waqt khamosh raho jab tak keh tum tumhare kalaam ka koi ahel wa qabil na pau (especially when you dont find a person worthy of conversing with)

tum us waqt kalaam zaroor karo jab tumhara kalaam Allah ke liye khalis ho, ya Allah ke baare mae ho.

Jaisa ke Nabi e kareem ne farmaya;

أن ربي أمرني أن يكون نطقي ذكرا وصمتي فكرا ونظري عبرة

Mere parwardigaar ne mujhe hukum diya hae ke mera kalaam Allah ke zikar mae ho, Meri khamoshi Allah ki fikar (thought) mae ho, aur meri nazar ibrat wali ho (har chez se sabaq lene wali)

Ek Sahabi e Rasool hamesha apne saath ek takhti (slate) rakhte, aur us per har woh baat likh lete jo unhune kalaam kiya phir raat mae us kalaam ko jo unhune din bhar mae kiya tha usper qor wa fikar karte ke kiya sahi aur kiya ghalat kha, aur aap phir kehte ke aah!  Aah!  Afsoos hae Afsoos hae, Yaqeenan khamosh rahne wala kamiyab hogaya, yane unko ahsaas hota ke in tammam halaat mae jo unhune kalaam kiya tha khamoshi hi rahna sab se ziyada behter tha

Baas (few) sahaba Rasoolullah apne mu (mouth) mae pather (stones) rakh lete aur jab kalaam karne ka irada karte to pehle qor karte, kiya hum jo kehne ja rahe hain, woh Allah aur Rasul ke nasdik sahi hae ya nahi, aur agar woh baat lillah fillah hoti to phir mu se pather nikalte aur kalaam karte
حديث شريف ہے

من كان يومن بالله واليوم أخر فليقل خيرااويصمت

Jisne Allah per Emaan laya aur aakherat per yaqeen rakha, usko chahye ke achi baat khe, warna khamosh rahe

Insaan ka najat pana, aur insaan ka halaak hona, kalaam karne aur na karne per hae, kiya hi behter kamiyabi us insaan ke liye hae jisko is baat ki marefat hae ke kab kalaam karna hae, aur kab khamosh rahna hae, aur khamoshi ke kiya faide hain

Nabi e kareem ka irshad e mubarak hae;

واملاء الخير خير من السكوت

Khair aur achai ki baataun mae tawaun (cooperation) aur mushawerat (opinion) Khamoshi se bahut behter hae
والسكوت خير من إملاء الشر

Khamoshi, bure aur khrab kamaun mae, maddad aur mashore se bahut behter hae

Khamoshi Ambia ke aqlaq mein se hae aur jisne kalaam ki qadar jaana aur khamoshi ko tarjeeh (preference) di, aur khamoshi ke khazane se faida uthaya us ne itmenan (satisfaction) hasil kiya
(People destruction & salvation lies in speech & silence, good fortune belongs to those who has knowledge of what is correct & what is incorrect in speech & the science of silence & its advantages and benifits)

Insaan ka kalaam karna aur khamosh rahna, dono bhi ibadat ka darja hasil karlenge agar woh in tammam baataun ka lihas kare, aur uski is ibadat se sirf Allah taala ki buzrug wa barter zaat ke alawa koi nahi waqif hae

🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀🍀

11/13/15, 10:29:01 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): Jawab ka intezar rahega
Mazameen kaise lagte hain

11/15/15, 11:59:29 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): □■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Safar ke mahine mae hamari Sulaimani Dawat ke bahut se buzrug is Dar-e-mahan (place of worries) chod kar Dar-e-Baqa, (permenant abode) akherat ki taraf kuch farmae (inteqal kiye)

Unhi mae se ek buzrug ka zikar karna hae, jinhune deen ke saath Duniya bhi bahut kamaya

aksar dekha gaya ke deen ke saath jab duniya bhi haath ati hae to aksar log deen ya duniya ya phir dono se hi haath dho baith'te hain,

 Haan agar woh, is duniya ki daulat ko deen ke liye, aur momineen ki bhlai aur faide ke kaam mae laye aur kharj kare, to yaqinan woh dono jahan ke khair wa sawab ko hasil karlenge

Syedi wa Moulai Al Mansoob Mohammed Ali bin Saleh Ul'badri ibn Syedna Hasan Khan bin Abdul Malik ek nadir (rare) shaqsiyat hain, jinhune  deen ke saath duniya bhi bahut kamaye, aur duniya ki daulat ka sahi istemal bhi kiye, apni sari daulat, deen ke bhlai aur logoan ki takaleef ko dur karne ke liye kharj kardiya

Aapki paedaesh 1080 Hijri mae huvi aur 27 Safar 1158 Hijri mae Barode se Ahmedabad ke safar ke darmiyan 'Amsan' naam ke gaon mae 78 saal ki umar mae achanak inteqal kiye, aur Waanch [village] nami muqam per aapko dafan kiye gaye

Aapki ahliye Mohtarama al Alema Fazela Aziza bu binte Qasim khan aur aapke navase (grandson) Mulla Gulam Inayatullah ne us zameen ko Rs 350/= mae khreed liye aur wahan aapka mazar aur chabrutra banaya, aaj aksar log Ahmedabad Syedna Sulaiman saheb ki ziyarat ke saath aapki ziyarat se bhi musharaf hote hain

Aapki tijarat (business) Hindustan ke bahut se shaher mae pheli huvi thi, Delhi, Ahmedabad, Surat Godhra, Malwa, Kutch, Aurangabad, Burhanpur aur Deccan (central india) mae aapki dukane thi

Aap Mansubiat se pehle do (2) waqt Hyderabad bhi tijarat ke liye aakar gaye, aapke do farzand Hyderabad ka karobar sambhalte the, aur ek farzand Qassam saheb Surat ki dukan dekhte the

Aapka karobar, aapke dada ke walid Abdul Malik ka shru kiye huva tha aur Syedna Hasan khan bin Abdul malik ke laqab (title) "Al'badri" se mashur wa maroof tha

Syedna Hasan Khan bin Abdulmalik ke khandaan ne bahut naam wa izzat kamai, bahut se Manaseeb aur hudood e Dawat aapke khandaan se huve

Mohammed Ali, Al Saleh ul Badri bahut hi zabardast aalim the, Syedi Almansoob Sheikh Saleh bin Ahmed ke inteqal ke baad 1141 Hijri mae Syedna Hibatullah bin Ibrahim ne, aapko Hindustan ka mansub e mutlaq banaye, aur chand saal ke baad Sindh ke Mansub Syedi Sher Mohammed bin Abdul khaliq ke inteqal ke baad Sindh ke bhi Mansub aap hi ko muqrar kiya gaya, aur aapke baad rutbe mae Mulla Sheikh Yaseen ko aapka moin wa madadgar muqrar kiya, aapki Mansubiat 17 saal rahi

Aapke zamane mae Ahmedabad Dawat ka markaz (centre) tha, Dawat ka Kutub khana jo "Dar ul  Ashrafiya" ke naam se mashoor tha woh bhi aap hi ke makan mae tha, us zamane mae haakimaun (rulers) ke zulm wa sitam ki wajeh se bahut se ikhwan e jamaat Ahmedabad se Baroda shift ho gaye, aur Baroda basaya

Aapke zamane mae Sulaimani Dawat bahut se shaher mae pheli huvi thi, Baroda, Dholka, Godhra, khambat, Sidhpur, Kutch ke bahut se gaon, Malwa ke gaon, Surat, Burhanpur, Aurangabad, Daulatabad, Hyderabad, aap ne har bilaad mae Dawat ka nizam qaem kiya, aap sab jagah ka dora karte, namaz padhane aur waaz wa nasihat aur deen ko phelane ka pura intezam karte, aur puri tarah momineen ka khyal rakhte

Aap Dawat ko masbut karne ke liye bahut se shagirdaun (students) ko deen ki taleem di

Aapke zamane mae bahut se hudood Syedna Dai ke pas istefade (learning) ke liye hijrat kiye, aur aksar hudood e Dawat bahut Aalim wa Fazil, Kamil e ulum e haqaeq bane, sab hi bahut qabiliyat paida kiye aur bahut bade maratib ko bhi hasil kiye aur khidmat e Dawat anjam diye

 Us waqt ke chand hudood ke naam ye hae;
Alhaj Mulla Yaseen
Alhaj Mulla Karamulla bin Mohammed Sadiq
Alhaj Abdul Rahim bin Saleh bin Ahmed, ye sab baad mae manaseeb ke rutbe ko hasil kiye,

Inke alawa aapki ahliye Mohtarama Al'alema Fa'zela Aziza bu binte Qasim Khan thi, jinke liye Sheikh Yaseen jo Mansub e waqt the unko hukum tha ke har baat Al'Mohtarama Aziza bu ki rae aur mashore (opinion & advice) se hi karna, aur hudood kiraam mae aap ka teesre number tha

Syedi Mohammed Ali Saleh ul Badri ke inteqal per Dai waqt ne bahut afsoos zaher kiya aur aapke liye sadqe wa khairaat kiye aur ek bahut lamba qasida (ashar) likhe jisme aapki qidmat, ache aqlaq, aapke ilm wa faham, tadabur wa hilm, az'am wa isteqlal (firmness, determination) ka zikar farmaye aur sab rishte daraun ko taziyat aur sabar ki talqeen ki

Aapke inteqal ke baad aapki ahlye mohtarama Aziza bu ne Dawat ki bahut badi khidmat ki, aur apni sari daulat, Dawat ke liye aur momineen ki maddad ke liye kharj ki, Aziza bu Baroda ke Syedna Ali saheb ke mazar mae dafan hain, ek taraf aap hae aur doosri janib Mansub e Mohtaram Hazrat Moulana Shakir saheb "Zia" hain

Allah taala hum sab ko deen ke saath duniya ki daulat bhi naseeb kare jo deen aur momineen ki falah (welfare and betterment) ke kaam aye

Kehta hae rok'ka huva pani, thede huve pani mae khrabi ka imkan hae, badbu wa khrabi paida hojati hae

Ilm e jari (flowing knowledge) mae barkat hae, Ilm, istefade aur if'ade, sikhane aur sikhne, padhne aur padhane se baqi rahta hae, aur badhta hae, jahan woh nahi khrabi ajati hae

Theek issi tarah Maal aur daulat kharj karne aur sahi maqsad ke liye istemal karne se hi badhta hae faida deta hae, warna tijori (safe) mae bandh daulat kis kaam ki ?  jitna kharj karo utne hi daulat aane ke raaste Allah khol dega

Aaj Syedna Hasan khan wa aulad, Syedi Saleh ul Badri aur almansub Hazrat Qassam saheb ki yaad wa zikar unki khair wa khairaat aur unki ilm ki wajeh se baqi hae, warna unse bahut ziyada maaldar log us zamane mae bahut guzre, jinki aaj khabar ki bhi khabar nahi hae aur na hi zikre khair hota hae

لَن تَنَالُوا الْبِرَّ حَتَّىٰ تُنفِقُوا مِمَّا تُحِبُّونَ وَمَا تُنفِقُوا مِن شَيْءٍ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ بِهِ عَلِيمٌ

Tum neki ko hargis hasil nahi karsakte jab tak ke tum us chez ko kharaj na karo jo tum ko sabse ziyada azeez ho

By no means shall ye attain righteousness unless ye give (freely) of that which ye love; and whatever ye give, of a truth Allah knoweth it well

□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□

11/15/15, 2:38:30 PM: Asif: Jazak Allah bil Khair Ishaq Bhai. I haven't had a chance to read these yet. I'm in Karachi leaving for the US in a couple hours. InshaAllah I'll read these when I get home.
But I'm sure they're just as amazing as the previous ones 😊

11/16/15, 12:44:09 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): I am sorry didn't know that you're visiting home, I hope everyone is fine there

Umeed ke Hazrat qibla se Khandambosi ka moqa mila hoga

Inshallah phir hum baat karenge

11/17/15, 10:52:51 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 💠⭐💠⭐💠⭐💠⭐💠

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Imam Jaffar e Sadiq farmate hain ke "Ilm" علم ko uske ma'dan (mine: source) se hasil karo, yane ahle baet se hasil karo

Aap ne farmaya ke Allah taala ne jahelaun se talab e ilm ka Ahed us waqt tak nahi liya, jab tak ke uloma se Allah taala ne ilm sikhane ka wada na liya

Aap ne farmaya khoof e khuda ilm ki miraas (inheritence) hae (yane aalim ko hamesha khoof e khuda rahna chahye) aur jis'e khoof e Khuda nahi woh Aalim nahi hosakta,

Allah taala farmata hae

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
 
َ إِنَّمَا يَخْشَى اللَّهَ مِنْ عِبَادِهِ الْعُلَمَاءُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزِيزٌ غَفُورٌ

 خدا سے تو اس کے بندوں میں سے وہی ڈرتے ہیں جو صاحب علم ہیں۔ بےشک خدا غالب (اور) بخشنے والا ہے

Aalim wahi hae jo dil mae khoof e khuda rakhta hae, aur bandaun mae Khuda ka khoof dilane wale woh Aalim hi hain

Phir aap ne farmaya ke uloma ki 8 aafatain hain, 8 khrabiyun mae aalim log mubtela hote hain, phas jate hain (indulge into)

Tama  طمع lalaj, hirs, greed

Bukhul بخل kanjusi

Riya رياء dikhawa karna, jo nahi hae, woh hum hae batana, zaher karna

Tazub تعصب sirf apne logoan ki himayat karna, doosraun ka khyal na karna (partiality)

Taweel guftagu  طویل گفتگو lambi lambi baat karna jiska koi natija nahi

Allah se Haya حيا na karna, bahut se mamlaat mae Allah ke hukum ke khilaaf karna, Allah sab per gawah hae is baat ko bhul jana

Fakher فخر akadna, apne ilm per itrana, aur doosraun per fauqiyat (superiority) dikhane ke liye ilm ka izhaar karna

Ilm علم hasil karne ke baad usper amal عمل na karna

Moulae Kaenat farmate hain:

Jis ne Ilm ki hadd tak pohunchne ka dawa kiya, usne apne jahalat ke hadd (limits) ko ujagar (exhibit) kiya

كل عالم غير الله سبحانه متعلم

Allah ke siwae har aalim, mutalim (sikhne wala) hae

Aur farmaya

زلة العالم تفسد العوالم

Ek aalim ki laqzish pu're aalam ko khrab kardeti hae

Allah taala humko ilm ata kar, aur saath mae Hilm, Burdbari, Ajisi, Inkesari bhi ata kar, aur ilm ke saath aane wali khrabiyun se dur rakh

العالم من عرف قدره

Aalim wahi hae jo uski khadar janta ho (apni haisiyat aur muqam samajhta ho)

💠⭐💠⭐💠⭐💠⭐💠

11/19/15, 10:25:16 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🌷🌿🌷🌿🌷🌿🌷🌿

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك

Zikar huva tha uloma mae hone wali khrabiyun ka, Ilm se badhkar koi fazilat wa daulat nahi, magar jaise har chez ka istemal bhi sahi hona zaroori hae, issi tarah Ilm ka istemal bhi sahi hona zaroori hae aur agar uska istemal sahi nahi to woh Aalim ke liye nuksaan de sabit hoga

Hazrat e Ibrahim Khaleelullah per Allah taala ne wahi وحى ki thi, ke Ilm bhi do kisim ke hain, ek woh jo insaan ke Dil mae jaguzi (absorbed) hojata hae, jem (firmly settled) jata hae aur sabko faida bhi deta hae, aur ek Ilm ki kisim woh hae jo sirf zabaan per jari hota hae, jiska aalim ke amal se koi taluq nahi, na hi woh kisi ke kaam ata hae

Imam e Jafar e Sadiq ne ek waqt farmaya

Uloma علماء mae se ek Aalim عالم aisa bhi hota hae jo apna ilm علم apne pas hi rakhta hae, aur us'e doosraun ko koi faida nahi milta hae, to uska muqam jahannam ke pehle darje mae hoga

Ek Aalim aisa hota hae, jab usko koi aur nasihat karta hae to woh nak mu chadhata hae (starts making faces) aur khud doosraun ko nasihat karta hae to sakhti se kaam leta hae, uska muqam bhi jahannam ke doosre darje mae hae

Ek Aalim aisa bhi hota hae jo chahta hae ke ilm علم sirf sahebane daulat ke pas ho, aur masakeen (poor) us'se mehroom rahein, uska muqam jahannam ke teesre darje mae hae

Ek Aalim aisa hota hae jo ilm علم ke ba're mae badshahaun ka tariqa ikhteyar karta hae, ke koi bhi uski baat ko kaat nahi sakta hae, uska muqam jahannam mae 4 chouthe darje mae hoga

Ek Aalim aisa bhi hae jo Yahud (jews) aur Nasara (christians) ke ahadees aur riwaiyataun ki talash mae rahta hae, takeh apni riwaiyataun mae isafa kare, aisa aalim jahannam ke panchwain tabqe mae hoga

Ek Aalim aisa hota hae jo fatwe dene ka shauqeen hota hae, halankeh khud kuch nahi janta, uska muqam chehte 6 tabqe mae hoga

[Fatwa= woh hukum e Islam jo na koran se ho, na Nabi ki Hadees se, aur na hi sunnat e Nabi se ho, na hi ahle baet se ho]

Aur ek Aalim aisa bhi hota hae jo apne Ilm aur aqal ke zareeyeh se sirf logoan per apna asar qaem karna chahta hae, aur aise shaqs ka thikana jahannam ke aakhri saatwae 7  tabqe mae hoga

Is baat se saaf zaher hota hae ke Ilm hasil karna hi kafi nahi balkeh Aalim ka, Aalim bane rahna bhi hae, aur apne ilm ka sahi istemal karna hae

Issi liye Nabi e kareem ne farmaya

لا تمنعوا العلم أهله فتظلموهم ولا تعطوه  لغير أهله فتظلموهم

Jo ahel (deserving) ho unse ilm ko mat roko, warna tum unper zulm karoge, aur jo na ahel ho (undeserving) unko ilm na do, warna tum ilm per, aur us aadmi per bhi zulum karoge

Isiliye ilm hasil karne ke adaab, tor tariqe aur uske bahut se lawazimat bhi zaroori hain

Deen ke uloom ko hasil karne ke liye chend (few) sharaet (conditions) lazim hain, jis baat per hamare buzrugane deen bhi badi ahmiyat dete hain

Jaise ke hum bhi jab Hijrat e Dai mae padhne gae, to hum se yehi sawal kiya gaya tha ke kaunsi, kaunsi, Dawat ki kitab padhe hain, kis ke hukum, wa ijazat se padhe hain, kis ke pas padhe hain, (padhane wala kaun) aur kiya puri mukamil padhe hain, aur kiya tarteeb ke saath (usually prescribed order) se padhe hain

Allah taala, hum ko tawfeeq de ke hum deen ke uloom ko, uske tariqe se padhe takeh woh ilm hamare Dil tak utar jae, aur hamari sahi Surat e Roohani bane, jo hamari is duniya ki asal kamai hae, jo hamari "ilmi" aur "amali" ibadataun ka natija hae
 
🌿🌷🌿🌷🌿🌷🌿🌷

11/22/15, 5:53:41 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): ¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤

السلام علیکم ورحمةالله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Hokoma حكماء aur filasefa   (philosophers) ke pas Ilm ke hasil karne ke 2 do zareeyah hote hae, ek to ye hae ke insaan, mufeed ke pas, apne ustad, teacher, ya Maa Baap se ilm hasil karta hae, aur uske alawa sunne, dekhne, mehsoos karne, aur tajrube se bhi bahut kuch sikhta hae

Aur ek woh bhi kaifiyat hoti hae, ke jab kisi insaan ka apne taqwa, parhezgari, ilmi wa amali ibadataun ki wajeh se uska Nafs wa Dil itna pak wa saaf hojata hae ke Allah taala khud uske Dil mae uloom e rabbani ko muqtalif zareeyeh se usper warid karta hae, aur woh zareeyeh Wahi وحى hae, ilham الهام hae, taeed تأييد hae, faiz فيض waqera hain, aur ye sab jab hi mumkin hosakta hae, jab ke insaan ka Dil saaf shafaf Aine ki tarah (pure) hojae

Issi nazriye ko kiya hi behtreen andaz mae Moulana Jalaluddin Rumi ne apne tashbihat mae pesh kiya hae

Dil ke liye aine (mirror) ki tashbih (example) aam hae, tammam kaenat (universe) dil ke aine mae munakish (reflect) hosakti hae, laikin is inekaas (reflection) ke liye Dil ka aina saaf shafaf (clear) hona zaroori hae,

Hirs (greed), lalaj, kina wa hasad, maal wa daulat ki ha'was (desires), shehwatain aur duniyadari us aina ko zang aalud (rusted) kardeti hae,

Insaan ke liye bahut behter hae ke Seena be-kina ho, aur Dil aur zameer be-daag ho, aur us waqt, tammam kaenat ka Ilm uske dil mae munakish hojaega (reflect karega), aur tammam kaenat ki marefat us'e hasil hojaegi

Issi baat ko batane aur samjhane ke liye Moulana Rumi ne ek tashbih di hae,

Aap likhte hain keh ek Badshah tha, usne Rome aur China se sculptures aur artists ko apna fun (art) dikhane ke liye, aur ek dusre se muqabela (compete) karne ke liye bulaya

Ek mahal ke aamne saamne (opposite) dewaar per unki apni musawari (painting & sculpture) banane ko kha aur dono dewaar ke darmiyan mae ek purdah (curtain) dal diya

Chinese aur Romans apna kaam shru kiye, Chinese bahut mahnat karte gaye aur bahut hi khubsurat sculptures aur paintings banaye aur Romans ne sirf aur sirf apni dewaar ko saaf karte gaye, itna rub aur polish kiye ke woh aina (Mirror) ki tarah saaf aur chamakne laga, aur reflections usme saaf nazar aane lage

Jab dono ke beech (in between) ka purdah  (curtain) uthaya gaya to Chinese ke tammam khubsurat sculpture aur paintings Romans ki polish ki huvi dewaar jo ab aina ki tarah chamak rahi thi, usper reflect karne lagi, aur lag aisa raha tha keh ye sab Romans ki dewaar per moujud hae

Moulana Rumi farmate hain ke yehi haal Ilm e Haqeeqat ka hae Jisne bhi apne Dil apne Nafs (soul) ko itna pak, saaf, aur shafaaf (clean pure) karliya hae, to phir woh tammam ilm e Haqeeqi, aur uske Anwaar uske Dil mae reflect karne lagte hain

Bas insaan ko chahye ke apna Dil ko hamesha saaf rakhe, to khud baqud (automatically) tammam uloom uske Dil mae munakish (reflect) honge

Allah taala hamare Dilaun mae itmenan paida kare aur Dil ko is duniya ki kudurataun, shehwataun  aur buraiyaun se pak rakhe

إلا بذكر الله تطمئن القلوب

Beshak Allah taala ke zikar se, Dil itmenan hasil karte hain

Deen ka aala, pak haqeeqi uloom hasil karne se pehle, hum ko apna Dil saaf karna chahye, aur us baat ki buniyaad woh hamare aqlaqiyaaat, sahi mamlaat, adaab waqera hain,

(strength of character, and behaviour hae)

¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤¤

11/24/15, 8:12:46 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

قال الله تبازك و تعالى في كتابه العزيز الحكيم

Allah taala Koran e Majeed mae irshad farmaya hae

وان الساعة آتية ﻻريب فيها وان لله يبعث من في القبور

Tahqeeq keh Qiyamat aane wali hae, is baat mae koi shak nahi, aur Allah taala, unko jo khabraun mae hae yaqinan uthaega

Aur Nabi e kareem ka irshad e mubarak hae ke

كل ما هوآت قريب

Har aane wali chez khreeb hae, aur har aane wali chez mae Qiyamat bhi shamil hae, to Nabi e Kareem ke irshad ke mutabiq Qiyamat bhi khreeb hae.

Nabi e kareem ko ye baat kehe 1400 saal ke khreeb guzar gaye, magar Qiyamat aati hi nahi, asal baat ye hae ke hum apni umar ke lihaaz se waqt aur mudat ka khyal karte hain, magar Allah ke pas ki muddataun ka hum hisaab nahi kar sakte, uske hisaab kitab aur hain

Aaj puri Duniya cheekh uthi hae ke woh waqt kab aega, puri Duniya be'chain hae aur tadap rahi hae, aur Allah taala farmata hae

ان لله عنده علم الساعة

Beshak Qiyamat ki ghadi (time) ka ilm Allah hi ko hae, aur bahut se jagaah Allah taala ne rasekhoona fil ilm bhi farmaya hae (who has indepth knowledge)

الراسخون فى العلم

 ko bhi Allah ke saath jodh diya

Nabi e kareem ka ye bhi irshad e mubarak hae

 اقتربت الساعة ولا يزداد الناس علي الدنيا الاحرصا ولا يزداد عنهم الا بعدا  

Qiyamat khreeb achuki hae, aur logoan ki hirs wa lalaj duniya ke liye badhti hi ja rahi hae, aur jitni duniya ki lalaj badh rahi hae, utni hi duniya un se dur (away) hoti ja rahi hae,

Aaj hum sab dekh rahe hain ke, duniya ki talab jitni badhte ja rahi hae, utni hi duniya hum se dur hoti ja rahi hae

Aur phir Nabi e kareem ka irshad hae, jab Qiyamat khreeb hogi

       ولا يزدد الا شدة ولا الدنيا الا ادبارا ولا الناس الا شحا

Jitna log apne mamlaat mae shidat ikhteyar karenge utne hi kirdar aur aqlaq (character & behaviour) mae pasti (downfall), aur buqul aur kanjusi badhte hi jaegi, aur aaj mamlaat apni shidat per pohunch gaye hain, extremes per pohuch gaye hain, chahe woh duniya ke mulkaun ke ho, ya phir apas ke bhai bhen ya miya biwi, Maa baap wa aulad ke ho

Aur ye duniya ki pasti (downward trend) aqlaqi pasti, aur nafsa nafsi ki wajeh se hirs, lalaj, kanjusi bukhul (greed & selfishness) aam hochuke hae

Aaj hum pereshaan kun halaat, (extemely disturbing) takaleef, aafatain aur pareshaniyaun ko dekhte hain to foran kehdete hain ki, yeh Qiyamat ke a'saar (signs) aur nishaniyan hae aur is baat mae koi shak nahi ke bahut hadd tak ye sachai hae, magar haqeeqat mae in a'saar aur nishaniyun ko Nabi e kareem ne bahut pehle bata chuke hain, aapka ek irshad hae

    اول ما يرفع من هذا الامة الحياء والامانة

Sab se pehli chez jo is ummat e Mohammedi se jaegi woh sharm wa haya, aur amanat dari hae, aur sharm wa haya ka direct taluq woh aurataun se hae, aur aaj be'hayai aur be sharmi aam baat hae aur amanat dari, aap sab jaante hae ki kitni rah'gai hae, aur jis tarah Nabi e kareem ne pehli chez jo Qiyamat ke khreeb khatam hojaegi kha woh "haya" wa "amanatdari" hae,

aap hi ka ek irshad ye bhi hae

وآخرماتفقدون من دينكم الصلوة

Aur sab se aakhir mae jo tum apne deen se kho doge woh Namaz hae, kiya ye ahadees aaj hi ke zamama ke liye nahi ?

Aaj puri duniya har mazhab, har qom, Qiyamat ka, ek hisaab ke din ka, intezar kar rahi hae, aaj ki thaki hari, pereshan, takaleef mae ghiri ye duniya us tasavur se, us Qiyamat ke intezar se sukoon hasil karti hae, aaj ke insaan ki bechaini, pereshani, be itmenani, alfaz nahi ke uska izhaar karsake, chand hi lamhe mae ghreeb ameer hojata hae, ameer ghreeb, chand hi lamhe mae badshahat khatam hojati hae hukumatain badal jati hae, kiya kisi aur zamane mae kabhi itni tezi se itni tabdiliyaan hote kisi ne dekha hae, insaani aqal hairan hae

Aur Nabi kareem ne farmaya ke, agar logoan per bura zamana aya, to ye na samajhna ke yeh bahut bura waqt hae, balkeh har ane wala zamana aur ziyada bura hoga, shadeed hoga aur jaisa keh ahadees aur Aulia Allah ke aqwal mae aya hae, jo Qiyamat ki nishaniyaan bayan ki gai hae, aurtaun ki mardaun per kasrat, barish mae garmi, garmi mae barish, mausam ki bade paimane per tabdili bachaun ka ma baap ke liye baas e ranj wa ghum hona, kamine aur khrab log nek logoan ke kaam karna, mard aur aurat apne hum jins (same sex) se jinsi (sexual) taluq rakhna, zalzalle toofan sailab, waqera waqera

Jis chez ka intezar ziyada hota hae uska zikar bhi ziyada hota hae, Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib farmate hain

اكثروا ذكرالموت ويوم خروجكم من قبوركم

Tum apne maut ka zikar ziyada karo aur apne khabraun se uthae jane ke din ko bhi ziyada yaad karo, yane Qiyamat ke din ko bhi ziyada yaad karo

Allah taala hum momineen ko in Qiyamat ke aafataun se, balaun se un Aulia Allah ke wasile se mahfooz rakhe

  لا حول ولا قوة الا بالله العلي العظيم
〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰〰
 
Ye mazmoon Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb muqaddus ka aaj se 56 saal pehle "Zia ul emaan" ke parche (magazine) mae "A'saar e Qiyamat" (signs of doomsday) ke unwaan se chapa tha, (was printed)

Allah Taala aap ke Nazrat hum sab per jari rakhe

Haqeer ne usko bahut hi muqtasar aur asaan alfaz mae bayan kiya hae  
➰➰➰➰➰➰➰

11/26/15, 10:21:41 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
جمعة مبارك

Moulana Al Mansub Hazrat Ziaali saheb muqaddus ka youm e wafat khreeb hae

Aapki tehriri (writings) yaadgaaraun mae aapke woh mazameen bhi hain jo aap ne "Zia ul Emaan" ke parche (magazine) mae, 13 saal editor ki haisiyat se har issue mae ek mazmun " بصائر ومعارف" ke unwaan (heading) se likhte the, jo taqreeben 30 se bhi ziyada mazameen hain

ilmi, adabi, aur uloom e Ilahi se arasta (decorated) mazameen hote the, ussi mae aapka ek mazmun jo موت "Maut" per bhi tha usko mae bilkul hi asaan zabaan aur mukhtasar alfaz mae pesh kar raha hun

Aap farmate hain ;

maut ek aisa raaz hae jo musalsil insaan ke zahen ki koshish ke baujud bhi hal nahi hosaka

Allah taala ne maut ko "Amrullah" yane Allah ka hukum kha hae, koran kehta hae

حَتَّىٰ جَاءَ أَمْرُ اللَّهِ وَغَرَّكُم بِاللَّهِ الْغَرُورُ

 یہاں تک کہ خدا کا حکم آ پہنچا اورخدا کےبارےمیں تم کو (شیطان) دغاباز دغا دیتا رہا

Yahan tak ke Allah ka hukum a'gaya, aur Allah ke mamle mae shaitaan dhoka deta raha

aur phir farmaya ;

وَأَن لَّيْسَ لِلْإِنسَانِ إِلَّا مَا سَعَىٰ
اور یہ کہ انسان کو وہی ملتا ہے جس کی وہ کوشش کرتا ہے

Insaan ke liye wohi hasil hae jo uski koshish thi

Koran majeed apni ayaataun mae "Maut" ke mutaliq bahut se mamlaat per roshni dala hae, usme sabse pehli baat jisper hamara Emaan bhi hona chahye, woh ye hae ke

هُوَ يُحْيِي وَيُمِيتُ وَإِلَيْهِ تُرْجَعُونَ

وہی جان بخشتا اور (وہی) موت دیتا ہے اور تم لوگ اسی کی طرف لوٹ کر جاؤ گے

Wohi zinda karta hae, aur wohi maarta hae, aur usiki taraf lautae jaoge (laut kar jana hae)

Ab sawal ye hae ke maut se kis ko chutkara hae ?

Kiya maut sirf chand (few) logoan ke liye maqsoos hae ?

Allah taala ka qol hae

كُلُّ نَفْسٍ ذَائِقَةُ الْمَوْتِ
ہر متنفس کو موت کا مزا چکھنا ہے

إِنَّكَ مَيِّتٌ وَإِنَّهُم مَّيِّتُونَ
(اے پیغمبر) تم بھی مرجاؤ گے اور یہ بھی مرجائیں گے

Har nafs maut ka maza chakhne wala hae, Ae Nabi aap bhi inteqal karoge aur woh sab bhi inteqal karenge

Kiya koi aisa muqam bhi hae, jahan maut ke haath na pohunchte hain ?

Allah taala Koran e Majeed mae irshad farmata

أَيْنَمَا تَكُونُوا يُدْرِككُّمُ الْمَوْتُ وَلَوْ كُنتُمْ فِي بُرُوجٍ مُّشَيَّدَةٍ

تم کہیں رہو موت تو تمہیں آ کر رہے گی خواہ بڑے بڑے محلوں میں رہو ا

Tum jahan kahi bhi maujud ho, maut tum ko yaqinan pa'legi agarche ke tum masboot khilaun (fort) mae kiyu na ho

Kiya, kisi ka waqt e muqrara (maut ka waqt) aane ke baad woh tal (delay) sakta hae ?

لِكُلِّ أُمَّةٍ أَجَلٌ إِذَا جَاءَ أَجَلُهُمْ فَلَا يَسْتَأْخِرُونَ سَاعَةً وَلَا يَسْتَقْدِمُونَ

 ہر ایک امت کے لیے (موت کا) ایک وقت مقرر ہے۔ جب وہ وقت آجاتا ہے تو ایک گھڑی بھی دیر نہیں کرسکتے اور نہ جلدی کرسکتے

Jab tum mae se kisi ko maut aati hae to ek lamhe bhi aage, peeche nahi hosakti hae

Aur kiya kisi ko khabar bhi hae ke woh kis zameen mae inteqal karne wala hae ?

Koran is baat ko yun farmata hae ;

وَمَا تَدْرِي نَفْسٌ بِأَيِّ أَرْضٍ تَمُوتُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَلِيمٌ خَبِيرٌ

 اورکوئی متنفس نہیں جانتا کہ کس سرزمین میں اُسے موت آئے گی بیشک خدا ہی جاننے والا (اور) خبردار ہے

Koi bhi insaan ye nahi keh sakta ke woh kis zameen mae, kis muqam per inteqal karega

Aur koran farmata hae ke jab kisi ki maut ka waqt aate hae to farishte uski Rooh ko qabz karte hain

إِذَا جَاءَ أَحَدَكُمُ الْمَوْتُ تَوَفَّتْهُ رُسُلُنَا وَهُمْ لَا يُفَرِّطُونَ

جب تم میں سے کسی کی موت آتی ہے تو ہمارے فرشتے اس کی روح قبض کرلیتے ہیں اور وہ کسی طرح کی کوتاہی نہیں کرتے

Moulana Ali Salwatullah alehe farmate hain ke agar tumhe maut ka waqt malum hota to tumhari tammam umeedaun aur arzuaun per pani phir jata

Aur yeh Allah taala ke hukum ko pohunchane wale kaun hain ?

To Allah taala farmata hae

قُلْ يَتَوَفَّاكُم مَّلَكُ الْمَوْتِ الَّذِي وُكِّلَ بِكُمْ ثُمَّ إِلَىٰ رَبِّكُمْ تُرْجَعُونَ

کہہ دو کہ موت کا فرشتہ جو تم پر مقرر کیا گیا ہے تمہاری روحیں قبض کرلیتا ہے پھر تم اپنے پروردگار کی طرف لوٹائے جاؤ گے

Kehdo ke tum ko Maut ka farishta (malak ul maut) qabz (get hold of you) karleta hae, aur tum ko wafat (maut) deta hae jaisa ke tumhare liye muqrar kardiya gaya hae

Nabi e kareem ne maut ke waqt ka tayun (indication) karte huve farmaya, ke koi aadmi us waqt tak nahi mar sakta jab tak ke woh apni rozi puri na karle, aur insaan apni rozi ke mutaliq la ilm (ignorant) hae, is tarah ek lailm (unknown) baat ko doosre se jod diya, aur maut ka raaz, raaz hi raha

Ameer ul Momineen Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alehe farmate hae ke tum maut ko sab se badi musibat na khyal karo, maut se ziyada saqt woh musibat hae, jis'se najat pa'ne ke liye insaan maut ki arzoo kare

Maut se badhkar koi sachai nahi, aur umeedaun se badhkar koi chez jhooti nahi

Maut se badhkar insaan ko koi baat gunahun se bachane wali nahi (aksar maut ke khyal aur dar (fear) se insaan gunahun se ruk jata hae)

Maut se ziyada jald aane wale chez koi nahi, ek mommin ke liye maut se badhkar aaram aur rahat pohunchane wali chez koi nahi

Maut se ghafil shaqs per hairat wa tajub hae halankeh maut us'se ghaflat nahi karti

Maut ek raaz hae aur ek raaz hi rahega, magar ye ek niha'yat hi mohmal (impossible) khyal hae ke insaan maut ke baad fana (destroy) hojata hae, balke sach to yehi hae ke haqeeqi baqa (eternal life) woh maut hi se shru hoti hae

Aur marne ke baad kiya hota hae is baat ko kisi shaer ne kiya khoob kha hae

بعد مرنےکےجو پوچهو تمکوکیا پیش آیگا
 میں کہوں گا وہ پیش آتا ہے پیدائش کے بعد

Aur kisi ne kiya hi behtreen sher khe hain
 
زندگی اور موت دو ساتھی ہیں جو ہر روح کو

باری باری سے لیجاتے ہیں منزل کی طرف

ہر نفس عمر گزشتہ کی ہے میت فانی

زندگی نام ہےمرمرکےجیے جانےکا

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum "Maut" ki haqeeqat ko deen ke uloom ke zareeyeh samjhe takeh woh raaz, hamare liye raaz na rahe

Arre haqeeqi zindagi to uski hae Jisne maut ko samajh liya, jaan liya, aur hamesha maut ke liye taiyar raha

🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘🔘

11/26/15, 10:30:12 AM: Asif: AsSalaamAlaykum Ishaq Bhai. I finally got to catch up!! MashaAllah! These are soooo amazing!! Thank you so much for sharing with me!!

11/26/15, 10:35:54 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): Wa alaikum us salaam

11/26/15, 10:36:06 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): Umeed ke ache honge

11/26/15, 10:36:16 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): Safar acha raha hoga

11/29/15, 10:48:20 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): ▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
 
▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

Aaj Walid e Muqaddus Hazrat Moulana Al-Mansub Ziaali saheb ka youm e wafat hae, 19 safar 1417 Hijri youm e Jumua aap Hyderabad mae inteqal farmaye

Aap hamesha yehi farmata ki mere inteqal ka din Jumua ka hoga, aur Allah taala ne aapki baat rakhi aur Jumua ke din zawal ke baad aapka inteqal huva

Aapka woh noorani chehra, halki si muskurahat, robdar shaqsiyat, Duwaat aur buzrugane deen se aqeedat wa taat, Ikhwan se hamdardi wa mohabbat, bachaun se shafaqat, zaeefaun ki izzat aur hurmat [respect & consideration for elderly] bimar se hamdardi pareshan haal se muwasat, aapke kin kin khubiyun ko yaad kiya jae

Allah taala hum ko aapki wasiyat aur nasihataun aur aapke bataye huve raaste per chalne ki hidayat de

Allah taala ka irshad hae

كُتِبَ عَلَيْكُمْ إِذَا حَضَرَ أَحَدَكُمُ الْمَوْتُ إِن تَرَكَ خَيْرًا الْوَصِيَّةُ لِلْوَالِدَيْنِ وَالْأَقْرَبِينَ بِالْمَعْرُوفِ حَقًّا عَلَى الْمُتَّقِينَ

Agar tum mae se koi maut ke khreeb ajae, aur kuch maal chod raha hae to usko chahye ke achi wasiyat kare, apne waledain ke liye aur rishte daraun ke liye, aur ye haq baat hae mutaqeen logoan ke liye

Aur Rasulullah ka ye qol hae ke tum mae se kisi ko laeq (doesnt suit one) nahi ke woh do raatain bhi guzare magar is haal mae ke uska wasiyat nama (will) uske sar ke neeche na ho

Rasulullah ne farmaya ke jis kisi ne bhi maut se qabal umda (good) wasiyat nahi karta hae to woh uski aqal aur murawat ki kami ka saboot hae   

Nabi e kareem ka irshad hae ke tum duniya ke mamlaat ke muqabil deeni umur (mamlaat) mae wasiyat karo, woh ziyada ahem hain,

Ek shaqs ne Moulana Ali se pucha tha ke mere pas to kuch maal bhi nahi hae, to phir kiya mae wasiyat nahi karsakta ?

Moula ne farmaya ke tum taqwa (parhezgari) ki wasiyat karo, aur maal aur daulat to bahut mamuli chez hae, maal to tumhare warisaun (heirs, beneficiaries) mae, wirasat ke khanoon ke hisaab se taqseem ho hi jaega, usme tumhara koi dakhal nahi, siwae iske ke 1/3 ka jisme tumhara haq hae, aur iske liye bhi Moulana Ali ne ye kha ke mae to ziyada pasand karta hun ke tum 1/5 mae hi wasiyat karo

Rasulullah ne bhi jo wasiyat ki thi, aap ne kha tha ke mae tum ko "Nafs" ki khaslataun (habits) ke taluq se wasiyat karta hun, aur usme se chand wasiyat ye the ke tum jhoot kabhi na kehna, qiyanat na karna, yateem se hamdardi rakhna, rishtedari ka khyal rakhna, waqera waqera

Hazrat Ziaali saheb muqaddus ne apni wasiyat (will), jo aap ne 1988 mae likhi thi usme ahle jamaat, wa khususan ahle khandaan ko nasihat ki hae

Aap wasiyat ke akhir mae farmate hae;

Hum akhir mae (in the conclusion of the will) apni aulad, apne aziz bhaiyun, aur aziz behnaun, aur tammam aziz wa aqarib (near & dear) ahle khandaan ko, aur Ikhwan e Jamaat e Sulaimani ko nasihat karte hain, ke Allah taala ka taqwa kare, Ilm e deen hasil kare, aur jumla (total) ibadat (religious practices in totality) ko apna watira (routine habit) banalae, hamesha mutafiq aur mutahid (unified & one) rahain, yaad rakhe ke mawasaat [ghum aur musibat mae saath dena, shareek rahna, hamdardi aur support ka ishaar karna] wa hamdardi mommin ke khaas aqlaq (characteristic) hain, akhir mae hum ye khenge (will like to add) jo hamare piyare Babahazrat Muqaddus Hazrat Moulana Mansub Ishak saheb ne unke inteqal per farmaya tha;

"Apni, apne khandaan ki, aur apne Ikhwan ki izzat wa hurmat (dignity & respect) ka khaas khyal rakhna"

Phir akhir mae aap likhte hain;

"Hum Allah taala se, be'wasile Aime tahereen (all the Imams) aur Duwaat e akrameen (karamat aur buzrugi wale Duwaat) apni maqferat aur husne khatama (achi maut wa akehrat) ke talib hain"

        استغفر الله العظيم وأتوب إليه وما توفيقي الا بالله العلي العظي

Hum Allah taala se isteqfar talab karte hain aur hamare gunahun se toba ke talabgar hain, Allah taala ke siwae, koi hum ko tawfeeq wa sahi raaste ki rahnumai aur hidayat dene wala nahi

Akhir mae aap wasiyat mae likhte hain,

Dua ka talib aur Dua dene wala
ضيا علي

Aapki wasiyat kafi taweel (lengthy) hae, aap ne usme aur bhi bahut se mamlaat ka is'haar kiye hae, jaise ke

aap ne chand yateem ka khaas zikar kiya hae jinper shafaqat rakhne aur unki zimmedari lene ki takid kiye hain

karz lene se mana farmaya hae, aur yehi kha ke karz ka bojh, bahut bada bojh hota hae us'se bacho, hamesha dene wala haath bano lena wala nahi, aur issi tarah aap ne likha hae ke mera koi karz baqi nahi hae, aur agar bhul se koi ho, to tum aulad ki zimmedari hae ke usko ada kardo

Aap ne chand mazurian (handicap) ka bhi maqsoos zikar kiya hae ki unka khaas khyal rakhna

Issi tarah aap ne apni khabar ki jagaah ke liye bhi khaesh ka ishaar farmaya hae ke Hyderabad mae apne walid Hazrat Ishak saheb ke pau ke rukh (dirction) per aap dafan hona pasand farmate hae, aur apne inteqal se ek saal pehle jagaah muqrar ki thi, aur Allah ka ahsaan hae ke aap ko woh jagaah naseeb huvi

Mae akhir mae Moulae kaenat ki is nasihat per khatam karta hun jo aap ne apni aulad ko ki thi

يا بنئ احي قلبك بالموعظة، وامته بالزهادة، وقوه بايقين، ونوره بحكمة.

Ae mere bete apne Dil ko waaz wa nazihat ke zareeyeh zinda kar,

Zohad ke zareeyeh apne Dil ko maar dal (khaeshat e nafs ko zohod se maar, usko khatam karde),

Yaqeen ke zareeyeh Dil ko taqatwaar bana,

Ilm wa Hikmat ka zareeyeh Dil ko noorani bana

▪▪▪▪▪▪▪▪

12/1/15, 8:43:57 AM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Aaj 21 Safar ul Muzaffar hae aur aaj ek azeem Dai Syedna wa Moulana "Falsuf- e-Zamana" (Philosopher of his time) Syedna Dai Husamuddarain Gulam Hussain ibne al Mansoob ul muqaddus Moulana Farhat Ali saheb ka youm e wafat hae

Aapki paedaesh 1 jamadil awal 1274 hijri Hyderabad mae huvi aur Bambai mae youme jumeraat 21 Safar 1357 hijri inteqal farmaye aur Jumua ke roz din mae tadfeen amal mae ayi

Aap 1 ek saal 7 saat mahine 11 din Dai ki haisiyat se rahe, magar taqreeban 22 saal khalifatut Dai ki haisiyat se rahe
 
Syedna Faiz e Ali bin Syedna Sulaiman Saheb   qadasalahu rooh'hohu ke baad aap pehle Hindustani Dai hain, aapki itni karamatain aur fazilatain hain ke kiya likhe aur kiya na likhe bahut mushkil hae

Do baatain jo mujhe bahut ziyada aapki mutasir ki woh ek to aapka talib e ilmi (student) ke zamane mae aapka Ilm ke liye koshish aur jiddo jahed (struggle)

Aap pehle Dai hain jo awaam ke madrese "Dar ul uloom deoband" bhi taleem ke liye tashreef legaya
 
Aapka mutaleya (reading of books) bahut hi wasi (vast) tha, aap sirf deen ke uloom per puri tarah havi the balkeh aap duniya ke uloom science philosophy etc per bahut hi gehri nazar rakhte the, Arabi ke alawa Urdu, Gujrati aur Farsee bhi jante the

Aap Allama Iqbal jo farsee aur urdu ke mashoor shaer the unko bahut shoq se padhte the aur unke farsee ashar bahut quote karte,

Aap Farsee zabaan ke zabardast aalim the aur farsee kalam (verses) bahut kehte

Issi tarah aapka Arabi manzum kalam (verses) bhi bahut hain

Aap ke pass Dawat ki kitabaun ke alawa, awaam ki kitabaun ka bhi bahut bada aur nayaab zakhira (collection) mojud tha

Aapki bahut si tasnifaat (authored books) hain, jinme chahel sabaq urdu aur arabi, Shareh ul masail, aur Khutrun Nada, iske alawa Haqaeq mae bi bahut si kitabain hain  

Deoband (awaam ka deeni madrese) ke taleem ke zamane ka mashoor hae ke aap isha (raat)) ke khane ke baad padhte to fajar tak mutalea (reading & study) karte rehte, puri raat aap jagte

aap aksar farsee ka ye sher padhte jiske mane (meaning) ye hote

"Kitabaun ka mutalea (reading & understanding)
Karke apni jhalat (ignorance) ke parde utha"

"Kitabe jama karlene se jahalat ke parde nahi uth sakte"

Doosri khubi wa fazilat jo hum sab bhi hasil karsakte hain, aur humko karna bhi chahye, woh aapki, aapke walid e muqaddus Moulana Almansoob Farhat Ali saheb ki qidmat thi, badi dil wa jaan se aap'ne qidmat ki, balke aap ne Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb ki bhi bahut qidmat ki jo aapke roohani walid aur sasur bhi hote the

Allah taala ke karam wa hidayat se hum mae aapki sirf ye do khubi bhi paida hojae, to hum bhi inshallah bahut kuch hasil karsakte hain

Ilm ke liye dil wa jaan se raat din jaag kar mahnat karna

Aur apne maa baap ki purre sache Dil wa jaan se khidmat, jis tarah koran farmata hae keh tum unko "uff" bhi na kehna

Aapke mazar e mubarak per Hazrat moulana Ishak saheb ne ye ayaat kanda (engrave) karvai hae

       فوجد عبدا من عبادنا اتينه رحمة من عندنا وعلمنه من لدنا علما

Unhune hamare bandaun mae se ek bande ko paya, jisko humne apne pas se "REHMAT " di, aur apne pas se "ILM" bakhsha tha

Koran ne ye do sifaat (qualities) hazrat e Qizer alahe salaam ki bayan ki hain, jo keh Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain saheb muqaddas per bhi puri tarah sadir aati hae

Allah taala Syedna al muqaddus ke nazrat hum sab per jari rakhe

🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲

Syedna Gulam Husain saheb muqaddas ne khud ki Mansubiat per taqreer farmai thi jiska unwaan (subject)

SCIENCE & RELIGION

Tha, jo Zia ul Emaan mae do Waqt print bhi huva hae, mae ne do saal pehle what'sapp per likha tha agar kisi ko padhne ki khaesh hae to request bheje mae forward kardunga

Mazmun bahut lamba hae magar utna hi malumati aur dilchasp bhi hae

🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲

12/3/15, 12:06:48 PM: Ishaq Ziaee (Mulla): 🍁🌿🍁🌿🍁🌿🍁🌿

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
يوم الجمعة مبروك

                  المومن اخو المومن

Beshak tammam momineen ek doosre ke bhai bhai hain, mashoor Qol hae ke har insaan ek doosre insaan se isi tarah juda (connected) huva hae, jaisa ke ek insaan ke jism ka har azo (organ) uske jism se juda huve hae, magar afsoos ye hae ke aaj ke zamane mae ye baat bilkul sabit nahi hoti (doesnt stand true in our time)

Ek jah'ti, itehad wa ittefaq, khloos wa mohabbat, hamdardi, bhai char'gi, na sirf qaeraun (others) mae khatam ho rahi hae, balkeh mae agar kahu (if I say) ki khatam hochuki hae to ghalat na hoga, balkeh hum ikhwan e momineen mae bhi ab kam hi nazar aati hae, jo yaqinan bahut hi buri aur takleef de baat hae

Ye sab aise buniyaadi emaani sifaat (qualities) hain ke jiski wajeh se hum apni ahmiyat ek zamane se doosraun per manwate (proved) aye hain, aur woh baat hum mae is tarah khatam ho rahi hae, ke hum ko us baat ka ahsaas bhi nahi ho raha hae

Hamdardi, murawat, diljoi (dilasa dena, dil rakhna) ghumguzari (takleef aur ghum mae shareek hona) ye aadatain hum momineen ki fitrat mae thi, kisi ko maddad karke humko jo khushi hasil hoti thi, usko bayan karna mushkil hae, magar aaj ye halat hae ke ek doosre ki musibat per afsoos karna to bahut dur ki baat hae, balkeh hum to is baat ki koshish mae rahte hain ke kab hum apne pareshan mommin bhai ko taan aur tashi ka hadaf banae (target for our sarcastic & hurting remarks)

Rasulullah ki mashoor Hadees hae

لا تظهر الشماتة لاخيك فيعافيه الله ويبتليك

 
Tum apne mommin bhai ki musibat per khush na ho, aisa na ho ke Bari taala unko aafiyat de aur tujhe ussi takleef mae mubtela karde

Rasul ka ye qol hamara liye behtreen raah e amal (guidence) hae, issi tarah Rasulullah ne farmaya ke jo shaqs apne bhai ki poshida tor per maddad kiya, Allah taala usko duniya wa akherat mae maddad karega

Issi tarah farmaya ke jisne apne bhai ki ek duniyavi takleef ko kam karega to Allah taala, uske Qiyamat ke din ki ek takleef dur kardega, balkeh is hadd tak farmaya ke Allah taala bande ki us waqt tak maddad karte rahega jab tak ke woh apne mommin bhai ki maddad karte rahega

Aur hum apne mommin bhai ki maddad se anjaan hojate hae, bahane dhundte hain, aur phir apni hajataun ke pu're na hona per Allah taala se shikayat karte hain

Allah taala ne farmaya ke tum sile rahmi ko na todo (blood relationship) warna tum mal'un ملعون ho jao'ge (Allah ki lanat kiye huve) aur aaj hamare ye haal hain ke hum rishtedar ki maddad to dur ki baat hae, hum usse bachne ke liye bahane dhundte hain, balkeh hamari rishtedariun ko mehdood (limited) karke rakh diye hain,

Humko yaad hae ke walid muqaddus jitna صلة الرحم rishtedari ko bar'qarar rakhne ki takid karte the, shaed hi kisi aur baat ke liye nasihat kiye ho

Rasulullah ka mashoor Qol hae ke agar tum salan (curry) pakao to usme kam us kam shorba ziyada kardo, ta'keh tumhare padosi ko shorba hi mil jae, magar hum mae kitne logoan ko ahsaas hae ke hamare padosi per kiya guzarti hae, aaj to hum ye bhi nahi jaante ke hamare padosi kaun hain, aur iske uper hum'e bada fakher hae ke hum civilized society mae hae

Aiyadat e marza (bimar ki misaaj pursi) 12 sunnat e deen se ek hae, magar aaj hum bimar ki takleef, pareshani aur mushkilaat ka bhi ahsaas nahi karte, balkeh aise kaam kar jate hain ke bimar ki takleef aur bimari badh jae

Mommin to woh hota hae jo apne mommin bhai ke liye wohi pasand karta hae jo khud apne liye chahta hae, pasand karta hae

Ab zaroorat ye hae ke hum mommin ke sifat ke aina (Mirror) mae jhank (peep) kar dekhae ki hamari Emaani surat kaise nazar aati hae, haqeeqat ye hae ke hum apni hi badnuma surat se khoof zada ho jainge

Duniya daar e amal hae, jab tak hayat hae, moqa hae, mommin woh hae jo phisalta (slip) hae magar girta (fall) nahi sambhal jata hae,

Umeed per duniya qaem hae, khud ko, aur halaat ko badalte der nahi lagti, in mayusi ke zamane mae bhi umeed ki Kiran chamak rahi hae, yaqinan woh purani iqwat, mohabbat khloos jaag uthegi

Walid e Muqaddus hamesha farmate the ki ek mommin ki shaan tum kiya jano, kaisa bhi mommin kiyu na ho, tum usko bura mat kho, tum ko nahi malum ke woh kab badal jae aur acha banjae

Allah taala hum sabko tawfeeq de ke hum kam se kam aqlaqi tor per sache mommin ban'jae

أن من موجبات المغفرة إدخال السرور علي أخيك

Beshak maqferat ke asbab mae apne mommin bhai ko khush karna bhi hae

🌿🍁🌿🍁🌿🍁🌿🍁

Jo padhne ki khaesh rakhta hae mujhe message karsakta hae
