4/14/16, 1:40:11 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌾☘🌾☘🌾☘🌾☘

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
جمعة مبارك

"Love the neighbour as thy self"

Ye ek bahut hi mashoor Qol hae Essa Masih alehe salaam ka Injeel mae jo Christianity mae doosra sab se ahem commandment tasavur kiya jata, hukum e toheed yane Allah taala ko manne ke baad

Deen e Islam ne in tammam Ambia ki kitabaun ke achaiyun ko samet liya hae (brought togather) aur Koran e kareem mae jama kardiya hae

Deen Islam mae "padosi" ki utni hi ahmiyat wa qadar hae jitna ke Christianity mae hae, balkeh mae kahunga ke usse bhi ziyada hae

Rasul e kareem aur ahle baet e kiram ne bahut se aqwal "padosi" ke huquq ke taluq se bayan kiye hain

Hamare pass deen e Islam mae itni ziyada ahmiyat hae ke Moula Ali farmate hain ke mujhe kabhi kabhi ye gumaan (dil mae khyal ana) hota ke Rasulullah padosi ko wirasat mae na shareek karde (inheritance)

Majalis e Mustansaria mae jahan deen ke 7 saat farayaz aur 12 bara sunatain bataye hain waha bara sunnataun mae  "HIFZ UL JAAR" padosi ki hifazat karna bhi shammil hae

Koran ne teen kisim ke padosiun ka zikar farmaya hae

وَالْجَارِ ذِي الْقُرْبَىٰ وَالْجَارِ الْجُنُبِ وَالصَّاحِبِ بِالْجَنبِ

 Ek rishtedar padosi, ek padosi, aur ek pados mae saath rahne wala jaise safar ka saathi

Saat kisim ke padosi ye hain;

Ek woh padosi jo mommin bhai bhi hae aur rishtedar bhi hae, uske teen haq bante hain padosi ka haq, mommin bhai ka haq aur rishtedar hone ka haq

Doosra woh padosi hae jo rishtedaar hae, magar hum mazhab hum aqeeda nahi (from different religion) uske do haq bante hain

Ek woh hae jo padosi hae aur hum mazhab, hum aqeeda bhi hae, magar rishtedaar nahi uske bhi do haq hain

Ek woh padosi bhi hae jo sirf padosi hae, na rishtedari hae aur na hi hum mazhab hae uska sirf ek hi haq banta hae

Ek padosi woh hae jo tumhare kishti (boat) mae saath raha, usko bhi padosi ka haq hae

Ek woh bhi hae jo tumhari sawari (ghoda unt gadha waqaera) per saath safar kiya, woh bhi padosi gina jaega

Aur ek padosi woh hae jo tumhare taleem yane istefade ke darmiyan saath raha jisko hum classmate kehenge chahe woh madrese ka ho ya deeni asbaq mae saath raha ho, aise padosi ki sab se ziyada hurmat aur ahmiyat hae, muqable mae doosre tammam padosi saàthiyun ke

padosi ke mutaliq Rasulullah ki Hadees hae

أكرم جارك وان كان كافرا أو أكرم ضيفك كان كافرا

Tum padosi ko karamat wa izzat do agarche woh kafir hi kiyu na ho aur mehmaan ko karamat do agarche ke woh فاجر fajir kiyu na ho

Padosi ke taluq se 12 adaab ye hain

Padosi apne padosi ke ghar mae tak jhak (peeping) na kare

padosi ki baataun ko chup kar na sunne
(Not to listen to the private conversation secretly)

Agar tumko unki koi khangi (private & personal) baat malum hojae to usko raaz hi rakhe
(If you come to know something of your neighbours which is private you should keep it to yourself)

Tum unse us mauzu  (subject) per baat mat karo jo woh sunna pasand nahi karte hain

Tum unko woh chez mat dikhaya karo jo woh dekhna pasand nahi karte

Koi choti choti zaroorat ki chez woh talab kare to us'se inkar na karo

Woh agar kisi bhi halat ya haisiyat se agar tum se kamtar hain to unper fakher aur kibir na karo

Aur agar woh tum se kisi bhi haisiyat, yane chahe ilm ho ya daulat, ya aur koi baat mae tum se badhkar aur aala ho to hargis unse hasad na karo

Agar woh pareshan haal ho to jitna bhi tum se mumkin ho tum unki maddad karo

Tumko agar unki koi raaz ki baat malum hojae to usko chupae aur raaz hi rakho, ya agar woh koi raaz tum per zaher kare to usko amanat rakho logoan per zaher mat karo
 
Unko kisi kisim ki bhi takleef na pohunchao jaise ke aaj kal hota hae TV zor se chalate hain ya cheek cheek kar baatain karte hain, ya raat der tak zor zor se baatain karte hae isme har woh baat shammil hae jis'se padosi ko takleef hoti hae

Aur padosi ke tumko takleef pohunchane per sabar karo aur thandak wa sharafat se usko samjhao

Yeh sab baatain Allah taala ki taraf se mommin ka imtehan hae, aur in baataun per sabar karna wohi taqwa hae

Moula Ali farmate hae Char baatain insaan ke liye badi badbaqti (curse) hae bura padosi, buri aulad, buri aurat (biwi) aur tang chota ghar (cramped house)

Aur Rasulullah ne Moulana Ali ko wasiyat (nasihat) ki keh ae farzand tum safar karne se pehle safar ke saathi ke ba're mae jaan lo malumaat karlo aur ghar khreedne se pehle padosi ko dekh lo unke bare mae jaan lo

Moulana Ali ne to is hadd tak pados ke taluq se kaha hae

جنبوا موتاكم في مدافنهم جار السوء  فإن الجار الصالح ينفع في الآخرة كما ينفع في الدنيا

Apne mayat ko bure padosi ke pas dafan karne se bachao kiyunke nek acha padosi aakherat mae bhi ussi tarah faida deta hae jis tarah duniya ki zindagi mae deta hae

Humko hamare deen per qaem rahna hae to in padosiun ke huquq ko janna chahye aur usper amal karna chahye

وما توفيقي الا بالله العلي العظيم

☘🌾☘🌾☘🌾☘🌾
4/17/16, 1:58:23 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀

 السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Kiya hi behtreen kalam farmaya hae Imam e Jafar e Sadiq Salwatullah aleha ne عفو (affo) ke bare mae, yane kisi ko maaf karne ke bare mae

Inteqam wa badla lene ki puri qudrat aur takhat (power & strength) rakhte huve bhi kisi ko maaf karna woh sunnat (tariqa) hae Ambia wa Mursaleen ki

Maaf karne وعفو ke bare mae aap farmate hain ke "affo" ka matlab ye hota hae ke ghalti karne wale per zaher mae bhi ilzaam na rakhe, aur batin mae bhi yane Dil se bhi us ghalti ko bilkul bhul jae aur us ghalti karne wale per aur ziyada ahsaan kare aur achai se pesh ae

عفو و غفران

"Affo wa Ghufraan" ye do Allah taala ke sifaat mae se hain jo Allah Tabaraka wa taala ne apne chuninda (selected) bandaun mae rakhe hain

Allah taala Koran majeed mae farmata hae

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

وَلْيَعْفُوا وَلْيَصْفَحُوا أَلَا تُحِبُّونَ أَن يَغْفِرَ اللَّهُ لَكُمْ وَاللَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ

Tum ko chahye ke tum unke ghaltiyaun ko maaf kardo, darguzar kardo, agar tum ye chahte ho ke Allah taala tum ko maaf kare darguzar kare, Allah taala Ghufuroon Raheem hae

Jo ek mommin bhai ko maaf nahi karsakta, woh kaise umeed rakh sakta hae ke Allah taala usko maaf karega

Nabi e kareem ne farmaya ke jo tumhare saath bura pesh aye uske saath tum achai se pesh ao, jo tum se taluq tod de tum uske saath taluq jodo, jo tumhare saath zulum kare usko maaf kardo, jo tum ko dene se roke usko tum ata karo, jo tum se bura chale tum usse ahsaan ke saath pesh ao,

 العفو  

"Al affo" Maaf karna woh Allah ke bhed (secret) mae se ek bhed hae jo Allah ke khaas bandaun ke dilaun mae moujud hota hae, yane maaf karna har insaan ke bas ki baat nahi

Rasulullah ne farmaya ke kiya tum mae koi abu Zamzam ke jaisa banna nahi chahta ?

Logoan ne pucha ke Abu zamzam kaun hae ?

Aap ne farmaya ke ye woh shaqs hae jo har roz Subah uthkar kehta ke mae ne sadqa kardiya yane maaf kardiya un tammam logoan ko jo mere saath ghalat kiye bura kiye

Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe farmate hain

Jaldi se maaf kardena kareem logoan ke aqlaq hain

Maaf karna ek behtreen ahsaan hae

Aur farmaya ke badtareen insaan woh hae jo logoan ki laqzish ko maaf na kare aur doosraun ke aeb ko poshida na rakhe

Do baataun ke sawab ko tolna bahut mushkil hae ek to "maaf karna" aur doosra kisi ke saath "adal" karna

Aur farmaya maaf karke kabhi nadim (regret), aur saza (punishment) dekar kabhi insaan ko khush nahi hona chahye   

 Walid hazrat muqaddus hamesha kehta ke tum kisi se badla lene se ye baat bahut behter ke tum apne mamle ko Allah per chod do woh behtreen badla lene wala hae tum agar badla loge to hosakta hae ke insaaf na karsako aur ulta khisas mae pakde jao

Allah humko tawfeeq de ke hum ye baat samjhe, ke maaf karna ziyada mushkil hae badla lene se aur har haal mae ziyada behter hae

Koran kehta hae

.فمن عفا واصلح فاجره  علي الله
 
Jis ne maaf kiya aur islah kiya uska ajar Allah taala ke pass hae

🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀🌸🍀
4/20/16, 1:11:59 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

15 Rajab ul Murajab ki mubarakbaad pesh hae Allah taala hum sab ki duaon ko darje qabuliat baqshe

Syedna wa Moulana Qazi un Nauman ne kiya hi behtreen andaz mae ek mommin ke adab aqlaq ko samjhaya hae jab ke woh Imam ke bargah mae hazir ho, ya phir unki majlis mae baithe, ya unse kalam kare

Ya aise behtreen adaab wa aqlaq hae ke humko tammam Aulia Allah duwaat aur hudood e deen ki bargah mae unka khyal rakhna chahye

Allah taala ki bargah mae Namaz ke qiyam ke liye Koran farma raha hae

وقوموا لله قانتين

Tum Allah taala ki bargaah mae itaat (total obedience) ke saath khede hojao, theek issi tarah Aima ke saamne bhi humko kheda rahna hae kiyunke unke zareeyeh Allah taala ka taqrub (nearness) hasil hota hae

Farmate hain ke agar Imam ke saamne kheda ho to namaz ki tarah seedha hokar khede rahe aur pure adab aur ahteram ko pesh e nazar rakhe aur apni nazar neechi rakhe

Farmate hae ke Imam ke saamne khede rahe to idhar udhar na dekhe bechani ka ishar na kare, khamoshi aur wiqar ko ikhteyar kare

Agar Imam kalam karne ka moqe de to us waqt tak kalaam kare Jab tak woh usko sunn rahe hain agar unki tawajuh doosri taraf ho to khamosh hojae aur jab tak dobara kalaam ke liye ijazat na de kalam na kare

Jab Imam se kalam ho to dhimi (low soft) awaaz mae baat kare aur kisi halat mae bhi Imam ki awaaz se awaaz bulund na kare jaisa koran farmata hae

يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا لَا تَرْفَعُوا أَصْوَاتَكُمْ فَوْقَ صَوْتِ النَّبِيِّ وَلَا تَجْهَرُوا لَهُ بِالْقَوْلِ كَجَهْرِ بَعْضِكُمْ لِبَعْضٍ أَن تَحْبَطَ أَعْمَالُكُمْ وَأَنتُمْ لَا تَشْعُرُونَ

Ae emaan walo tum apni awaazain (voice) Nabi ki awaaz se unchi na karo aur tum jis tarah apas mae cheekh cheekh kar baat karte ho us tarah Nabi se baat na karo warna tumhare amaal gira diye jainge aur is baat ka tum ko ahsaas bhi nahi hoga

Aur agar Imam khud tum se mukhatib (address) ho to tum khamoshi se unke alfaz ko bahut qor se suno, Aulia Allah ke alfaz ilm, hikmat wa Danish (wisdom) ka khazana hote hain samajhne wale ke liye bahut saare faide usme poshida hote hain

Agar Imam kisi mehfil mae kisi shaqs se poshida guftagu karna chahta hae to jo log khreeb baithe hain unko dur hojana chahye

Imam ki majlis mae hazereen e majlis mae kisi ko jaes nahi ke woh apas mae poshida guftagu kare, ya Imam ko chodkar apas mae ek doosre se guftagu kare

Imam ki majlis mae hone wali tammam ter guftagu hazereen e majlis  ke zimme amanat hae  jaisa ki Hadees mae aya hae

أن المجالس امانات وان لم توتمن من فيها

Har majlis amanat hoti hae chahe majlis ke shuroka (participants) ko paband na bhi kiya gaya ho

Imam ke huzoor Mae hazir hone wale har aadmi ko chahye ke woh ladai jhagde behes mubahesa hujjat wa takrar se aeteraaz (avoid) kare

Imam ki majlis mae angdai lena jamai lena, ungliun ko todna (chatkana) ya beja be zaroorat harkat karna mayub baat hae aur agar Imam baithne kehe to ajisi inkesari fakhirana andaz mae baithe ye tammam baatain haram nahi hae lekin bure afaal hain be adabi hae, Imam ki majlis balkeh har ilm wa hikmat ki majlis is laeq hae ke in kamaun se bacha jae

Imam ke saamne logoan ki qibat karna, Aeb jui karna, beja gila shikwa karna takeh loqoan ko Imam ki nazar se gira dena bahut buri baat hae

Aulia Allah to mommineen ke aeb ko chupate (hide) hae unki purdah poshi karte hain, woh to darguzar se kaam lete hain

Ye ek badi haqeeqat hae ke Aulia Allah aur buzrugane deen momineen ke aeb aur laqzishaun ki purdah poshi karte hain wo aisa na karte to logoan ke bure kartoot (bad deeds) bad amaliyaan khuli kitab ki tarah sab logoan per zaher hojati
Hadees e shareef hae

لو تكاشفتم ما تدافنتم

Agar tum ek doosre ke bad amaliyun (khrab kaam) se waqif hojao to apne murdaun ko dafan karna bhi chod doge

Iska matlab ye hae ke agar logoan ke aeb zaher hojain to log ek doosre janaze mae hazari dene bhi nafrat karne lagenge

Kehna ka matlab yehi hae ke har insaan mae aeb hae tum uski purdah poshi karo

Isiliye moulana Ali ne farmaya hae ke mae kisi mommin ko burai karte huve dekhu to mae usse apni chadar se dhamp Lunga

Aur Imam e Zainulabideen farmate hae ke woh shaqs jo logoan ko mukamil janta hae woh unke saath zindagi nahi guzar sakta hae

Duniya mae koi insaan aisa nahi ki jisme koi aeb na ho koi kami na ho, Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum apne aeb aur ghaltiyun ko durust kare banisbat doosraun ke aeb aur ghaltiyaun ko nikale

🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌
4/21/16, 9:53:28 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💦💦💦💦💦💦💦💦

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك 🌹

Nabi e kareem ka qol e mubarak hae Sadqa wa khairaat ke adaab ke taluq se

عطاوها قبلالصدقة المسألة
واخفاؤها مع العطاؤها
وكتمانها بعدالعطا
وان كان فرضا اظهره

Adaab e Sadqa ye hae ke maangne wale ke maangne se pehle dena (yane usko maangne ki sharmindagi se bacha lo)

[Ye baat jab hi mumkin hae jab insaan rishte daraun ikhwan e momineen padosi dost ahbab se taluq rakhta hae aur unki khabar lete rahta hae]

Khamoshi se chupa kar sadqa karna

Sadqa dene ke baad usko raaz rakhna logoan mae charcha nahi karna

Agar yeh uska dena (sadqa) farz hae to usko zaher kar sakta hae jaise ke zakat hae

Aur moulana Ali farmate hain ;

احي المعروف باماتته

Neki ko maut dekar zinda karo

Haqeeqat mae Neki karne wala us neki karne ka ziyada mohtaj hae banisbat usse jisper ahsaan kiya jata hae kiyunke ahsaan karne wale ko uska ajar sawab wa inam jo usne diya hae, ahsaan kiya hae, usse bahut ziyada milta hae isliye dene wale ko hargis lene wale se ahsaan ka shukriya talab nahi karna chahye

Isi baat ko koran e kareem ne kiya hi behtreen andaz mae bayan kiya hae

إِنْ أَحْسَنتُمْ أَحْسَنتُمْ لِأَنفُسِكُمْ وَإِنْ أَسَأْتُمْ فَلَهَا

Tum jo ahsaan kiye woh apne hi nafs apni hi jaan ke liye kiye aur jo tum ne bura kiya uska bhi baar (responsibility) tum hi per hae

Issi tarah Adaab e aleel (bimar) ke liye Rasul kareem ka qol e mubarak hae

دوام الحمد والثنا
استعمال التضرع والدعا
اظهارالعجز والفاقة لرب اسماء
واستعمال الدواءمع الاستعانة الخالق الدواء

Bimar ko chahye ke woh hamesha Allah taala ka Hamd wa sana (tareef) karta rahe

Aajisi wa tazaro zari ke saath Allah taala se Dua maange

Aapni aajisi wa majboori ka sirf apna rabbe subhanahu ke saamne is'har kare

Aur Allah tabaraka wa taala se maddad chahte huve dawa (medicine) ka istemal kare jo haqeeqat mae dawa ka bhi khaliq hae

Moulana Ali salwatullah alehe farmate hain

دواء كل داء كتمانه

Har marz ki dawa us marz ko logoan se chupana hae   

Allah taala Koran e majeed mae irshad farmata hae

واذا مرضت فهو يشفين

Jab tum bimar hote ho to woh (Allah taala) shifa (cure) deta hae

Allah taala hum ko tawfeeq de ke hum is deen ke falsafe wa nazriye ko samjhe aur us lihaz se amal kare

💦💦💦💦💦💦💦💦
4/22/16, 3:39:15 AM: Asif Hussain: SubhanAllah! Thank you Ishaq Bhai for these constant messages of enlightenment! Hope salaat zawaal went well for all of you!
4/23/16, 2:16:36 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ☘🌿☘🌿☘🌿☘🌿

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Imam Ahmed ibne Abdullah salwatullah alehe apne Rasael mae jo maruf (known as) hae "Rasael e Ikhwan us Safa" mae ek Hindustan ke musalmaan Badshah ka waqae bayan farmaya hae

Hindustan ke ek musalmaan Badshah jab maut ke khreeb huva to usne apne wali e ahad (Crown prince) jo uske baad Badshah hone wala tha usko bulakar nasihat ki

Badshah ne kaha ae mere farzand mae tumko 30 nasihatain karta hun usme se 10 tumhare Nafs aur aakherat ko behter banaegi

10 nasihatain tum ko duniya mae faida degi, achi pursukoon aur behter zindagi degi aur tumhari rozi mae ziyadati aur barkat ata karegi

Aur 10 nasihatain woh tumhari badshahat ko masboot banaegi aur tumhare mulk ki siyasat ko durust rakhegi

10 nasihatain jo tumhari Duniya ko behter karegi woh hain

1) sab se pehle tum ache Aqlaq (character) ikhteyar karo

2) ache adaab (manners) rakho

3) sacha wada karo aur apne ahad ko pura karo

صدق الوعد والوفاء بالعهد

 4) qudrat wa taqat rakhte huve bhi maaf karne wala bano

العفو عند القدرة

5 ) Hasad (jealousy) chod do aur khud mae woh qabiliyat (qualities) paida karo jis baat ki wajeh se tum doosraun se hasad karte ho

6 ) tum puri koshish ye karo ke tumhara koi dushman na ho, aur agar koi dushman ho bhi to tum usper itna ahsaan karo ke woh ahsaan uske liye saza banjae

7) Allah ne jo bhi tumko naemat ata ki hae chahe woh maal wa daulat ho, ya ilm wa fazal, tum uske ghalat aur beja istemal se bacho

8) tum apni shehwataun ko apni sharm wa haya aur murawat per qalib aane na do

9 ) tum duniya ko aakherat per kabhi bhi tarjih (prefence) na do

أن لا توثر دنياك علي آخرتك

Yaqinan Jab Allah Subhanahu tumhari is baat ko dekhega to tumko Duniya bhi ata kardega

Jaisa ke kaha gaya hae ke Allah taala ne duniya ko wahi وحي ki

Ae duniya jo tere peeche pada raha bas to bhi us'se puri khidmat le aur jisne meri khidmat ki (yane meri bandagi ki) bas ab to uski khidmat kar

يا دنيا من خدمك فاستخدميه، ومن خدمني  فاخدميه   

Kehne ka matlab ye hae ke jo insaan duniya ki shewataun ko, lazataun ko, maal aur daulat ko, hasil karne ke liye puri zindagi mehnat aur mashaqat mae padha raha ae duniya to usko aur mehnat mae, pareshani mae mubtela kar aur jisne Allah taala ki bandagi ki uski ae Duniya to khidmat kar

10) tum un mamlaat mae dakhal andazi na karo jisme tumhara, Allah taala ko dakhal andazi karna pasand nahi, tum unhi baataun mae mashqul raho jo Allah taala pasand farmate hae aur uski khushnudi ho

Allah taala hum ko tawfeeq de ke hum bhi in nasihataun per amal kare aur apni duniya ki zindagi ko khush gawar aur behter banae

🌿☘🌿☘🌿☘🌿☘
4/27/16, 10:52:08 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌾🌿🌾🌿🌾🌿🌾🌿

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Aksar logoan ki farmaesh per us Hindustan ke Badshah ki wasiyat (nasihat) jo unhune apne wali e ahad ko farmaya tha uske 10 wasiyataun ka zikar pesh hae jo uske Nafs aur aakherat ko behter banaegi

1) sab se pehli aur sab se ahem (the first and the most important) woh Allah ki توحيد toheed karna hae, yane uska iqrar hae, Allah ka kiya tasavur karna, usko kaisa mana jae, aur uski khushnudi ki taraf Dua, tazaro zari, aur munajaat ke zareeyeh se aage badhna hae

2) Allah taala ke bheje huve Rasulaun ka iqrar karna unko sachana aur un tammam baataun ko qabool karna jo woh Allah taala ki taraf se leker aye hain.

الإقرار برسله وتصديقهم والقبول منهم   

3) Allah taala ki bheji huvi kitabain jo unper (rasulaun) per nazil ki gai thi uski تصديق tasdik karna

التصديق بالكتب المنزلة من عنده عليهم

4) "Namus" shariat e Mohammedi ki hifazat karna, uski pabandi karna, aur logoan ke saath sahi mamlaat karna

حفظ الناموس وسياسة الناس

5) logoan ke saath Allah ki khatir, tawazu se pesh ana, acha sulook karna aur mael milap rakhna aur fakher ko chod dena apni badai apne akad pan ko khatam kardena

التواضع لله وترك الفخر

6) "Zulum" wa "Jor" ko puri tarah chod dena

ترك الظلم والجور

Zulum ke ma'ne hote hae kisi bhi chez ko uske sahi muqam per nahi rakhna aur "Jor" جور kehte hae ziyadati karna yane maarna todna, dantna,badd kalami karna yane har woh baat karna jo saamne wala deserve nahi karta hae aur jiske karne ka aapko haq wa ikhteyar nahi hae,

Jo Allah ke bande per zulum karega to Allah tabaraka wa taala uska dushman hoga aur jiska Allah dushman hoga uske liye ruswai ke siwae chara na hoga

7) Aurataun se mael milap aur unki baithakaun mae baithna tarak kardena, unki baataun ki taraf kaan lehkana se mardaun ki aqal mae fasaad paida hojata hae

ترك المخالطة النساء والاجتماع معهن والاصغاءالي قولهن، فإنها تفسد عقول الرجال اذا اصغوا اليهن

8) Tum sharab aur har nashe ki chez ko chod do kiyunkeh woh tumhari aqal ki dushman hae, aur yaad rakho ki tumhari aqal batini hasiyat se Allah taala ki khalifa hae, jisne bhi Allah ke khalifa per kisi aur ko musalat kiya (gives away control) uski aqal chale jaegi, uska dushman usper ghalib ajaega aur Allah taala usko tabah wa taraj kardega (will totally destroy the person) aur jiski aqal chale gai to uska na deen baqi raha, na ilm, aur na uski murawat (sanjeedgi), na haya na muraqeba (concentration, or clarity of thought) aur jiski ye halat hojae to us insaan ki maut hi sabhaun ke liye behter hae

8) karamat ke saath pesh ana, sakhawat karna Nafs mae itni kushadgi paida karna ki kisi ko bhi asani se maaf karsako, aur ye ke har ek ke saath ahsaan achai fazal wa karam aur ahteram ke saath pesh aana chahe woh tumhara dost ho ya dushman

10) aur aakhri wasiyat ye hae ke qol ka sadiq hona hamesha sach kehna aur amanataun ko ada karna, chahe woh nek shaqs ki amanat ho ya phir kisi badd aur fajir ki ho

Ye behtreen nasihatain Imam Ahmed bin Abdullah  ne apni mashoor kitab  "Rasael e Ikhwan us Safa" mae bayan farmaya hae

🌾🌿🌾🌿🌾🌿🌾🌿
4/30/16, 2:03:24 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💢💠💢💠💢💠💢💠

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Kisi Hakim ka kiya hi behtreen qol hae jismani zindagi aur uski maut ke liye, aur Nafsani, Roohani, Abadi, (eternal) zindagi ke taluq se


Kehte hain;

Jismani Zindagi kiya hae, siwae Nafs ka jism ko istemal karne ke

Aur Jismani maut kiya hae siwae us Nafs ka jism ko istemal karna chod dene ke

To malum ye huva ke "Nafs" hi asal chez hae jism ki itni ahmiyat nahi uska maqsad kuch aur hae, aur ye ke maut ke baad Nafs hi hamesha baqi rahta hae ussi ki aakherat mae zindagi hae, wohi taraqi karta hae, ussi ko jannat milti hae aakherat ki tammam naematain ussi Nafs ke liye hain

Issi baat ki wazahat koran e kareem ki ye ayaat karti hae

 يَا أَيَّتُهَا النَّفْسُ الْمُطْمَئِنَّةُ
 ارْجِعِي إِلَىٰ رَبِّكِ رَاضِيَةً مَّرْضِيَّةً
 فَادْخُلِي فِي عِبَادِي
 وَادْخُلِي جَنَّتِي

Ae Nafs e mutmaina (satisfied soul) palat aa apne Rabb ki taraf woh tujh se razi aur tu usse razi aur dakhil hoja mere bandaun mae aur dakhil hoja meri jannat mae

Nafs ki ahmiyat, uska maut ke baad baqi rahna aur maut kiyu rakhi gai uski kiya hikmat hae is haqeeqat ko kiya hi behtreen andaz mae misaal dekar Moulana Imam Ahmed ibne Abdullah salwatullah alehe ne farmaya hae

Aap farmate hain ke tum jism ko ek kishti (boat) khyal karo aur Nafs ko malah (kishti chalane wala captain) aur duniya ke tumhare nek amaal, ibadatain jo tum ne duniya mae kiye hain usko tum tumhara tijarat ka samaan samjho, duniya ko ek samandar khyal karo aur is duniya ki zindagi ko us dariya (sea) ke safar ka waqt, maut ko sahel (sea shore) khyal karo jiski taraf tumhara irada hae woh tumhara destination hae, aur aakherat tumhara wo muqam hae jahan tum woh samaan ki tijarat karoge aur jannat tumhara profit hae, kamai hae, jo tum samaan laye ho uski kamai hae aur Allah taala ko tum us mulk ka badshah khyal karo

Aap farmate hae ke tajir (businessmen) agar salamti (safety) ke saath dariya ka safar pura karle aur apne samaan ke saath sahel (coast) per pohunch jae to ab uske paas koi wajeh (reason) nahi ki woh (shore) per na utre (disembark) aur us shaher mae samaan na beche (sell) aur jab maal bechega tab hi to woh kamaega, chahe uska safar kitna bhi acha raha ho, kitna bhi safar mae maza (enjoy) kiya ho magar ultimately manzil hi uska maqsad hae jahan usko maal se nafa (profit) kamana hae, inam lena hae

Issi tarah ka mamla Nafs ka jism ke saath hae, jab insaan apni duniya ki zindagi puri karta hae nek amaal karke achi saaf suthri zindagi guzarta hae,  ache aqlaq se apne aapko arasta (decorate) karta hae, deeni aeteqadaat ko sahi aur durust rakhta hae, shariat ki pabandi karta hae, duniya ki tammam moujudaat e jismani ho ya roohani uske haqaeq ko jaan leta hae, aur jab ke woh apni umar ke aakhri hisse mae pohunchta hae to lazimi tor per uska jism kamzoor hone lagta hae, us waqt us Nafs ke liye koi tadbeer nahi, koi wajeh nahi ke jism ke saath baqi rahe, uske liye behteri issi mae hae ke jism se alag hojae aur wohi Nafs ka jism ko chodna uski jismani maut hae

Agar maut na hoti to kaise woh Nafs aasmaan ki bulundiyun per chadhta, kaise woh Malaeka ke zumre (group) mae shammil hosakta, aur kaise apne Rabb e Raheem se mulaqat karsakta

Ye theek issi tarah hae jaise ek janeen (embryo) 9 mahine maa ke paet mae badhne ke baad uske liye lazim hojata hae ke woh màa ke paet se baher nikle warna woh kaise ye wasi (vast) duniya ko dekh sakega, aur kaise ye duniya ki naemataun ko hasil karsakega, kaise woh apne organs jo usne apne maa ke paet mae banaya hae uska faida utha sakega

Issi liye kaha jata hae ke Maut ek Hikmat hae, Rehmat hae aur Naemat hae
 
كل نفس ذائقة الموت ثم إلينا ترجعون

Allah taala farmata hae, har Nafs ko maut ka maza chakna hae aur phir hamari hi taraf laut kar ana hae

يعلمون ظاهرا من الحياة الدنيا وهم عن الآخرة هم غافلون

Log zaheri duniya ki zindagi  ko jante hain aur aakherat se bilkul qafil (ignorant) hain

والآخرة خير وأبقى
 
Aakherat bahut behtar hae aur baqi rahne wali hae

Isiliye hum per lazim hae, zaroori hae, ke hum apne nafs ko ja'ne uske behter se behter banane ki koshish kare jis tarah hum apne jism ko behter, sahetmand, tandrust, wa khubsurat banane ki koshish karte hain

💠💢💠💢💠💢💠💢
5/3/16, 1:41:42 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ☘🐾☘🐾☘🐾☘🐾

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Zikar huva tha "Hikmat e Maut" ke taluq se ke aakhir ye Maut kiyu rakhi gai hae ? Iska maqsad kiya ?  iske peeche raaz kiya ?

Saheb e Rasael e Ahmedia kiya hi behtreen asaan misaal dekar is baat ko samjhaya hae

Aap farmate hain ke har chez jo wajud (existance) mae aati hae, badhti (grows) hae, uski ek ibteda aur ek inteha hoti hae, (the beginning & the end) uski ek qayaat (purpose) hoti hae, jiski taraf woh taraqi karti hae aage badhti hae

Aap farmate hain ke مسقط نطفة (attachment of sperm with egg) woh zindagi ki ibteda hae, aur bache ki jismani wiladat (birth) woh uski inteha hae

Issi tarah se bache ki duniya mae wiladat bhi ek ibteda hae jiski inteha woh maut hae

Jis tarah se bache ka maa ke paet mae ibteda hone (growth of the embryo in mothers womb) ka faida woh bache ki wiladat (birth) ke baad hota hae, jaise ke bacha apni jismani quwat (strength) aur aaza (organs & limbs) ko paedaesh ke baad hi istemal karta hae, theek issi tarah ka mamla Nafs ka bhi hae ke woh apna pura faida jism ki qaed (freedom from physical dimensions) se azaad hone, chutne ke baad hi utha sakta hae

Kiyunke jismani maut hi insaan ke Nafs ki asal paedaesh hae

Jaisa ke kaha gaya hae jism ka marna woh hi asal Nafs ki paedaesh hae, theek ussi tarah jaisa maa ke paet ke bacha (embryo) ki paedaesh woh màa ke paet yane rahem (womb) se baher aana per hi hae

Jis tarah paedaesh mae badi hikmat hae, theek ussi tarah maut mae bhi badi hikmat hae

Jis tarah janeen (embryo) maa ke paet mae apni surat banata hae quwatain mukamil karta hae, apni khilqat ko masboot karta hae, lekin phir bhi woh in tammam baataun ka faida maa ke rahem mae nahi uthata, balkeh paedaesh ke baad duniya ki zindagi mae uthata hae

Issi tarah nafs bhi jism ke saath rahkar apni khilqat, banwat, surat e roohani, ko mukamil karta hae magar woh uska faida jism ko chodne ke baad, jismani maut ke baad hi aakherat mae uthata hae Issi liye kehte hae ke maut badi hikmat hae, bada poshida raaz hae

Baqa e abadi, hamesha ki zindagi (eternal life) woh jismani maut ke baad hi mumkin hae

To malum ye huva ke maut hi sabab hae (cause) hayat e abadi ki

Aur hayat (life) e jismani, duniya ki zindagi woh sabab banti hae maut ke liye haqeeqat mae

Qor kare, (think) agar insaan is duniya mae hi nahi aata to uske liye mumkin hi nahi ke usko maut aye

Isiliye insaan agar duniya ke wajud mae aye hae to lazim hogaya ke maut bhi zaroor aegi

To yaqeen karle ke maut ek rehmat hae, hikmat hae, naemat hae magar ye sab uske liye jisne apne 'Nafs' ko acha karliye tayar karliye mukamil karliye us aalam ke qabil bana liye

وان الدار الاخرة لهي الحيوان

Haqeeqat mae agar zindagi hae to woh Dar e aakherat mae hae kaash ke log is baat ko jante

Duniya ki zindagi to ek Aasmaesh hae, imtehan hae, har lamhe ghum hae, pareshani hae, takleef hae, dard hae, bimari hae, sadme hain....

Kash ki hum 'haqeeqi  zindagi', 'maut', 'Nafs' ke wajud aur aakherat ko hanare deeni nazriye se samjhe takeh duniya ka koi ghum, ghum na lage, koi takleef hokar bhi ahsaas na ho, koi pareshani, pareshan na kare

🐾☘🐾☘🐾☘🐾☘🐾
5/5/16, 2:43:36 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌾🍁🌾🍁🌾🍁🌾🍁

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مبارك 🌹

Allah taala Koran e majeed mae 'Surat ul Jumua' mae irshad farma raha hae

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
قُلْ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ هَادُوا إِن زَعَمْتُمْ أَنَّكُمْ أَوْلِيَاءُ لِلَّهِ مِن دُونِ النَّاسِ فَتَمَنَّوُا الْمَوْتَ إِن كُنتُمْ صَادِقِينَ

Yehudiyun se khitab hae ke agar tumhara ye da'wa (claim) hae ke tum hi Allah ke Aulia ho, dost ho, khreeb ho doosraun ke muqabil to zara "Maut" ki tamana (arzoo, khaesh) to karke dikhao agar tum apne da'we (claim) mae sache ho

Yahan Allah taala ne dawe mae sache hone ki daleel woh maut ki tamana karne ko rakha hae

Ayaat ki taweel, tafseer, ya haqaeq mae ja'na mera maqsad nahi hae, is bare mae bahut kuch kaha gaya hoga aur kaha ja sakta bhi hae, magar yahan kehne ka matlab sirf itna hi hae ke Allah taala ne "Maut" ki tamana karne walaun ko "sache" yane صادقين hone ki daleel thedaya hae aur "Maut" ki tamana karna ek acha kaam, acha fael qarar diya hae

Insaan hamesha apne se behter chez, behtar haal, behter kaifiyat ki khaesh wa arzoo aur umeed rakhta hae to phir yaqinan "Maut" mommin ke liye behter aur achi baat hogi jiski khaesh karne ki raqbat (inclination) Allah taala ne humko dilaya hae

Maut ek Hikmat hae, ek Naemat hae, ek Rehmat hae, ek Rahat hae, ye sab uske liye hae jo mommin e mutaqi (parhezgar) hae,

Jitna insaan maut ki haqeeqat ko janta jaega, jitna uska Ilm wa Irfan (knowledge & wisdom) badhta jaega utni hi uski maut ki tamana wa khaesh mae isafa hota jaega

Woh Ambia wa Rasul, Aima wa Duwaat hi hote hain jo maut aur aakherat ki haqeeqataun se puri tarah  waqif hote hae, aur isiliye  woh hamesha maut ki arzoo aur khaesh rakhte hae

Maut aakhir kiyu hikmat hae ?

kiyu uski khaesh rakhna ek achi baat hae ?

 Kiyu uski tamana karne wale صادقين (sache) kehlate hain ?

"Maut" ki haqeeqat "Nafs" ke wajud aur uska maqsad, jism ke saath Nafs ka rahna aur phir duniya ki adna (lowly) aur aakherat ki aala, abadi (eternal) zindagi ki kiya hi behtreen misaal Imam ne pesh ki hae

Duniya ki zindagi mae nafs jism ke saath juda huva (connected) rahta hae, ye issi tarah se jaise ek bacha bachpan aur jawani ka kuch hissa madrese yane school college university se connected rahta hae usme ilm hasil karta hae, seekhta hae, practice karta hae, apne ko train karta hae, adaab, aqlaq, muqtalif uloom ko hasil karta hae, jab apni soch samajh aqal tajrube ko mukamil wa masboot karleta hae apne field of education apne subject mae mustahkam (firm) hojata hae to ab uske liye lazim hota hae ke woh apne school, college, madrese ko chod de aur ek nayi duniya mae khadam rakhe ab us ilm ka faida uthae, uska inam hasil kare, theek issi tarah se Nafs ka bhi mamla hae, nafs jism ke saath rahkar jo kuch bhi usko hasil karna tha karliya to usko ab uska puri tarah faida uthana hae, aur ye baat jab hi mumkin hae jab woh is (dimensional) jism ko chod de, usse azad hojae

Ye aisa hi hae jaise ke bache ko taleem ke dauran pen, pencil, eraser, books, bag, table chair, aur bhi bahut chezaun ki zaroorat hoti hae magar jab ilm pukhta (firm) hojata hae, sab uski aqal wa nafs mae sama (get contained) jata hae to phir usko pencil eraser waqera ki hajat zaroorat baqi nahi rahti

Theek issi tarah insaan ka Nafs jab tayar hojata hae mukamil hota hae, us aakherat ke qabil banjata hae to ab uske liye maut hi ek raasta hae, ek darwaza hae, jis'se usko guzarna zaroori hae, jism ko chodna uske liye lazim hae,

Yaqinan maut ke baad Nafs ki ek nayi zindagi hoti hae jo jism ke saath ki zindagi se bahut Ashraf wa aala hoti ussi ki taraf koran ishara kar raha hae

ْ وَنُنشِئَكُمْ فِي مَا لَا تَعْلَمُون

Tumko aise jahan (world) mae paida karega jisko tum nahi jante ho, aur yehi hamari nafsani paedaesh hae aakherat ki zindagi hae

Maut kiya hae sirf "Fear of the unknown" hae jitna hum deen ko janenge, jitna duniya aur uske wajud ki haqeeqat se waqif honge, samjhenge utna hi hamara ye khoof ye darr dur hote jaega, maut ki tamana karne lagenge yahan tak ke ek waqt aisa aega ke hum khushi, khushi muskurate (smiling) huve maut ko labaek kehenge, gale lagainge

والحمد لله رب العالمين والعاقبة للمتقين

Tammam Hamd (praise) Allah hi ke liye hae, aur aqebat (acha anjaam) mutaqeen hi ke liye hae

🍁🌾🍁🌾🍁🌾🍁🌾
5/6/16, 9:04:51 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته

Aaj pehli Shaban e Kareem hae aur Mukaram Al Amil Mulla Gowhar Ali Hakim saheb ka inteqal ka din hae mae ne unki biography 3 saal pehle what'sapp per likha tha aur har saal bheja bhi hun agar koi nahi padha hae aur padhna chahta hae woh mujhe request bhej sakta hae mae usko forward kardunga

Marhum ki zindagi ke waqaet bahut dilchasp hain bahut mutasir karne wali zindagi hae aur usme hamare liye bahut se sabaq  aur inspiration hae, unki qidmat badi Azeem thi  

Allah taala Rehmat wa Maqferat farmaye

■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■
5/8/16, 1:51:20 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*
*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

*Maut* ek *Hikmat* hae, *Rehmat* hae, *Naemat* hae, *Rahat* hae, Yaqinan ye sab usi ke liye hae jisne duniya mae rahkar aakherat ke liye amal kiya aur maut ke liye hamesha tayaar raha

*وان الدار الاخرة لهي الحيوان*

Haqeeqat mae agar zindagi hae *hayat* hae to woh aakherat ki hi hae yane jismani maut ke baad nafsani zindagi roohani zindagi, woh zindagi jisko koi fana (destruction, end) nahi jo abadi hae azali hae hamesha ki hae

Hamari duniya ki jismani zindagi ek dhoke ki zindagi hae jo kisi lamhe bhi munqata (break) hosakti hae issi baat ko *Quran e Kareem* keh raha hae

*وما الحياة الدنيا إلا متاع الغرور*

Aakhir ye duniya ki zindagi  hae kiya, siwae ek dhoke aur fareb ke

Aur farmaya ;

*إنما الحياة الدنيا لعب ولهو وزينة وتفاخر بينكم وتكاثر في الأموال والأولاد*

Beshak ye duniya ki zindagi khel kud, dikhawa aur logoan ka aapas mae apni aulad, maal wa daulat per fakher karne ke siwae kuch bhi nahi

Ye _Jism_ aur jismani duniya ka maqsad hi _Nafs_ ko aakherat ke liye tiyar karna hae

_Jism_ aur _Nafs_ ko Hokoma e Deen ne samjhate huve farmaya hae

*Jism* ba'zaat e khud (initself) yane uska asal wajud jisko *Johar* kehte hae woh mayat hae murda hae, jism ki zindagi aarzi hae jab tak ke uska Nafs uske saath hae, ye theek issi tarah se hae jaise ki hawa (air, space) muzlim hae dark hae uski roshni Suraj Chand aur Siyaraun (stars) ki roshni se hae, aur ye hum sab ka mushaheda (observation) hae ke kis tarah maut per, nafs ka jism ko chodne ke baad jism mae khrabi aati jati hae aur woh mayat miti ki taraf palat jati hae jis'se woh paida kiya gaya tha

Issi baat ko *Koran* farmata hae ;

*منها خلقناكم وفيها نعيدكم*

Tum ko issi miti se paida kiya gaya tha aur issi miti ki taraf lauta diya jaega
 
Kiya hi behtreen misal dekar is _Jism_ aur _Nafs_ ke mamlaat ko Imam alehe salaam ne samjhaya hae

*Jism* ka asal maqsad hi *Nafs* ko tiyar karna hae, qabil banana hae us roohani aalam ke liye

Aap farmate hae ke insaan ka Nafs ek karigar ki tarah hae, jism uska karkhana (workshop) hae aur us jism ke aaza (organs & limbs) uske adwaat (tools) hain

Karigar apni puri mehnat lagadeta hae us karkhane mae apne tools ke zareeyeh kuch banae jiske zareeyeh woh maal wa daulat kamae aur jab woh kama leta hae, daulat hasil karleta hae, to ab usko mehnat ki zaroorat nahi rahti, ab usko aram ki rahat ki zaroorat hoti hae us mehnat ka ab woh faida uthana chahta hae, woh retire hona chahta hae, pursukoon zindagi guzarna chahta hae, ab usko na karkhane ki zaroorat hae na hi un tools ki hajat (need) hae

Issi tarah se hamare Nafs ka bhi mamla hae, jab tak ke jism ke saat rahe aur jab tak Allah taala ne usko mahulat wa moqa diya hae woh aakherat ki tayaari karte rahta hae, jitna bhi hasil kiya wohi uska aakherat ka tosha hae ab usko roohani aalam ki taraf chadhna hae, Allah taala ki  *روح وريحان*  Rooh o Raihan mae dakhil hona hae, ab uske liye lazim hae ke ye saqil (heavy diminsional weight) se azad hojae warna woh kabhi bhi Allah taala ki aasmani mumlekat (Kingdom) mae dakhil ho nahi sakta

Yehi hikmat Allah taala ne maut mae rakhi hae aur yaqinan maut ek naemat hae unke liye jo Allah taala ke nek saleheen bande hain

Aur issi wajeh se tammam Ambia wa Rasul ne maut ki tamana ki

Jaise *Yusuf* alehe salaam ne farmaya

*رب قد آتيتني من الملك،.............  توفني مسلما والحقني من الصالحين*
 
Mujhe muslim ki wafat (death) de aur saleheen ke saath jod de

Aur issi tarah *Ibrahim Khaleelullah* ne bhi Dua maangi thi

*الذي خلقني فهو يهدين.........واجعلني من ورثة جنة النعيم*

*Ibrahim Khaleelullah* ne bahut lambi Dua maangi aur aakhir mae yehi farmaya ke ae Allah tu mujhe *Jannat e Naeem*ka waris bana

*Jannat* ka waris koi jab hi ban sakta hae jab us'e *maut* aye

*Maut ek Hikmat hae, Rehmat hae, Naemat hae*

♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢
5/12/16, 10:33:20 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ●○●○●○●○●○●○●○●○●○●○●

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*
*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*
*جمعة مبارك*

Maut ek *Hikmat* hae, ek *Rehmat* hae, ek *Naemat* hae, ek *Rahat* hae

Yaqinan hum momineen ke liye jo aakherat per yaqeen rakhte, aur usi ke liye amal karte hain *Maut* ka aana ek bahut badi Rehmat hae

Hikmat e maut ke liye kiya hi behtreen misaal Aulia Allah ne di hae

Insaan ki duniya ki zindagi kheti (harvesting fields) ki tarah hae aur kisan ka mitti mae beej bona (seeding) woh aisa hi hae jaise ke nutfe (sperm) ka aurat ke rahem (womb) mae qarar pana, issi baat ki taraf Koran e kareem ne kiya lateef andaz mae ishara kiya hae

*نِسَاؤُكُمْ حَرْثٌ لَّكُمْ*

Tumhari aurtain tumhare liye kheti hain   
 
Paude (plant) ka zameen se ugna woh bache ki wiladat ki tarah hae aur us paude (plant) ka bahar (bloom) per aana insaan ki jawani ki tarah hae aur uski adhed umar (middle age) woh pauda per lage anaaj ke pakne (ripening of crop) ka waqt hae aur budhapa uske khushki (drying, jhadne) ka waqt hae

Bas yehi woh waqt hae ke anaaj ko kata jae uski kaasht ki jae (harvesting season) uska faida liya jae

Beej bo'ne (seeding) se leker fasal (fields) ki harvesting ke waqt tak sab karwai tak asal maqsad woh anaaj (grains) ko paida karna hae aur us'se faida uthana hae agar harvest nahi kiya gaya, agar anaaj ko uske pauda (plants) se juda (seperate) nahi kiya gaya to kheti karne ka sara maqsad hi bekaar hojaega sari mehnat ka koi natija nahi, koi faida nahi

Theek issi tarah hamari jismani zindagi ka bhi mamla hae ek waqt aata hae ke Nafs ko Jism ka saath chodna hi padhta issi mae dono ki bhlai aur behtari hae yehi Allah ki mashiyat hae, irada hae yehi insaan ki taqdeer hae agar *maut* na hoti to phir kaise nafs jism ki qaed se azad hosakta aur woh kaise jism ka saath rahkar jo amaal kiya, jo mehnat wa mashaqat (labour) kiya, jo ibadat e ilmi aur amali ki, jo khair wa khairaat ki,jo tammam neki ke kaam kiye uska ajar, inam wa Ikram hasil karsakta  

Hamare wajud ka asal woh hamara *Nafsani* wajud hi hae jisko hum *Rooh* bhi keh sakte hain jiskoek khaas maqsad aur hikmat ki wajeh se is duniya ki zindagi mae jism ke saath joda gaya hae bandha gaya hae

*ذلك تقدير العزيز العليم*

Yehi Allah ki taqdeer hae yehi uski mashiyat (marzi) hae aur wohi har baat ki qudrat rakhta hae aur jan'ne wala hae
 
Jism to hamesha se hi murda hae, Imam farmate hain tumhare jism ki haqeeqat hi kiya uski ibteda *ماء مهين* ek halke mamuli pani (humble water) se hae jisko duniya karahiyat (repulsive) se dekhti hae aur uski inteha woh ek *جيفة* sadhne galne (decaying) wali laash hae

Hum per ye haqeeqat waze huvi ki  insaan ki asal woh uski *Rooh* hae uska *Nafs* jaise ke kishti jism hae to usko chalane wala Nafs hae jo asal hae, jism hatiyaar (tools) hae to karigar (craftsmen) Nafs hae aur karigar hi asal hae theek issi tarah paude per lagne wala anaaj (grains) asal hae pauda nahi

Agar aap qor kare to Koran e kareem mae be shumar (countless) ayaataun mae sirf Nafs hi se khitab hae jism se nahi jaise nafs ko acha banane, tehzeeb dar karne, shahwataun se rokne, Sabar ka aadi karne, ghuse mae Nafs per qabu rakhne waqera waqera

Jaise Koran farmata hae

*وَأَمَّا مَنْ خَافَ مَقَامَ رَبِّهِ وَنَهَى النَّفْسَ عَنِ الْهَوَىٰ ○ فَإِنَّ الْجَنَّةَ هِيَ الْمَأْوَىٰ*

Jo apne parwardigaar ke saamne khede hone se darta hae, jo apne nafs ko duniya ki khaeshat se rokta rahta hae ussi ka thikana Jannat hae

*وَمَن يَكْسِبْ إِثْمًا فَإِنَّمَا يَكْسِبُهُ عَلَىٰ نَفْسِهِ وَكَانَ اللَّهُ عَلِيمًا حَكِيمًا*

Jo koi bhi gunah karta hae woh usike hi nafs per bojh dalta hae Allah taala har baat ko jan'ne wala aur hikmat wala hae

 *وَيُحَذِّرُكُمُ اللَّهُ نَفْسَهُ وَإِلَى اللَّهِ الْمَصِيرُ*

Allah tabaraka wa taala tumhare nufoos (plural nafs) ko darata hae aur har ek ko ussi ki taraf lautna hae (Allah taala ki taraf)

In tammam ayaat se ye sabit hota hae ke insaan ka nafs hi asal hae aur wohi aakherat mae sawab ka aur agar اعمال سوء  bure kaam kiya hae to uske anjaam mae saza wa azaab ka mustahaq hoga

*كُلُّ نَفْسٍ بِمَا كَسَبَتْ رَهِينَةٌ*

ہر شخص اپنے اعمال کے بدلے گرو ہے

Har nafs apne amaal ke badle girwi (pawned) hae bandha huva jo jaisa kiya jitna kiya utna hi aakherat mae paega
 
Aakhir hum is Nafs ki haqeeqat ko kaise samjhe kaise jan'ne

Nabi kareem ka irshad hae

 *من عرف نفسه فقد عرف ربه*

Jisne apne Nafs ko jana bas usne apne Rabb ko jana, ek na mumkin baat ko doosre na mumkin se jod diya, bas insaan koshish karsakta hae aur jitna woh Nafs ko janta jaega utna hi Allah taala ki marefat se khreeb hota jaega

Aur issi tarah hamara nafs bhi maut ke baad kin naemataun ko hasil karega uska bhi ahsaas wa andaza duniya ki zindagi mae puri tarah kar nahi sakta hae
 
Issi baat ki taraf Nabi e kareem ne irshad farmaya hae

*الناس نيام فإذا ماتو انتبهوا*

Duniya mae log so (sleeping) rahe hain jab maut aegi to woh be'dar honge hoshyaar honge

Duniya ki neend woh unki ghaflat hae jahalat hae un tammam baataun se jo aakherat mae maut ke baad pesh aane wale hain

Jab maut aegi aur nafs jism ko chode ga tab hi sari haqeeqatain usper kashf (open) hojaegi jism ke saath nafs _passive_ halat mae hae maut hi per woh _active_hoga bedar hoga puri tarah hoshyaar hoga aur phir un tammam baataun ka mushaheda (visualise imagine see) karega jo Allah taala ne us'se wada kiya hae

Issi ko Koran keh raha hae

*فكشفنا عنك غطاءك فبصرك اليوم حديد*

maut per hi uski aankhaun se tammam purdeh hata diye jainge aur us roz uski aankhen beinteha tez hojaegi
:
*وَاعْبُدْ رَبَّكَ حَتَّىٰ يَأْتِيَكَ الْيَقِينُ*

Tum apne Rabb ki ibadat karte raho jab tak ke tumhe yaqeen (yane maut) na ajae

yaqeen insaan ko *maut* per hi asakta hae isiliye maut ko *yaqeen* kehte hae aur yaqeen ko *maut*

Insaan issi haqeeqat se qafil hae, bhula huva hae

Nabi e kareem ka irshad hae ke tum do baataun ko hamesha yaad karte raho ek to *Allah tabaraka wa taala* ki zaat aur doosra apni *Maut* yane har baat un dono ko pesh e nazar rakh kar karo

Aur agar insaan ne ye kiya to uska har amal sahi hoga durust hoga ikhlaas ke saath hoga

*وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم*

○●○●○●○●○●○●○●○●○●○●

5/16/16, 12:34:41 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*
*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■

Maut ek *Hikmat* hae, ek *Rehmat* hae, ek *Naemat* hae, ek *Rahat* hae

*Maut* ki haqeeqat kiya hae siwae iske ke *Nafs* ka *Jism* ko istemal karna chodne ke

Jism to hamesha hi murda the aur murda hi rahega

Inteqal (muntaqil, transfer) hone wali chez woh mommin ki *Rooh* hi hae jisko hum *Nafs* kehte hae

Woh Nafs jisne jism ke saath rahkar Allah ki Toheed ki, Hudood ki sahi marefat wa taat ki, Rasulullah ki layi huvi Shariat ki paervi ki (follow), halal haram ka paband raha, logoan ke huqooq (rights) ko puri tarah ada kiya, amanatdar aur qol ka sacha raha (truthful), balkeh har khair aur bhlai ke kaam mae tezi aur khloos se aage badha, wohi Nafs inteqal karta hae, wohi *Nafs* jism ko chodega to jannat ka haqdar hoga, Alam e Roohani mae jaisa uski duniya mae koshish thi waisa hi muqam hasil karega

Jaisa ke Koran be hisaab ayaat mae aise hi mutaqi pak aur saaf nafs ke liye irshad farmaya

وَوُفِّيَتْ كُلُّ نَفْسٍ مَّا كَسَبَتْ وَهُمْ لَا يُظْلَمُونَ

Har Nafs ko pura ka pura badla diya jaega aur us roz (Qiyamat ke din) kisi per zulum nahi kiya jaega

 وَفِيهَا مَا تَشْتَهِيهِ الْأَنفُسُ وَتَلَذُّ الْأَعْيُنُ وَأَنتُمْ فِيهَا خَالِدُونَ

Aur Jannat mae har woh chez hogi jinki unka nafs khaesh karega aur jo unki aankhaun ko acha lage aur woh usme hamesha rahega

فَلَا تَعْلَمُ نَفْسٌ مَّا أُخْفِيَ لَهُم مِّن قُرَّةِ أَعْيُنٍ جَزَاءً بِمَا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُ

Koi Nafs ye nahi janta ke kiya chez Jannat mae uski aankhaun ki thandak ke liye (Allah taala ne) utha rakhi hae jaza mae jo usne duniya mae amal kiya

Aur jo ye sab nahi kiya, jisne emaan nahi laya, shirk, gumrahi, kufur, jahalat mae pada raha uska nafs to sirf halak huva, tabah aur barbad huva, woh inteqal nahi kiya, uska nafs jannat mae nahi jaega Roohani Qudsani alam mae hargis dakhil nahi hoga issi baat ko Koran farmata

أَن تَقُولَ نَفْسٌ يَا حَسْرَتَا عَلَىٰ مَا فَرَّطتُ فِي جَنبِ اللَّهِ وَإِن كُنتُ لَمِنَ السَّاخِرِينَ

Hae ! Mujhe bada hi afsoos hae jo mae ne Allah ke ba're mae kami ki uske ahkamaat ko nahi mana balkeh mae ne to unka mazaak udaya

إِنَّ الَّذِينَ لَا يَرْجُونَ لِقَاءَنَا وَرَضُوا بِالْحَيَاةِ الدُّنْيَا وَاطْمَأَنُّوا بِهَا وَالَّذِينَ هُمْ عَنْ آيَاتِنَا غَافِلُونَ

Jin logoan ne hum se (Allah taala) se milne ki khaesh wa umeed na rakhi aur duniya se mutmain wa razi (satisfied & accepeted it) wohi hamari nishaniyun se qafil rahe  

قَدْ يَئِسُوا مِنَ الْآخِرَةِ كَمَا يَئِسَ الْكُفَّارُ مِنْ أَصْحَابِ الْقُبُورِ

Woh aakherat se mayus hae umeed nahi rakhte jaise ke kufar khabraun se uthae jane ki umeed nahi rakhte

Unka Nafs duniya mae jism ke saath zindagi guzari woh aisa hi hae jaise safar to zaroor kiya magar manzil ko nahi pohuncha woh aisa hi hae jaise safar hi nahi kiya isiliye hum kehenge ke inteqal nahi kiya balkeh halakat ke wadi mae bhatak gaya

Hamare Aima alehe salaam ne kiya hi behtreen misaal dekar *Nafs* ke *Jism* ke saath rahne ki kaifiyat ko samjhaya hae

Farmate hain ke Nafs haqeeqat mae bahut hi Aala wa Ashraf hae, saaf shafaf  roohani, ملكوتي malakooti hae, woh hamesha ka hai (living, immortal) us Nafs ki kisi khata, gunah ki wajeh se is Duniya mae ek muddat (time) tak, yane insaan ki jismani zindagi tak jism mae qaed (prisoned) kardiya gaya hae jo ek khaas maqsad ke liye hae jisme Allah taala ki badi Hikmat poshida hae

Is baat ki misaal Imam ne is tarah se di hae ki tum Nafs ko ek shareef hakim acha insaan khyal karo jo apna watan (home town) chod kar doosre shaher (town) aya huva hae aur us nayi ajnabi jagah mae ek bahut hi khubsurat jawan aurat ki mohabbat mae giraftar hogaya, uske ishq mae deewana hogaya halankeh woh aurat bahut hi khrab aqlaq ki, jahel, fajir, gande, halke, raddi, khyalaat ki hae, usko sirf khane pine, khubsurat libaas mae sajne sawarne aur apni sab hi duniyawi khaeshat pura karne ke siwae koi kaam nahi

Imam farmate hae ke woh khubsurat fajir khrab aurat haqeeqat mae woh uska duniya mae jism hae

Woh nek insaan us jawan aurat ki mohabbat mae giraftar ishq mae deewana apni puri koshish aur mehnat uske mamlaat ko durust karne, uski duniya ki khaeshat ko pura karne  lazataun ko satisfy karne lagadeta hae

Woh aadmi apni ishq wa ki diwangi mae hosh kho baithta hae na usko apni fikar rahti hae na apne haal per nazar, na usko us baat ka khyal ata hae ke woh kisi aur shaher ka hae aur wahan uske dost saathi rishtedar sab hi maujud hae sab hi usko yaad kar rahe hain uska gharbar aur sab hi naematain wahan maujud hae

Jab tak ke Nafs jism ke saath rahega woh be inteha takleef wa pareshani mae rahega, jism ki khaesh maal wa daulat hae, khana pina aesh wa aram hae, Nafs Aqal ke zareeyeh Aqal ki maddad se usko rokta hae samjhata hae aur aksar thak haar kar jism ki khaeshat ko majboori mae puri kar bhi deta hae, ye duniya ki zindagi mae woh ek kash' mo' kash aur imtehan mae hae kabhi aakherat ki yaad ayi to ibadat karliya aur kabhi shaitaan ne bhe'kaya to Allah ko bhi bhul gaya  

Nafs ke liye koi rahat nahi, koi aram nahi, koi najat nahi, jab tak ke woh is adna jism ko na chode,

Jis tarah se us shareef nek insaan ko koi rahat nahi jab tak ke woh us fajir fasiq khrab aurat ko na chode jiske ishq mae woh giraftar hae

Hamara deen e Islam aur Shariat e Mohammedi humko yehi batati hae ke ye duniya ki adna zindagi mae *Nafs* jism ke saath kaise rahe, kiyunke ye do bilkul opposite hae tabiyat mae bilkul juda hain, dono ke zarooriyaat alag, khaesh alag, maqsad alag, magar jab tak duniya ki jismani zindagi hae saath rahna bhi hae  

Shariat humko yehi sikhati hae ke kaise miljulkar *Nafs aur Jism* saath rahe balkeh deen nafs ki maddad karta hae ke jism ko uske tabe (under control) kare khabu mae rakhe aur uske jaisa banae

Misaal ke tor per jaisa Imam e Jafar e Sadiq farmate hain ke nafs ki qiza (food) wo uska bhuka (hungry) rahna hae aur jism ki khaesh ziyada se ziyada khae, ache se acha khae, yahan hamare ahkamaat e shariat kaam aate hain Rasulullah ne farmaya tum kuch bhuk rakhkar dastarkhan se uth jao, to is tarah shariat balance create karti hae aetedal paida karti hae aur puri koshish karti hae ke nafs duniya ki khrabiyun mae na phas jae

Deen aur shariat ke ahkamaat isiliye hain ki hamare Nafs ko duniya mae pak wa saaf rakhna hae, us'e Alam e Roohani ke qabil bhi banana hae aur duniya ki zindagi mae aetedal (balance harmony) qaem rakhna hae, takeh maut ke waqt nafs jism ko khushi khushi asaani se chode, aur mahal e Noorani, alam e Qudsani mae dakhil hojae jo uska haqeeqi ghar hae

*Maut* ek *Hikmat* hae *Rehmat* hae, *Naemat* hae, *Nafs*ke liye rahat hae  

 ■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■

*Maut* ki *Hikmat* per ye aakhri mazmun hae inshallah ainda seerat e Syedna Sulaiman aur zikar Syedi Almansoob Mohammed Hussain saheb ka hoga jinka Urs 14 shaban ko hae

■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■■

Kiya iqbal bhai ko sabaq ke recording bheje ho
5/19/16, 9:24:24 AM: Asif Hussain: WalaykumAsSalaam Ishaq bhai. Very sorry, but I did not get a chance yet. InshaAllah I'll send it to you both by the end of the weekend
5/19/16, 10:54:11 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: Koi baat nahi itmenan se bhejna
5/19/16, 11:58:27 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍃🌾🍃🌾🍃🌾🍃🌾

*سلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*
*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*
*جمعة مبارك*

14 Shabaan e kareem Hazrat Moulana Muqaddas *Mohammed Hussain ibne Mulla Shamsuddin saheb* ka youm e wafat hae, aap 1360 Hijri qable namaz e Nisf e Shaban e kareem inteqal farmae

Aap be'inteha mutaqi aur parhezgaar the, aapka wara wa taqwa, zohod wa ibadat, Ilm wa amal bemisaal tha

Aapki paedaesh Satara Maharashtra ki thi, aapke walid wa dada *Mulla Shamsuddin wa Mukaram Saadullah saheb* Dawat ke mukhlis log the jinka zikar Duwaat ke aksar musharafat (letters) mae milta hae,

Hazrat Moulana Mohammed Husain saheb, *"Mulla saheb"* se bahut ziyada maroof (known) the, aap shru se hi taleem ki taraf bahut raqbat (inclined) rakhte the aapke walid ghreeb the ghar mae light ka intezam bhi barabar nahi tha aap sadak ki roshni (street light) mae baith kar padhte the

Aapke zindagi ka kuch waqt Barode mae bhi guzra aur ziyada tar waqt Mumbai mae rahe

Taleem ke baad aap Anjuman E Islam High School mae ustad ki naukri karliye, school mae aapki ba'wiqar shaqsiyat aur aala kirdar ki wajeh se shagird to shagird ustadaun yane teachers mae bhi aapki badi izzat aur hurmat thi

Aapki hle baet e Nabi se mohabbat ka ek bahut hi diljasp waqea hae ke aap ke ek shagird ne jo aapke maslak (religious beliefs) ko jaanta tha ek kitab pesh ki jisme teeno Khalifa ki badi tareef thi aur Moulana Ali ki mazamat (insult) thi woh ladka aap se kuch badtameezi bhi kiya aap ne pehle usko samjhaye aur tambeeh (scolded) ki, magar us bache ne aap se dobara badtameezi ki to aap uski woh kitaab narazgi mae phek di woh ladka us zamane ke mashoor ahle baet ke dushman khandaan Qazi Kabiruddin ka fard tha, usne Hazrat qibla ke khilaf adalat mae case kardiya

Us waqt Hazrat Moulana Ziaali ibne Sheikh Ibrahim saheb muqaddas Bambai mae tashreef rakhte the aap ne khetwadi ki khadeem masjid mae Jumua ki namaz ke baad Mohammed Hussain saheb ke liye dua karne ke liye farmaya, "ke Allah taala aapko court ki zillat se mahfuz rakhe"

Us waqt badiwale mashoor Vakil Janab Ameeruddin Tayabji saheb bhi masjid mae the unhune ne Hazrat ko itmenaan dilaya ke mae khud court ki karwai karunga magar Allah ka karna aisa huva jab aap court mae gaye to judge aapki buzrugiyat aur shaqsiyat ko dekhkar hi itna mutasir huva ke ussi waqt muqadame (case) ko kharij (dismiss) kardiya aur aapko puri izzat aur takreem ke saath wapas bhej diya

Syedna Dai *Moulana Gulam Hussain saheb* ne 5 ziqada 1355 mae aapko mansubiat se nawaza, aapko us roz chand (few) ikhwan ke saamne ghar se Dawat e Shareef ke kamre mae bulaya, jab Syedna Dai ke saamne hazir huve to topi utarne kaha aur Syedna Dai ne  apna Amama pehnaya aur Nas e Shareef haath mae dedi jisme likha tha ke aapka wara wa taqwa deen mae aapki khidmat aur koshish ne aapko is martabe azeem tak phuncha diya Allah aapko aur tammam momineen ko mubarak kare

Us waqt aapki umar shareef 87 saal thi aur Syedna Dai se aapka ek saal ka faraq (difference) tha

Aapki Mansubiat ke kuch waqt ke baad Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain saheb muqaddas ke inteqal ke baad unke janeshin Syedna Hussain bin Ahmed ne Hazrat Moulana Ishak Saheb ko bhi mansub muqrar kiya aur Nas mae aapka bhi zikar kiya aur aapko Dai ne walid ke kar likha hae jo aapki badi umar aur Dai ki nazar mae aapka ahteram ki taraf ishara hae

Aapke Barode ke qiyam ke zamane mae aap fajar ki "Ratib" ki dua ke waqt al hadd ul fazil *Musa bin Taj* ki ziyarat ke liye roz jate aur namaz khatam hone se pehle wapis bhi hojate ek waqt aap wapis ho rahe the ke kisi ne aapke kandhe ko mara aap palat kar dekhe koi nahi tha aap ka kehna tha ke is waqae ke baad mujhe *Jinnat* nazar aane lage, yeh aapki karamat thi ke yeh chezain aapko nazar aati

Aapki di huvi taweez aur duain bahut mujrab (effective) thi aur logoan ko bahut faida hota, aap ka Arabi khat (writing) bahut khubsurat tha aap ne bahut si Dawat ki kitabain naqal (copy) ki hain aapki jama karda duaon ka Sahifa jo aap ne apne haath se likha hae bahut hi nayab (rare) hae, aap ne bahut hi shaandar duain muqtalif duwat ke sahifaun se jama ki hain,

Aapki roshan zameeri (far sightedness) ke bahut se waqaet hain, aap momineen ko bahut si baatain hone se pehle agah (warn) kardete, aur kai waqt aisi baataun ka inkeshaf (express) karte jo baad mae barabar hokar rahti

Aap ne itni badi umar mae bhi bahut khubi se Dawat ki zimmedari uthayi, waaz wa nasihat karte rehte aur ilmi ifada (teaching) hamesha jari rahta, logoan ki aur jamaat ki badi khidmat ki, aakhri waqt tak namaz ba jamaat se khiyam kiya

Aap 14 Shaban ke roz ache the ghar mae kisi se kuch kaam ke liye kha aur phir kaha mae kal se tum ko takleef nahi donga aur aap ne us waqt khushi ka ishaar kiye aur hanse (laughed) bhi (aap ko apne inteqal ka pura andaza tha jiski taraf aap ne ishara kiya tha)

Aap us roz 14 Shaban kareem 1360 Hijri dopahar ka khana bhi nahi khaye aur sogaye, teen baje ke khreeb aap is Dar e fani se Dar e baqa ki taraf kuch kiye (duniya se aakherat ki taraf inteqal kiye)

Aapka mansubiat ka dor 4 saal 8 mahine raha aapki umar inteqal per 92 saal thi,

Aapko Bambai ke kabrastan mae Syedna Dai Gulam Husain saheb ke bazu dafan kiye gaye

aapki waise aulad bahut huvi magar sab hi aapki zindagi mae hi inteqal ki sirf do betiyaan aapki hayat rahi

Allah taala ki rehmatain ho aapki khabar mubarak per aur aapke nazraat aur barkaat nazil ho hum sab per

Aapke roze mubarak jisme Syedna Dai Gulam Hussain saheb muqaddas aur Hazrat Moulana almansoob Nasrullah saheb muqaddas bhi moujud hae aur aapki khabre mubarak ki tasveer saath bhej raha hun

Aap sab ko Nisf Shaban e kareem ki mubarak raat ki mubarakbaad bhi pesh hae aur ilteja hae ke haqeer ke liye aur khususan waleda majeda jo bimar hae unko apni duaon mae zaroor shareek rakhe

🌾🍃🌾🍃🌾🍃🌾🍃
5/19/16, 12:01:07 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: <‎image omitted>
5/19/16, 12:02:09 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: <‎image omitted>
5/21/16, 1:10:29 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌹🌾🌿🍂🌾🌹🌿🌾🌹

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*
*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*


Dawat e Haq Hindustan mae kaise pheli is baat ki tareeq bahut se tareeqdan (historians) ne likhi hae

Janab Moulvi Mohammed Najam saheb (from awaam) ne apni kitab _Mazahebe Islam_ mae  hamari *Emaani Dawat* ki ibteda Hindustan mae kaise huvi uska zikar kiya hae aur is tareeq (history) ke liye unhune bahut se historians aur bahut si kitabaun ka reference bhi diya hae

Unhune jin kitabaun ka reference diya hae woh ye hain

_Abjad ul Uloom_  

_Gujrat & Gujratis by Behramji Malhari_  

_Raas Mala Gujrati translation_

_Preaching of Islam by Arnold_

_Encyclopedia of Islam_

Aur inke alawa unhune bahut si kitabaun ka reference diye hae in reference ke tawasul se woh likhte hain keh

*Bohraun* ( *Sulaimanis, Dawoodi Bohras, Alia's and sub branches* ) ki ibteda *Gujrat* se hi huvi kehte hae ke *Moulana Imam Maad al Mustansir Billah* ke zamana mae (427 to 467 Hijri) yane aaj se taqreeban 1000 saal pehle Miser (Egypt) se Imam ne do shaqs ko Hindustan ki taraf Dawat karne ke liye bheja unme ek ka naam *Moulai Abdullah* tha aur doosre ka *Moulai Ahmed* woh dono Yemen ke raaste se hote huve Hindustan aaye

Woh Hindustan ke khambat (Cambay) ke port per pohunche us zamane mae khambat ka Raja ek Rajput tha jiska naam *Sidh Rao Jaisingh* tha aur taqriban pure Gujrat per uski hukumat thi aur uska Dar ul hukumat (capital) *Pattan* tha

*Sidh Rao* ke Vazir ka naam *Bharmal* tha woh bhi *Rajput* tha aur bahut hi chalak aur aqalmand insaan tha Raja ka pura aetemad (faith) usper tha aur woh taqriban hukumat chalata tha

Sidh Rao masulmanaun ke liye bahut hi mutazib (jealous) tha butaun (Idols) ka bahut aqeeda rakhta tha

Syedi Moulai Abdullah jab sahel (coast) per utre to apni jaan ka bada khoof tha aap chupte chupate jungle aur khetaun (fields) mae phirte rahe aur ek roz unka guzar ek khet (farm) ke pas se huva jahan ek aadmi apni biwi ke saath kheti kar raha tha Moulai Abdullah unke pass gaye aur pani maanga woh budhe miya biwi ne kaha kuch roz pehle tak kuwe mae pani tha magar ab kuwa (well) sukh (dried) gaya hae hum bhi pani se mahroom hogaye hain

Moulai Abdullah ne kha ke mujhe kuwa (well) dikhao woh dono ne kaha kuwa dekhkar tum kiya karoge kiya tum phir se pani nikal sakte ho ?

Moulai Abdullah ne kaha nahi magar Allah taala har chez per khadir hae woh jo chahe kare agar woh hukum de to koi nahi rok sakta

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
وَإِن يَمْسَسْكَ اللَّهُ بِضُرٍّ فَلَا كَاشِفَ لَهُ إِلَّا هُوَ وَإِن يَمْسَسْكَ بِخَيْرٍ فَهُوَ عَلَىٰ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ

Agar Allah taala tum ko koi takleef pohunchana chahta hae to uske siwae usko koi dur karne wala nahi hae

Aur agar koi rehmat aur rahat pohunchana chahta hae to koi usko rokne wala nahi woh har chez par Qadir hae
 
Phir Moulai Abdullah ne kha ke agar Allah taala tum per ahsaan kare aur kuwe se pani nikal aye to kiya tum dono mere haath per musalman hojauge aur Allah Subhanahu wa taala per emaan le auge ?

Woh dono ne kaha ke agar tum jo kehte ho woh Allah taala karde to tum jo khoge woh hum zaroor karenge aur Allah per emaan le ainge

Moulai Abdullah us waqt kuwe mae utre aur ek neza (spear) jo aapke haath mae tha usko us kuwe ke tah (bottom) mae gaadh diya (pierced the bottom of the well)  jisse kuwe se pani ubalne laga aur thodi hi daer mae kuwa pani se bhar gaya, ye dekhkar woh dono Moulai Abdullah per emaan le aaya aur *Dawat Haq* qabool kiya, unke naam *Kaka Akela* aur biwi ka naam *Kaka Akeli* tha

Inshallah *khambat* aur *Pattan* mae Dawat e Hadiya kaise pheli aur Badshah ke Vazir *Bharmal* uska *Pandit Pujari* aur phir badshah *Raja Jaisingh* ne emaan qabool kiya aur phir Dawat ka sisila chala Bharmal ke bhai *Tadmal* ne emaan laya aur phir unki aulad *Moulai Yakoob* aur *Moulai Fakhruddin* ne *Dawat Hadiya* ko phelaya

Inshallah ainda zikar jari rahega ......................................

🌼💐🌹🌼💐🌹🌼💐🌹
5/22/16, 8:09:22 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌹🌳🌹🌳🌹🌳🌹🌳

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Zikar kiya tha hamari Emaani Dawat ki ibteda Hindustan mae kaise huvi

Ye riwayatain awaam ki ek mashur kitab se liye gaye hain jiska zikar mae pehle kiya hun

Saheb e kitab (author) likhte hein ke *Moulai Abdullah Saheb* ke haath per sab se pehle *Kaka Kela* aur *Kaki Akeli* ne deen e Haq mae dakhil huve aur phir unhune us mandir ke bade pujari pandit ko deen e Haq ki taraf mael (incline) kiya aur uska baad pujari ki koshish se Raja ke Vazir *Bhadmal* ne bhi Emaan le aya

Vazir Bhadmal bahut hoshyar aur chalak insaan tha unhune deen ko bahut achi tarah Moulai Abdullah ke pas samjha aur uske baad namaz salaat ke aur shariat ke ahkamaat ke bahut paband hogae

Vazir Bhadmal ne apne deen ko Raja se chupa rakha tha magar kuch logoan ne Vazir ko Namaz padhte huve dekh liya tha aur unhune ye baat *Raja Jaisingh* ko bata di thi
ek waqt Vazir Bhadmal namaz padh rahe the Raja ke jasus (spies) Raja ko batadiye, Raja khud Bhadmal ke pas aye aur unko namaz padhte huve dekh liya

Raja ne Vazir se pujha tum ye kiya kar rahe the ?

Janab Bhadmal ne kaha ae Raja mae ne ek saamp (snake) dekha jisko mae khade khade (qiyam in namaz) dekhta raha jab snake nazar nahi aya to jhuk kar ( bowing, ruku mae) dekhta raha phir mae ne dekha ke woh is badi sandok (trunk) ke peeche chala gaya hae to mae zameen per apna sar rakhkar (sajda) usko dhund raha tha

Raja samajh gaya ke Vazir bahane kar raha hae aur uski baat ko ghalat sabit karne ke liye apne sipahiyun (soldiers) ko hukum diya ke sandok (trunk) hatao, khuda ka karna ye huva ke jab sandokh hatai gai to haqeeqat mae uske peeche se saamp (snake) nikla, Allah ne Vazir ki izzat rakhli balkeh Raja ki nazar mae Vazir ki qadar aur badh gai

Khambat ke bade mandir mae ek metal ka haathi (elephant) jo without support latka huva tha usko kuch is tarah magnets se set kiya tha ke woh space mae without support hang ho raha tha us mandir mae Raja saal mae ek khaas din us haathi ki puja ke liya aata tha

Moulai Abdullah ne ek chal chali (made an scheme) aur us mandir ke pujari ko jo emaan la chuka tha usko kaha ke tum Raja ko kaho ke haathi mere khawab (dream) mae aya tha aur keh raha tha ke woh bahut thak gaya hae (very tired) aur paun zameen per rakhna chahta hae,

Moulai Abdullah ne us raat mae ek taraf ke magnets ki setting badal di aur woh haathi jhuk gaya Raja bahut mayus huva aur dosre roz Moulai Abdullah ne dosre magnet bhi hatadiya aur woh haathi dono paer (legs) zameen per rakh diya aur phir kuch waqt baad woh charo (all four) paer zameen per rakh diye

Raja bahut ghumgeen (saddened) huva us waqt Raja ko kuch logoan ne bataya ke mandir ka pujari aur Vazir apna purana Hindu dharam badal diye hain aur ek Arab muzaffir ke dharam Islam ko qabool kiya hae aur yeh sab unki shrarat hae

Raja bahut naraz huva aur Moulai Abdullah aur us mommin pujari ko pakadne ke liye badi fauj le aaya magar us waqt Moulai Abdullah ke bahut karamatain (miracles) zahur mae aai (jiski tafzeel bahut lambi hae) in sab karamataun aur kaifiyataun ko dekhkar *Sidh Rao Jaisingh* aur uske saath bahut se Hindu Brahmin Musalman hogaye balkeh emaani Dawat mae dakhil hogaye

Moulai Abdullah uska baad *Sidhpur* aur *Pattan* gaye wahan bhi bahut sau (hundreds of people) ko mommin banaya uske baad Moulai Abdullah ne Vazir Bhadmal ke bete Moulai *Yakoob* ko deen ki taleem di aur apne Inteqal se qabal moulai Yakoob ko apna janesheen muqrar kiya aur Moulai Yakoob ne apne chachere bhai jo Tadmal ke bete the moulai *Fakhruddin*  ko _Bagad Raj dungarpur Rajputana_ mae hae Dawat karne ke liye bheja aap ne deen phelaya magar aap kuffaar ke haath shaheed huve aur *Galiakot* mae dafan huve

*Moulai Yakoob* ne apni Dawat ko masbut kiya apne baad mae aapne bete *Ishak* ko janesheen banaya aur *Ishak* ne *Ali* ko aur *Ali* ne *Hasan* ko  aur *Hasan* ne *Adam*ko yahan tak ke ye silsala *Syedna Yusuf bin Sulaiman* tak gaya jo pehle Hindustani Dai huve pohuncha aur aap ke baad Syedna *Abdul Jaleel* aur Syedna *Dawood bin Ajab Shah* aur uske baad Syedna *Sulaiman bin Hasan* huve

Mojisa ya karamat (miracles) koi Nubuwat, ya Haq ki daleel nahi hoti Rasulullah ne bhi mojise dikhae magar woh aam jahel unpadh logoan ko deen ki taraf raqib (incline) karne, shoq dilana ke liye hae, asal chez ilm se samajhna hae

Rasulullah ne bhi deen e Islam sab se pehle apne *Aqlaq* aur *Kirdar* se phelaya aap *Sadiq* aur *Ameen* kehlate the (yane Sache aur Amanatdaar) log aapki ye khubi ko dekhkar deen mae dakhil hote aur ahista ahista log deen ko bhi samajhte aur aqeede ko masboot karte

Ek zamane tak hum mommineen ki yehi kaifiyat thi ke hum bhi Sadiq wa Ameen kehlate the log unke pas be inteha qimti aamanatain rakhewate unko yaqeen hota ke amanat zaroor wapas milegi ye Sulaimani hae adalat (court) mae Sulaimani ki gawahi (witness) kabhi radd (reject) nahi ki jati

Aaj hamare aqlaq kiya hain hamara kirdar (character) kiya hae ?

*Kiya hum Sulaimani kehlane ke qabil hain ?*

Ye bayan awaam ki mashur kitab _Mazhab e islam_ se liya gaya hae

Hamare pas bhi us zamane ki history ki ek mashur kitab hae

رسالة بدايع الأخبار المأخوذة من العلماء الهندية والاحبار  

 _"Risalatul Bada'eul Akhbar al Ma'qusatun min al Ulloma Al Hindiya wal Ahbar"_

Risala ajeeb wa ghreeb khabraun ka jo ulomae Hind se hasil kiya gaya hae jiske musanif (author) hae *Syedi Ahmedji bin Abdul Lateef bin Miyan Shamsuddin* aur ye kitab *Syedna wa Moulana Jafar bin Syedna Sulaiman* ke hukum se likhe hae aur is kitab ka behtreen tarjuma *Raas ul Hudood Moulvi Abbas Nooruddin saheb muqaddas* ne kiya hae jisme bahut hi diljasp waqeaat ka zikar hae

Moulai Abdullah Moulai  Yakoob wa Mukaram Kaka Kela wa Kaka keli ke roze mubarak  khambat mae hae aur Moulai Fakhruddin ka roza Galiakot mae maujud hae

Allah tabaraka wa Taala unki badi khidmataun ka behtreen ajar de jinki wajeh se aaj hum deen e Haq per hain aur unki khabraun per rehmatain aur barkatain nazil ho aur hum sab momineen per unke nazraat hamesha jari rahe

*Ameen be Haq e Taha wa Yaseen*

5/22/16, 1:17:37 PM: Asif Hussain: Sure! It's very simple. I put the files in a folder called MM
5/25/16, 1:43:56 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍒🍒🍒🍒🍒🍒🍒🍒

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*
*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

18 Shaban e kareem ko hamare ek azeem us shaan *Dai Syedna Faiz e Ali bin Syedna Sulaiman Saheb* ka youm e wafat guzra

Aap 88 saal ki umar mae 1088 Hijri ko 38 saal 4  mahine Dai ki haisiyat se Dawat ki behtreen khidmat karke Ahmedabad mae inteqal farmae

Aapki wiladat 12 Jamadil Awal 1000 Hijri ki hae aur aapka naam *Syedna Sulaiman Saheb* ne Imam waqt ke farzand Ali ke naam se فيض علي Faiz e Ali rakhe jiske adad (numerological value) 1000 hoti hae

Aap ke bhai *Syedna Jaffar* Dai e munfareed the, aapke do bhai Dai e qaer munfareed huve aapke doosre bhai (half brother) jo ek hi waleda se the *Syedna Ibrahim bin Mohammed bin Fahad* aapke baad Dai e munfareed huve aapke Dada *Syedna Hasan bin Syedna Yusuf* Dai e qaer munfareed huve aur Dada ke walid *Syedna Yusuf* pehle Hindustani Dai huve aur aapki waleda *Khadija binte Noah* bahut Alima fazila thi bahut bada martaba tha aur Dawat ki bahut hi azeem khidmat anjaam di hae

Syedna Ali saheb ke be hisaab ma'ajis hae jisme se *1000 ma'ajis (miracles)* kisi bhai ne ek kitab mae jama kiya hae jiska naam hae

*بستان أهل الايمان في معجزات سيدنا علي بن سيدنا سليمان*

Is kitab mae ma'ajis se pehle aapka hulye mubarak ka zikar kiya hae

Kehte hain ke aap darmiyani khad (height) ke the, duble the (lean), aur aapka chehra gol (round) bahut ziyada khubsurat tha, badi badi surmai aankhen thi (almond shaped eyes) aur naak lambi khubsurat thi,(straight balanced nose) hont (lips) surq (reddish) the aur dant (teeths) bilkul anar ke danaun ki tarah the, dadhi (beard) bahut ghani thi magar aapke sar per baal nahi the *(Moulana Ali ibne abi Talib ki tarah)* aap ki chaal bahut tez thi

Aap itne khubsurat aur wajih the ke log aapko farishta hi kehte dost to dost aapke kattar dushman (sworn enemies) bhi yehi kehte

*حَاشَ لِلَّهِ مَا هَٰذَا بَشَرًا إِنْ هَٰذَا إِلَّا مَلَكٌ كَرِيمٌ*

Subhanallah, beshak ye khubsurat haseen aadmi insaan nahi balkeh ek kareem farishta hae

Aapka libaas bahut hi mamuli aur sada hota aur aksar aap logoan se bachne aur pehchane na jae isliye fakhi'rana aur baaz waqt Hindu tariqa ka libaas pehen lete

Aap ki ghiza (diet) bahut hi sada thi aap ziyada'ter roti aur khichdi pasand karte meetha aapko pasand nahi tha magar mewe (fruit) mae mauz (banana) bahut pasand tha aur shoq se khate

Aapka sab se bada mau'jiza ya karamat kahe to woh ye hae ki aap ne *377 kitabain tasneef wa taleef ki hain (authored and compiled)* jinme 'seerat' se lekar Aala 'haq'aeq e aliya' per hain jinko sirf dekhkar hi aqalain hairan hojati hain aur aapka dor be'inteha saqt aur takleef de tha, Aurangzeb Badshah alag peeche pada tha aur hamare mukhalefeen Dawoodi Hazraat se aap alag pareshan the bahut se waqt in halaat ki wajeh se aap chupe (hidden) rahte, in halaat aur mushkilaat ke baujud aap ne itni kitabain likhi hae jo ek maujize se kam nahi

Aapki ek kitab *شعاع الأنوار* jo Haqaeq mae bahut hi shaandar kitab hae, walid e muqaddus aksar woh padhaya karte aur ek waqt jab aap Karachi se Multan plane ka safar kar rahe the plane ka hydraulic system fail hogaya tha aur crash landing ka decide huva tha us waqt haqeer bhi saath tha, walid us waqt bilkul itmenan wa sukoon se the aur mujhe farmaya ke humko kuch nahi hoga mere haath mae *Syedna Ali bin  Syedna Sulaiman ke haath ki likhi kitab شعاع الانوار* hae jiski barkat se, aur uske wasile se, hum sab bach jainge aur huva bhi aisa hi ye aapki kitab ki barkat se hum apne muqam Multan pohunch gaye doosre roz akhbar mae khabar print huvi thi *"Taiyara (plane) maujizana tor per bach gaya"* ye sab Syedna Ali saheb ki kitab ki karamat thi

Hamare pass roz fajar ki Namaz ke baad har bilad mae *"Ahya us salaf"* padhte hain, basically woh records of death hae jisme inteqal karne wale ka naam, inteqal per uski umar kiya thi, kaise inteqal huva, kaunsi jagah ke rahne wale the aur kis jagah inteqal huva sab likha hota hae aur phir uske naam se dua e maqferat aur fateha padhte hain, Iska riwaaj Syedna Ali saheb ne hi jari kiya

Aapka ziyada ter waqt logoan ki qidmat mae jata aap har namaz ke liye taqreeben ek ghante pehle aate aur duaon mae aur Quran ki tilawat mae guzarte, baqi jo waqt bachta kitabain likhne mae sarf (spend) karte, aap bahut hi khush ilhan the (meledious voice) aur behtreen andaz mae koran e majeed aur duaon ki tilawat karte the

Aap ghar se baher bahut kam nikalte aur nikalte to do hi kaam ke liye, ya to ziyarat e qaboor ya phir bimar mareez ki ayadat (mizaaj pursi) ke liye, ya phir agar bahut hi zaroori kaam hota to ghar se nikalte, aap raaste mae itni ziyada khair khairaat karte ke log hairat mae hojate aur kehne wale ye kehte ke malum nahi shaed aap kimiya (alchemy) jante hain jiski wajeh se itni khairaat karte hain

Aap aksar apne aap ko poshida rakhne ke liye bahut hi mamuli masakin wa fuqra (fakhir ka) ka libas pehente

Ek waqt aapko raaste mae ek jyotshi (palm reader) ne pakad liya aur aapka haath dekhne (palm reading) ki khaesh ki aap ne muskurakar haath de diya woh jab aapka haath dekha to kehne laga ke salha saal (in many years) mae, mae ne aisa haath nahi dekha ye to *Bhagwan ke Avatar* ka haath hae usne dono haataun ko choom liye aur aapko puri izzat wa karamat dete huve Aapke saamne zameen per sajda de diya

Inshallah ainda aapka zikar Moghul badshah Aurangzeb ke darbar mae ka aur kuch aapke ajeeb wa ghreeb ma'ajis wa karamataun ka  

Roze mubarak ke do tasveer bhi bhej raha hun
