Aaj 21 Shehrullah e mubarak ka din hae aur aaj hi Moulae kaenat Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe, ibne Muljim ki talwaar ki zarb (maar) ki wajeh se Shahadat hasil farmaye

Aapki nasihataun ko yaad karne aur usper amal karne se bheter aapke liye kiya khiraj e aqeedat (homage) hosakta hae

*Kumael ibn Ziyad* aapke mashoor sahabi the jisko Rasulullah ki ata ki huvi Dua bahut hi mashoor hae farmate hain ke ek roz Moulae Kaenat ne mera haath pakda aur khabrastan ke ek kone mae le chale

Jab hum ek su'ni veeran (desolate) jagah mae baith gaye to aap ne irshad farmaya;

Ae *kumael* momin ka dil ek bartan ki tarah hote hae aur nekiyaun aur achaiyaun us bartan mae rakhne ki chez hoti hae

Yaad rakho ki Ilm maal se bahut behter hae Ilm tumhari hifazat karta hae aur maal ki hifazat tum karte ho

Ilm amal ko pak karta hae aur maal kharch karne se ghat (reduce) jata hae

Ilm aalim ko zindagi mae taat guzar (obedient) banata hae aur usku un baataun se a'raasta (decorate) karta hae jo usko uski maut ke baad ki zindagi ko achi aur asaan karti hae
 
Maal ke khatam hone per maaldar ki duniyavi zindagi mae zawal (decline) aur khrabi aajati hae aur woh zinda rahte huve bhi murda hojate hae aur Uloma (aalim log) apni zindagi mae bhi aur uske baad bhi aakherat mae bhi hamesha zinda rahte hae

Ae Kumael tum khana shru karte waqt yeh kaho

  بسم الله الذي لا يضر مع اسمه دآء و فيه شفاء من جميع الاسواء

Mae shru karta hun Allah ke naam ke saath woh hasti jiske ke naam ke saath koi marz nuqsaan nahi pohuncha sakta aur Allah ke naam mae har marz (illness) se shifa (cure) hae

Ae Kumael jab tum khana khao to logoan ko bhi khana khilao usme kanjoosi kabhi na karo, is baat mae koi shak nahi ke tum logoan ke razzak (provider) nahi ho, magar Allah taala tum ko is baat ka sawab zaroor ata karega ke tum zareeyeh bane

Ae Kumael tum jab khana kha lo to bulund awaaz mae *الحمدلله  "Alhamdulillah"* zaroor kaho is'se tumhara ajar (sawab) ziyada hoga

Ae Kumael tum apne aqlaq ko nek banau aur apne saathiyun se khush Dili aur ache se milo aur apne khadim aur naukar ko kabhi  jhidko mat (never abuse or insult)

Ae Kumael apne paet (stomach) ko khane se pura mat bhro pani ke liye kuch jagah chod do aur kuch hawa ki jolani (circulation of air) ke liye bhi rakho

Ae Kumael sahet (health) ka daromadar kam khane aur kam pine se hae

Ae Kumael to kuch bhook (hunger) ko baqi rakhkar dastarkhan se uth ja

Ae Kumael Zakat ki adaegi momineen mae bhai chargi wa mohabbat, aur rishtedari mae barkat ka baaz hoti hae

Ae Kumael to momineen ke saath khrabat (relation closeness) ko badha aur tum rishtedaraun per hamesha meherbaan raho

Ae Kumael tum sadqa karo, Allah taala ke paas sadqe ka bahut bada ajar hae

Ae Kumael mommin ki behtreen araesh (beauty, quality) woh tawazu  (humility & respect for others) hae, aur tawazu ki khubsoorti, logoan ki khata (mistakes) ko darguzar (ignore) karne, ache aqlaq rakhna, shafaqat wa meherbani se pesh aana, aur qil wa qaal yane, bakwaas aur betuki baat aur be'ja kalaam se bachna hae.

Ae kumael to dikhave se bach

Ae kumael tum deen ke mamle mae khuda ke liye agar kisi se behes wa mubhasa (argument & debate) karo to aqalmand se hi karo bewaquf wa jahel  se ahtiyat karo yeh bahut hi ahem aur zaroori baat hae

Ae Kumael tu nalaeq se munazera (debate) mat kar, aur to unke saath aisa hoja jaisa ke Allah taala Koran mae farmata hae

وَإِذَا خَاطَبَهُمُ الْجَاهِلُونَ قَالُوا سَلَامًا

Jab jahel log unko muqatib hote hain (kalaam karte hain) to woh bas Salaam karte huve guzar jaate hae

Ae Kumael tum har haal mae sach kaho Mutaqeen ka bojh utha (burden of being honest; mutaqeen)  faseqeen se dur rahe, aur qaen (amanat mae chori karne wala) ka kabhi saath na de

To har haal mae pak daman rahe sabar aur tahamul se har mamle mae kaam le

Ae Kumael teri mohtajgi aur teri bechaeni ko logoan per kabhi zaher na kar, usko poshida rakh, izzat ke saath sabar kar, aur is baat ke sawab ki umeed sirf Allah taala se rakh

Ae Kumael tere bhaiyaun mae, sacha bhai woh hae jo shidat ki takleef mae bhi tera saath na chode, aur tere koi gunaah mae mubtela hone per woh kabhi Khamosh bhi na rahe (tujh ko tambih kare, aur haq baat samjhae)

Ae Kumael momin, momin ka aina hota hae, kiyunke woh uska har halat mae saath deta hae, uski mohtajgi ko rokta hae aur uski har halat ko bardasht karta hae

Jaan ae Kumael momin aapas mae bhai bhai hain, koi baat koi chez bhaiyaun ke darmiyan hael (in between) nahi asakti (there could never be anything possible which can create differences between brothers)

Ae kumael tu Allah taala ka uski tammam naemataun ke ata karne per shukur ada karte rahe

Ae kumael to har shidat aur takleef mae ye tilawat kar;

لا حول ولا قوة الا بالله العلي العظيم

yeh tere liye kafi hoga, aur har naemat per "Alhamdullillah" kehe, is'se teri naemataun mae ziyadati hogi, aur jab teri risq wa rozi mae kami hojae to tu Allah taala se Isteqfar talab kar Allah taala teri risq mae wusat (kushadgi) dega

aur ae Kumael jab Shaitan tere dil mae "was wase" paida kare to us waqt to khe

  اعوذباللہ القوى من الشيطان الغوى واعوذ بمحمد الرضى من شر ما قدر وقضى واعوذ بالله الناس من شر الجنة والناس أجمعين

_Mae Allah taala se panah maangta hun jo gumraah shaitan se bahut ziyada taqatwar aur qawi (strong) hae, aur Mohammed Al Razi Salwatullah alehe se, har burai se jo Qaza aur Qadar hochuki hae, aur mae panah maangta hun Allah taala se un tammam Ins wa Jinn ke shar (burai) se_

Ae kumael Allah ki naemataun se koi zamana khali nahi, tum Allah taala ki *Hamd, Majd (buzrugi), Tasbeeh, Taqdees, Shukoor aur uske Zikar* se ghafil na raho

Ae kumael Faraez ki adaegi mae koi riyayat (exclusion) nahi aur Nuwafil ki adaegi mae koi sakhti aur shidat nahi

Ae kumael to is baat per bhi qor kar (think) keh to kiyu aur kis liye Namaz padh raha hae aur agar to yeh nahi jana to teri Namaz ki qaboliyat mae farakh ajaega
 
Ae kumael dil ki baat zabaan se zaher hoti hae, aur tera dil qiza (your diet) se banta hae, bas to zara qor kar ke to apne jism wa dil ko kiya qiza (food) khilaya, agar woh Halal na thi to Allah taala teri *Ibadat, Tasbeeh, wa Shukur* ko kabhi bhi qabool nahi karega

Ae kumael samajh le aur jaan le maqlooq mae kisi ki bhi amanat ki adaegi ko tark (avoid) karne ki kisi ko bhi ijazat nahi

Phir *Moulae kaenat Moulana Ali Ibn Abi Talib* ne farmaya

_Mae kasam khata hun ke mae Rasulullah ki wafat se kuch waqt pehle suna ke Rasul e khuda ne takid ki, aur teen martaba farmaya, Ae Abul Hasan (Moulana Ali ki kuniyat hae) amanat ko ada karo, chahe woh kisi nek ki ho ya fajir ki, chahe woh kam ho ya ziyada, yaha tak keh woh sui ke nake (hole of the needle) ke barabar dhaga (thread) kiyu na ho (kitni bhi mamuli chez kiyu na ho agar amanat hae to usko lotana hi hae)_

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de keh hum moula ke in nasihataun ke paband bane jinme qor wa fikar karne wale ke liye bade bade raaz wa haqaeq poshida hae

*وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم*

_Tawfeeq wahi hae jo Allah Ali ul Azeem ki taraf se hae_

🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸
6/26/16, 5:07:16 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*
*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

*أپ سب کو ليلة القدر کی آمد الله تعالی بہت مبارک کرے*

Buzrugane deen se hamesha sunte aye hain ke insaan ke bade se bade gunah ki maqferat ke liye do hi moqe Allah taala ne rakhe hae

Ek Haj ke ayaam mae *ARFE* ke Roz, muqam e *ARAFAT* per jae aur toba kare aur Allah tabaraka wa Taala se maqferat talab kare

Aur ek aaj ki Woh mubarak tareen raat  *ليلة القدر*  hae yane *Qadar wali raat* kehte hain jo *23 wi raat* hae Shehrullah e Mauzam se.

Hadees e shareef hae;

ما تقرب العبد الي الله أفضل من سجود خفي

_Banda Allah taala se sab se ziyada khreeb poshida SAJDE ki halat mae hota hae_

 *Sajde* hi ki halat mae humko Allah taala ki bargaah mae apni toba pesh karna hae isteqfar karna hae gidgid'ana hae aankhun se aansu (tears) bahana hae

*Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib* Salawatullah alahe farmate hain ;

نعم العبادة السجود والركوع

_Sab se behtreen ibadat woh Ruku wa Sujood hae_.

وأفة الصلاة الرياء
 
_Aur farmaya, sab se badi khrabi aur afat ibadat ki woh ibadat mae dikhawa karna hae_

*Imam Jafar e Sadiq* salwatullah alehe farmate hae;

_Jisne sahi mane mae Allah taala ki bargaah mae Sajda kiya, woh hargis, hargis, kabhi bhi nuqsan mae nahi rahega, agarche ke uska woh *SAJDA,* Allah ki bargaah mae uski zindagi mae ek hi waqt kiyu na huva ho_

Aur woh shaqs kabhi kamiyaab nahi huva jisne Sajde mae Allah ke siwae kisi aur ka khyal kiya, kisi aur ki taraf tawaju kiya usne apne Nafs ke saath dhoka kiya, woh ghafil raha, be parwah raha, is baat se jo Allah tabaraka wa Taala ne us bande ke liye uske Sajde mae kiya hi behtreen ajar e azeem wa be hisaab sawab rakha hae is duniya ki zindagi mae bhi wa aakherat mae bhi

Jisne *SAJDE*  ko acha kiya, khalis Allah taala ke liye kiya usko kabhi bhi Allah taala se duri nahi hosakti.

Aur Jisne *SAJDE* ke adaab ka khyal nahi rakha, uski hurmat (respect & dignity) ko zaye kiya (disregard kiya), apne Dil ko apne khyalaat ko Allah ke siwae kisi aur se jod  (connect) diya, to usko Allah se taqrub (closeness) kabhi bhi hasil nahi hoga

Tum Allah ko puri tawazo aur hurmat ke saath *SAJDA*  do, apne aap ko zaleel (degrade) karte huve uski bargaah mae, ye jaante huve aur pura ahsaas rakhte huve ke :

_Allah taala ne tum ko issi mitti (dust of the earth) se paida kiya hae, us mitti se jisko tum jaisi maqlooq raundhte huve, khundalte huve, apne paer (feet) se usper chalte hain, aur tum ko Allah taala ne tarkeeb (systematically organised) diya hae us Nutfe (sperm) se jisko har koi gandi nigah se dekhta hae, aur tum ko paida kiya wahan se jahan tum kuch bhi na the_

شيء مزكورا

_Koi aisi chez na the jiska zikar kiya ja'sake_

Allah taala ne *SAJUD* ka maqsad yehi rakha hae ke tum Dil se Allah taala se sabse ziyada khreeb hojao, apne andaruni zameer ke jasbe ke saath apni Rooh ke sàath

Jo bhi Allah se khreeb huva woh doosre tammam ter khilqaat (created) se dur hogaya (usko kisi aur maqlooq ki hajat nahi rahegi)

Tum agar zaheri *SAJDE* per hi qor karo to tum ko malum  hoga ke woh tum ko har dekhe jaane wali chez se dur kardeta hae

Jis tarah tumhari aankhaun se tammam zaheri dekhe jane wali chezain *SAJDE* mae chup jati hain, issi tarah Allah taala chahta hae ke batin mae bhi tumhara Dil wa Dimaag se Allah ke siwae har chez tum se chup jae,  dur hojae.

Agar banda apne Dil ko *SAJDE* mae kisi aur chez ke khreeb kiya, usse taluq joda to yaqinan woh us chez se khreeb huva aur Allah taala se dur huva

Allah taala ka irshad e mubarak hae ;

ما جعل الله لرجل من قلبين في جوفه

_Nahi banaya Allah taala ne kisi bhi Insaan ke seene mae do (2) Dil, woh ek hi waqt mae do ko khush nahi karsakta_ yane Allah taala aur uske saath kisi aur ko

*Hadees e Qudsi hae* Allah tabaraka wa Taala farmata hae ke mae jab bhi dekhta hun apne bande ke Dil ki taraf, bas mae jaan janta hun uski kaifiyat ko, agar woh meri mohabbat iqlaas ke saath karta hae mere khatir meri taat mae hae, meri khushi aur razamandi mae hae, to us waqt mae uska wali (zimedar, caretaker) hojata hun uske maamlat ki durustagi ka uske zindagi ke tammam mamlaat ka, aur mae us bande ke hamesha khreeb rahta hun

Aur jo bhi Insaan apni Namaz mae, Sajde mae, mere siwae kisi aur ke taraf mashqul hojata hae woh sirf apne aap se apne Nafs se thatta mazaaq kar raha hae, bas uska naam us diwan (volume) mae likha jaega jisme *خاسرين* yane nuqsan uthane wale qusur waar bandaun ke naam likhe jate hae

*Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib* ne ek waqt apni khud ki shaan mae khutba diya, aur farmaya keh  _"Mae Awaal hun, mae Aakhir hun, mae Zaher hun, mae Batin hun"_, aapke alfaz aise the ke logoan ko aapki khudai ke dawe ka khyal jata, us waqt aap mimber se neeche tashreef laye aur zameen ki raet (sand) per apna chehra rakh rakh diya, phir aapne farmaya _Mae Allah taala ka ajis BANDA hun, tum mujhe Allah ka banda samajh kar, tasleem karke, mujhe tum jo chahe kehna keh sakte ho "Allah O Akbar"_

Hamari ye halat hae, ke us Allah tabaraka wa Taala ki marefat to kiya karsakte hain bahut dur ki baat hae, humko to hamari ajis bande hone ka bhi sahi ahsaas nahi hae

Ae Allah humko hamare ajis wa majboor bande hone ka sahi ahsaas karwade takeh hamara *SAJDA* uski bargaah mae sahi mane mae *SAJDA* ho

سجد وجهي البالي الفاني، لوجهك الدائم الباقي، سجد وجهي الذليل لوجهك العزيز الجليل، سجد وجهي الفقير لوجهك الغني الكبير

Mae Sajda karta hun apne bosida (fragile) aur fani (khatam hone wale) chehre ke saath us zaat ko jo hamesha Qaem wa Daem aur baqi rahne wali hae,

us chehre se Sajda karta hun jo zaleel hae usko Sajda karta hun jo bada hi taqat wa khudrat wala hae jo jaleel hae,

mae us chehre se Sajda karta hun jo Faqir, aajis wa mohtaj hae maangne wala hae, usko jo ghani (jiski koi zaroorat baqi na ho) aur kabir hae, be niyaz hae, jo kisi ka mohtaj nahi  

Ae Allah aaj ki azeem mubarak raat hamara *سجدون* *SAJDAUN* ko teri bargaah mae qabuliat ka darja ata farma

وما توفيقى الا بالله العلي العظيم

🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁
6/26/16, 1:42:17 PM: Asif Hussain: AsSalaamAlaykum Ishaq Bhai. Lailatul Qadr aap sab ko boht Mubarak. Please remember us in your prayers
6/27/16, 9:24:49 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم


Allah taala ka fazal wa ahsaan hae ke humko ek aur *قدروالی khadar wali* raat naseeb huvi Allah tabaraka wa taala hamare naqis (defective) amaal aur tuti phuti duaon ko qabool farmae  

 25 Shehrullah e Mauzam 1005 Hijri youm e wafat hae Syedna wa Moulana *Dai Humam us Zaman Syedna Sulaiman ibne Syedna Hasan bin Syedna Yusuf bin Sulaiman saheb ka*

Aap ki seerat (history) e mubaraka ko bilkul hi mukhtasar mae pesh karna hae

Aap daur e *Tayabi ke 27* wae Dai hae aur daur *Mohammedi* ko khatam karne wale aur daur e *Qaemi* ki ibteda karne wale hain jiski ibteda aapke farzand 28 wae Dai e mustaqar *Syedna Jafar* se huvi

Aapki paedaesh e mubarak 27 shawal e kareem 961 Hijri ko *Dar e Sadaan* (aapke dada ka makan) qile *Tayba* Yemen mae huvi

Aapke walid Syedna Hasan per aapke dada Syedna Yusuf ne Dai ki nas kardi thi magar aapke dada hi ki zindagi mae aur Syedna Sulaiman ke bachpan mae hi aapka inteqal hogaya aur aap Dai e Qaer Munfareed huve (one who could not become an active Dai)

Aapki waleda *Syedti Zainab ibne Musa ibne Sulaiman jo Syedna Yusuf* ki bhetiji hoti thi sahebe martaba Aalema fazele bibi thi jinka shummar us waqt ke Hudood e Dawat mae hota tha

Syedna Sulaiman saheb 5 saal ki umar mae yateem hogae the aapki tarbiyat wa taleem aapke dada aur aapki waleda ke pas huvi

5 saal ki umar mae aap Koran padhna shru kiye apke pehle ustad miya Malik ibne Qutub the

5 saal mae aapki taharat e fitri bhi ki gai (musalman kiya gaya)

8 saal ki umar mae aap Koran e majeed khatam farmaya aapke dada Syedna Yusuf ne khushi mae ek badi dawat ki aur ek gae (cow) ki zabihat ki jo ek khaas baat ki taraf ishara tha

9 saal mae aap ne Koran e Majeed ko hifz (by heart) karliye aur Sahifatus Salaat ki puri duain yaad karli aur namaz salaat ke paband hogae

Aap ne Dada Syedna Yusuf ke peeche Arfe ki namaz padhi aur issi saal Syedna Yusuf apne pote ko khud padhana shru kiye

Daswae 10 saal *Idd e Qadeer* ke mubarak din dada ne Ahadees e Nabawi ki kitab _Shahab un Nabawi_ aur _Kitab ut Tahara_ jo _Syedna Qazi un Nauman_ ki mashoor kitab hae padhane shru ki

Aap bahut hi tezi se apni zahanat (intelligence) aur zakawat (sharpness,  understanding) ki wajeh se ilm ke madareej (levels) tae kar rahe tha

974 Hijri jab aap 13 saal ke the aapke dada Syedna Yusuf ne aap se is Koran e Kareem ki ayaat ke mane (meaning) aur tafseer puchi,

*وعلي الله قصد السبيل*

Aur Allah hi per seedhi raah dikhana hae

Syedna Hummam ne bahut hi behtreen andaz mae is ayaat ki tashreeh aur tafseer ki jisse aapke dada be inteha khush huve aur apne pote mae woh buzrugiyat ke asaar (signs) nazar aagae jisse se aapki aankhen thandi huvi

Aur ussi saal jabke aapki umar 13 saal thi 16 Zilhaja ko aapke dada *Syedna Yusuf bin Sulaiman saheb* ka Yemen mae inteqal farmae

Aapke dada ke inteqal ke baad aap ka pura khandaan  Yemen ko chod diya aur Hindustan Sidhpur ka irada kiye

Umar ke 14 saal mae aap Hindustan pohunche Hindustan ke port (ghogha) per aapko *Syedna Jalal ibne Hasan* ke inteqal ki khabar mili aur Syedna *Dawood bin Ajab Shah* ka aapke baad Dai hone ki itela (news) mili

Aap Sidhpur 975 ki pehli Mohurram ko pohuncha

Jamadil awal 975 aap Sidhpur se Ahmedabad jo us zamane mae Dawat ka markaz tha Syedna Dawood bin Ajab Shah ki khidmat mae gaye

Sydney Dawood aapka bahut hi khushi se isteqbal kiye aur khud hi Syedna Sulaiman ko taleem dena shru kiye

Sab se pehle aapko kitab _"Daem ul Islam"_ aur _Mukhtaser ul Asaar_ padhana shru kiye

Ek waqt aap Ahmedabad se Sidhpur kuch kaam se gaye magar bahut jadi hi wapas Ahmedabad aagae us waqt Syedna Dawood ne mazaq mae bahut lateef andaz mae Koran ki ye Ayaat padhi

وما اعجلك عن قومك يا موسى

_Ae Musa tum apni qom ke pas se kiyu itni jaldi chale aye ?_

Janab Syedna Sulaiman ne bhi Koran ki hi ayaat se foran jawab diya

 عجلت اليك ربي لترضي

_Aapke pas jald isliye aya keh aap khush ho_

Kiya hi behtreen jawab Syedna Hummam ne itni kam umri mae diya

Syedna Dawood ne aapko Musa e daur khekar ye bhi bata diya ke agar aap Musa e daur hain to aapka ek dushman Firaun (Pharaoh) bhi yaqinan hoga jisse aapko muqabela karna hoga

14 saal ki umar mae *"Lailatul khadar"* mae Syedna Dawood ne aapka Ahed E Shareef (Misaq) liya

15 saal mae aap Shariat aur Seerat ki bahut si kitabain padh rahe tha aur aap manzoom (poetic form) mae ashaar kehna shru kiye aur Rasulullah aur Ahle Baet e Nabi ki shaan mae Qaside manqebat aur muqtalif ashar kehna shru kiye

17 saal ki umar mae aap _Rasaele Ahmedia jo Imam Ahmed bin Abdullah hamare 9th_ Imam ki kitab hae jo  _"Rasa'ele Ikhwan us Safa"_ ke naam se maruf hae woh aapne padha

18 saal mae aapko Namaz ba jamaat padhane ki Fushat ata ki gai aur Sidhpur ke tammam Hudood e Dawat per aapko foq (supercede) kardiya gaya (us waqt Sidhpur mae sab se badi jamaat thi)

19 saal mae aapko Syedna Dawood ne kitab _Taj Ul Aqaed wa Madan ul Fawaed_ jo hamare 5th Daur e Tayabi ke Dai *Syedna Ali bin Mohammed bin Walid* ki likhi huvi hae woh padhane shru kiye

Ye kitab hamare ahle Haq ke sahi aqeeda (beliefs) kiya hona chahye unme se 100 aqeede aap ne samjhae hain

Is kitab ke liye Syedna Sulaiman Saheb likhte hae ke ye kitab meri *Surat e Roohani* ko sab se ziyada munawar aur roshan karne wali sabit huvi

Umar e shareef ke 20th saal mae aapka Nikah Idd e Qadeer ke roz fajar mae Alhura Khadija binte Noah se huva jo Syedna Dawood ki bhetiji thi aur shaadi ke baad widai pehli Mohurram ko huvi

Aapke Zindagi ke tammam ahem mamlaat kisi na Kisi mubarak din anjaam pae hain

Agar aap qor kare to aapki zindagi aur Rasulullah ki zindagi mae bahut si baatain mumasil (similar) hain jaise aapka bachpan mae Yateem hona, zaher (poison) se shahadat hasil karna iske alawa aur bhi bahut se baatain common hain

Hum Syedna Sulaiman saheb ki ziyarat karte hain, hum zaheri khabre shareef ko chumte hain magar batini ziyarat bahut badhkar hae aala hae aur woh aapki marefat hae, aapke maratib ko jan'na hae, aap ki azeem khidmat ko samajhna hae, aap apne waqt ke Imam ke Dai e azeem ki haisiyat se batini tor per kiya kaam anjam farmaye hain woh asal hae aur Duwaat kehte hain ke jo kaam Imam ko karna tha woh aap ne Dai ki haisiyat se kiye

*Syedna Dai Ali bin Hussain Almakrami* ne aapki jab ziyarat ki to aapki tareef mae kiya hi baleeq baat kehi thi *حجاب حجاب خير المرسلين* *"Hijaab e Hijaab khair ul Mursalina"* jo Ilme haqaeq se waqif hain woh jante hae ke ye aapke kitne bade muqam ki taraf ishara hae

Aap ne ye farmaya tha ke

_"Syedna Sulaiman mae Nubuwat ke tammam Qasail e Mehmooda (good qualities required for nubuwat) maujud the"_

Nubuwat ke Qasail e Mehmooda 46 hain (qualities or virtues required for nubuwat) jo tammam ke tammam aap mae maujud the

Aapki Seerat e mubaraka per bahut kitabain likhi gai hae aur urdu mae bhi moujud hain, *Hazrat Moulana Shakir saheb muqaddus ki likhi *"Zia ul Emaan"* ek behtreen kitab hae uske alawa *Syedna Dai Ali bin Hussain Almakrami ka likha Risala "Al Shahab e la'mea"* jiska urdu tarjuma bhi hae iski alawa aapki wiladat ke 400 saala jashan 1361 per jo muqtaleef buzrugaane deen ne tahqeeqi mazameen (researched articles) likhe hain unme *Mukaram Ras ul hudood Moulvi Abbas Saheb* ka mazmun *Syedna Sulaiman Saheb ke Ashaar* per hamari baseerat ko roshan kardeta haain Syedna Sulaiman saheb ne *11954 Ashaar* (verses) kehe hae jo 6 volumes mae Syedna Jafar ne ek jagah naqal (copy) kiya hae

 Allah humko tawfeeq de ke hum in kitabaun ko padhkar aapki batini tor per bhi ziyarat se mushraaf hojae

Inshallah aapka zikar aur bhi hae...............

🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳🔳
6/28/16, 1:29:54 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ▫▪▫▪▫▪▫▪▫

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Aaj 25 Shehrullah youm e wafat hae *Syedna Dai Sulaiman ibne Syedna Hasan qadasalahu arwahuma*

Aapki zindagi ke bees saal tak ka mukhtasar zikar kal huva tha aage ka zikar maqsood hae

Aapke ki shaan badi hi nirali thi, aapke Muqeem aapke ustad aur aapko Dai banane wale *Dai Syedna Dawood ibne Ajab Shah* aapke liye apne ghar walaun ko farmate _kiya tum log samajthe ho ke Sulaiman mere pas padhne aate hain, arre nahi, nahi, Sulaiman to mujhe padhane aate hain_ aur farmate ke unki Maa ne ek _Noor ka tukda_ jana hae (gave birth to)"

23 saal ki umar mae Syedna Dawood bin Ajab Shah ne aapko Yemen bhejne ka irada kiya takeh aap apne Dada *Syedna Yusuf bin Sulaiman* ke muqam ko Yemen mae sambal le

14 Rajab 984 Hijri ko Syedna Sulaiman saheb ko Syedna Dawood ne Hindustan se Yemen ke liye bheja aur us waqt farmaya _"mae tum ko ek khaas maqsad ke liye bhej raha hun aur woh maqsad tumhare siwae koi pura nahi karsakta hae"_

Jazeere Yemen ke ravana hote waqt aapki umar 24 saal thi aur us waqt Syedna Dawood ne aapko tammam Yemen ke Hudood e Dawat per fauq (promoted over) kardiya tha siwae Syedi Ali bin Idrees al Sumbuli ke aur aapko Jazeere Yemen (deeni territory) ka pura itlaq (power) diya tha ke aap wahan jaisa chahain karsakte hae baqaer Hindustan se ijazat liye

Umar ke 25 saal aap 20 Rabiul awal 985 Taiba Yemen pohunche Syedi Idrees ne aapka khair maqdam (welcome) kiya aur Yemen ke tammam Hudood per fauq kiya

26 saal ki umar aap Haj wa ziyarat e Nabi se mushraaf huve aap wapasi ke raaste per the ke Yemen mae Syedi Idrees bin Sumbuli ka inteqal ki khabar mili aur aapko Yemen ki dawat ko sambhalne ki wasiyat ki hae malum huva aap wasiyat ke hisaab se Taiba aye aur Syedna Dawood bin Ajab Shah ko sab baataun ki khabar bheji aur aapke ahkaam ke muntazir rahe

27 saal ki umar mae aap ne Yemen ke Haras aur uske atraaf ke tammam ilaqe jahan momineen rahte the do'ra (tour) kiye, aur sab momineen aapki taat kiye    

 Issi saal Syedna Dawood bin Ajab Shah ka Hindustan se mushraf (musharaf, letter of senior hudood like Dai is called so) mila aapko Syedna Idrees ki taziyat thi aur saath hi mubarakbaad aur khushi ka ishaar tha ke aapko pure Jazeere ka itlaq (power) mila hae

Syedna Dawood ne aapko yehi bhi likha tha ke hum yehi baat aapke liye chahte the aur aapko Hindustan se bhejne ka maqsad bhi yehi tha

Issi saal aapki waleda *Zainab binte Musa* bhi Hindustan se Yemen ayi aapka bahut bada muqam tha aur Hudood e kiraam mae shummar hota tha

988 Hijri umar ke 28 saal mae aapko ek farzand paida huve jinka naam aap ne *Yusuf* rakha jinki tareeq e paedaesh bhi 27 shawal thi jo aapki ki bhi tareeq e paedaesh thi aur issi saal aapki buzrug waleda ka Yemen mae inteqal bhi huva (Syedna Yusuf baad mae Dai e qaer munfareed huve)

Umar ke 30 wae saal aapke halaat khrab hone shru huve Yemen jo turkey hukumat ke control mae tha uska *Governor Hasan turkey* tha aur Dawat ke mamlaat *Ameer Mohammed bin Ismail aur Abdullah almehfuz* ke haataun mae the "teeno bhi bade  *منافق* munafiq the Dawat ke dushman the Syedna hummam in teeno se bahut hi narmi aur ahtiyat se bartau (behave) karte takeh momineen ko nuqsaan na pohunche

Issi saal mae aapne ek kitab *"Muktatabat Al Hasana"* jisme aap ne apni wiladat se leker aakhri umar tak ka ahwaal likha hae us waqt ke halaat ke ek lamba chapter hae

30 saal ki umar se aapke mushkilat ka saqt tareen daur shru huva magar aap ne Syedna Dawood ke hukum ke mutabiq kaam kiye aur halaat per sabar farmate rahe

Inshallah aapke zindagi ka aage ka ahwaal aapke youme wiladat 27 shawal ko likhunga

11 Shaban ko aapke tadfeen ka din tha uska ahwaal is mazmun ka baad hi bhejne ki koshish karunga
 ....................................

▪▫▪▫▪▫▪▫
6/28/16, 2:33:33 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

11 Shabaan e kareem din tha tadfeen ka *Syedna Sulaiman ibne Syedna Hasan qadasalahu arwahuma ka*

*Syedna Jaffar bin Syedna Sulaiman* aapke liye farmaya tha

*ما هذا بشر أن هذا إلا ملك كريم*

_Aap ek fauq ul basher (above human) insaan the aap hum jaise insaani khaeshat se pak wa saaf the *Malaeka bil quwa* the (yane passive the)_

Nabi kareem ka qol hae

*علماء أمتي كأنبياء بني إسرائيل*
 
_Mere ummat ke uloma bani Israel ke Ambia ke jaise hain_

Aap bahut hi bade aalim e ummat the is lehaz se bani Israel ke Ambia jaise hi the

Jaise Syedna Moiyad jo *Bab ul Abwaab* ke sab se bulund martabe per the khud ke liye farmaya tha ke

*انا ادمي في رداء حقيقي*  
*ملك تبين ذاك للمستبصر*

Mae aadmi ki chadar mae lapta huva hun haqeeqat mae farishta hun aur ye baat aqalmand janta hae

Allah taala hum ko itni aqal de ke is baat ko hum samajh sakae

Syedna Sulaiman saheb 25 Ramzan ul mubarak 1005 Hijri ko Lahore mae zeher (poison) se shaheed huve jo hamare muqalif qom ke logoan ne diya tha (Dawoodi Bohras)

Aapki tadfeen (burial) 11 Shaban 1006 Hijri mae, taqreeban 10 mahine 16 din baad Ahmedabad ke markaz e Dawat mae huvi

*Syedi Ibrahim ibne Syedna Dawood ibne Ajab Shah* ke farzand ne aapke inteqal ke baad naash e mubarak ko musk aur amber aur doosre khushbuan se mauter (perfumed) karke ek sandokh (coffin) mae rakhkar Lahore mae bataur e amanat (temperory) dafan kardiya tha aur taqreeben 10 mahine wahan dafan rakha aur phir aap *Akbar ke Darbar* ke cases se fursat pakar us naash e mubarak ko nikalkar Lahore se Ahmedabad bheja naash e mubarak ke tabut (coffin) ko ek taqht (wooden bed) per rakh kar logoan ke kandhe (shoulders) per uthakar Ahmedabad rawana farmaya (bheja)

Raaste mae Syedna hummam ke naash e mubarak ke bahut se maujizaat pesh aye

Ek to aap ki naash ke saath ek Shia Aalim ki bhi naash gujarat layi ja rahi thi wahan se karbala dafan ke liye bhej rahe the us naash ke saath pura fauj ka intezam tha magar raaste mae dakuan (decoits) ne un sipahiyun per hamla kiya aur us qafile ko loot liya magar Syedna Hummam ke coffin ko haath bhi nahi lagaya aur na aapke logoan ko kuch kiya

Aapki naash e mubarak se khushbu mehak rahi thi aur puri fiza khushbu se mauter ho rahi thi (atmosphere was filled with fragrance) magar us doosre mayat se badbu phel rahi thi is hadd tak ke uthana wale pareshan the

Hamare dushman ne aapki naash Lahore se Ahmedabad la'ne per bahut aeterazaat kiye magar ahle Haq ke pas is amal ki daleel aur misaal maujud hae

Duwaat e khadeem mae *Syedna Dai al Mukaram* ne bhi apne walid *Syedna Ali bin Mohammed Al Sulehi* aur unke bhai, apne chacha *Syedi Ibrahim* ki naash ko muqam e Zabeed se Sana Yemen laye the aur wahan dafan kiya tha

Aur issi tarah jab Hazrat e Ishak bin Ibrahim ke Farzand Janab e Yakoob Nabi ko Logoan ne apne walid ke pas dafan karne se roka tab bhi aap ke naash e mubarak ko Baet ul muqaddus se Miser (Egypt) le jane majboor huve the

Syedna Hummam ki naash e mubarak jab Ahmedabad pohunchi to hamare dushman ne bahut takleefain di aur aapko dafan karne na diya, bahut fasad (riots) huva log zakhmi bhi huve bas unka kehna tha zameen hamari hae, Syedna hummam ka watan Sidhpur hae wahan lejakar dafan karo

Aapke liye jo khabar khodi gai thi us'me gandagi dali gai bahut takleef momineen ko pohunchai gai

Hamare dushman ne har mumkin koshish ki magar aakhir hukumat ki hifazat mae aapko Ahmedabad mae aaj jis mubarak jagaah aapka roza hae wahan dafan kiya gaya

Hamare dushman bohre logoan mae se bahut se logoan ko hukumat ne fasad (riots) karne ke jurm mae arrest bhi karliya tha, hukumat ke qazi (judge) ne unme se bahut se logoan ke haath katne ka hukum de diya tha magar aakhir mae unhune hukumat ko aur judge ko be'hisaab daulat rishwat (bribe) mae dekar apni jaan chuhdai

Syedna Hummam ke jism e mubarak ko Hindustan la'ne mae Syedi Ibrahim bin Dawood bin Ajab shah ne jo mushkilat uthaye aur jo takleef bardasht kiye Allah taala unko uska behtreen ajar de

*عظم الله له الأجر في يوم المعاد*

Allah taala aakherat mae aapke ajar ko bahut bada karde

Aur un momineen wa mukhleseen ko bhi Ajar e azeem ata kare jo Syedna hummam ke *Nasut e mubarak* (physical body) ko Lahore se la'ne mae aur Ahmedabad mae dafan karne mae maddad ki hae

Har zaher ka ek batin hona zaroori hae agar uske piche batin na ho to phir zaher ka koi matlab nahi

In tammam zaheri waqeat ke background mae bahut hi unche aur aala wujuhaat (reasons & factors) hain, Allah taala humko un bataun ki marefat karae takeh hamara Emaan wa aqeeda masboot se masboot tar hojae  

▫▫▫▫▫▫▫▫
6/30/16, 1:12:09 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💠💠💠💠💠💠💠💠💠

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
جمعة مبارك  🌹

*Moulana Imam e Jafar e Sadiq* Zakat ke liye farmate hain;

من كل جزء من اجزاءك زكاة واجبة لله تعالى، بل علي كل منبت شعر من شعرك، بل علي كل لحظة من لحظاتك زكاة

_Imam ka irshad e mubarak hae ke tumhare jism ke har jus (part) per Allah taala ki taraf se Zakat wajib hae, tumhare badan per ugne wale har baal per hae, balkeh tumhare har lamhe (moment) per Zakat farz ki gai hae_

*Aankhaun ki Zakat* ye hae ke tum har chez ko ibrat ki nazar se dekho, (take lessons from everything in life) aur apni nazar har shahwat aur haram chez se neechi rakho.

*Kaan (ears) ki Zakat* ye hae ke tum apne kaan se Ilm wa Hikmat ki baat ko suno, Koran ko suno, aur waaz wa nasihat ki baataun ko suno, jis'se tum ko duniya se najat hasil ho, aur tum un baataun ko sun'ne se mu modh lo (turn away your face) jaise jhoot, qibat, aur uske jaisi tammam baataun se

*Zabaan ki zakat* ye hae ke woh apne ahel wa aulad wa Musalmaan bhai ko nasihat kare, ghafil logoan ko apni ghaflat ki neend se be'dar kare, aur ziyada se ziyada Allah ki tasbeeh kare aur jis baat mae Allah taala khush ho uska zikar ziyada kare

*Haath ki zakat* ye hae ke Allah ki raah mae kharch kare, khair khairat kare us maal wa daulat se jo usper Allah taala ne fazal wa karam kiya hae, aur haath ko harkat de (kaam mae lae) Ilm ki kitabat karne (to write), jis'se log faida uthae Allah ki taat mae aur har shar aur burai se apne haath ko rok rakhe

*Paer (legs) ki zakat* ye hae ke tum Allah taala ke huquq (plural of Haq) ko ada karne mae koshish karo jaise muqaddaseen wa saleheen ke khabar ki ziyarat karna, deen ki ilmi majalis wa mehfil jisme Allah aur Rasul ka zikar hota hae us'me shirkat karna, rishtedaraun ke pas aana jana rakhna, unse mael milap rakhna, Allah taala ki raah mae jahad karne

Yeh woh tammam baatain hain jo tumhare *Dil* ko behter karne wali hain, aur jis'se tumhare deen ki salaamti aur behtari hae

Ye woh baatain hain jo tumhara *Dil* mutahamil hosakta hae, samajh sakta hae, aur tumhare *Nafs* usper razi hokar usper amal karsakta hae magar ye baat ussi ke liye mumkin hae jo Allah taala ke muqhlis wa muqrab bande hain

Issi baat ko Imam e Jafar e Sadiq Emaan ke bayan mae bhi farmate hae ke insaan ke har azo (organ) per ek emaan farz kiya hae, ek maqsus kaam us azo (organ) per Farz hae

*Dil* per Allah taala ki toheed iqrar wa marefat farz hae aur ye tasleem karna ke Mohammed e Mustafa uske bande hain Rasul hain.

*Zabaan* per achi tarah ache lehje mae baat karna, sahi baat karna, Haq baat karna aur ye farz kiya hae jaisa koran kehta hae

قولوا للناس حسنا

_Logoan se achi baat kiya karo_

وقولوا قولا سديدا

_Rasti aur durust baat kaho_  

وقل الحق من ربكم

_Aur aap keh dijiye ke Haq tumhare Rabb ke taraf se hi hae_

Aur phir *kaan* ke liye bhi Koran farmate hae

وَقَدْ نَزَّلَ عَلَيْكُمْ فِي الْكِتَابِ أَنْ إِذَا سَمِعْتُمْ آيَاتِ اللَّهِ يُكْفَرُ بِهَا وَيُسْتَهْزَأُ بِهَا فَلَا تَقْعُدُوا مَعَهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يَخُوضُوا فِي حَدِيثٍ غَيْرِهِ

_Allah taala tum ko hukum diya hae ke Allah ki ayaat ka inkar mat karo unka mazaaq na udao tum aise logoan ke saath mat baitho, yahan tak ki woh doosri baat na karne lagae_

*kaan* per Farz kiya hae ke Allah ka kalam sune, uski taraf pura dhyaan de, aur haram aur aisi baat na sune jo Allah taala ko napasand ho

Aur Allah taala farmata hae;

وَإِذَا سَمِعُوا اللَّغْوَ أَعْرَضُوا عنها

_ke agar woh laqo (useless, bekar) baat sunte hain to anjaan hojate hain_ yane tum bhi koi aisi buri baat sunno to anjaan hokar khamoshi se dur se chale jao
 
Aur *Aankhaun* ke liye Koran farmata hae

قُل لِّلْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَغُضُّوا مِنْ أَبْصَارِهِمْ وَيَحْفَظُوا فُرُوجَهُمْ ذَٰلِكَ أَزْكَىٰ لَهُمْ

_Aap Musalman mardaun se keh dijiye ke woh apni nigah neechi rakhe aur apni sharmgaah ki hifazat kare, takeh koi uski taraf nazar utha kar na dekhe ye bahut achi baat hae unke liye_

Aur issi tarah *Paer* (legs) ke liye bhi farmaya

وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا إِنَّكَ لَن تَخْرِقَ الْأَرْضَ وَلَن تَبْلُغَ الْجِبَالَ طُولًا

_Tum zameen per itra ke, akad ke mat chalo, na tum zameen ko phad (tear) sakte ho, na pahadaun (mountains) ki unchai (height) pohunch sakte ho_

Allah taala ne is tarah har azo (organ) per ek emaan farz kiya hae aur issi tarah humko uski zakat bhi ada karna hae    

اللهم وفقني بما تحب وترضي

_Allah taala mujhe tawfeeq de us baat ki jisko tu pasand karta hae aur jis'se to razi hae aur khush hae_

💠💠💠💠💠💠💠💠
7/1/16, 1:42:44 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ♢■♢■♢■♢■♢■♢■♢■♢

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

*اللهم اجعلني من زوارك وعمار مساجدك وافتح لي باب رحمتك وأغلق عني باب معصيتك، الحمدلله الذي جعلني ممن يناجيه*

_Ae Allah to mujhe masajid ki ghadi ghadi ziyarat karne wala (Masjid aane jane wala bana) aur tere masajid ko abaad karne wala bana, aur khol de mere liye tere Rehmat ke darwaze aur bandh karde mere liye gunaah ke darwaze Ae Allah tera Hamd hae is baat per ke tu ne mujhe teri bargaah mae munajaat karna wala banaya (ajisi ke saath ahista ahista Dua karna wala)_

*Ramazan ul mubarak* ki barkat hae ke har koi koshish karta hae ke Masjid mae ba-jamaat namaz ki pabandi karle koi saal tammam paband hote hae koi maah Rajab Shabaan wa Ramazan ka paband hota hae aur koi sirf Ramazan ul mubarak ka, jiska jaise amal hoga, waise uska sawab ya iqaab (saza)

Har mutaqi perhazgaar abid (ibadat karne wale) ki tafreeh gaah woh masjid hoti hae

Rasulullah ne farmaya;

*المسجد بيت كل تقي*
.
_Masjid har mutaqi parhezgar shaqs ka ghar hae_

Aur farmaya ;

*احب البقاع الي الله المساجد*

_Allah taala ke pas sab se pasandida muqam woh masajid hae_

Aur farmaya ;

*واتخذواالمساجد بيوتا*

_Tum masjid ko apna ghar jaisa banalo (tum kasrat se us'me ate jate raho)_

*Imam e Jafar e Sadiq* masjid mae namaz ke liye hazir hone wale namazi ke liye farmate hain;

Ae shaqs jab tu masjid ke darwaze per pohunchta hae to zara ruk ja aur qor aur fikar kar is baat mae ke

To ek azeem us shaan badshah ke darbar mae dakhil hone ka irada kar raha hae, ye aisa Darbar hae jiske farsh (floor) ko siwae *مطهرين muthareen* ke kisi ko bhi khundalne (walk on) ki ijazat nahi aur na uske bargaah mae siwae *صدقين* *Sidiqeen*(sache log) ke kisi ko dakhil hone ki  ijazat nahi hae

Tum dakhil ho to us badshah e azeem (Allah ki zaat) ki haibat, raub, aur dab'dabe ka sahi andaza wa ahsaas karo kiyunke mumkin hae tujhe ek azeem khatre (danger) ka saamna bhi ho, agar tu ne zara si bhi qaflat ki to woh zaat (Allah) puri qudrat wa taqat rakhti hae ke jo chahe woh tere saath kare, chahe to woh tere saath adal wa insaaf kare, ya chahe to tere saath meherbani se fazal aur karam kare

Agar Allah taala tere se meherbani kare aur apne fazal aur rehmat se tere thode se amaal ko qabool farmae jo tu ne taat ke saath uske bargaah mae pesh kiye hae to uska woh tujhe bada sawab aur inam dega

Aur agar Allah taala tujh se apne Haq ko jatate huve, tujh se Iqlaas aur sachai ke saath tere amaal ko talab kare aur agar tere amaal mae iqlaas aur sachai ki kami hogi to woh tujhe rok dega aur radd (reject) kardega agarche ke tera amal kitne hi ziyada kiyu na ho

*وهو فعال لما يريد*
 
_Woh jo chahe kare woh uska Haq hae, uski marzi hae_

Tum jab us Badshah (Allah) ke darbar mae hazir ho to Inkesari ke saath apne qusur, faqiri aur ajisi ka aeteraaf karo

Tu (closeness) Allah taala ki taraf mutawajeh ho raha hae uski ibadat ke liye, usse unsat chah raha hae uski bargaah se, to phir ye baat bhi achi tarah jaan le ke maqlooq ke koi bhed wa raaz us'se chupe huve nahi hain chahe woh alaniya (openly) kiya ho ya maqfi (secretly) mae kiya ho

Tum uski bargaah mae apne aap ko sab se ziyada mohtaj Faqir khyal karo aur apne Dil ko Allah ke ma'siwa har shuqul se khali karlo jo tum ko tumhare Rabb se rok de

Tu tere amaal ke zareeyeh  dekh ke tera naam kis diwan (register) mae Qiyamat ke din likha jaega, unme jo najat hasil karke jannat mae dakhil honge, ya jinko jahannam bheja jaega

Agar tum ko apni munajaat ki mithas ka maza chakna hae uske bargaah mae *muqatebat  "kalam"* karne ki lazzat hasil karna hae, aur uski rehmat ke piyale se pina hae, to tum apne aap ko sab se bheter andaz mae Allah taala ke saamne pesh karo

Tum Allah ki bargaah mae hazir ho to iqrar aur tasleem karte huve hazir ho aur yaqeen karlo ke Allah ke siwae aur koi nahi hae jo tumhari umeedaun ko puri karne wala hae

Aur jab Allah taala tumhari dil ki sachi niyat ko janega aur uski janib tumhare iqlaas ke saath ajisi se ilteja karne ko dekhega tab woh apni Rehmat, Rafaat aur lutf wa karam ki nigaah se tum ko zaroor dekhega

Aur agar tum aisa nahi karsakte ho to ruk jao, thed jao, tumhari umeedaun ko koi aur puri karne wala nahi

Allah taala tawfeeq dega usko jisko woh pasand karta hae jis'se woh razi hae, Allah taala kareem hae aur woh karamat ko pasand karta hae, woh مضطرين mustareen (bechain aur pareshan dil) ki ibadat ko pasand karta hae unko pasand farmata hae jo apne aap ko gunahun ki sharmindagi ki aag mae jala leta hae

Allah taala Koran e Majeed mae farmata hae

*امن يجيب المضطر اذا دعاه ويكشف السوء*

_Kaun hae (Allah ki siwae) jo jawab deta hae مضطر ko (person in distress), jab woh usko pukarta hae aur Allah taala dur kardeta hae unki takleef aur pareshaniyun ko_

♢■♢■♢■♢■♢■♢■♢■♢
7/2/16, 1:40:51 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💐💐💐💐💐💐💐💐

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

*Ramazan ul mubarak* ikhtetaam (end) ko pohunch raha hae do din do raat baqi hae Allah tawfeeq de ke hum usko bhi ibadat wa duaon mae guzar de

Allah taala hamare naqis (incomplete) aamal aur tuti phuti duaon ko qabool farmae

Allah taala ek bande mommin ki tutti phuti Dua ke liye farmata hae ke tum Dua mae takaluf na karo aur Muqafa wa Musajja kalam ke bajae ek fitri wa tabai kalaam Allah taala ki bargaah mae pesh karo

( Do not decorate or use fancy and difficult words but use normal language & simple words which comes naturally from heart)

Zillat wa Inkesari wa Ajisi se Dua karna bahut behter hae us'se ke fasahat wa rawani ke saath Dua ki jae

Dua karne mae koi chez muqrar nahi, dua karne wala jo chahe Dua kare aur Allah taala se jo chahe maange jitna chahe maange laikin zulum aur khate rahem ki Dua hargis na maange (breaking of blood relations)

Dua karne wale ko chahye ke Dua se pehle kisi nek kaam ya phir khair khairat kare

Khalis niyat se Allah taala se apne gunahun se toba wa maqferat talab kare

Allah taala ke doosre bandaun ke saath jo usne zulum wa haq talafi (deprived them of their dues) ki hae, jo takleef wa izza aur pareshan kiya hae us'se maafi maange

Dua mae sab se pehle Allah taala ka Hamd (praise) wa shukoor (thanks) baja lae

Dua ke pehle beech mae aur aakhir mae Rasulullah aur aapke Ahle Baet e Kiraam per durood wa salaam bheje

Farz namaaz ke baad Dua karna bahut behter hae doosre waqt ke muqabil Fajar ke waqt se leker tulu e aftab (sunrise) tak Dua mae mashqul rahna apni hajatain puri hone ka baas hota hae

Allah taala hum tammam ki duaon jo is maah e mubarak mae Allah taala ki bargaah mae humne kiye hae usko darje qabuliat ata farmai

Ye pura bayan Dua ke bare mae hamare Sahifatus Salaat (bada Sahifa) se liya gaya hae

💐💐💐💐💐💐💐💐
7/3/16, 2:46:49 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌺🍀🌺🍀🌺🍀🌺🍀

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

*Shehrullah e Muazzam* ki aakhri shab aap sab ko mubarak ho

Allah taala hum sab ke naqis amaal (incomplete) tuti phuti (stammered) duaon ko qabool farmae

Allah taala ka maaf karna uska Fazal o Karam hae, uski ataa o bakhshish be hisaab hae,

Jaisa ke Allah taala Quran  Majid mae farmata hae

Jo neki aur achai karega Allah taala usko uska dus gunaah (ten times) sawaab dega

Aur farmaya ke jisne apne maal se ek daana (grain) kharch kiya to Allah taala us ek daane se saat khoshe (seven sprouts) nikaalta hae aur har khoshe (sprout) se 100 daane nikaalega
 
والله يضاعف لمن يشاء والله واسع عليم

Allah taala jisko chahta hae usko be hisaab deta hae  (multiple times). Allah taala *واسع عليم*Waseeun Aleem hae

Yaqinan hum ne agar Dua ke sharaet (conditions) ka khayal rakha hoga, to hamari Dua ki maqbuliat (acceptance) mae koi rukaawat nahi aegi

Jaise keh Dua ke sharaet mae farmaya gaya hae

*Tazaro Zaari* (apni ajizi afsos aur nadaamat ke ehsaas hona aur ikhlaas hona)

*Khushu wa Quzu* ek jismani arkan ka mukamil tor per ada karne se taluq hae to doosra zahani tawajoh hae, (concentration)

Apne *zabaan ki hifazat*

*Halal rozi* ka istemal karna

Apni aankhon ko haraam chezon ko dekhne se bachaana wa rokna

Kisi ne kya khoob kaha hae ke Dua ke bhi *Arkaan* hain, uske *Baazu* (sides) hae, uske *Asbaab* hae, aur uske *Awqaat* hae,

Agar hamari Dua un Arkaan ke muwaafiq hogi to qawi (strong) hogi

Uske Baazu honge (strong sides) to woh aasman mae bulund hogi aur udhne (ascend) lage gi

Aur agar Munaasib Waqt (right time) per hogi to woh kamiyaab hogi

Aur agar Asbaab muwaafiq honge to fatehmandi hasil hogi (Allah taala usko qubool farmaega)

*Dua ke Arkaan, Asbaab, Baazu, wa Awqaat kya hote hain ?*

*Arkaan e Dua* woh huzoor e qalb, yane dil ki puri tawajohi, khushu wa khuzoo ke saath hona hae

Uske *Baazu* (support) sidq wa sachai hae (honesty & truthfulness)

Aur uske *Asbaab* woh Rasoolallah aur aapki Aal e pak per Durood o Salaam bhejna

 اللهم صلي على محمد وعلى آله

Uske *Awqaat* (timing) woh fajar ka waqt hae, qabal e tulu (before sunrise)

Iske alawa Dua ke aur bhi sharaet wa lawazimaat bayaan kiye gae hain

Woh ache lahan aur sahi alfaaz ke sath ho, aur Rab e Subhanahu ke bargaah mae aajizi o inkesari ke izhar ke saath ho

Dua karne wala qibla rukh hokar baithe, aur apne dono haath Allah taala ki bargaah mae bulund kare, Rasulullah ka qol hae ke jab banda apne dono haath Allah ke bargaah mae bulund karta hae to Rab e Subhanahu ko un haataun ko khali lautane ko sharm aati hae

Dono haataun ko chehre per masah karna, aur ye baat sunnat e Rasoolallah se hae

Allah taala ka irshad hae

    ادعوا ربكم تضرعا وخفية

Tum Allah taala ko tazaro zari aur maqfi tor per pukaro (in a soft tone & in seclusion)

Irshad hae ke tum Allah taala ko inkesari ajizi aur apne aap ko uske muqaabil zaleel karte huve pukaro (is baat ka ahsaas rakhna ke uske muqaabil hamare koi haisiyat hi nahi)

Bande momin ko chahiye ke puri ajizi o inkesari ke saath dua mae puri tarah koshish kare, aur Dua karte waqt Allah taala se Dua ki qubuliat ki puri aur achi umeed rakhe, Aur Allah Tabaraka wa Taala ki Rehmat se mayus na ho kyunke woh jiski bargaah mae Dua kar raha hae woh ek rahim o karim zaat hae

Allah taala se multaji hun ke humko dua karne ke sahi tareeqe se waqif karae, takeh hamari har Dua uski bargaah mae qubuliat ka darjah hasil karle

 وَآخِرُ دَعْوَانا أَنِ الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
 
Hamari aakhri Dua yehi hae ke tamaam Hamd hae Rab ul Aalameen ke liye

🌺🍀🌺🍀🌺🍀🌺🍀

Aaj vida e Shehrullah ki Imam e Zainulabideen ki Dua padhne ki raghbat dilai gai hae, ye Dua english translation aur recitation ke saath net per available hae, kisi ko khaesh ho to request bheje, mae link bhej dunga

🍀🌺🍀🌺🍀🌺🍀🌺
7/4/16, 5:59:07 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
ليلة العيد الفطر مبارك🌹

*Lailatul Eid ul Fiter* ki mubarak raat mae ek khaas namaz padhne ka hukum hae jiske baad hukum hae ke *استغفر الله*  ki 1000 martaba tilawat kare yane 10 tasbeeh kare is baat se saaf zaher hota hae ke ye behtreen waqt hae Allah taala se apne gunahun se *Toba wa Isteqfar* talab karne ka

*Kiya isteqfar karna itna asaan hae ?*

 Kiya hamare bade bade gunah jo hum ne apni akad na samjhi logoan ke bhekane se jinko Aulia Allah *shaiyateen al Ins* kaha hae yane shaitaan jo insaan ke libaas mae hae unke behkane se kar guzre hain

Nahi, maqferat itni asaan bhi nahi hae magar ye Allah taala ka fazal aur karam hae ke aisi mubarak raatain bhi rakha hae jinme humko maqferat ka bherpur moqe diya hae

Aaj shab tasbeeh karte huve Moula ke *isteqfar* ke is kalam ko bhi Dil wa Dimaag mae rakhein, bas Dua hae ke Allah taala haqeer ko bhi maqferat farmae aur aap sab ko bhi uski wasi rehmat se maqferat ata kare

Jaise ke Moula ne farmaya

من أعطي استغفارلم يحرم المغفرة

Jisko isteqfar karne ki tawfeeq ata hogai woh maqferat se kabhi bhi mehroom nahi hosakta

Ek waqt Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe ne ek shaqs jisne zor se *ASTEQFERULLAH  استغفرلله* kaha usko farmaya

Kiya tujhe pata bhi hae ke *ASTEQFERULLAH* kisse kehte hain ?

Moula ne farmaya;

Isteqfar badi unchi aur aala chez hoti hae, aur woh 6 baataun per munhasir (dependent) hae

  *الندم علي ما مضى*

1] Jo ho chuka usper nadamat karna, sab se pehle jo bhi gunaah kiye hain usper afsoos wa nadamat puri tarah Dil se karna chahye

*العزم على ترك العود إليه ابدا*

2] Jo bhi gunaah se Isteqfar chah raha hae usko dobara kabhi na karne ka paka aur pura irada karna

*أن تودي الي المخلوقين حقوقهم حتي تلقي الله أملس ليس عليك تبعته*

3] Allah taala ki tammam maqlooq ke huquq ko puri tarah ada karna takeh Qiyamat ke roz usper koi maqlooq ke saath kye gae  gunaah ka bojh (burden) baqi na rahe

*أن تعمد الي كل فريضة عليك ضيعت فتودي حقها*

4] Un tammam faraez ko ada karna jo Allah ki taraf se usper wajib kiye gae the jo usne zae (waste) kardiya tha (nahi ada kiye the)

*أن تعمد الي اللحم الذي نبت علي السحت فتذيبه بالاحزان حتي تلصق الجلد بالعظم، وينشاء بينهما لحم جديد*

5] Ghalat tariqe se, na'jaez tariqe se, haram zareeyah se, jo kamiya haram khakar, haram pikar, haram dekhkar jo jism per gosht aur charbi (fats) banaya tha, ab woh usko ghum, fikar, afsoos wa nadamat se ghulade (melt karde), is hadd tak keh chamdi (skin) hadi (bones) ko chipak jae (woh sara gosht khatam hojae)
 
*أن تذيق الجسم الم الطاعة كما اذقته حلاوة المعصية*

6] Tum ne jo gunahun ki lazzat uthae, jo maza kiye, jo dunya ke aesh wa aaram ke aadi huve, ab tum wohi Allah aur Rasul ki taat mae, uske ahkam aur wajebat baja lane mae takleef aur mehnat wa mashaqat uthao

Moulae ae kaenat ne farmaya;

Ae shaqs to ye sab kar aur phir Allah Tabaraka wa taala se *استغفار Isteqfar* talab kar

Allah taala aaj ke mubarak raat ki barkat se aur aane wale kal ke Din ki barkat se hamare tamman gunahun ko, laqsishaun ko, khata'un ko maaf farma aur darguzar kar

*واغفرلناياخير الغافرين بحق سيدنا محمد واهل بيته الطيبين الطاهرين صلوات الله عليهم أجمعين*

🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌
7/5/16, 6:56:24 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌸🌺🍀🌹🌸🌺🍀🌹

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*
*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

*عيد الفطر مبارك*

*Moulana Imam Ali e Zainulabedeen Salwatullah alehe* ne kiya hi behtreen *EID ki Dua* farmai hae jo hamare *"Sahifatus salaat"* mae moujud hae, ye Dua Eid ki Namaz ke baad 'Imam e salaat' yane jisne Eid ki namaz padhai hamare liye qible mae khede hokar Allah taala ki bargaah mae ajizana tor per maangta hae

DUA ke chand jumle urdu mae tabruk ke tor per *EID ki MUBARAKBAAD* ke saath pesh khidmat hae

Mommin ki Dua hae Allah taala ke bargaah mae ;

Ae woh (Allah) jo aise shaqs per bhi rahem karta hae jis per bande bhi rahem nahi karte

Ae woh (Allah taala) jo apne hajat mandaun ko haqeer (lowly) nahi samajhta

Ae woh jo uski bargaah mae gidgid'ana wale (sorrowfully begging), ajizi karne wale ko nakaam wa na murad wapis nahi karta

Ae woh jo bande ke chote se chote tohfe ki qadar karte huve pasandadgi ki nazar se usko dekhta hae aur qabool bhi farmata hae

Ae woh jo bande ke thode se mamuli se amal per bhi bade se bada ajar wa inam de deta hae

Ae woh jo uske khreeb huva to usko aur khreeb karta hae, aur jo us'se mu moda (turn away the face) usko bhi apni taraf bulata hae

Ae woh, jo bande ko saza dene mae jaldi nahi karta, itna rukta hae ke banda us gunaah ko mita le aur maaf karwale, toba aur maqferat karle

Ae Allah teri baqshish, faiz wa karam se mere khaeshaat ke bartan bher gae hain (vessels of my wishes are overflowing) teri naematain mujh per behisaab hain

Har sifat (quality) teri tareef tak pohunchne se bekar hogai, koi sifat teri sahi tareef nahi karsakti, teri bulundi har bulundi se unchi hae, har bulund aur aala teri bulundi, jalal, azmat wa majd (buzrugi) ke muqable bahut choti aur adna hae

Har shareef teri sharafat ke muqable bahut haqeer hae

Ae Allah, jo log tere siwae tere ghair (apart from you) ke pas gae woh nakaam, na muraad, mayus, mehroom wapis huve

Jisne tere fazal ki justaju ki, un raqbat karne walaun ke liye tere darwaze hamesha khule hain, teri baqshish har sawal karne wale ke liye mubah (permitted, open) hae, yane har ek ko Allah taala se maangne ka haq hae

Tujh se umeed rakhne wale mehroom nahi hote, aur teri baqshish se tere saamne aane wale na umeed nahi hote

Teri rozi tere nafarmani karne wale ke liye bhi pheli (spread out) huvi hae, aur tera Hilm wa Burdbari tere dushman per bhi jari hae

Bure aur badi (wrongdoer, scoundrel) logoan ke saath bhi ahsaan karna teri hi aadat hae, sarkash wa baqi (rebel) ke saath meherbani karna aur unke haal per chodna woh tera hi tariqa hae
 
Afsoos us ke liye hae jisne tujh se mu modh liya, badi ruswa (insulting) karne wali mahrumi hae uske liye, aur saqt badbakhti hae uske waaste jo tere saamne maqroor (proud) huva

Kis qadar ziyada woh (jo maqroor aur sarkash log hain) tere azaab mae phirta rahenga, aur kitna lamba zamana woh tere iqaab (punishment) mae aata jata raheinga, aur kitna dur hoga unke liye us azaab wa iqaab se nikalne ki muddat

Aur ye tammam baatain tere insaaf ke faisle per hogi, adilana hukum (on just order) per hogi, tu kabhi bhi kisi per zulum wa sitam nahi karta

Tu ne to bande per khullam khulla apni hujjatain (argumements) zaher kardi thi, darane wali chezaun se agaah (warned) kardiya tha, aur bahut hi lutf wa meherbani se aakherat ki tarqeeb (shoq) dilaya tha, aur tarah tarah ki misaal ke zareeyeh duniya wa aakherat ke mamlaat samjhae the

Ae Allah tu ne apni mohalat (grace period) ki muddat ko badhata hi gaya hae, aur azaab aur saza mae taqeer (delay) karta hi gaya, halanke to foran grift (pakad, catch hold) mae lesakta tha, tera pura ikhteyar tha aur to puri taqat wa quwat rakhta tha

Na ye narmi teri ajizii ki wajeh se thi, aur na ye mohalat dena teri kamzoori ki wajeh se thi, aur na azaab mae deri karna teri ghaflat ki wajeh se thi, balkeh ye sab isliye tha ke teri hujjat har tarah se puri ho, tera karam kamil ho, tera ahsaan pura hojae, aur teri naimaat tammam ter ho

Teri buzrugi itni ziyada bulund hae ke uski haqeeqat ki hadd ki ja sake (usko samajh sake, to understand the reality of the existence of God almighty)

Teri naematain itni ziyada hain ke uska pura shummar karsake, aur tera ahsaan itna ziyada hae ke uske thode ka bhi shukriya ada kiya ja sake

Mae teri tareef wa Hamd se aajiz hun, mae apni ajizi aur majboori ka pura aeteraaf karta hun, mae itna kamzoor hun ke teri sahi tareef karne ki qudrat bhi nahi rakhta,

Ae Allah ye sab meri be raqbati ki wajeh se nahi hae, balkeh meri ajizi, majboori kamzoori ki wajeh se hae

Ae Allah mae tere pas aane ka qasd (irada) karta hun

انا ذا أمك بالوفادة وأسألك حسن الرفادة

Mae tere pas aane ka irada karta hun, aur tujh se achi baqshish wa karam ka sawal karta hun aur umeed rakhta hun

To Mohammed (Salal'lahu Alehe wa Sallam) aur unki Aal per rehmat bhej aur meri munajaat, sargoshi (whispers) ko sunle aur meri Dua ko qabool farma

يا مولاي كانت اليوم تهيي وتعبيي واعدادي واستعدادي رجاء عفوك ورفدك وطلب نيلك وجاءزتك
 
_Ae Allah aaj ke din meri tayari aur aamadgi aur mustadgi (readiness) teri hi taraf hae, teri baqshish wa ata tere daen (offers) aur ata aur inam ke maangne ke liye hae, aaj ke din meri umeed ko mehroom na jane de ae mere maa'bud (jiski ibadat ki jati hae)_

🌸🍀🌺🌻🌸🍀🌺🌻

_Ye Dua ka pura mukamil lafzi tarjuma nahi hae, Dua mae se chand jumle urdu mae apni zabaan mae pesh kiya hun, Allah tabaraka wa Taala aapki aur hamari naqis duaon ko qabool farmae Ameen !!_

🍃🍂🌿🍁🍃🍂🌿🍁

Haqeer Ishak ziaee walde Hazrat Ziaali saheb muqaddus wa waleda mohtarama Ruquia Ziaee ahliya Arwa Ziaee wa Farzand Ziaali wa Dukhtar Zainab ki taraf se Idd ul Fiter ki mubarakbaad qabool karna

🌺🍀🍂☘🍁🍃🌺🍀
7/7/16, 12:10:51 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌾🍀🌾🍀🌾🍀🌾🍀

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
جمعة مبارك 🌹

Allah ka lakh lakh ahsaan hae ke hum per *Ramazan e Shareef* ko warid kiya tha, takeh hamare jismaun ki aur nufoos ki taharat wa safai hosake

*Eid* uski thi jisne 30 din ke kamil Roze rakhe apne jawarah (limbs) ko gunaah aur khraabi se roka, apne aankh ko haram dekhna se, kaan ko haram sunne se, zabaan ko pu'ri tarah khabu mae rakha bure ghalat aur laqo (nonsense) kalam karne se, aur Allah taala ki kitab *Quran e Kareem* ki tilawat kasrat se kya (in plenty), faraez ke alawa raataun ko jaag kar tatawaat ki pabandi kiya aur sab se badh kar to khloos e Niyat se *Zakaat* ko ada kiya, jisko Allah taala ne Namaz ke saath jod diya hae

Walid muqaddus farmate the;

_"arre Eid uski nahi jisne naye kapde pehne khushbu lagaliya aur sheer khorma banaliya"_

yaqinan hum momineen ka shummar unme hargis nahi hae

Allah ka is baat per bhi shukoor hae ke usne is 30 din ke Roze ki halat ko iftar mae badal diya aur hamare liye Eid ko khushi ka din muqrar kiya

Jis tarah 30 din Roze rakhna farz qarar diya hae ussi tarah 10 din mae Roze ka na rakhna bhi farz kiya hae aur us din mae Roza rakhna haram kardiya, aur hamare liye un dinaun ko jaan'na bhi zaroori hae

*Majalis e Mustanzaria* mae *Moulana Imam Maad al Mustansir Billah* ke majalis mae, Imam farmate hain ke *10 kisim ke Roze jo haram hain* woh ye hain

1) _Eid ul Fiter_

2) _Eid us Zo'ha (Baqar Eid)_

3)  4)  5) _teen din ayaam e Tashreeq ke yane Eid us Zuha ke baad ke teen Roze_ 11, 12, 13 _Zilhaja ke din_

6) _Saum ul Visaal, yane do din ya us'se ziyada din ko milakar continious Roza rakhna yane beech mae iftar wa sehri na karna_

7) _Saum ul ab'ad, hamesha ka Roza rakhna_

8) _saum ul ha'ez, haeza aurat ka Roza (women in her periods)_

9) _gunaah mae nazar maan'kar Roza rakhna_

(Kisi aur ka bura hone, ya unka kaam khraab hone ke liye nazar ke roze rakhna jaisa ke kisi dushman ke karobar mae nuqsaan hojae us niyat se roze maan'na)

10) _shak (in doubt) ki halat mae Roza rakhna Roza sirf yaqeen per rakh sakte hain shak ki halat mae koi bhi amal qabool nahi_

Allah taala humko in ahkamaat ka paband banae takeh hamara deen o duniya dono beheter hojae

*ربنا آتنا في الدنيا حسنة والآخرة حسنة وقنا عذاب النار*

*_Ae hamare rabb hum ko duniya mae bhi neki ata kar aur aakherat mae bhi nekiyaan ata kar aur jahannam ke aag ke azaab se mehfuz rakh_*

*Aur ROZA hi sabse badi dhal (protective shield) hae azaab e jahanam se bachne ke liye*

*🌾🍀🌾🍀🌾🍀🌾🍀
7/10/16, 7:57:48 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌼🌸🌼🌸🌼🌸🌼🌸🌼

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
 
*Imam e Jaffar e Sadiq* salwatullah alehe farmate hein insaan ke har azu [organ & limbs] per amali tor per Emaan farz kiya gaya hae

Har azu ka Emaan doosre azu se alag hae jaisa ke *Dil* per Allah taala ka iqraar wa Allah ki marefat farz kiya hae to *Zabaan* ka Emaan kuch aur hae issi tarah Allah taala ne Koran Kareem mae in aaza ke Emaan ka zikar kiya hae, jaise keh *Dil, kaan, Aankh, Haath, Zabaan paer (legs) aur Farj (sharamgaah)*

Aur Qiyamat ke roz Allah taala har azo se unke Emaan ke taluq se sawal karega aur un azo ko quwat e kalaam (ability to speak) di'jaegi aur woh tumhare khilaf gawahi denge (will be witness against you) kal tak jo tumhare the wohi aaj tumhare khilaf unko ghalat istemaal karne per gawahi denge

يَوْمَ تَشْهَدُ عَلَيْهِمْ أَلْسِنَتُهُمْ وَأَيْدِيهِمْ وَأَرْجُلُهُم بِمَا كَانُوا يَعْمَلُونَ

_Us din unke khilaf gawahi denge unki zabaan unke haath aur unke paer (legs) jo us shaqs ke hukum se amal kya karte the_

Allah Taala ne har ek azo (organ) ke Emaan ko Quran e Kareem mae Saaf Saaf tor per bayan farmadiya hae

Quran e majeed mae dono paeraun (legs) per Allah ki taat karte huve, hukum e Khuda wandi wa raza e ilahi mae chalna farz kiya hae

Quran e majeed farmata hae;

وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا إِنَّكَ لَنْ تَخْرِقَ الْأَرْضَ وَلَنْ تَبْلُغَ الْجِبَالَ طُولًا

_Tum Zameen per pau (foot) zor se maarkar mat chalo, na tum zameen ko phad (tear) sakte ho aur na hi pahad ki unchai ko pa'sakte ho (or touch the heights of the mountains)_

Aur farmata hae ;

وَاقْصِدْ فِي مَشْيِك

_Tum apni chaal (pace of walking) ko darmiyani yane aetedal (balanced) rakho_

Phir farmaya;

يَا-أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا إِذَا نُودِيَ لِلصَّلَاةِ مِنْ يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ فَاسْعَوْا إِلَىٰ ذِكْرِ اللَّهِ

_Ae Emaan walo jab Jumua ke din namaz ke Liye tum ko bulaya jae to Allah ke zikar (yaad) ki taraf tezi se aage badho_

  وَلْيَطَّوَّفُوا بِالْبَيْتِ الْعَتِيقِ

_Tum Allah ke khadeem Ghar (kabatullah) ka tawaf karo_

Phir farmaya;

وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا خُطُوَاتِ الشَّيْطَانِ إِنَّهُ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ مُبِينٌ

_Tum shaitaan ke naqshe e khadam (on the footsteps) mat chalo woh tumhara khula dushman hae (open enemy)_

Phir farmaya :

وَعِبَادُ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الَّذِينَ يَمْشُونَ عَلَى الْأَرْضِ هَوْنًا وَإِذَا خَاطَبَهُمُ الْجَاهِلُونَ قَالُوا سَلَامًا

_Woh Allah ke khaas bande hein jo ajizi ke saath chalte hein aur jab jahalat ke pas se guzarte hein to salaam karte huve guzar jate hein_

Phir farmaya;

وَالَّذِينَ لَا يَشْهَدُونَ الزُّورَ وَإِذَا مَرُّوا بِاللَّغْوِ مَرُّوا كِرَامًا

_Tum Jab be'huda baat, cheap & vulgar conversation karne walaun ke pas se guzro to karamat ke saath guzar jao (move away from them giving  respect & keeping your self respect & dignity)_
 
 Koran e Kareem ne mukamil tor per har baat ki nasihat farmadi hae sirf chalne phirne (walking) ke liye itni mukamil nasihat wa hidayat farmai hae to phir yaqinan zindagi ke doosre maamlaat ke ba're mae Quran mae kya nahi hoga

Mukhtasar mae Allah taala  Irshad farmata hae ke tum apni chaal darmiyani rafter rakho, tum gharoor (akad pride) wa takabur na karna tum ajizi wa inkesari se chalo, tum shaitaan ke naqsh e khadam na chalna woh tum ko gumrahi ke raaste per lejaega tum zameen per pau patak kar mat chalo woh takabur ki nishani hae tum jahelaun ke pas se guzro to salaam karte huve guzar jao, tum Allah taala ki taat mae Allah ki khushnudi aur bhlai aur khair ke kamaun mae apne khadam aage badhao

    *اهدناالصراط المستقيم , اهدناالصراط المستقيم  اهدناالصراط المستقيم*

_Ae Allah humko siratal mustaqeem ki hidayat de_

*Yane seedhe sahi raaste ki rahnumai farma*

🌼🌸🌼🌸🌼🌸🌼🌸🌼
7/13/16, 2:32:08 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

*Hazrat Ali ibn abi Talib* Salawatullah alahe ne ek Aalim e Quran ko Hazrat e Umar se najat dilaya

Waqae yun pesh aya ke ;

Ek waqt Hazrat e Umar ne ek Aalim e Quran mohib e ahle baet (ahle baet ki mohabbat rakhne wala) se kha ke tumhara kya haal hae ?

Woh Aalim ne Umar se kaha mae to un logoan mae se hun jo *فتنه fitne* se mohabbat karte hain

Haq ko napasand karte hain

Aur ye ke mae us baat ki gawahi dete hun jisko mae dekha hi nahi hun

(I Stand witness to a thing which I have never seen)

Hazrat e Umar tesh mae agaya (lost hi cool) aur foran us aadmi ko qaed (prison) mae dalne ka hukum de diya

*Hazrat Ali* Ameer ul Momineen ne farmaya ke usko chod do woh jo kuch bhi keh raha hae woh sach keh raha hae aur durust baat hae

Hazrat e Umar ne farmaya ke ye kaise sach keh sakta hae jab ke ye fitne se mohabbat karta hae aur Haq se nafrat karta hae

Moulana Ali ne farmaya ke ye aadmi apne maal aur aulad se mohabbat karta hae aur Quran khud ye kehta hae

إنما أموالكم واولادكم فتنة

Beshak ke tumhara maal aur tumhari aulad fitna hae (yane tumhare liye aasmaesh hae imtehan hae)

Aur maut Haq hae aur har koi maut ko napasand karta hae

Aur phir farmaya ke ae Umar woh aadmi *Mohammed e Mustafa* Salallahu Alehe wa sallam ko dekha hi nahi hae magar woh *Hazrat Mohammed e Mustafa* Salallahu Alehe wa sallam ki risalat ki gawahi deta hae

Hazrat e Umar ne unhe foran chod diya aur farmaya ke

الله يعلم حيث يجعل رسالته

Allah taala hi behter janta hae ke woh apni risalat ko kahan rakhe

🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸
7/14/16, 2:38:59 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*
*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

*جمعة مبارك* 🌹

Bayan kiya gaya hae ke Hazrat e Abu Bakar ki khilafat ke zamane mae ek wafd (delegation) Rome se aya huva tha jisme ek Nasrani (Christian) padri (bishop) bhi tha aur woh kuch sona aur chandi bhi laya huva tha

Us waqt janab e Abi Bakar masjid e Nabavi mae kuch Mohajir wa Ansar ke saath baithe huve the

Woh Nasrani ne kha ke tum mae tumhare Rasul ka khalifa kaun hae aur tumhare deen ka ameen kaun hae ?

Sab ne janab e Abu Bakar ki taraf ishara kya to woh aage badhkar kha ke ae Sheikh aapka naam kiya hae ?

Janab e Abi Bakar ne kha mera naam *عتيق Ateeq* hae, usne kha aur bhi kuch naam hae to unhune kha mera naam *صديق Sidiq* bhi hae

Kehne laga aur bhi koi naam hae ?

Janab e Abi Bakar ne kha nahi to us raheb (padri) ne kha ke phir to tum meri murad nahi

Janab e Abi Bakar ne kha ke tumhari murad aur maqsad kiya hae ?

Raheb (christian) padri ne kha ke mae Rome se aya hun aur mae *Deen e Mohammed ke Ameen* se kuch sawal karna chahta hun aur agar mujhe sahi jawab milgaye to mae Islam qabool karunga aur uski taat karunga aur ye sara maal uske haath taqseem kardunga

Abu Bakar ne kha tum jo sawal karna chahte ho karlo tum ko jawab mil jainge

Us raheb (padri) ne kha ke pehle mujhe yaqeen dilaya jae ke meri jaan mehfooz rahegi

Janab e Abi Bakar ne kha ke mae tum ko tumhare jaan aur maal ki Aman deta hun

Us waqt raheb ne sawal kiya

*Woh kaunsi chez hae jo Allah ke liye nahi hae ?*

*Woh kaunsi chez hae jo Allah ke pass nahi hae ?*

*Woh kaunsi شيء chez hae jo Allah jaanta nahi hae ?*

Lamba waqae hae ke janab e Abi Bakar jawab na de sake phir janab e Umar ae woh bhi jawab nahi de sake aur phir Janab e Osman bhi ae magar jawab dene se qasir (could not reply) rahe

Aakhir raheb ne kha ke _Ae buzrugane kiraam tum dawa karte ho magar tum ilm se khali ho_(empty from knowledge) ho

Raheb jane laga to Hazrat e Umar ne kha ke agar mae tum ko jaan ki amaan na diya hota to zameen per tumhara khoon beh raha hota

Janab e Salman e farsee bhi mehfil mae maujud the aap jakar Hazrat Ali ko bulakar lae

Hazrat Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah Alehe Hasanain ke saath masjid mae tashreef lae aur kha ke ab puch kiya puchna chahta hae

Raheb ne kha ke ae navjavan shaqs aapka kiya naam hae

Moulana Ali ne kha Yehudiyun ke pas mera naam *اليا Ilya* hae aur Nasraniyun ke nasdik mera naam *إيليا Eiliya* hae mere walid ke nasdik mae *علي Ali* hun aur mere aur mere waleda ke nasdik mera naam *حيدر Hyder*hae

Raheb ne kha Nabi e kareem se aapka rishta kiya hae

Aap ne farmaya;

Woh mere Bhai hae, woh mere susre (father in law) hae aur mere chachzaad bhai hain

Raheb ne kha ki *Essa* ki Qasam aap hi meri murad hain

Jab usne sawal dohrae (repeated) to Moulana Ali ne farmaya

_Jo chez Allah taala ke liye nahi hae woh Allah ke liye biwi aur Aulad nahi hae_

_Jo chez Allah taala ke pas nahi hae woh Allah ke pas zulum nahi hae, woh kisi per bhi zulum nahi karta hae_

_Aur jo chez Allah taala nahi jaanta hae woh Allah ke saath koi shareek hae, woh to وحده لا شريك له hae_

Woh Nasrani padri moulana Ali ke peshani ka bosa diya (kissed) aur kha

*أشهد أن لا إله الا الله محمد رسول الله انك الخليفة الله*

Phir kha ke mae ne aapka naam *Torat mae اليا Ilya Injeel mae إيليا iliya aur koran mae Ali aur khadim Ambia ke sahifaun mae Hyder* padha hae

Aap hi Rasulullah ke baad unke wasi ho khalifa ho

Usne woh sara maal Moulana Ali ke supurd kardiya aur moulana Ali ne foran hi sara maal ghreebaun mae taqseem kardiya

Raheb musalman hokar Rome wapis laut gaye

🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂🍂
7/17/16, 12:55:25 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

*Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salawatullah alahe* ka mashoor Qol hae ke Hikmat  (wisdom) woh mommin ka kho'ya huva khazana hae (lost tressure) jahan kahi bhi miljae usko hasil karlo

Log jaa'ne aur an'jaane kitne waqt Haq ke bahut khreeb aakar bhi Haq ko pa nahi sak'e jaise mashoor Shaer e zamana *Allama Iqbal* jinhune apni shaeri mae jo nazriyaat ka izhaar kiye khususan *Toheed ka nazriye aur خودي Khudi ka nazriya* hamare deeni nazriye se itna khreeb tha ke *Syedna Dai Moulana Gulam Hussain saheb muqaddas* unhe *Emaani Sulaimani Dawat* ki taraf dawat dena chahte the aur shaed aap khat (letter) likhe magar bheje nahi ya likhna chahte the magar phir aap ne irada badal diya aur yehi farmaya ke *"abhi waqt nahi aya hae"*

Is tarah se duniya mae aise bahut se Danishwar aur Hakim guzre hain jinka khuda ka tasavur, khilqaat ke mamlaat, jismani aur roohani alam ke wajud ka tasavur, hamare deeni aqeede nazriye se bahut khreeb hain magar puri tarah unper deen ki haqeeqat wa sachai waze nahi huvi

Aise hi ek Danishwar mae  *Benjamin Franklin* bhi tha jisko *founding father of USA* kehte hae jo scientist bhi tha, author bhi tha, politician bhi tha usne apne ek azeez ke maut per taziyat ka khat likha tha jisme woh aisi baatain likha hae jo hamare deen ke nazriye se aur hamare deen ke *mabda maad wa haqaeq* ke nazriye se hum se bahut khreeb hae

*Benjamin Franklin* ke khat ke alfaaz hae jisko mae urdu mae likh raha hun;

_Insaan jab tak Aalam e Arwah (roohani Alam) ki taraf parwaz nahi karta tab tak sahi manau mae uski paedaesh nahi hoti_

_To phir humme maut per ranj wa a'lam (sorrow & grief) kiyu karna chahye ?  jab ke kisi ki maut per daar e baqa (hamesha) ke ghar mae yane roohani alam ek bacha paida huva hae_

_Hum Arwah (spirits) hain, aur Allah taala ka ye bada ahsaan hae ke usne humme ye jism karz diye hae jis'se hum khushiyaan hasil karsakte hain, jiske zareeyeh hum ilm hasil karsakte hain, jiske zareeyeh hum logoan ki khidmat bhi karsakte hain aur jab ye jism in kaamaun ke liye bekaar sabit hote hae, khushiyun ki jagah Dukh dard deta hae aur maddad ki jagah bojh banjate hae, us waqt ye Khuda ki badi Rehmat hae ke us jism se peecha chudane ke liye ek raasta banaya hae aur woh raasta *maut* hae_

_Woh kehta hae ke tum jab jism chodte ho (yane Rooh) to uske saath tumhari sari takleefain aur jitna bhi dard takaleef ya pareshaniyan jiska ainda hone ka imkaan tha woh sab bhi khatam hojate hae_

_phir marne wale ke liye kehta hae ke hamare dost ko bahut dur kabhi khatam na hone wali khushiyun mae shareek hone ke liye bulaliya gaya hae_

_Hum aur aap uski maut per kiyu ranjida (grieved) hote hain, hum sab ko bahut jaldi uske peeche jana hae aur hum ko ye bhi malum hae ke usko hum kahan dhund sakte hae_

is khat ke mazmun se ye sabit hota hae ke Benjamin Franklin *Rooh*(spirits soul) ka iqrar kar raha hae aur ye bhi kehta hae ke *Jism* se *Rooh* aala (much superior) hae aur *asal chez hae* aur Roohani Alam hi *asal Alam* hae aur maut ke baad ki zindagi hi asal zindagi hae jisko hum *aakherat* kehte hain jahan na kisi kisim ki takleef hae na dard hae na hi maut ka saamna hae

Hamare deen e Haq mae in tammam baataun ki haqeeqat ko puri tarah waze (clearly) explain kiya gaya hae hum ko chahye ke hum iska ilm hasil kare aur hamari deen duniya wa aakherat ko acha banae

🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁🍁
7/19/16, 9:23:01 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

Allah Tabaraka wa Taala *Quran e Kareem* mae Irshad farmata hae ;

*ادعونى استجب لكم🔸أن الذين يستكبرون عن عبادتي سيدخلون جهنم داخرين*

_Allah taala Irshad farmata hae ke tum mujh se Dua maango yaqinan mae tumhari Dua qabool karne wala hun aur jo log meri ibadat se akadte hain woh bahut jald zillat ke saath jahanam mae dakhil honge_

Aur Phir farmaya;

*ولله الأسماءالحسنى فادعوه بها*

_Allah taala ke liye *"Asma ul husna"* hain (Allah ke mubarak naam) unhi ke zareeyah Allah se Dua maanga karo_

Phir farmaya;

*وأدعوه مخلصين له الدين*

_Tum Allah ko pukaro ussi ke liye apne deen ko khalis karte huve (iqlaas ke saath deen ki pabandi karte huve)_

Phir farmaya ;

*وابتغوا إليه الوسيلة*

_Aur tum Allah taala tak pohunchne ka wasila (link contact) talaash karo_

Dua ka karna Khaliq wa maqlooq ke darmiyaan ek zareeyah hae jis tarah logoan ka ek doosre ke contact karne ke muqtalif zareeyeh hote hain theek issi  Khaliq wa maqlooq ke raabte (link) ke liye Dua ka zareeyah muqrar kiye hae aur Dua ke maangne ke liye *Quran e Kareem* mae bahut si ayaat ayi huvi hain, usne apne kalaam Quran e Kareem ke zareeyeh Duaon ka Tariqa, andaz, alfaz, ibarat sab hi ki taleem di hae, *Ambia wa Mursaleen* ki duain Qurani ayaataun ki surat mae moujud hain

*Adam Alehe* salaam ki Dua hae

*ربنا ظلمنا أنفسنا وان لم تغفرلنا وترحمنا لنكونن من الخاسرين*
 
_Ae Allah hum ne apne Nafs per zulm kiya hae agar tu ne humko maqferat nahi ata ki aur rahem nahi kiya to hum to bade nuqsaan mae hojainge_

*Ibrahim Alehe Salaam* ne Dua ki thi

*رَبِّ اجْعَلْنِي مُقِيمَ الصَّلَاةِ وَمِن ذُرِّيَّتِي رَبَّنَا وَتَقَبَّلْ دُعَاءِ*

_Ae mere Rab mujhe tawfeeq de ke mae Namaz ka paband hojaun aur meri aulad bhi paband hojae ae Allah meri Dua ko qabool farma_

*رَبَّنَا اغْفِرْ لِي وَلِوَالِدَيَّ وَلِلْمُؤْمِنِينَ يَوْمَ يَقُومُ الْحِسَابُ*

_Ae mere Rab jis din hisab hoga us roz mujhe, aur mere maa baap aur momineen ko maqferat farma_

*Yunus Nabi* ne Dua maangi

*لااله الا انت سبحانك اني كنت من الظالمين*

_Nahi hae koi *Ilah* siwae tere, tammam tareef teri hi hae aur ye bhi sach hae ke mae zaleem logoan mae se hogaya_

*Ayub Nabi* ne Dua ki thi

*أَنِّي مَسَّنِيَ الضُّرُّ وَأَنتَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ*

_Ae Rab mujhe takleef ho rahi hae aur tu hi sab se ziyada rahem karne wala hae_

*Musa* ne Dua maangi

*رب إني لما أنزلت الي من خير*

_Ae Allah taala tu jo bhi khair nazil kar raha hae mae uska mohtaj hun_

: *قَالَ رَبِّ اشْرَحْ لِي صَدْرِي*

_Ae bari taala mera seena kushada karde_

 *وَيَسِّرْ لِي أَمْرِي*

_Mere kaam ko asaan karde_

*وَاحْلُلْ عُقْدَةً مِّن لِّسَانِي ○ يَفْقَهُوا قَوْلِي*

_Meri zabaan ki girah (knot) ko khol de takeh woh meri baatain samajh le_

Aur Dua ki hidayat huvi

*رَّبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا*

_Ae Allah mere ilm mae izafa kar_

 aur Phir Allah taala ne *Quran e Kareem* mae bandaun ki taraf se bhi muqtalif Dua'ya jumle istemal Kiye hain jaisa keh

*اياك نعبد وإياك نستعين*

_Hum Teri hi ibadat karte hain aur tujh hi se Dua maangte hain_

Dua mae ek banda apne dil ki gehrai se Rab e Subhanahu ko pukarta hae aur apni deeni aur duniyawi hajat ko talab karta hae

*Nabi e Kareem* ka Irshad hae ;

 *الدعاء سلاح المومن وعمودالدين ونور السماوات والأرض*

_Dua mommin ka hatyar (weapon) hae, deen ka Suttun (pillar) hae aur aasmaan wa zameen ka noor hae_

Dua maangne ke bahut se aadaab Rasul e Maqbool,  Aulia Allah aur Ahle baet e kiraam ne farmaye hae jaise Dua maangne se pehle Bismillah ka padhna, Wazu ka karna, Qibla rukh hona, Dua ka uske sahi waqt per maangna, Dua ka sahi muqam per maangna, wasile ke saath Dua maangna, Dua mae riqat (heartfelt soulful  touching) quloos e niyat ka hona

Ek ahem adab jiska aksar khyal nahi kiya jata hae, woh yeh hae ke Dua maangte waqt awaaz ziyada bulund nahi ki jae balkeh mautadil (soft & medium voice) awaaz mae Allah se Dua maangne chahye dheemi awaaz jisme ajizi inkesari apni majboori ka ahsaas ho    

Allah taala Irshad farmata hae;

*وأذكر ربك في نفسك تضرعا وخيفة ودون الجهر من القول بالغدو والأصال ولا تكن من الغافلين*

_Tum Allah taala ko apne dil hi dil mae tazaro zari (with repentence & sorrow heart) aur khoof ke saath yaad karo aur kalaam ke hisab se bhi dheemi awaaz (low voice) mae subah aur sham yaad karo, aur khabardar, tum Allah taala se qafil na hojana_

Ae Allah tabaraka taala humko Dua karne ki sahi marefat ata farma    
 
*والحمدلله والصلاة والسلام على رسول الله وعلي أله صلى الله عليه وسلم*

*وآخر دعوانا و الحمد لله رب العالمين*   

Hamari aakhri Dua hae ke tammam *Hamd* Allah Rab ul Aalameen ke liye hae

🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸
7/21/16, 10:22:19 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🐔🦁🐴🐪🐘🐐🐢🐿

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
جمعة مباركة

Hamare pas hamare 9 th *Imam Moulana Ahmed bin Abdullah at-Taqi al Mastur* ki likhi kitab hae jiska naam *Rasael e Ahmediya* hae aur duniya mae *Rasael e Ikhwan us Saffa* se mashoor hae

Aaj *Rasael e Ahmediya* duniya bhar mae sab se ziyada mashoor wa maroof Arabi kitab hae jiska duniya ki bahut si zabaanaun mae tarjuma hochuka hae aur bahut se universities mae bhi padhai jati aur bahut se log uske mukhtalif subjects per research aur doctorate bhi kar rahe hain  

Is kitab ke ba're mae bahut si baataun per duniya mae bahut ikhtelaaf (difference of opinion) hae jaisa ke

_kiski likhi huvi kitab hae ?_ _Kis zamane mae likhi gai ?_ _Kitne risale (subjects wise books) hain ? aur in Risalaun ko likhne ka kiya maqsad tha ?_

In baataun ki tafzilaat bahut hain jiska batana mera maqsad nahi hae hamare pas is Kitab ki bahut ahmiyat hae, Duwaat uski padhai ki bahut ahmiyat dete hain Syedna Sulaiman saheb bhi is Kitab ko bahut pasand farmate aur apni taleem ke darmiyaan usko bahut ahmiyat dete the

Duniya ke har subject per isme books hain jaisa ke *Numbers Geomatry Astrology Mathematics Geography Music Nafsaniyat Jismaniyat, insaan ki jismani banwat aur uske Nafs ke mamlaat Pythagoras ka falsafa Magic waqera waqera etc* unme se ek Risala hae *Haiwanaat* (living creatures) per jo basically fictional debate hae *insaan aur jaanwar* ke darmiyaan unki ek doosre per supremacy ke liyejiska faisla Jinnaat ke badshah ke pas hona hae

51 risale mae sab se bada Risala (subject wise books) yehi hae jo shaed 100 pages se bhi ziyada per hae usme se sirf ek point of debate pesh hae jo insaan aur haiwaan ki banwat (physical shape) per hae

Insaan jab dawa karta hae ke uski banwat yane tarkeeb e jism sab creations se behter hae aur khubsurat hae

Bayan hae;

Insaan ka dawa (claim) hae ke Allah taala ne humko sab se achi surat shakal per paida kiya jaisa ke Quran khud farmata hae

*لقد خلقنا الإنسان في أحسن تقويم*

Yane Allah taala ne insaan ko sab se achi shakal wa surat per paida kiya (ideal) uska har azo (organ) bahut aetedaal per munasib lambai chodai (length & breadth) per rakha hae jaisa ke Quran ne farmaya hae

*فعدلك في أي صورة ما شاء ركبك*    

Yane har lihaaz se uska jism uske munasib hae (in the best of the form shape & proportion)

Insaan ne kaha ke ye baat hamare liye bahut badi fazilat hae jo tum jaanwar mae nahi hae tum mae baaz janwaar bahut badsurat hain, baaz bahut hi odd looking hain, kisi ke haath lambe hae kisi ke paer, kisi ka sar (head) bahut bada hae to kisi ki gardan (neck) choti, kisi ki dum (tail) choti hae to kisi ki bahut lambi

Jaisa ke unt (camel) hae to bahut bada uncha janwaar paer lambe gar'dan (neck) lambi dum (tail) choti, haati (elephant) bahut hi bada aur wazan (heavy) jaanwar hae uske do dant (tusk) mu se hamesha baher nikle huve hote hain aur mu hamesha khulla, kaan (ears) bahut bade aur phele huve (spread) aankhen bahut choti si, bael (ox buffaloes) uski dum (tail) lambi hoti hae issi tarah Rabbits chota sa jaanwar hae magar kaan uske bahut bade

Ye sunte hi jaanwar ke leader ne kha ke ae insaan tujh per afsoos ke tum ne Allah taala ki karigari ko aur uske maqsad ko nahi samjha tum jaanwar ki burai nahi kar rahe ho balkeh Allah ki creation per aeb laga raha ho, tum jisko aeb (khraabi defects) samajhta hae wohi uski khubi aur acchai (good quality & perfection) hae yehi Allah ki Hikmat hae jo usko aisa banaya hae

Phir jaanwar ke leader ne kaha ki unt camel ki gardan (neck) is liye lambi (long) hae ke uske paer (legs) bahut lambe hote hain lambi garden ki wajeh se woh zameen per pada chara (fodder) kha sakta aur lambe jhad (trees) se leaves tod sakta hae aur mu se khud ke badan ko khuja (scratch his body) sakta hae aur sab se ahem baat ye hae ke woh zameen se gardan (long neck) ke zareeyah apne aap ko balance karke uthta hae

Haati ke dant itne bade aur mu (mouth) se baher nikle is liye hain ke woh wild animals se apne aap ko bachae, suund (trunk) is liye lambi hae ke woh choti gardan (short neck) ko compensate karti hae aur ussi se khane pine ki chez hasil karta hae aur bade chapte (flat) kaan aur suund ki maddad se woh makhi Machar (mosquito) aur doosre insects ko dur karta hae kiyunke uske tusk ki wajeh se uska mu hamesha khula rahta hae aur ussi se uski aankh ko bhi protect karta hae

Rabbits ke kaan uske jism ke hisaab se isliye bade hae ke rabbits ki skin bahut fragile hoti hae aur badan nazuk (delicate) hota hae woh sardi (winter) mae apne badan ko kaan se cover karta hae aur garmi (summers) mae usko zameen per bicha (spread) karke ussi per sota hae

Phir jaanwar ke leader ne kha ke Allah taala Quran e Kareem mae ye bhi to Musa ke zareeyah kha hae ke

*قَالَ رَبُّنَا الَّذِي أَعْطَىٰ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ خَلْقَهُ ثُمَّ هَدَىٰ*

Musa Alehe salaam ne kha ke Allah taala ne har chez ko uske hisaab se (surat wa shakal) ata ki aur phir usko (uske sahi istemal) ki hidayat bhi di

Allah taala be shummar  (innumerable) Quran ki ayaat mae humko aasmaan wa zameen aur uski tammam khilqaat mae qor karne ki hidayat diya hae humko chahye hum unper qor kare takeh hamara deeni aqeede masboot ho, Ilm hasil karne ka shoq badhe aur hamari aakherat achi ho

🐋🐐🐪🦄🐢🐘🐔🐴🦁

Duniya ke har subject per isme books hain jaisa ke *Numbers Geomatry Astrology Mathematics Geography Music Nafsaniyat Jismaniyat, insaan ki jismani banwat aur uske Nafs ke mamlaat Pythagoras ka falsafa Magic waqera waqera etc* unme se ek Risala hae *Haiwanaat* (living creatures) per jo basically fictional debate hae *insaan aur jaanwar* ke darmiyaan unki ek doosre per supremacy ke liyejiska faisla Jinnaat ke badshah ke pas hona hae

Bayan hae;

*لقد خلقنا الإنسان في أحسن تقويم*

Yane Allah taala ne insaan ko sab se achi shakal wa surat per paida kiya (ideal) uska har azo (organ) bahut aetedaal per munasib lambai chodai (length & breadth) per rakha hae jaisa ke Quran ne farmaya hae

*فعدلك في أي صورة ما شاء ركبك*    

Yane har lihaaz se uska jism uske munasib hae (in the best of the form shape & proportion)

Insaan ne kaha ke ye baat hamare liye bahut badi fazilat hae jo tum jaanwar mae nahi hae tum mae baaz janwaar bahut badsurat hain, baaz bahut hi odd looking hain, kisi ke haath lambe hae kisi ke paer, kisi ka sar (head) bahut bada hae to kisi ki gardan (neck) choti, kisi ki dum (tail) choti hae to kisi ki bahut lambi

Jaisa ke unt (camel) hae to bahut bada uncha janwaar paer lambe gar'dan (neck) lambi dum (tail) choti, haati (elephant) bahut hi bada aur wazan (heavy) jaanwar hae uske do dant (tusk) mu se hamesha baher nikle huve hote hain aur mu hamesha khulla, kaan (ears) bahut bade aur phele huve (spread) aankhen bahut choti si, bael (ox buffaloes) uski dum (tail) lambi hoti hae issi tarah Rabbits chota sa jaanwar hae magar kaan uske bahut bade
