Phir jaanwar ke leader ne kaha ki unt camel ki gardan (neck) is liye lambi (long) hae ke uske paer (legs) bahut lambe hote hain lambi garden ki wajeh se woh zameen per pada chara (fodder) kha sakta aur lambe jhad (trees) se leaves tod sakta hae aur mu se khud ke badan ko khuja (scratch his body) sakta hae aur sab se ahem baat ye hae ke woh zameen se gardan (long neck) ke zareeyah apne aap ko balance karke uthta hae

Haati ke dant itne bade aur mu (mouth) se baher nikle is liye hain ke woh wild animals se apne aap ko bachae, suund (trunk) is liye lambi hae ke woh choti gardan (short neck) ko compensate karti hae aur ussi se khane pine ki chez hasil karta hae aur bade chapte (flat) kaan aur suund ki maddad se woh makhi Machar (mosquito) aur doosre insects ko dur karta hae kiyunke uske tusk ki wajeh se uska mu hamesha khula rahta hae aur ussi se uski aankh ko bhi protect karta hae

Musa Alehe salaam ne kha ke Allah taala ne har chez ko uske hisaab se (surat wa shakal) ata ki aur phir usko (uske sahi istemal) ki hidayat bhi di

🐋🐐🐪🦄🐢🐘🐔🐴🦁
7/23/16, 1:56:48 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ***************************

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Aaj *19 Shawal* youm e wafat hae *Hazrat Almansub Moulana Ziaali ibne Almansub Moulana Sheikh Ibrahim Saheb bin Sabah Ali saheb*

_Dor e Mansubiat 1287-1330 47 saal mansub rahe inteqal aaj se 137 saal pehle huva hae_

_Aapki seerat (biography) 2 do saal se mae bhej raha hun agar koi nahi padha hae aur padhna chahta hae woh mujhe khabar kare (Send request) mae unko individually bhej dunga_

Allahhafiz
Ishak Ziaee

****************************
7/24/16, 1:49:19 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🐒🦄🕷🐣🐍🐱🐼🐎

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Zikar kya tha *Ikhwan us Safa ke Risale haiwanaat* se kuch behes (debate) darmiyaan mae insaan aur jaanwar ke

Bahut se logoan ke khaesh per ussi debate se kuch aur zikar pesh hae

Insaan apna Haq jata raha hae haiwaan per ke hum har lihaaz se tum se behter hain aur issi wajeh se hum tumhare malik hain آقا aqa hae aur tum hamare gulam hain hum ko tum per pura Haq hae hum jaisa chahe tum per hukum chalae aur tum se kaam le

Insaan apni supremacy ke liye apne malik hone ke liye bahut si daleel Jinnaat ke badshah ke saamne pesh karta hae magar jaanwar bhi uski har daleel ko radd (refute) karte hae aur ye baat sabit bhi karte hain ke *"hum insaan ke sirf barabar hi nahi balkeh bahut behter bhi hain"*

Arguments mae insaan ek daleel ye pesh karta hae ke hamare hawaas (senses) tum janwaar se bahut ziyada tez (sharp) hae

Jaanwar kehte hain _"Ae insaan tumhara is baat mae bhi gumaan ghalat hae hamare ha'waas tum insaan se bahut ziyada tez hae"_

Tum unt (camel) per hi qor karo itna uncha lambi gardan lambe paer rakhne wala phir bhi woh ragistaan (desert) mae andheri raat mae aisa raasta talaash karta hae aur guzar jata jab ke insaan ek khadam bhi aage nahi bada sakta hae

Ghoda itna tez hota hae ke bahut dur se kisi chalne wale ki awaaz ko sunleta hae aur aksar aisa bhi huva hae ke dur se dushman ki ahaat sunkar apne malik ko bedaar  kardiya jaan bachaliye hae

Agar kisi ne bael ya gadhe  ko kisi jungle mae kisi suni  jagaah per lejakar chod de aisa raasta jahan woh kabhi  bhi nahi gaya ho phir bhi woh apne ghar kaisa bhi wapas ajate hae aur ae insaan tum kisi raaste se kai baar bhi guzre ho phir bhi tum raasta bhul jate ho bhatak jate ho

Bhed bakriyaan (cattle) ek hi raat mae kai kai (many) bache dete hain aur doosre hi subah bachaun ko chodkar charagaah (grazing fields) jate hain aur shaam ko jab woh sab wapas aate hain to sab bache apni apni maaun ko pehchante hain aur maa bhi barabar apne hi bache ke pas jati hae jab ke sab ek jaise hi nazar aate hain

Jaanwar ke leader ne kha _"Ae insaan tum kuch waqt apne bhai bhen maa baap se dur rahe to tum unko pehchan nahi pate ho phir tum kiyu apni quwat e tameez aur jaudat e hawaas (strong & powerful senses) per fakher aur ghamand karte ho jab ke woh bhi hum jaanwar mae tum se bahut ziyada aur behter hae"_    

Ek waqt insaan ne dawa kya (claim) hum mae bahut ziyada khubiyaan hae hum bahut se uloom (knowledge in different fields) rakhte hae hum mae technical knowledge aur expertise bahut ziyada hae hum mae organising ability tum se bahut ziyada hae, hum mae danai (wisdom) bahut hae issi wajeh se hum ko Haq hae ke jaanwar per hukum chalae hum unke malik hain woh hamare gulam hain

Us waqt shahed ki makhi (honey bee) ne jawab diya ke insaan zara qor to kare ke hum hamari zindagi ko kaise organise karte hain hamara bandobast aur intezam kitne behter aur acha hota hae

Honeybee ne jinnaat ke badshah ke saamne kaha ke zara insaan ko kaho ke woh ek seedhi lakeer to markar batae kisi scale ke baqaer ya triangle, ya square, banakar batae baqaer kisi instruments ki maddad ke aur hum janwaar beqaer kisi ki maddad ke apne mukhtalif kisim ke ghar banate hain jisme straight lines bhi hote hain, circles bhi, square bhi, triangle bhi aur yaqinan insaan usme zara bhi flaw nahi paega

 _[agar insaan sirf shahed ki makhi ke puthe bee hives per qor kare jo hexagon hota hae na uske angles mae zara sa bhi difference hoga aur na hi sides ke length mae na kisi proportions mae]_

Shahed ki makhi ne kha ke ye hunar (art of construction) humko koi ustad ne nahi sikhaya hae balkeh Allah taala hum per  *وحي wahi* karta hae jaise ke Koran kehta hae

وَأَوْحَىٰ رَبُّكَ إِلَى النَّحْلِ أَنِ اتَّخِذِي مِنَ الْجِبَالِ بُيُوتًا وَمِنَ الشَّجَرِ وَمِمَّا يَعْرِشُونَ

All taala ne wahi farmai shahed ki makhi per ke pahad per darakht per aur unche unche muqam per apne ghar banau   

Phir shahed ki makhi ne kiya hi saqt baat insaan se ki "ke tum ko itna ghamand hae ke tum hamare malik hone aur hum ghulam to phir tum hamara jhuta kiyu khate ho (bee is referring honey) arre tum to bahut se mamlaat mae hum jaanwar ke mohtaj hain aur hum kisi bhi mamle mae tumhare mohtaj nahi hum azaad hae independent hae haqeeqat mae tum hamare gulam ho arre hamare mu se nikla jhuta tumhare liye شفاء shifa (cure) hae

يَخْرُجُ مِن بُطُونِهَا شَرَابٌ مُّخْتَلِفٌ أَلْوَانُهُ فِيهِ شِفَاءٌ لِّلنَّاسِ إِنَّ فِي ذَٰلِكَ لَآيَةً لِّقَوْمٍ يَتَفَكَّرُونَ

Shahed ki makhi ke pet se pine ki ek chez (honey) nikalti hae jiske mukhtalif rang hote hain jisme logoan ke liye shifa (cure) hae sochne walaun ke liye usme bahut si nishaniyaan hain

Ae insaan tum kehte ho tumhari tadbeer (organising skill) hum se bahut ziyada hae, tum zara chumti (Ants) ko dekho woh tum se bahut ziyada organised hae

Itni choti magar zameen ke neeche kaise complex ghar banati hae, kaise bhi pani ka sailab (flooding) ho ek khatra bhi pani ka uske ghar mae nahi jata hae jahan woh apna anaj sardi ke dinaun ke liye jama rakhti hae aur kabhi ittefaq se bheeg gaya to woh usko dhup mae lakar sukhate bhi hain

Itne hoshyaar hote hae ke grains ko sprout hone aur khraab hone se bachane ke liye dane ke chilka (covering) ko nikal kar dane ko tod dalti hain

Ants group mae khane ka dhundne nikalte hae aur kabhi akele kisi ek chunti ko khane ka milta hae to woh uska thoda sa hissa, ya phir uski khusboo ko saath lejakar apne saathiyun ko batati hae aur phir sab saath milkar aate hae aur usko lejate hae koi chumti susti karti hae ya kaam nahi karti hae to usko maar bhagati hae aur issi tarah koi zakhmi ho ya bimar to uska uthakar lejati bhi hae

Kiya hi behtreen andaz mae Imam ne mukalema (dialogue) pesh kiya hae aur kitne hi janwaar ki kitni ajeeb wa ghreeb khubiyun ka zikar kya hae, Ye kitab taqreeben 1100 saal pehle likhi gai jab ke duniya ko bhi bahut si baataun ki khabar nahi thi balkeh aaj bhi bahut si baataun ki koi khabar nahi

Hamari aqal hairaan hojati hae jab hum padhte hae, kitne detail mae Imam ne muqtalif jaanwaar ki banwat batai hae jaise dimak (termite), honey bee, lions, cockroach, parrot, turtle, frog aur bhi bahut se Jaanwar ka zikar kya hae

Allah humko aqal de, samajh de ke hum un janwaaraun ki zindagiyaun mae qor aur fikar kare aur unki khubiyun ko apnae jo shaed Imam Alehe salaam ka bhi ek maqsad hosakta hae   

🦁🐮🐶🐼🐢🐠🐒🐧🐝
7/27/16, 2:19:57 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🐘🐓🐀🐪🐎🐑🐿🐂

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Kiya hi behtreen andaz mae hamare *Imam* Alehe salaam ne muqtalif jaanwaraun ki khilqat unki qaslat (habits) unka rehan sahen (way of living) ko bayan farmaya hae

Aaj science itni taraqi kar chuki hae ke in baataun ko bahut hi asaani aur sahulat se hum malum karsakte hae, aaj cameras hae, microscopes hae, sound detectors hae, satellite imaging latest instruments aur gadgets hain, kiya 1100 saal pehle ye sab tha ?

*Aur agar nahi tha to phir Imam Alehe salaam ne ye sab tafseel kaise Bayan ki ?*

*Kiya ye ek insaan ke bas ki baat hae ?*

Sirf ek janwaar ki puri kaifiyat jan'ne ke liye ek nahi balkeh kai insaan ki puri zindagi kharch (spend) hojati hae

Aur *Imam* ne, na sirf jaanwar ke bare mae likha hae balkeh shaed hi koi baat in risalaun mae choda hae, jahan time space matter energy ki tafzilaat bayan ki hae wahan minerals kaise bante hae, (form hote hae) bata diya, human embryo ke stages ki tafseel aise bayan ki ke aaj bhi medical science hairaan hae, kisi muqam per Astronomy aur Astrology ko bayan kiya to kisi ri'sale mae hafeza mutakhyala mufakera (memory intelligence & imagination) dimaag mae unki jagaah kahan hain aur kaise kaam karte hain bataya *"Allah O Akbar"* agar ye kitab Imam ki tasneef hae, aur *yaqinan Imam hi ki hae to phir Imam ki zaat kiya hogi ?*

Walid muqaddus kehte ke agar koi shaqs *Imam aur uski Imamat* ko samajh liya to woh haqeeqat mae deen ka ek bahut bada hissa jaan liya, samajh liya

Sirf ye ek hi kitab, balkeh mae kahunga ki unme ka koi bhi ek risala hi insaan ke liye hamare deen per kamil Emaan wa Yaqeen lane ke liye kafi hae   

Zikar ho raha tha insaan wa jaanwar ki behes ka jab keh insaan ka dawa (claim) hae ke woh malik hae aur jaanwar unke gulam

Insaan apne kai daleel rakhte hain aur jaanwar unki har daleel ko buri tarah se radd (overrule) karte jate hain

 Insaan ne ek aur daleel pesh ki, Kehne lage hum mae aur bhi fazilatain hain hamare zindagi jaanwar ke muqabil bahut aesh wa aram (comfort & luxury) ki hae sirf khane aur pine ka hi dekh lo itne kisim ke khane ke haiwaan to kabhi dekhe bhi nahi honge, mewe (fruits) ka maqs (andar ka asal) hum khate hain aur jaanwar ke liye sirf gutli aur chilka hota hae (seeds & peels) aur hamare liye itne kisim ke dishes aur khane ki varieties hae ki uski koi ginti nahi, mithai hi kai kisim ki hoti hae  aur in khanaun ko banane ke liye bhi bahut se tariqe hote hain

Phir insaan ke leader ne kha
hamari tafreeh (entertainment) ke liye kitne tariqa hae, naach gaana khel kud, hasi mazaaq ki mehfil,

Hamare liye kai kisim ke libaas hae alag alag kapde rashem (silk) uun (wool) chamda (hides & skins) muqtalif rang ke aur alag alag designs ke, phir hamare liye zevar (jewellery) bhi hae sirf yehi nahi hamare baithne ke liye behtreen carpets hote hain, gaddi takye (mattresses & pillows) hote hain aur in jaanwaraun ke liye kiya hae, zindagi tammam nange (naked) rahte hae jungle ki ghaas (grass) jhad ke patte (leaves) khate hain aur din raat mehnat wa mashaqat karte hain kiya ye gulami nahi to aur kiya hae ?

Ek parinde ne janwaar ki wakalat (advocacy) ki Kehne laga ye jo insaan keh raha hae aur bahut fakher kar raha hae ke hamare liye itni khane ki varieties hae woh yeh nahi samajh raha hae ke ye sab unke liye takleef ranj wa ghum wa pareshani ka sabbab hae

Kehne laga in muqtalif kisim ke khane ke liye unko kitni mehnat wa mashaqat (hard work) karna padhta hae kheti karna beech bona hal chalana pani ka dalna waqera waqera phir pakene (cooking) ka intezam karna, aag ka intezam karna bartan aur doosre saman ka bhi intezam karna, phir pakana seekhna ya bawarchi (cook) ka intezam hona agar gosht ho to usko katna, saaf karna jo sirf qasai (butcher) hi karta hae aur phir in sab ka hisaab kitab bhi rakhna, naap tol bhi rakhna aur phir halal aur haram ka bhi khyal rakhna warna saza wa azab ke liye tayar rahna

Hum ko in sab baataun ki zaroorat hi nahi hamari seedhi sadi gissa ghaas (grass leaves fruits) jo Allah taala qudrati tor per uga deta hae na humko uske liye mehnat karni padhti hae aur na takleef uthate hain humko khane pine ki fikar kabhi nahi hoti jahan jate hae Allah ke fazal se kuch na kuch mil hi jata hae hum be takaluf charte hain (graze) saaf shafaf lateef talaab neher (river) se pani pite hain na humko dol bartan bucket ghade aur tanki ki zaroorat hoti hae pani jama karne ke liye intezam karna padhta hae

Phir parinde ne kha insaan jitne alag alag khane khata hae utne hi bimariun aur takleefain bhi uthata hae Imam ne bahut si kisim ki bimariun ka zikar kiya hae jo ziyada khane, alag alag kisim ke khane ghalat chez khane se hoti hae bayan kiya hae aur uska natija zindagi bher doctor, hakim, tabib ke pas phirte rahte hae aur dawa daru aur parhez karte rahte hain

Aur ek baat jaan lo ke tumhare pas jo sab se lazeez khane ki chez hae woh shahed hae aur woh shahed ki makhi ka laub hae woh hum jaanwar ki chez hae ya tum banate ho ?

Ab ae jinnaat ke badshah tum hi batau ki ye unki fazilat hae ya hazimat (insult)

Insaan ne foran kha bimar to janwaar bhi hote hain

Jaanwar ne kha bimar to woh jaanwar hote hain jo tumhari qaed (prison control) mae hote hain jaise bili kutte murgi gae bakri ghode gadhe aur woh is waaste bimar hote hain ke unko apne hisaab se azaadi se khana nahi milta tumhare pas unka khane ka waqt muqrar hae usme kami ziyadati nahi hoti woh apne hisab se apne waqt per nahi kha sakte Isiliye woh bimar hote hain kabhi khoof ke maare kam khate hain ya kabhi is dar se ke baad mae milta hae ya nahi ziyada khate hae aur phir unko unki  warjish (exercise) bhi nahi milti jo jungle aur khule mae azaad phirte hain woh aise bimar nahi hote

Tum jo kehte ho ke tumhare liye naach gana khushi ki mehfilain hae, aesh wa ishrat ke moqe hote hae jo hamare liye nahi to tum ye bhi jano ke har ek baat ke saath Allah ka hisaab bhi hae saza wa azaab bhi hae tumhari khushi ke saath ranj wa ghum bhi juda hae aisi khushi hi kiya jiske saath hamesha ranj ghum fikar aur musibatain saath ho  

Phir janwaar ke leader ne kha tum apne libaas ka zikar karte ho tum qor nahi karte ke ek zamane mae tumhare baap dada issi zameen per nange dhadenge (totally naked) ghumte phirte the sach to ye hae ke tum ne ye libaas haiwaan se zulum karke chihna (grabbed) hae tumhare nasdik sab se kimti libaas silk ka hae jo ek kida (insect silk worm) jo jhad per apne luaab (secretion) se apne aur apne bachaun ke liye bunta (weave) hae takeh sardi garmi se mehfooz rahe tum ne zulm se usko liya hae issi liye tum ko saza hae ke silk ka kapda banane tum ko be'inteha mehnat wa mashaqat hoti hae aur sirf yehi nahi tum ko kapda darzi se silana bhi padhta hae, dhobi se dhulana bhi hota hae

Aur tumhare bahut se libaas woh hamare hi khal (hides, skin, wool, hair) se bante hae tum hum haiwaan per zulm karke uski chihna hae aur phir ussi baat per fakher karte hain ke hamare liye mukhtalif libaas hain, sachai to ye hae ke Allah taala ne tum ko nanga (naked) paida kiya hae aur hum ko fakhar hae ke Allah taala ne uski shafaqat wa meherbani se ye sab libaas hum per hamari paedaesh ke saath paida farmaya ab tum hi batao ae jinnaat ke badshah ke hum unke gulam hae ya insaan ko hamare gulam hona chahye ?

Hum insaan ko hamari kamiyun ko dekhna chahye banisbat hamari khubiyun per itrana wa akadna chahye  hamari haisiyat hi kiya hae

Quran kehta hae

ثُمَّ جَعَلَ نَسْلَهُ مِن سُلَالَةٍ مِّن مَّاءٍ مَّهِينٍ

Allah ne tumhari nasal (progeny) ko jari kiya ek halke (humble) pani se (semen)

Hum hae Kiya jo apne aap per itna ghamand karte hain

🐪🐑🐎🐿🐓🐀🐂🐒
7/28/16, 2:50:37 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

*جمعة مباركة*🌹

Aap mae se aksar ke jawab mile aur *Imam Ahmed bin Abdullah alehe salaam* ke kalaam ko pasand farmaya

Inshallah *janwaar aur insaan* ki behes ka kuch aur zikar ainda bhi karunga

Aksar logoan ne kitab ka naam aur risale ka naam pucha hae woh yeh hae

رسالة من الجسمانيات الطبيعات فى كيفية تكوين الحيوانات واصنافها

 Kitab is naam se mashoor hae

رسائل اخوان الصفاءوخلان الوفاء

*RASSA'EL IKHWAN AS-SSAFA*

Hamare pas isse *RASAEL E AHMEDIYA*  kehte hain

 Original Kitab Arabi mae bahut pehle print hochuki hae aur doosre zabaanaun mae tarjuma bhi huva hae, recently Ismaili foundation ne kuch risale English mae translate kiye hae

Internet per in risalaun ke bare mae bahut kuch articles aur research  papers maujud hae shaed *Wikipedia* per bhi hae

Haiwanaat ka risala bahut pehle urdu mae bhi translate hochuka hae

Hamare pas Dawat mae is Kitab ko *Ilm eTaweel* ke level per rakhe hain agar humko is Kitab se sahi roohani faida uthana hae to Saheb e Dawat (manaseeb) se ijazat leker padhna chahye

*Al Aalim Al Aamil Moulvi Adnan Saheb Muqaddus* ye waqae hamesha bayan farmate ke

_"mae Bombay university ka Arabi ka student tha us zamane mae *Hazrat Ishak saheb muqaddus* Bambai aye huve the mujh se daryaft kiye ke "Adnan" tum aaj kal kiya mutalea (study) kar rahe ho ?_

_Mae ne kha *"Ikhwan us Safa"* padh raha hun"_

_Aap ne farmaya kisi ki ijazat se padh rahe ho?_

_Mae ne kha Bombay university library mae hae isliye padh raha hun_

 Mulla Adnan saheb ne farmaya us waqt hazrat saheb ne ijazat lene ki ahmiyat ko samjhaya ke _jab ijazat lete hae us waqt humko *"taeed"* (roohani help) milti hae, hum ek roohani silsile se connect hote hain, aur hamare *Nafs* ko hamari *Surat e Roohani* ko faida milta hae, maddad milti hae sahi *tasavur* qaem hota hae_

Allah humko tawfeeq de ke hum is baat ka khyal rakhe

Aksar log mazameen ko pasand karte huve jawab diye hain uska Shukriya sach hae *Imam ke kalaam se badhkar koi kalaam nahi*

*(This is a broadcast message will reach to all on my broadcast list)*

🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌
7/30/16, 12:49:37 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🦃🕊🐬🐩🐠🐐🐸🐝

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

jab Insaan ki koi daleel bhi jaanwar ke muqabil kamiyab nahi huvi to jinnaat ke badshah ne insaanaun se kha ke ab aur koi daleel hae tumhare pas jis'se tumhara Haq sabit hota hae ke jaanwar tumhare gulam hain

Insaan mae se ek leader bankar utha aur kehne laga yaqinan hamare pas aur bhi kai daleel hain jis'se sabit hota hae ke hum *آقا* hain aur jaanwar hamare gulam

farmane laga insaan ke leader ne ;
 
Allah taala ne Deen, nubuwaat wa risalat, Allah ka kalam Quran e Kareem ye sab hamare liye hi nazil kiya hae   

Nek wa badd, halal aur haram ki tameez hamare liye hae, اوامر ونواهي (karne ka hukum aur na karne ka hukum), wada karna aur azab se dadhana, waqeaat aur qisse sab hamare liye hae aur jannat sirf hamare liye hi banai gai mae

Gusul taharat namaz roza sadqa zakat, masjid mae namaz padhna mimber per khutba dena, waaz wa nasihat ki mehfil mae shirkat karna, ye sab baatain sirf hamare liye hi hain aur ye sab hamare liye badi sharafat aur fakher ki baat hae aur ye tammam baatain dalalat karte hain ke hum haiwaan se buzrug hae hum malik hain ye gulam hain

Janwaar ke wakil ne kha ke agar tum zara socho samjho, qor wa fikar karo to malum hoga ki ye tammam baatain tumhare liye ranj wa ghum, azaab wa saza aur mehes pareshani hae, isse tumhari sharafat ki taraf ishara nahi balke tumhare liye aeb ki baat hae

*Badshah ne hairat se kha ki ye ranj wa azab kaise aur Aeb kaise ?*

Janwaar ke wakil jo ek parinda tha "Hazaar dastaan" (the whistling thrush) Kehne laga ke ye sab pabandiyaan aur faraez wa navafil Allah taala ne is waaste rakhi hae ke insaan ke gunah maaf ho aur ye ke ainda gumrah na hone pae

Isiliye Quran farmata hae

إِنَّ الْحَسَنَاتِ يُذْهِبْنَ السَّيِّئَاتِ ذَٰلِكَ ذِكْرَىٰ لِلذَّاكِرِينَ

Nekiyaan gunahun ko mita deti hain agar insaan Allah ke banae huve khanoon per amal nahi kare to woh gunahgaar hoga, aur insaan issi khoof ki wajeh se ibadat mae mashqul rahte hae

Hum jaanwar gunahun se pak hain hum ko uski ibadat ki zaroorat hi nahi jis'se insaan fakher kar raha hae

Allah taala ne Ambia wa Rasulaun ko un logoan ke waaste bheja hae jo kafir
mushrik wa gunahgaar hain, jo uski ibadat nahi karte the jo raat din fisq wa fujur mae mashqul rahte hain

Parinde ne kha hum to Allah ke شرك shirk wa معاصي  masi (gunah karne) se bahut dur hain, hum to Allah taala ki towheed karte hain usko *وحده لا شريك له* maante hain aur hamesha hi uski ibadat mae mashqul rahte hain

Ambia wa Rasul misl (like) tabib (doctor) hain aur tabib ki zaroorat bimar wa aleel ko hoti hae hum jaise sahet mand ko nahi, Ambia tumhara ilaj kar rahe hain tum لهو لعب  laho laeb mae pade ho tumhare Nafs khrab hogae hain tum khane pine mae ahtiyat nahi karte ho apne jism wa Nafs ko khrab karte ho

nabi ne farmaya

    الحمية رأس الدواء والبطن رأس الداء
parhez karna wa asal dawa hae aur tumhara pet bimari ki asal hae

Taharat wa gusul tumhare waaste isliye hae ke tum aksar na'pak rahte ho raat din tum jinsi shehwat (sexual indulgence) mae masroof rahte ho is waaste tum ko taharat ka hukum hae hamara to ye mamla hae ke hum mae se aksar sirf saal mae ek martaba hamare madda (female) ke pas jate hain aur woh bhi lazzat wa shehwat ke liye nahi balkeh hamari nasal ki baqa ke liye

Namaz roza tum per isliye farz hae ke tumhare gunah maaf ho, hum gunah karte nahi to phir hum ye maqferat kiyu talab karna maafi kiyu maangna
 
Quran mae Allah taala tumhare liye farmaya

  .َ إِنَّ الصَّلَاةَ تَنْهَىٰ عَنِ الْفَحْشَاءِ وَالْمُنْكَرِ

namaz tum ko fahesh aur munkir kaam se rokti hae

nabi ne roze ke liye kha hae

صوموا تصحوا

tum roza rakho aur sahet pao

is baat se sabit hae ke tum bimar ho
 
sadqa zakat tum per isliye wajib hae ke tum bahut maal haram zareeyah se jama karte ho, aur maal mae jiska Haq hae usko nahi dete, agar tum sahi jagah sahi maqsad ke liye kharch karte hote to phir kiyu tum per zakat wajib hoti, hum to hamare hum jins (same kind of species) per shafaqat wa meherbani wa hamdardi karte hae hum kabhi kanjusi nahi karte aur na tumhari tarah maal jama karte  

Quran farmata hae;

يَا-أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا إِنَّ كَثِيرًا مِنَ الْأَحْبَارِ وَالرُّهْبَانِ لَيَأْكُلُونَ أَمْوَالَ النَّاسِ بِالْبَاطِلِ وَيَصُدُّونَ عَنْ سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ وَالَّذِينَ يَكْنِزُونَ الذَّهَبَ وَالْفِضَّةَ وَلَا يُنْفِقُونَهَا فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ فَبَشِّرْهُمْ بِعَذَابٍ أَلِيمٍ

farmata hae Quran mae Ae Emaan walo tum mae se bahut se log ghalat tariqe se logoan ka maal kha jate hain aur Allah ki raah se rokte ho aur ye keh jisne sona aur chandi jama kiya aur Allah ki raah mae kharch nahi kiya uske liye dardnaak azab hae

tumhare liye Allah taala ne halal haram, hudood wa khisas (punishment) ki ayaatain nazil ki takeh tumhari taleem ho warna tum to jahel ho, nadaan ho acha bura, sahi ghalat, faida nuqsaan nahi samajhte

humme to Allah taala ne paigambar ke waaste ke baqaer hi har baat ki khabar karta hae, jaisa ke Quran mae kha ke Allah taala ne shahed ki makhi per direct wahi ki ke woh pahadaun (mountains) per aur unchai per makan banae

Allah Tabaraka wa Taala ne shru se hi hum per wahi aur ilhaam ke zareeyah humko har us baat ki hidayat ki jiski humko zaroorat thi

aur farmaya

كل قد علم صلاته و تسبيحه  

 Hum mae se har haiwaan apni tasbih aur namaz ko jaanta hae

Ek moqe per to Allah taala ne ek kawe (crow) ko bheja ke zameen ko kho'de (dig) aur *Qabil* ko batlae ke ke apne bhai *Habil* ki naash ko kaise dafan kiya jae jab ke *Qabil ne Habil* ka qatal kardiya tha aur usko samajh mae nahi aaraha tha ke uske jism ke saath kya kiya jae to us waqt Allah taala ne ek kawe ko bheja ke woh Qabil ko dafan karna batae aur us waqt Qabil ne kawe ko dafan karte huve dekh kar sikha tha  

فَبَعَثَ اللَّهُ غُرَابًا يَبْحَثُ فِي الْأَرْضِ لِيُرِيَهُ كَيْفَ يُوَارِي سَوْءَةَ أَخِيهِ قَالَ يَا وَيْلَتَا أَعَجَزْتُ أَنْ أَكُونَ مِثْلَ هَٰذَا الْغُرَابِ فَأُوَارِيَ سَوْءَةَ أَخِي فَأَصْبَحَ مِنَ النَّادِمِينَ

Allah taala ne kawe ko bheja takeh woh gadha (dig) kare aur doosre murda kawe ko dafan karke Qabil ko batae ke kaise murde ko dafan kiya jae, us waqt Qabil bahut sharminda huve ke mae itna bhi nahi janta tha aur kawe ne mujhe sikhaya
 
ab ae insaan tum hi batau ki hum se tum sikhte ho, to phir hum aqa hae ya tum ?

Allah taala hum per direct wahi karta hae, ilhaam karta hae, hum buzrug hae ya tum ?

ab kiya jawab tha insaan ke pas siwae khamoshi ke

hum insaan ko duniya mae hamari haisiyat ko samajhna chahye aur *Ummahaat ul maasi أمهات المعاصي yane كبر kiber حسد hasad wa حرص hirs se bachna chahye jo teen burai duniya ki sab burayun ki maa hae asal hae*

🐝🕊🐸🐇🐠🐐🦃🐤
8/2/16, 4:42:33 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌸🌺🌸🌺🌸🌺🌸🌺🌸

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
ماه ذي القعدة الحرام مبارك  🌹

Zikar huva tha insaan wa jaanwar ke darmiyaan ki behes ka jo Saheb e Rasael ne apne 51 Rasael mae se ek Risale mae pesh kiya hae

mujhe aksar logoan ne likha hae ke aap ne to jaanwar ko insaan se behter hae sabit kardiya hae

baat ye hae ke ye ek Risala taqreeben 200 pages ka hae usme se kuch behes ka hissa mae ne aapke saamne pesh kiya hae abhi koi conclusion nahi hae abhi natija kahan nilkla bayan bahut lamba hae natija final judgement to dono ki puri behas (arguments) mukamil hone ke baad hi hoga
 
insaan har halat mae Ashraf ul maqluqaat hae jaanwar se bahut Aala aur Afzal hae Koran Ahadees aur Ahle baet ke kalaam mae is baat ki bahut si daleelain maujud hain

insaan ki ek hi sifat bahut hae ke usko *عقل سليم* Aqal Saleem aur *نطق*;Nutq (kalam karne ki quwat di gai) aur yaqinan usme hazaraun aur bhi fazilatain maujud hae jo ke usko jaanwar se mumtaz karti hae

ye ek fiction hae na hi jaanwar kalam karsakta hae na daleel pesh karsakta hae ye tammam ka tammam Imam ka kalam hae jiske peeche Imam ka koi maqsad hoga, badi Hikmat hogi, jo ke hum tammam Rasael ko tarteeb ke saath Arabi mae ustad ke pas bade ki ijazat se padhe to hum per waaze hosakti hae

guzarish hae ke is mazmun ko mabda maad ke bayanat ya haqaeq se mat connect kijiye na hi shariat ke pehlu usme dhundiye bas behes ka lutf utha'ye aur sabaq aur nasihat lijiye aur Dua kijiye ke hum aur aap is behtreen kitab ko padh sake

mashoor Qol hae ke insaan agar apni shehwat aur khaeshat per khabu rakha to woh farishta hae aur agar shehwat aur duniyavi khaeshaat ke tabe (under) hogaya to jaanwar aur darinde se bat'ter (worse) hae

Insaan aur jaanwar ki behes ka ek aakhri nukta (point) pesh kar raha hun ;

Insaan ke leader na kha ke tum ae jaanwar bahut saqt dil hote ho, bade hi wahshi (savage wild) hote ho tum apne jaise hi jaanwar ka shikar karte ho aur bahut hi dardnaak tariqe se cheer phad kar uske hadiyun (bones) tod dete ho paet (stomach) cheer kar sab baher nikal kar daal dete ho  aur uska khoon tak pi jate ho tum mae zara bhi rahem nahi

jaanwar ke leader ne kha hum ye jo harkat doosre jaanwar ke saath karte hain woh hum tumhari taleem aur sikhane ki wajeh se karte hain

khadeem zamane mae (long long time back) jab ae insaan tum duniya mae nahi aye the, yane Adam se pehle koi bhi jaanwar doosre jaanwar ka shikar nahi karte tha jo jaanwar qudrati tor per jungle mae marjata (natural death) hum ussi jaanwar ka gosht khate kabhi bhi zinda jaanwar ka shikar nahi karte the

magar kiya kare ab hum majboor hogae hae jab se tum duniya mae aye tum ne bael bakri gae unt gadhe (all cattle donkeys camels) ko pakad liya hae aur qaed (imprisoned them) mae le liya, ab ye jaanwar hum ko jungle mae nahi milte hae hamara to guzara inke murda naash (dead body) se hojata tha ab ye nahi to hum majboor hogae hae hum per مضطر ki shart lagi hae, ab ye baat hamare liye jaes hae ke jis tarah tumhare pas bhi majboori ki halat mae haram khana bhi jaes hojata hae ab hamara bhi wahi haal hae

(mustar مضطر majboori ki halat ke ahkamaat ki tafseel Daem ul Islam aur shariat ki doosri kitabaun mae moujud hae)

tum jo kehte ho ke hum doosre jaanwar ko cheerphad karte hain (cruel manner) tum bhi to gae bakri ke saath waisa hi karte ho, tokde tokde kardete ho balkeh tum to badi be rahami se uske gosht ko aag per talte ho bhunte ho pakate (cook) ho hum to aag (fire) uske khreeb bhi nahi lejate

balkeh tum to shikari janwaar bhi rakhte ho (trained hunting dogs and birds) jo tumhare liye doosre jaanwar ka shikar karte hae aur tum ko khilate hain

tum hamari har chez se faida uthate ho aur humko tum se koi faida nahi, hamari khal (hides leather skin hair) hadi gosht sing dant (horns ivory etc) tum faida uthare ho aur tum itne kanjoos ho ke tumhare murda ko mitti mae dafan kardete ho humko khane tak nahi dete

tum humko darinde aur wahshi (wild cruel savage) kehte ho sachai to ye hae ke tum wahshi ho, tumhari paas saalaun tak jung chalti hae hazaraun log bila wajeh ma're jate hain unko dardnaak tariqe se qatal karte hae, muqtalif saza dekar tadpa kar (torture) marte ho, Adam se leker aaj tak hazaraun ladai huvi aur be hisaab log mare'gae

Phir jaanwar ne kha aur ek baat hae tum insaanaun mae jo abid zahed parhezgaar log hote hae woh sheher basti (human habitat) chodkar jungle aur pahadaun (mountains) mae jakar baste (settle) hae jahan jaanwar rahte hain aur woh jaanwar se unsat rakhte hae aur jaanwar bhi unko nahi satate

ab batao ke agar jaanwar insaan se behter nahi hote to tumhare Abid Zahed Mutaqi Parhezgaar log sheher ki logoan ki sohbat chodkar hum jaanwar ke pas aakar kiyu baste (settle) hote

jo acha hota woh achaun ke pas hi jata hae aur jo bura hota hae woh bure ke khreeb rahna pasand karta hae

insaan khamosh hogae koi jawab na tha

aage behes bahut lambi hae magar mae apna bayan yahan khatam karta hun

Risale ke aakhir mae jinnaat ke Badshah ne tammam insaan aur jaanwar ki hujjat sunne ke baad ye faisla farmaya ke jaanwar insaanaun ke tabe (under) hain aur unko insaan ke farma bardaar (obedient) rahna hae

hamare pas deen mae is Kitab mae aur shariat ki doosri kitabaun mae jaanwar ke saath kaisa sulook karna chahye uska tafseel se bayan hae aur mae bhi pehle likh chuka hun jaise jaanwar ke mu per kabhi bhi nahi maarna unki peeth per bahut ziyada wazan nahi dalna, safar mae raaste mae ruke to pehle jaanwar ke chare (grass fodder) aur pani ka intezam kare, raaste mae ghoda ya doosre jaanwar per sawaar hokar lambi baat nahi kare uski peeth se utarjae

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke is baat per amal kare

🌸🌺🌸🌺🌸🌺🌸🌺
8/4/16, 1:12:12 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

جمعة مباركة 🌹
 
*Rasulullah* Salallahu Alehe wa sallam ka Qol e mubarak hae

أن ربي أمرني أن يكون نطقي ذكرا، وصمتي فكرا، ونظري عبرة.

_Mere Rabb ne mujhe hukum diya hae ke mera kalaam karna sirf Allah ke zikar aur yaad hi mae ho, meri khamoshi sirf Allah ki fikar mae ho (Allah taala ki khilkhat mae qor aur fikar karne mae) aur meri nazar ibrat wali ho yane duniya ke halaat ko dekhkar sabaq lene wali ho_

*Imam e Jaffar e Sadiq* farmate hain ke khamoshi, mohaqeqeen yane jo duniya aur aakherat ke maamlaat ko achi tarah gehrai se samajh chuke hain unki aadat aur tariqa hojati hae (becomes the habit of those who knows the realities of this life & life after death)

من صمت نجا

_Jo khamoosh raha woh najat paya_

khamoshi mein Allah taala ki khushnudi aur razamandi hae, aur khamoshi se insaan ke hisaab mae kami hoti hae aur qata aur laqzish (errors & mistakes) se uski hifazat hae

من سره أن يسلم فيلزم الصمت

_Jo salaamti chahta hae usko chahye khamoshi ikhteyaar kare_

Allah taala ne khamoshi ko jahel (ignorant) ke liye purdah banaya jab tak woh khamosh hae, aur ek aalim ke liye wohi khamoshi zeenat dene wali chez banjati hae (silence is a veil for the ignorant & adornment for man of knowledge) jab tak jahel apna mu bandh rakhta hae uski jahalat nahi malum hoti

 Hadees e shareef  hae ;

ومن كثر كلامه كثر سقطه ،ومن كثر سقطه كثرت ذنوبه ،ومن كثرت ذنوبه كانت النار أولي بها

_Jiski baatain ziyada hogi uski ghaltiyaan bhi ziyada hogi, jiske ghaltiyaan ziyada honge uske gunaah bhi ziyada honge aur jiske gunaah ziyada honge, jahannam uske liye ziyada munasib jagah hae_

Aur Moulana *Ali ibne Abi Talib* farmate hain ;

تلافيك ما فرط في صمتك أيسر من ادراكك ما فات من منطقك  
 
_tumhari khamoshi mae jo kami rahgai hae us kami ki bharpai karna usko dur karna bahut asaani hae us baat se ke se apne kalaam mae jo chod diye ho usko pura karna ya jo ziyadati huvi hae usko durust karna_

aur farmaya

صمتك حتئ تستنطق أجمل من نطقك حتى تسكت

_tumhari woh khamoshi jiske baad tum se baat karne ki khaesh ki jae woh bahut behter hae us kalaam se jiske baad tumko khamosh kardiya jae_
 
Aur khamoshi se insaan nafsani khaeshat se bach sakta hae apne nafs ki achi tarbiyat karsakta hae, khamoshi hi se ibadat mae lutf (enjoyment) hae,

*Moulana Ali* ka qol hae ;

أفضل العبادة الصمت

_Khamoshi hi sab se behter ibadat hae_

khamoshi dil ki sakhti ko dur karti hae, aur khamoshi hi se aqlaq ki bulundi aur Nafs ki paki hae

الصمت يكسبك الوقار

_Tumhari khamoshi wiqar (dignity) ko le aati hae tumko ba wiqar banati hae_

Tum apne zabaan ke darwaze ko bandh hi rakho, jab tak ke tum ko kalaam karne ke siwae koi aur chara na rahe (no way out) khusasan jab tum tumhare kalaam ka koi ahel na pau (until you dont find a person worthy of talking to) siwae yeh ke tumhara kalaam Allah ke liye ho ya Allah ke baare0 mae ho

Ek sahebi e Rasool hamesha apne saath ek takhti (slate) rakhte aur phir har woh baat jo unhune kha usko likh lete aur raat mae us kalaam ko jo unhune din bhar mae kha usper qor wa fikar karte ke kiya sahi kiya ghalat kha aur ainda ke liye sabaq lete aur ahtiyat karte.

Baaz (few) Sahaba e Rasulullah, apne mu (mouth) mae pather (pebbles) rakh lete aur jab kalaam karne ka irada karte to pehle qor karte kiya hum jo kehne ja rahe hain woh Allah ke haq mae sahi hae ya nahi aur agar woh baat lillah fillah hoti to phir mu se pather nikalte aur kalaam karte

Insaan ka najat pana aur insaan ka halaak hona kalaam karne aur na karne  per hi munahasir hae kiya hi behter kamiyabi us insaan ke liye hae jisko is baat ki marefat hae ke kab kalaam karna hae aur kab khamosh rahna hae aur khamoshi mae kiya faide hae

Khamoshi Ambia ke aqlaq mein se hae aur jisne  kalaam ki qadar jana aur khamoshi ko tarjeeh di (preferences diya) aur uske khazane se faida uthaya usne itmenaan hasil kiya (People destruction & salvation lies in speech & silence, good fortune belongs to those who has knowledge of what is correct & what is incorrect in speech & the science of silence & its advantages and benifits)

Insaan ka kalaam karna aur khamosh rahna dono bhi ibadat ka darja hasil karleta hae jab woh in tammam baataun ka lihas kare khyal kare

قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم؛

واملاء الخير، خير من السكوت، والسكوت خير من إملاء الشر

_Khair ke baataun mae taawun (support) karna mashora dene khamoshi se behter hae aur khamoshi bure (Khraab) kaamaun mae mashora dene se behter hae_

♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢♢
8/6/16, 2:32:49 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌿🍂🍃🍁🌿🍂🍃🍁

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Hamare paas deen mae panch waqt ki 51 rakat Namaz Faraez wa Sunnat ki muqrar hain uske alawa bhi bahut si namazain tatawaat ki bhi hae jo maqsus maqsad ke liye ya generally _Rozi Sahet Ilm ke liye ya Humm wa Ghum waqera_ ko dur karne ke liye padhi jati hain

bahut si tatawaat Namaz hamare Sahife mae maujud hain, ye namazain namaz ke auqaat (timings) mae insaan roz bhi padh sakta hae

hamare paas Hindustan mae aksar ye namazain Shehrullah mae padhte hain magar hamare Arab bhai har Jumeraat ko teen namazain *تهجد tahajud, تسبيحه العاظم  tasbeeh Azam تسبيحه الكفاية tasbeeh ul kifaya* aur Ramazan ul mubarak mae roz hi teeno padhte hain

tammam tatawaat ke namazaun mae sab se mubarak Aala wa Afzal namaz woh Tasbeeh Ul Azam ki namaz hae

*ye mubarak tareen Namaz hum momineen tak kaise ayi aur kis ki batai huvi hae ?*

Riwayat ye hae ke ye mubarak namaz *Rasulullah Salallahu Alehe wa sallam ne Janab e Jafar ibne Moulana Abi Talib* ko Hadiya di thi jab aap *Habash* yane *Ethiopia* se wapas aye the aur Rasulullah se *Khybar* mae mulaqat huvi thi us waqt *Rasulullah Moulana Ali ibne Abi Talib* ke haath per khybar fatah kiye the (had won the war at khyber against the Jews)

Rasulullah ne *Janab Jafar* se milkar is qadar khush huve ke farmaya ke mujhe samajh mae nahi aaraha hae ke mae kis baat per ziyada khush hun *Jafar* ke wapasi per ya *Khybar* ke fatah hone per

aur wohi moqa tha jo Rasulullah ne Jafar bin Abi Talib ko *تسبيحه الأعظم* namaz hadiya diye aur aaj ye namaz saare aalam ke tammam musalman (all sects) padhte hain

Ab jo Shaqs ko itni mubarak namaz Rasulullah ne hadiya diya hae uska martaba aur muqam kiya hoga

*Janab Jafar ibne Abi Talib* jo aam tor se *Jafar e Tayyar* se mashoor hain unki seerat e mubarak (biography) bayan karna maqsad hae jinki khidmat itni azeem hae ke Rasulullah ne aapko Tasbeeh ul Azam namaz hadiya di aur aapke mulaqat ki khushi ko Khyber ki jung ki fateh ke barabar khyal kiya aur aapki shahadat per aisi baat kahi ke aap *Jafar e Tayyar* se mashoor huve (the flying Jafar)

inshallah in tammam baataun ki tafzilaat ainda..................

🍁🍃🍂🌿🍁🍃🍂🌿
8/9/16, 1:53:52 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🕌🕌🕌🕌2⃣🕌🕌🕌🕌

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Zikar e mubarak huva tha *Syedna wa Moulana Jafar ibne Abi Talib* ka jo mashoor hae *Jafar e Tayyar* ke laqab se

aap bahut si khususiyat ka hamil the

1) _Aap jab shahadat pae aur aapke dono haath kat gae the us waqt Nabi Kareem ne aapko khawab mae dekha tha ke aap jannat mae do haath ki jagah do par (wings) se udh (fly) rahe hain issi wajeh se aapko *ذوالجناحين* do par wale kha gaya aur *tayyar* (the flyer) aapka laqab huva_

2) _Aapko *تسبيح الاعظم* jaisi mubarak namaz hadiya di gai thi_

3) _Rasulullah ne farmaye tha keh aap ne do Hijrat farmai ek Mecca se Habsha (Ethopia) aur doosri Habsha se Medine Munawara_

4) _Aap jab habsha se wapas aye aur Rasulullah se Khayber mae mulaqat ki to us waqt Rasulullah, Ali ke haath per khaybar fatah karchuke the aap ne farmaya tha mujhe samajh mae nahi aaraha ke fateh khaybar per khush hun ke Jafar ke Habsha se wapas aane per ziyada khush hun_

*Syedna Jafar bin Abi Talib* ki seerat e mubarak ye hae ke aap Moulana Abi Talib ke teesre farzand the aap se bade janab e Talib aur Janab e Aqeel the aur Moulana Ali ibne Abi Talib aap se chote the

sab bhaiyun mae dus dus saal ka farq tha yane Moulana Ali ibne Abi Talib aap se dus saal chote the aur doosre do bhai dus dus saal bade aur aap Rasulullah se 20 saal chote the

Rasulullah ko janab Abi Talib ne bada kiya is lihaz se janab e Jafar ka bachpan Rasulullah ke saath guzra aur is lihaz se aapki tarbiyat mae Rasulullah ka bhi haath tha

Janab e Abi Talib bahut tang haal the isiliye Rasulullah ne aapse Moulana Ali ko le liye aur aapke bhai Janab e Abbas ibne Abdul mutalib ne Janab Jafar ko apne pas parwarish wa tarbiyat ke liye rakha takeh Abi Talib ka bojh kam ho

Ek waqt janab e Abi Talib jo *Sheikh e Batha* se mashoor the apne farzand moulana Ali ko Mecce mae talaash kar rahe the us waqt janab e Jafar bhi saath the aap ne dekha ke Rasulullah aur Moulana Ali Namaz padh rahe hain aur Ali, Mohammed e Mustafa ke seedhe bazu khede hain Us waqt Moulana Abi Talib ne Jafar se kaha ke tum baye janib (left side) per khede raho aur apne moula Mohammed ka saath do aur ye ke "parinda do par se udta hae"

jab Quraesh e Mecca ka zulum bani Hashim aur musalmaanu per bahut ziyada hogaya us waqt Rasulullah ne chand musalmanu ko hidayat ki ke tum log Mecca se Habsha (Ethiopia) migrate kar jao jahan ka Esai (christian) badshah *Najashi (Negus)* ek adal pasand badshah (just king) tha aur woh tum ko sahara zaroor dega aur huva bhi aisa hi

jab Quraeshiyun ka zulum bahut ziyada hogaya to Rasulullah ne phir Janab e Jafar ki sardari mae 80 logoan ka doosra khafila Habsha rawana kiya

janab e Jafar aur aapki ahliya Asma binte Umays aur 80 log taqreeben 12 saal     
 Ethiopia mae Badshah Najashi ki sultanate mae bahut sukun wa itmenaan ke saath rahe, aapki teen aulad bhi wahan paida huvi Janab e Abdullah, Mohammed wa Aun aur Janab e Abdullah ibne Jafar ki baad mae Janab Zainab binte Moulana Ali ibne Abi Talib se shaadi huvi thi  

inshallah aapki Islam ke liye khidmat, badshah *Najashi* ke darbar ka ahwaal aur wapasi per Rasulullah ke hukum per *jung e Mauta* mae shirkat karne ka zikar ainda.........

🕌🕌🕌🕌2⃣🕌🕌🕌🕌
8/11/16, 12:44:59 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍁🍃🍁🍃🍁🍃🍁🍃
 
السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
جمعة مباركة

Zikar ho raha tha *Syedna wa Moulana Jafar ibne Abi Talib ka jo maruf hae Jafar e Tayyar* ke laqab se

janab Jafar e Tayar Mecce mukarama se Ethiopia *khuraish* (tribe in Mecca) ke mazalim se bachne ke liye Rasulullah ke hukum se Hijrat farmaye (migrated) aapke saath taqreeben 80 musalmaan afraad the

*Habash (Ethiopia) ka badshah Najashi (Negus)* bahut insaaf pasand badshah the jisne in tammam mohajereen ka isteqbaal kiya aur apne mulk mae izzat wa karamat ke saath rahne diya aur mazhab e Islam per chalne per bhi koi pabandi nahi lagaya

Syedna Jafar aur aapke saathi bahut sukoon wa itmenaan se rah rahe the magar Mecce ke khuraish ne unko wapas lane ki thaan li takeh unper zulm karsake aur Islam se hata de aur Islam ne phelne pae  

issi maqsad se unhune 2 logoan ko Najashi ke pass bheja ke jakar Najashi se shikayat kare ke ye log hamare babdada (forefathers) ke khuda ko chodkar doosre khuda ki ibadat kar rahe hain aur ye ke un logoan ko hamare hawale kardo

do log Amar bin Aas aur Amara bin al waleed Najashi ke Darbar mae aye aur sabse pehle to bahut khimti tohfe pesh kiye aur phir Badshah se khaesh kiye ke Jafar aur unke tammam saathiyun ko hamare hawale kardo

Badshah ne kha ke mae kaise un logoan ko tumhare hawale karsakta hun jab ke woh mere mulk mae panah (asylum) liye hain aur unse mujhe koi takleef nahi mae pehle tahqeeq karunga ke tum jo kehte ho woh baat sahi hae ya nahi

Najashi ne Moulana Jafar aur unke saathiyun ko darbar mae bula bheja

jab Moulana Jafar darbar mae tashreef laye to to doosre logoan ke jaisa aap badshah ko sajdah tazeemi  (bowed down) nahi kiya us waqt badshah naraz hote huve kha ke tum ne mujhe sajdah kiyu nahi kiya

us waqt Amar bin Aas ne kaha _"dekha ae badshah ye log to aap ke deen ke bhi khilaaf hain"_ magar badshah bahut adal wa insaaf pasand tha badshah ne unko khamosh rahne ke liye kaha aur Janab e Jafar ko kehne ke liye kaha

janab e Jafar ne kaha ke hum siwae  الله وحده لاشريك له  Allah Wahdahu la shareek e laho ke kisi ke aage sajdah nahi karte

phir Janab e Jafar ne ek aisi zabardast taqreer farmai aisi hujjat pesh ki jo tammam aalam mae mashoor tareen taqreer difae Islam (to safe guard Islam) mae gini jati hae

issi taqreer ke chand jumle pesh karte huve mae apne is mazmun ko khatam karta hun

Aap ne farmaya;

ae Badshah hum jahel log the, hum butaun ki puja karte the (idol worshippers) the, hum murdaar jaanwar khate the, hum ko rishtedarun aur padosi ke huqooq ka koi ilm nahi tha, hum sirf jismani taqat ko hi sab kuch samajhte the, logoan per zulm karte, yateem ka maal khate aurataun zaleel karte unki izzat se khelte phir Allah taala ne hamare hi darmiyaan mae se uske ek *Rasul* ko hamare paas bheja hum uske aba wa ajdaad (forefathers) ko jante hain aur yaqeen hae ke woh sach keh raha hae, woh sadiq wa ameen hae

usne humko Allah taala ki panch waqt ibadat ka hukum diya, khair khairaat ki taraf raqbat dilai, sachai aur amanat dari ki taleem di, yateem ke maal ki hifazat farmai aurat ki izzat wa hurmat ko badhaya......

is tarah aap ne Islam ke be hisaab khubiyaan bayan farmaya jo islamic history ki kitabaun mae darj (included) hae

Inshallah taqreer ke baad ka zikar ainda, ke Badshah Najashi kis tarah taqreer se mutasir huva aur kiya hukum kiya.........

🍃🍁🍃🍁🍃🍁🍃🍁
8/13/16, 12:43:08 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌾🌱🌾🌱🌾🌱🌾🌱

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Zikar huva tha *Janab e Jafar e Tayyar* ka *Habash ke badshah Najashi* ke Darbar mae

jab Syedna Jafar ne Mecca mukarama mae *Mohammed er Rasulullah* ke mabus hone ka zikar kiya aur unki layi huvi islamic taleemaat ka taskere kiya to badshah bahut mutasir huva aur us waqt Badshah ne aapse farmaya jo Koran tumhare Rasul per Allah ne nazil kiya hae usme se kuch padhkar sunao

janab e Jafar ne *Surah Maryam* tilawat karna shru kiya waise waise Badshah Najashi per ajeeb kaifiyat tari hona shru huvi aur aankh se aansu jari hone lage uske dono gaal aansuan se ter the aur uske tammam doosre darbari aur padri (priest) bhi rone mae a'gae

Us waqt Najashi ne khuraish ke jo do log shikayat le ae the unse khitab kiya aur naraz hote huve kaha ke mae kisi bhi halat mae Jafar aur unke saathiyun ko tumhare hawale nahi karunga aur tum log darbar se ja sakte ho aur badshah ne woh tammam khimti tohfe bhi wapas de diya ye kehte huve ke mae rishwat nahi qabool karta

Najashi ne Janab e Jafar se kha ke tum sab jitna waqt bhi chahte ho mere mulk mae aram se rah sakte hain balkeh tumhare Rasul ko bhi mae khush amadeed kehta hun (he is welcome) aur ye ke mera ek chota sawal hae ke tum musalmaan apas mae milte ho to kaise wish karte ho

us waqt Syedna Jafar ne bataya ke hum
السلام علیکم

kehte hae aur saamne wala uske badle وعليكم السلام kehta hae

aur san (year) 6 Hijri mae Rasulullah ne *Dawat e Islam* khreeb ke tammam mumalik  (countries) ke badshahun per khat likh kar pesh kiya

*Amar bin umaya al Dhimry* ke saath Rasulullah ne Najashi ko khat bheja aur Islam ki Dawat di

khat mae likha tha ke ye  khat hae Allah ke Rasul *Mohammed* ki taraf se *Habash ke badshah Najashi* ki janib

uske baad Allah ki Hamd wa sana farmaya tha

phir likha tha ke Essa woh Roohullah hae Allah ke sache Nabi the aur bibi Maryam woh pak thi aur ye ke Allah ne Essa ko apni khudrat se paida kiya tha jis tarah se Allah ne Adam ko paida farmaya tha

aur ye ke mae ab tum ko Allah Tabaraka wa Taala ki taraf Dawat de raha hun, mae ne tumko Haq ka raasta batadiya hae aur tum meri rae qabool karo

islami wafad (delegation) ke saath darbar mae Syedna Jafar bhi moujud the aur aap ne pehle hi badshah ke dil mae Islam ki mohabbat paida karchuke the

kehte hae ke Najashi pehle apne takht e shahi (throne) se utra aur zameen per aakar baith gaya aur khat padha aankhaun se lagaya aur phir hukum diya ke ek haathi dant (ivory) ka daba laya jae aur phir usne woh mubarak khat usme rakha is aur farmaya ke _"jab tak ye khat Habsha ke logoan mae hifazat se rahega Habsha khush haal rahega"_ tarah woh Islam qabool kiya

woh islami delegation ne aur ek khat bhi saath laye the aur woh doosre khat mae Rasulullah ne khaesh zaher ki thi ke Jafar aur unke saathiyun ko wapas apne watan jane ke ijazat de

Najashi ne na sirf unko jane ki ijazat di balkeh unke liye sailing boats ka intezam kiya aur saath mae apne kuch logoan ko unko chodne bhi bheja aur unke saath Rasulullah ke liye hadiye bhi bheja

is tarah Syedna Jafar e Tayyar aur aapke saathi 8 saal baad apne watan 6 hijri mae wapas aye

inshallah jung e Mauta aur aapki shahadat ka zikar ainda......

🌱🌾🌱🌾🌱🌾🌱🌾🌱
8/15/16, 7:00:36 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ⚫⚪⚫⚪⚫⚪⚫⚪⚫

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته

بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Aaj hamare mulk ki youm e azadi hae aur tammam janib khushiyaan manayi ja rahi hae aur azadi ki jung mae shaheed hone walaun ko yaad kiya ja raha hae jinki be'daulat humko azadi mili

jis tarah hum hamare azadi ke shaheedaun ko yaad karte hae ussi tarah hamara farz hae ke hum woh *Shaheedane raah e Haq* ko bhi hamesha yaad kare jinki qurbani aur koshishaun se hum tak *Deen e Islam* pohuncha aur duniya wa aakherat ki naaematain humko hasil huvi aur ainda bhi hoti rahegi

zikar ho raha tha us azeem insaan ka jinhune na sirf apni zindagi Islam ke baqa ke liye waqf ki balkeh apni jaan bhi raah e Haq mae de di

Rasulullah ki Hijrat e Medina ke baad mukhtalif Islami jungain huvi _Jung e Badr, Jung e Ohad, Jung e Ahzaab aur jung e Fateh Khayber,_

*fateh khaybar aur Sulah Hudaibiya* ke baad (agreement between khuraish of Mecca & Rasulullah at Hudaibia) Rasulullah ko itmenaan huva to aap ne Dawat Islam ki tableeq shru ki aur khreeb ke bahut se mumalik ke badshahun ko *Dawat e Islam* ke liye khat likhe jinme *Khaizar e Rome, Iran ka badshah Kisra, Muquqas Miser (Egypt), Najashi e Habsha* in tammam khutoot (letters) per aap ne apni mohar (seal) lagayi jo aap chandi ki banae the aur jis per likha tha

*محمد الرسول الله*   
!
Rasulullah ne ek khat (letter) Shyam (Syria) ke ruler *Sharjil bin Amar* ko janab *Haris bin Ameer حارث بن عمير* ke saath bheja tha magar woh logoan ne Rasulallah ke khasid messenger ko hi khatal kardiya

Rasulullah ne Janab e Haris حارث ka inteqam lene ke liye jung ka irada kiya aur 3000 hazar ki fauj tayar ki aur uska command aap ne sab se pehle زيد بن حارثه Zayed bin Haresa ko diya aur uske baad   جعفر طيار Jafar e Tayar ko saumpa aur agar woh bhi shaheed hojain to عبدالله بن رواحه Janab e Abdullah bin Rawaha ko muqrar farmaya aur agar teeno shaheed hojain to phir musalmanu ko chahye ke apna leader apas mae rae aur mashora karke chun le

ye jung e *Mautah* ke naam se mashoor huvi kiyunke ye mautah ke muqam per ladi gai is Jung mae musalmaan fauj ki tadad 3000 thi jab ke muqalefeen ki ek lakh thi jisme bahut badi fauj Roman Emperor ki thi aur Emperor ka bhai *Tyodor* khud command kar raha tha

Islami fauj ne bahut himmat se josh se muqabela kiya janab *Zaid bin Haresa* bahut hi bahaduri se muqabela karte huve bahut jald shaheed hogae phir *Janab e Jafar ibne Abi Talib* ne command sambhala aur bahut hi bahaduri se Jung shru kardi logoan ko josh dilate aur farmaya _" kitni khubsurat wa haseen nazar aati hi jannat jab woh hum se khreeb hoti hae"_

jung ki tafseelat bahut taweel hae jo ke Islami tariq (history) ki kitabaun mae darj hae *Hazrat Moulana Ziaali saheb muqaddus* ne bhi moharrum ke majalis mae 10 Islami jungaun ka tafseeli ahwaal bayan kiya hae, is Jung ki ek khaas baat ye thi ke janab e Jafar e Tayyar ne apne ghode se neeche utar gae the aur apne ghode ke paer kaat diye aur paidal jung kiye ye baat aap ne is baat ko zaher karne ke liye farmaya tha ke mae jung ke maidan se bhagne wala nahi hun aur shaheed hone se ghabrata nahi ye pehla moqa tha ke ye baat Islami jung mae huvi jo bahaduri ki bahut badi misal hae

aap bahut bahaduri se Jung kiye aur kai dushman ko khatal kiya magar jung mae aapka seedha haath kat gaya aap baye haath se talwaar uthae ladhte hi rahe is tarah aap ladhte huve bahut logoan ko khatal kiya magar aakhir ye naubat ayi ke aapka baya haath bhi zalimaun ne kaat diya aakhir aap apne be hisaab zakhmaun ki taab na la'sake aur ussi halat mae aap ne 41 saal ki umar mae inteqal kiya

aapke baad *Abdullah bin Rawaha* bhi bahut hi bahaduri se ladai ki aur shaheed huve uske baad logoan ne *khalid bin walid* ko leader chun liya magar khalid bin walid ne ye faisla liya ke jung chodkar wapas hojain

is tarah musalmaan jung ke maidaan se wapas huva, kaha jata hae ke Rasulullah ne bhi is faisle se khush nahi huve aur musalmaan auratain apne shohar aur bachaun ko tana dete ke tum jung mae shaheed hojate to woh hamare liye ziyada khushi aur fakher ki baat hoti aur aksar ne apne ghar mae unhe aane nahi diya

Janab e Jafar ke bahaduri ke qisse bahut mashoor huve Rasulullah ne bhi khawab mae dekha ke janab e Jafar ke do haath ki jagah Allah taala ne do per (wings) ata farmaya issi liye aapko *Zul Janahain* kehte hain yane do per wale aur aapka laqab *Tayyar* hogaya

Rasulullah ne Janab Jafar ki aulad ko teen din tak apne makan mae rakha aur be inteha mohabbat aur shafaqat se pesh aye

Rasulullah ke hukum se teeno shaheedane e jung  *Zaid bin Haresa janab e Jafar e Tayar aur janab e Abdullah bin Rawaha* ko ek hi khabar mae dafan kiya gaya

Aapka Mazar e mubarak *Al Kerak Jordan* mae hae

Hamare paas batini haisiyat se Janab e *Jafar ibne abi Talib* aur Rasulallah ke chacha *Janab e Humza* jo Ohad ki jung mae Shaheed huve dono ka martaba bahut buzrug aur aala hae, Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum sahi marefat hasil kare

hum duniya ki siyasat aur jungaun ka padhte hain humko chahye ke Islami  jungaun ka bhi mutalae (study) kare jisme sirf jungaun ka ahwaal hi nahi balkeh hamare liye bade bade aqlaqi sabaq maujud hae

⚫⚪⚫⚪⚫⚪⚫⚪⚫
8/17/16, 12:14:31 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

11 ziqadatul haram 939 Hijri, youm e wafaat hae ek bahut aalim saqi Hadd e azeem ka jinka mubarak naam *Syedi Moulai Al'ajal Badruddin Hasan bin Noah al hindi al Bhrochi* tha

Aap qaleban (probably) Bharuch Gujrat ke rahne wale the aur taleem ke liye Hijrat farmakar Yemen gae the

Aap Yemen mae *Syedna Dai  Mohammed bin Hasan bin Idrees* ke zamane mae sab se bade hudood mae the

Aapko Syedna Dai ne teeno jazeeraun ka pura itlaq diya tha aap apne Ilm aur fazal mae ekta e zamana the, aur uloom e Dawat se puri tarah waqfiyat rakhte the, Syedna Dai ne aapko teeno jazeeraun mae taleem wa tadrees ki puri ijazat ata ki thi

Aap hujjat (debate) mae bahut darak (expertise) rakhte the Syedna Dai ne bahut se kaam aap ke supurd kardiye the, Ahed e shareef lena, taleem ka intezam, mohajereen ka khyal rakhna unko tarteeb dena, Zakat ki wasuli aur uski taqseem karna

Syedna Dai ne apne Khalifa *Syedna Ali bin Jafar bin Hasan* ka aapko maazid (madagaar) muqrar kiya,

Syedi Hasan bin Noah ki khaas baat yeh thi ke aap bahut bade tajir (trader) the, aur bahut hi maaldar the, unke karobar ke bahut se mulkaun mae branches the Hindustan mae bahut se shaher mae dukan thi aur bahut se khadeem port city's mae bhi branch the, *Mecce Mauzama, Egypt aur Baet ul Muqaddas* mae aapka business tha

Itni daulat ke baujud aap bahut hi narm dil, momineen per meherbani karne wale, aur tabiyat mae zara bhi quroor wa takabur na tha, aap Dawat ke aur momineen ke bhlai ke liye be hisaab daulat kharj karte the

Ek waqt *Zaidi firqe* (sub sect of Shias) ke *Imam Shamsuddin* ne *Syedna Dai Mohammed Husain* ko ek dhamki bhra khat (threatening letter) bete ka saath bheja, likha tha ke tum mujhe Imam aur badshah tasleem karlo aur meri taat karlo aur inkar karne per mae tum se jung karunga  

Syedna Dai ke halaat bahut khrab the us waqt aapke bahut se Hudood aur momineen kisi epidemic mae inteqal kar gae the aur jung karne ki bilkul taqat na thi, aap ne mashore ke liye hudood e Dawat ko bulaya, sab ne kaha, hum uske hukum ko manne ke badle jung karke izzat ki maut ko tarjih (preferences) dete hain, faisla aapka hae.

Us waqt moulai *Al'ajal Badruddin Hasan bin Noah* ne garaj kar kha ke _"Ae Syedna aap dushman ke safeer (badshah ke bete) se saaf keh dijiye ke jitna woh aage aye hae hum usko kuch nahi kehta hae, magar ab agar aur agae badhega to hum uski umeedaun ko puri nahi hone Daenga, agar woh apni bandook (guns) mae lohe ke goliyaan dalenge to hum usko jawab sone aur chandi ki goliyaun se dainge_ aur phir aap ne apne Arab bhaiyun ko khitab karke kha, _ke tum ko jung ke liye jitna bhi maal aur daulat chahye mujh se le lo, logoan ko fauj mae bharti karo aur jitna hathyaar chahye khreedo_

Moulai Hasan ki ye baat jab badshah ke qasid (bete) ne suna to to usko yaqeen hogaya ke aisa jaan nisar pur khloos saathiyun ke hote huve unse ladna asaan na hoga aur usne apna irada badal diya

Moulai Hasan ki teen betiyaan bhi thi unme do to bahut hi alema fazela aur bahut aala darje per qaem thi  

Syedi Hasan bin Noah ne ek kitab bhi taleef ki hae jo ziyada tar hujjataun per hae, jiska naam *كتاب الأزهار* kitab ul azhaar hae aur jiske saat 7 parts hae ye aapke haath ki likhi kitab Hindustan ki Dawat mae moujud hae

Moulai Hasan bin Noah bahut se salahyitaun ke hamil the jitni daulat thi utne hi saqi the, aapne inteqal se pehle apna aksar maal wa daulat Dawat e Hadiya ke liye Waqf kardi thi aur khud ke waris aulad ke liye sirf utna hi choda jis se unki guzar basar hosake

*Syedna Yusuf bin Sulaiman Najmuddin* bhi jab Dai ki Hijrat mae gae to Syedi Hasan bin Noah ko Syedna Dai ne aapka ustad muqrar kiya tha aur baad mae Syedna Yusuf aur Syedi Hasan bin Noah dono Syedna mohammed bin Hussain ke pas istefade karte (padhte the) aap dono ki taleem ka haal ye tha ke Syedna Mohammed ne Syedna Yusuf aur Syedi Hasan ko kitab الأنوار اللطيفه  "Al Anwaar ul latifa" saat waqt padhai aur aap dono Syedna Dai ke pas subah namaz ke baad se padhne baithte to raat tak padhte hi rahte aur ye silsila taqriban 6 mahine tak chala

Aapke inteqal ka tafzeeli ahwaal *Jamaluddin Saif ul hujjat Syedi Ali bin Qutbuddin* ne apni kitab  *seerat ud Duwaat ul muwahedeen* mae farmaya hae, Syedi Hasan bin Noah ka Yemen mae hi aag ke jalne ke waqae se inteqal huva

Allah taala aapke rooh ko muqaddus kare aur aapke Dawat per aur momineen per kiye gae ahsaanat ka behtreen ajar ata kare

aapki wafat ko taqreeben 500 saal huve aur angrezi hisaab se 486 years huve yane 1530 AD ke waqeat hae

*من أيقن بالخلف جاد بالعطية*

Jo shaqs bhi Allah taala ke pas jaza aur inam ka yaqeen rakhega utna hi saqi hota jaiga yane jis kisi ko bhi aakherat aur usme sawab, jaza, ajar aur inam ka yaqeen hota jaiga woh utna hi is duniya mae khair wa khairaat karega

⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

Syedi  *Jamaluddin Ali bin Qutbuddin "Saif ul Hujjat"* ka bhi youme wafat pehli Ziqadatul haram 1195 hae aapke waqaet bahut hi dilchasp hae mae do saal pehle aap per mazmun likha tha agar koi padhna chahta hae to request bheja mae usko bhej dunga

⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕
8/18/16, 12:03:43 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌹🌿🌹🌿🌹🌿🌹🌿🌹

*السلام علیکم ورحمة الله و بركاته*

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

*جمعة مباركة* 🌹

*Behtreen zindagi ke liye behtreen usul (rules)*

*1) Jhuko to wiqar ke saath jhuko (bow with dignity & respect)*   

*2) jaancho (check) to firaq dili ke saath (to check with open heart, practice leniency)*

*3) Muqabela karo to ahtiyat ke saath karo (confront with precaution)*

*4) Ibadat karo to mohabbat ke saath*

*5) kisi ki baat suno to tawajuh ke saath (listen with concentration)*

*6) Dekho to diljaspi ke saath (look with interest)*

*7) Mansuba banao to farasat ke saath (plan with open mindedness)*

*8) Intezar karo to sabar ke saath.*

*9) Khana khao to aetedal (within reasonable limit)*

*10) Nahao (bath) to pabandi ke saath*

*11) Saans (breath) lo to rawani ki saath*
 
*12) Aram karo to waqfaun  ke saath (reasonable break)*

*13) Ata karo to fayazi ke saath (when you give, give liberally)*

*14) Jiu (live) to hausla mandi ke saath (himmat courage)*

*15) Kharaj karo to samajhdari ke saath (spend thriftly)*

*16) bolo to ikhtesar ke saath (talk briefly & to the point)*

*17) Qor karo to gherai ke saath (think indepth)*

*18) Qidmat karo to aamadgi ke saath (serve with freewill no strings attached)*

*19) Tamanna karo to istehqaq ke saath (Wish when you deserve)*

*20) Aetemad karo yaqeen ke saath (rely with firm belief)*

*21) Safar karo to tez raftari ke saath (travel with swiftness)*

*22) Amal karo to bekhoof ho kar (do it with conviction without fear)*

*23) Bahes karo to daleel ke saath (argue with facts & figures)*

*24) Socho jasbe tameer ke saath (think creatively for something constructive)*

*25) Warjish karo to ba'qaedgi ke saath (exercise with set routine & punctuality)*

*26) kaam karo to khush uslubi ke saath (do things in a proper systematic organised manner)*

*27) Khelo to fursat ke saath (play when you have free time)*

*28) Hanso (laugh) to khyal karte huve hanso (think about the time occasion & the surroundings before laughing*)

*29) Chalo to aetemad ke saath (walk with confidence & dignity)*

*30) Aur padho to intekhab ke saath (make selective reading)*

🍀🌹🍀🌹🍀🌹🍀🌹
8/21/16, 6:36:58 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم  

Insaan ki ajeeb fitrat hae sari zindagi maal aur daulat jama karne ki koshish mae rahta hae aur phir itna jama karleta hae ke usko kai  zindagiyaan (many lives) hasil ho to bhi kharch karna uske liye mumkin nahi aur ye sab woh ye baat jante huve bhi karta hae ke Allah taala uski Rozi ka zameen hae aur phir ye uska dawa bhi hae (he claims) ke woh Allah taala per puri tarah tawakul karta hae

issi zimmen (with regard to the above subject) mae *Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib Salwatullah alahe* ka kiya hi behtreen Qol hae

Aap farmate hain ;

لا تخلفن وراءك شيء من الدنيا فاتخلفه لأحد رجلين، أما رجل عمل فيه بطاعة الله سبحانه فساد بما شقيت به واما رجل عمل فيه بمعية الله سبحانه فكنت عونا له علي المعصية وليس أحد هذين حقيقة أن نواثره علي نفسك

_Tum apne maut per duniya ka maal wa daulat kisi ke liye bhi mat chodo_

_Agar tum apne waris (heirs) ke liye daulat chodte ho to do (2) baatain mumkin hae_

_Pehli baat agar tumhari aulad usko ache kaam khair ke kaam mae kharch kiye to log ye kehenge ke tumhare paas itni daulat thi magar tum ne khud usko kharch nahi kiya, aur Allah taala bhi naraz hoga ke tum ne kanjoosi ki khair ke liye kharch nahi kiya, Allah per tawakul nahi kiya bhrosa nahi kiya aur tum is baat se gunehgaar honge_

_Aur agar tumhari aulad buri huvi to woh bure aur khraab kaam mae kharch karenge aur agar aisa huva to is baat ke bhi gunehgaar tum hi honge kiyunke daulat to tumhari thi tum khud ache kaam mae kharch karsakte the_

{ _Don't leave your worldly possessions behind you when you die, because you either leave them to one of the two persons, a person who uses them in obeying Allah taala and uses the money for good causes, the hard earned money for which you had toiled_

         *Or*

_or your heirs may be bad character a person who uses them for sinful deeds, so in that case you have helped him to sin, none of this two should be preferred over yourself_

The Imam means to says that, don't leave your worldly possessions behind you, when you die, either someone inherits it and uses it for good deeds, in that case you will be judged in the aakherat for sin of keeping your money idle, and not using it yourself for good deeds,

or someone who inherits it and uses it for bad and sinful deeds and in that case you have actually helped that person to do the sin by leaving behind your money  

So in either case you shouldn't leave behind your wealth, spend the money yourself for virtues deeds in your lifetime, and gain the sawab yourself

Allah taala Koran kareem mae irshad farmaya hae ke jab tum inteqal ke khreeb ho to apne maa baap, aulad khrabatdaar (near ones) ke liye *خير الوصية* achi behter wasiyat (will) chodo

Rasulullah ne aur tammam Aulia Allah ne deeni maamle mae hi wasiyat ko ziyada ahmiyat di hae,

wasiyat uske urdu mae maane (meaning) nasihat ke hi hote hae wirsa (will of inheritance) usme marne wale ka sirf 1/3 Haq hota hae baqi shariat ke khanoon ke hisaab se taqseem hota hae

sab se behter wasiyat woh *Namaz* ke liye hae

walid muqaddus *"Hakim e waqt" Moulana Ziaali saheb muqaddus* apne aakhri ayaam (days) mae ye farmate ke *Aaj ke zamane mae ye Dua karo ke Allah taala paisa na de, jahan paisa ziyada aege wahan saath mae sirf aur sirf khrabi aegi, aulad bigad jaegi rishtedarian khatam hote jaegi, deen se duri hoti jaegi, shariat ka ahsaas khatam hota jaega*

 *Allah taala humko daulat bhi de aur uske sahi istemal ki tawfeeq bhi de, nek wa farmabardaar aulad se badhkar insaan ke liye koi daulat nahi aur sab se badhkar to humko Allah per mukamil tawakul karne wala banae*

*ومن يتوكل على الله فهو حسبه*

*Jo koi bhi Allah taala per mukamil tawakul karega Allah taala uske liye kafi hoga*

🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸🌸
8/24/16, 4:33:09 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂


*السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته*

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

Agar hum *Rasulullah* ke baad zaheri Islami hukumat per ghaur karen to malum hoga ke char Khalifa jisko awaam kholofae Rashedeen kehte hain ke baad zaheri islami hukumat *Bani Umaya* ne 132 Hijri tak chalayi aur uske baad *Bani Abbas* ikhtedaar (power) mae aye aur taqreeben 640 Hijri tak unki hukumat rahi magar 290 Hijri ke baad unka zor khatam hogaya tha aur nahi ke barabar rahgaye the

*Bani Umaya* ho ya *Bani Abbas* dono bhi kattar ahle baet ke dushman the aur aulad e Ali yane Haq ke Aimma (Imams) ko sataya aur pareshan kiya karte balkeh nasal e ahle baet ko ko hi khatam karne ke dar (on the verge) per rahte

*Bani Abbas* ke Hakimaun mae se *Mamoon Rasheed* bahut hi mashoor huva aalim tha aur *Moulana Ali* se be inteha mohabbat rakhta tha agarche ke woh Haq ke Aimma ka kattar dushman tha

Mamoon khud bahut zabardast munazera (debate) karne wala tha aur usne apni hukumat ke zamane mae ek munazera muqarrar kiya tha jo Islami tarikh (history) mae Moulana Ali ki haqqaniyat ko sabit karne mae bahut ziyada mashoor huva

Hum ahle Haq ke pas *Ali* ki  *وصايت Wasayat* aur *Ahle baet ki fazilat* mae be'hisaab daleelain maujud hain

Sirf Rasul ki Ahadees hi nahi balkeh ahle marefat ke paas pura ka pura *Quran* Ali ki fazilat mae hae aur Janab e Ali ki wasayat ko sabit karta hae

Ek waqt Mamoon ne apne *Qazi ul Quzaat* (chief justice) *Yahya bin Aksam* ko hukum diya ke woh darbar mae mulk ke 40 sab se bade Uloma aur Faqih ko jama kare

Mamoon Rasheed khud takht e shahi (throne) se neeche utar aya aur uloma ke darmiyaan baith gaya aur khitab karte huve kaha-

Mera mazhab aur aqeeda ye hae ke *Rasulullah* ke baad *Moulana Ali ibne Abi Talib* tammam khulofa se ziyada afzal the aur khilafat ke sab se ziyada mustahaq (deserving) the

Tammam 40 uloma ka jo sardar (leader) tha uska naam *Ishak* tha usne Mamoon se kaha ke jab aap ne sabko bulaya hae aur ye baat pesh ki hae to aap hi ko sab se pehle iski daleel bhi dena hoga

Mamoon ne kaha ke Rasulullah ke mabus hone ke baad sab se behter amal kiya tha ?

Ishak ne kaha Islam lana aur kalema  *لااله الا الله* ka padhna

Mamoon ne kaha ke Islam lane mae sabaaqat (pehel karna) kiya sab se afzal amal nahi ? aur kiya Ali se pehle tumhare nazdeek koi Islam laya tha ?

Ishak ne kaha ke Ali to us waqt bache the Rasulullah to unpar koi amaal e Shariat lagu nahi karsakte the, bache per shariat farz nahi jab tak ke woh aqil wa baliq (adult) na hojae

Aur phir Ishak ne kaha ke *Janab e Abu Bakar* to badi umar ke the unper to shariat ki pabandi farz hosakti thi is lihaaz se woh sab se pehle Islam lane wale gine jaenge

Mamoon ne kaha ke tum  pehle ye batao ke sab se pehle Islam kaun laya, phir hum is kam sini (childhood) ya kamaal e sin (adulthood) hone per bahes karenge

Ishak ne kaha ke beshak sab se pehle *Ali* ne hi Islam laya magar is shart per (with reservation) ke woh kam sin the, bache the

Mamoon ne kaha beshak Ali bache the jab Islam laye, ab hum aage umar (age) ke bare mae baat karenge

Ab tum ye batao ke Ali ne Rasulallah ke Dawat karne per Islam laye tha ya phir unko ilhaam huva tha ?

agar tum ye kahoge ki ilhaam huva tha, ya unper *وحي* wahi huvi thi to phir tum unko Rasulullah se bhi badhaa do'ge, to phir is baat se ye sabit huva ke Rasulullah ne hi Ali per Islam pesh kiya tha

Ab agar Rasulullah ne Islam pesh kiya tha to do baatain hosakti hain- ya to Rasulullah ne Allah taala ke hukum se Dawat Islam di thi, ya phir apne dil se Dawat di thi, ab tum sab ye baat to zaroor jaante ho ke Rasulullah wohi baat kehte the jo *وحي* wahi kehti thi

*وما ينطق عن الهوى*

Rasulullah apni khaesh se kuch bhi nahi kehte the !

Ishak ne kaha ke yaqinan Nabi ne Ali ko Khuda ke hukum se Dawat e Islam di thi

Ab batao ke kiya khuda ke liye jaaez hae ke woh apne Rasul ko aise shakhs ko Dawat dene ka hukum de jinper amaal e takleefiya, yane shariat lagu nahi hoti ?

Ishak ne kaha Allah ki panah hargiz aisi baat nahi hae

Mamoon ne kaha ke phir to ye sabit hogaya ke Nabi ne Ali ko Dawat dekar sab se mumtaz, sab se alag kardiya, warna Allah ne Nabi ko bachaun ko Dawat dene ka hukum diya hota to Nabi aur doosre bachaun ko bhi Dawat e Islam zaroor dete

To is baat se sabit hogaya ke nabi ne Allah ke hukum se Ali ko Dawat e Islam pesh kiya tha, kiyunke Ali ki haisiyat hi alag thi (aap ka exceptional case tha)

Ye sunkar Ishak aur tamaam 40 uloma khamosh the

Ye munazera tarikh ke sab se taweel munazeraun (long debate) mae gina jaata hae, bahut lambi lambi bahes hai Mamoon ne Ali ki fazilat mae be hisaab daleelain di hain aur sab ko khamosh kardiya tha

Munazere ke aakhir mae Mamoon ne Dua maangi thi ke mae walayat e Ali ke zareeyeh ae Allah tujh se taqarub chahta hun

Mamoon ne to sirf chand zaheri *Ali* ki fazilataun aur zaheri baataun ko lekar bahes ki thi, magar hum jo sab se ziyada Ali ko sahi manne wale hae, jo sab se sahi Ali ki marefat rakhte hae, hamare paas Ali ki haqqaniyat ke hazaraun zaheri wa batini daleelain maujud hain

Allah taala humko *Ali ibne Abi Talib* ki sahi marefat ata farmae

🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂🍁🍂
8/25/16, 10:23:56 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
جمعة مباركة

Youm e Jumua Rasulallah per dalalat karta hae

Rasulullah ki shaan badi ajeeb hae Quran e Kareem aapke liye farmata hae

وَمَا أَرْسَلْنَاكَ إِلَّا رَحْمَةً لِّلْعَالَمِينَ

اور (اے محمدﷺ) ہم نے تم کو تمام جہان کے لئے رحمت (بنا کر) بھیجا ہے
yane aap tammam  Aalameen ke liye *Rehmat* banakar nazil kiye gae

*Moulana Qazi un Naumaan bit Mohammed* jo saheb kitab Daem ul Islam hain apni doosri mashoor kitab
 
*الهمة فى آداب اتباع الايمة*

mae Rasulullah se janwaaraun ke mutaliq riwayat farmate hain.

Rasulullah ka Irshad hae ;

mae ne ek aurat ko jannat mae dekha aur woh aurat jannat ki mustahaq isliye huvi thi ke us aurat ka, ek waqt ek kutte (dog) ke paas se guzar huva jo ek kuwe (well) ke pas baitha tha aur piyas (thirst) ke maare zabaan baher nikale tadap raha tha pani hasil nahi karsakta tha

us aurat ko kuwe se pani nikalne aur kutte ko pilane ke liye koi chez nahi mili to usne apne joote (shoes) ko nikalkar usko apne duppatte se baandh diya aur uske zareeyah pani ko kuwe se khench kar nikala aur us piyase kutte ko pilaya, Allah taala ne uski is neki aur hamdardi ki wajeh se usko jannat naseeb kiya

phir aap ne farmaya ke mae ne ek billi (cat) wali aurat ko jahannam mae dekha hae ye aurat ek billi ko baandh rakha tha, na usko khane deti thi aur na hi usko azad karti thi ke woh billi zameen ke kide (insect) kha kar apna paet bharti aakhir woh billi bhuk ki wajeh se margai Allah taala ne us aurat ko uske zulum ki wajeh se usko jahannam mae bhej diya

Allah Tabaraka wa Taala ka Irshad hae ;

*وَأَحْسِن كَمَا أَحْسَنَ اللَّهُ إِلَيْكَ*
 
jis tarah Allah taala ne tum per ahsaan kiya tum bhi doosraun ke saath ahsaan karo

Rasulullah ka Irshad hae ke har jaandaar ko sairaab  (quenching of thirst) mae bahut bada sawaab wa ajar hae

mashoor Qol hae ke agar tum doosraun per Rahem nahi karoge to Allah taala tum per Rahem nahi farmaega

Quran farmata hae

*وَالْأَرْضَ وَضَعَهَا لِلْأَنَامِ*

And the earth has He spread out for all living beings,

is sar zameen per har jaandar ka Haq hae hum insaan ko doosraun ke haq ka hamesha khyal karna chahye

🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸🕸
8/28/16, 1:44:21 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌

 السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Zikar karna maqsud (intention) hamare ek jaleel ul qadar Imam ka jinka naam *Imam Maad ibne Ismail al Moiz le Deenillah Abu Tameem* hae, Abu tameem aapki kuniyat thi

aap hamare Imamat ke silsile ke 14 th Imam hain, wazi e Rasulullah Moulana *Ali ibne Abi Talib* ke baad hamare Aima ka silsila, *Imam e Hussain* se shru hota hae aur aap doosre hafte (7th of the second group of 7 Imams hamare paas har saatwain Imam ki fazilat bahut hoti hae) ke ja'me hae

 *Imam Moulana mohammed bin Ismail* jo hamare pehle hafte ke saatwain Imam the unke chup (hide) jane ke baad teen Imam mastur (hidden) rahe aur phir hamare 11 Imam Moulana *Imam Abdullah al Mehdibillah* zuher kiye (came out of hiding)   

Moulana Maad hamare zahur ke chauthe 4 Imam hain aur aap ne Imamat ke saath zaheri hukumat bhi ki, aapki paedaesh 21 Ramazan ul mubarak 319 Hijri mae huvi aur wafat 46 saal ki umar mae 11 Rabi ul Aakher 365 Hijri mae Cairo Egypt mae huvi

29 Shawal 341 hijri mae aapke walid Moulana *Ismail al Mansoor Billah* ka inteqal huva, taqreeben dedh maah tak aapki wafat ki khabar ko maqfi (secret) rakha gaya tha aur 7 Zilhaja 341 ko logoan ne aap ki bayat ki

aapka bahut hi shaandaar dor (period) raha hae, Moulana Mehdi billah ke zamane se Aima ki hukumat *Maghrib* mae thi (Morraco Algeria Tunisia parts of libya was know as Maghrib) wahan se *Egypt wa Syria* tak aapki hukumat pheli aur *Sicely aur Spain* mae bi aapki hukumat rahi

aap hi ke zamane mae *Qahera (Cairo)* city ki buniyaad padhi aur shaher banaya gaya aur aap hi ke zamane mae *Jamae Azhar Islamic University* qaem huvi jo aaj bhi duniya ki sab se khadeem aur badi islamic university hae

aapke zamane mae hujjat ke azeem martabe mae *Syedna Qazi un Naumaan bin Mohammed* the jo *Qazi ul Qazaat* yane chief justice the aur Imam ke hi hukum per aap ne *kitab Daem ul Islam* likhi jo hamare pas sab se ahem shariat ki kitab hae aap Ilm e Shariat Fiqah Tariq Hujjat seerat mae bahut bulund martaba rakhte the aapke be hisaab tasnifaat hae (authored books)

Imam Moulana Maad ke zamane mae aap ke hudood mae jo sab se bulund martaba rakhte the jo *Baab ul Abwaab* ka darja hae woh *Syedna Jafar bin Mansoor ul Yemen* ka tha  

aap ke zamane mae doosri khaas shaqsiyat woh aapke katib (writer) aapke mautamid (confident) fauj ke commander *Abul Hasan Jowhar e Siqli* jo asal mae ek Roman Gulam the jisko Moulana Maad ne pala (brought up) tha baad mae unke haath per aap ne Egypt fatah kiya tha jinka muqam aur martaba aapke nasdik bahut bulund tha

uske alawa Moulana Maad ke zamane mae aur ek mashoor shaqsiyat *Kafoor* ki thi jo haqeeqat mae ek habshi gulam (black slave) the aur unhune ne 22 saal Egypt per hukumat ki aur aakhri zamane mae unhune  bhi Imam ki dawat qabool kiya tha

Imam maad al Moiz ka Imamat ka zamana taqreeben 25 saal raha aur aap aakhri 3 saal Qahera Moiziye (Cairo) mae guzra

aapka har lihaz se bahut hi shaandaar dor raha aap ne bahut se mumalik ko fatah (conquered) kiya deeni aur ilmi haisiyat se bhi bahut hi numaya dor raha

inshallah aapki seerat mubarak ka zikar, Qahera (Cairo) ki kaisa buniyaad rakhi gai, Moulana Qazi un Naumaan ki azeem khidmaat, Jamae Azhar islamic university ki tafseelat, aur Jowhar e Siqli ki kiya khidmat thi aur imam ke paas unka kiya muqam tha aur issi tarah Kafoor jo ek azad karda habshi Gulam (negro slave) tha uska Imam ke pas kiya muqam tha aur usne jo 22 saal Egypt per behtreen andaz mae hukumat ki, aakhir usko 22 saal ki badshahat kis liye naseeb huvi uske liye hamare Duwaat ne kiya farmaya hae

Inshallah in tammam baataun ka zikar ainda....

🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌
8/28/16, 1:47:23 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌

 السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Zikar karna maqsud (intention) hamare ek jaleel ul qadar Imam ka jinka naam *Imam Maad ibne Ismail al Moiz le Deenillah Abu Tameem* hae, Abu tameem aapki kuniyat thi

aap hamare Imamat ke silsile ke 14 th Imam hain, wazi e Rasulullah Moulana *Ali ibne Abi Talib* ke baad hamare Aima ka silsila, *Imam e Hasan* se shru hota hae aur aap doosre hafte (7th of the second group of 7 Imams hamare paas har saatwain Imam ki fazilat bahut hoti hae) ke ja'me hae

 *Imam Moulana mohammed bin Ismail* jo hamare pehle hafte ke saatwain Imam the unke chup (hide) jane ke baad teen Imam mastur (hidden) rahe aur phir hamare 11 Imam Moulana *Imam Abdullah al Mehdibillah* zuher kiye (came out of hiding)   

Moulana Maad hamare zahur ke chauthe 4 Imam hain aur aap ne Imamat ke saath zaheri hukumat bhi ki, aapki paedaesh 21 Ramazan ul mubarak 319 Hijri mae huvi aur wafat 46 saal ki umar mae 11 Rabi ul Aakher 365 Hijri mae Cairo Egypt mae huvi

29 Shawal 341 hijri mae aapke walid Moulana *Ismail al Mansoor Billah* ka inteqal huva, taqreeben dedh maah tak aapki wafat ki khabar ko maqfi (secret) rakha gaya tha aur 7 Zilhaja 341 ko logoan ne aap ki bayat ki

aapka bahut hi shaandaar dor (period) raha hae, Moulana Mehdi billah ke zamane se Aima ki hukumat *Maghrib* mae thi (Morraco Algeria Tunisia parts of libya was know as Maghrib) wahan se *Egypt wa Syria* tak aapki hukumat pheli aur *Sicely aur Spain* mae bi aapki hukumat rahi

aap hi ke zamane mae *Qahera (Cairo)* city ki buniyaad padhi aur shaher banaya gaya aur aap hi ke zamane mae *Jamae Azhar Islamic University* qaem huvi jo aaj bhi duniya ki sab se khadeem aur badi islamic university hae

aapke zamane mae hujjat ke azeem martabe mae *Syedna Qazi un Naumaan bin Mohammed* the jo *Qazi ul Qazaat* yane chief justice the aur Imam ke hi hukum per aap ne *kitab Daem ul Islam* likhi jo hamare pas sab se ahem shariat ki kitab hae aap Ilm e Shariat Fiqah Tariq Hujjat seerat mae bahut bulund martaba rakhte the aapke be hisaab tasnifaat hae (authored books)

Imam Moulana Maad ke zamane mae aap ke hudood mae jo sab se bulund martaba rakhte the jo *Baab ul Abwaab* ka darja hae woh *Syedna Jafar bin Mansoor ul Yemen* ka tha  

aap ke zamane mae doosri khaas shaqsiyat woh aapke katib (writer) aapke mautamid (confident) fauj ke commander *Abul Hasan Jowhar e Siqli* jo asal mae ek Roman Gulam the jisko Moulana Maad ne pala (brought up) tha baad mae unke haath per aap ne Egypt fatah kiya tha jinka muqam aur martaba aapke nasdik bahut bulund tha

uske alawa Moulana Maad ke zamane mae aur ek mashoor shaqsiyat *Kafoor* ki thi jo haqeeqat mae ek habshi gulam (black slave) the aur unhune ne 22 saal Egypt per hukumat ki aur aakhri zamane mae unhune  bhi Imam ki dawat qabool kiya tha

Imam maad al Moiz ka Imamat ka zamana taqreeben 25 saal raha aur aap aakhri 3 saal Qahera Moiziye (Cairo) mae guzra

aapka har lihaz se bahut hi shaandaar dor raha aap ne bahut se mumalik ko fatah (conquered) kiya deeni aur ilmi haisiyat se bhi bahut hi numaya dor raha

inshallah aapki seerat mubarak ka zikar, Qahera (Cairo) ki kaisa buniyaad rakhi gai, Moulana Qazi un Naumaan ki azeem khidmaat, Jamae Azhar islamic university ki tafseelat, aur Jowhar e Siqli ki kiya khidmat thi aur imam ke paas unka kiya muqam tha aur issi tarah Kafoor jo ek azad karda habshi Gulam (negro slave) tha uska Imam ke pas kiya muqam tha aur usne jo 22 saal Egypt per behtreen andaz mae hukumat ki, aakhir usko 22 saal ki badshahat kis liye naseeb huvi uske liye hamare Duwaat ne kiya farmaya hae

Inshallah in tammam baataun ka zikar ainda....

🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌🕌
8/28/16, 2:01:50 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: there was a typo error in the first article Imam Hasan name was written as Hussain
8/30/16, 1:24:58 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨

السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

Zikar e mubarak huva tha *Imam Moulana Maad al Moiz Billah* ka

aap ke zikar ke saath zikar huva tha *Kafur* jinka pura naam *Abu al-Misk Kafur* tha

Janab e *Kafur* ek habshi gulam the (black slave) jinko  Ethiopia se Egypt ke Badshah *Mohammed bin tughj* jo *Ikshidid* (the king) kehlate the gulam ki hasiyat se laye the magar unki qabiliyat wa hoshyari ko dekh kar badshah ne apne do farzandaun ka ustad muqrar kiya tha

Kafur ko baad mae Badshah ne apne fauj ka commander muqrar kiya aur woh bahut se jungaun mae hissa bhi liya aur kamiyab bhi huve

*Ikshidid* (the ruling king) ke 335 Hijri mae achanak maut ke baad unke dono farzand kam umar the isliye unke naam per Kafur ne Egypt ki hukumat ko sambhal liya

Kafur ne taqreeben 22 saal Egypt per hukumat ki aur baad mae badshah ke dono bachaun ki jawani mae maut ke baad Kafur khud mukhtar badshah (independent king) muqrar huva aur 357 Hijri mae 22 saal ki hukumat ke baad Janab e Kafur bhi inteqal kiye

Janab e Kafur ne behtreen andaz mae Egypt per hukumat ki aap bahut qabil administrator the, aapke dor mae economy bahut achi hogai, log bahut khush haal the aur aapki taqat ke saamne atraaf ke kisi bhi mulk ne aap per fauji hamle karne ki jurrat nahi ki

aap khud bhi bahut aalim the aur aalimaun ki bahut khadar karte the aap ke darbar mae bade bade uloma jama rahte

Arab ka ek bahut hi mashoor Sha'er *Mutanabbi* bhi aap ke darbar ka ek rukun (member) tha jis ne aap ki tareef mae bahut behtreen ashar kehe hain

Kafur ne us khadeem zamane mae hospital ki buniyaad dala tha aur do bahut hi shaandaar masjid banai thi aur apne dor mae bahut se mahal banae aur uske alawa Kafur ne bahut se baghaat (gardens) lagae jo bahut mashoor huve jinko us zamane mae _kafurriya_ gardens kaha jata

*Ab baat ye hae ke Imam Moulana Maad al Moiz se Kafur ka kiya taluq tha*

Moulana Maad ke zamane mae hi Kafur Egypt ka  badshah th Imam ka khyam *Mansuriya* aur *Mehdiya* mae tha aap Egypt ko fatah karna chahte the, aap ne is maqsad se apne bahut se Duwaat ko Dawat e Imam us zaman phelane ke liye Egypt bheja tha aur kafi hadd tak log Imam Alehe salaam ki bayat mae agaya the aur *Fatemi Dawat* ko qabool karchuke the
