*Syedna Idrees bin Hasan* jo hamare mashoor Dai the Syedna hummam se 100 saal pehle apni mashoor kitab *عيون الاخبار  Ayun ul Akhbaar* mae Janab e Kafur ka zikar kiye hae ke woh Imam Maad al Moiz ki bayet mae aa chuke the aur Moulana Moiz ke paas unka bulund muqam tha aur jab tak Kafur ki hukumat rahi Imam ne Egypt per hamla nahi kiya

Imam Maad al Moiz Kafur ke inteqal ke baad jab Egypt fatah karvchuke aur pehli waqt Egypt tashreef le gae to *Janab e Kafur ki ziyarat* kiye aur Dua e khair farmai

*Duwaat ka janab e Kafur ke liye bada ajeeb qol hae ke aap agarche Black slave the magar 22 saal Egypt per badshahat kiye uski wajeh aur sabab kiya tha ?*

Duwaat kehte hain ke Kafur kisi zamane mae kisi piyase shaqs ki shidat ki piyas ko ek angoor ke ghoshe jisme  22 angoor ke dane the khila kar piyas bujhai thi jiske sawab wa ajar mae Kafur ko 22 saal Egypt per hukumat naseeb huvi

Allah taala ke pas sirf adal wa insaaf hi nahi balkeh sabar wa shukur karne wale ke liye behisab ajar inam wa sawab bhi hae

Rasulullah ka qol hae jab aap se pucha gaya ke ek shaqs ke pass 1000 dinar hain aur woh 100 sadqa karta hae doosre ke pass 100 hain woh 10 sadqa karta hae aur teesre ke pas 10 hae  woh ek Sadqa karta hae kiya 1000 wala 10 wale se badhkar hae ?

Rasulullah ne farmaya teeno barabar hae teeno ne apni apni haisiyat se barabar diya

*itni choti chez ke sadqe ka ajar itna bada inam ke 22 saal ki hukumat ?*

baat choti aur badi ki nahi hoti baat khlus e niyat aur kin halaat wa mushkilaat mae sadqa kiya gaya hae

hum kitne waqt badi badi raqam khairaat wa sadqa karte hain magar maangne wale ko bura bhla bhi kehdete hain, hiqarat (insulting tone) se pesh aate hae fakhir ko be izzat karte hae, kiya aisa karne wala Allah ke pas ajar ka mustahaq hae ? kiya woh aur narmi hamdardi wa khloos se pesh aane wala barabar hain  

Allah taala humko tawfeeq de ke hum khalis niyat ke saath khair khairaat kare  takeh Allah ke pas behtreen ajar ke mustahaq ho jaise ki janab e *Kafur* huve

inshallah ainda zikar *Jawhar e Siqli* ka jo Imam ke vazir bhi the Army ke commander bhi the aur *Qaed* aapko laqab diya gaya tha ..............

✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨✨
8/31/16, 1:13:48 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: السلام علیکم

mae ne drop box link janab naqib mulla nazeer zia saheb ko diya hae woh Hazrat se ijazat liye hain Shukriya
9/1/16, 12:47:50 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: ⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°
 *آپ سب کو ماه ذی الحجۃ الحرام  کی مبارکباد پیش ہے*🌹
 °°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°
Zikar e mubarak huva tha hamare jaleel ul qadar *Imam Moulana Maad al Moiz le Deenillah* ki seerat ka

Aapke zamane ki sabse mashoor wa maroof shaqsiyat *جوہر صقلی Jawhar as Siqli* ki thi

kaha jata hae ke aap ki paedaesh *Sicely Italy* ki thi Isiliye Siqli kaha gaya aur aap ko 334 Hijri mae *Imam Ismail Al Mansoor Billah* ki khidmat mae gulam ki haisiyat se pesh kiya gaya tha

Janab *Jawhar e Siqli* bahut jald *Imam Maad al Moiz* ke zamane mae apna muqam bana liye, 341 Hijri mae Moulana Maad ke Imamat per aate hi Imam ne *Jawhar e Siqli* ko apna *Katib* (writer personal secretary) banaya aur aap ne *Abul Hasan* ki kuniyat bhi ata ki, 347 hijri mae aapko Imam ne apne *Fauj ka commander in chief* muqarar kiya

347 Hijri mae Jawhar ne bahut se Maghrib ke ilaqe fatah karliye aur Imam Alehe salaam ki *Fatemi Dawat* qaem kardi aur hukum diya ke Imam ke naam ka tammam jagah *Khutba* padha jae, aur Imam ne aapko *Al Qaed* the leader ka laqab ata kiya

*Egypt* per hamesha hamare Aima ki nazar rahi magar *Janab e Kafur* ki hukumat tak Imam Egypt se dur rahe magar Kafur ki maut ke baad 358 Hijri mae Imam Egypt fatah karne ka irada kiye

Imam ne jung per jane ki bahut zabardast tiyari farmai Egypt jane ke tammam raaste per Imam ne fauj ke liye kuwe (wells) khudwae aur sarai (Rest house) fauj ke aram ke liye tayar kiye

Jab Imam ne Invasion ka irada farmaya us waqt hi janab e Jawhar bahut saqt bimar hogae imam jaante the ke jawhar hi hae jo Egypt fatah karsakte hain

Imam Alehe salaam Janab e Jawhar e Siqli ki ayadat ke liye gae aur Dua farmai aur Irshad farmaya _ki Egypt zaroor fatah hoga aur Jawhar ke hi haath per hoga_

Jawhar bahut jald sahet yaab huve aur Jung ke liye nikalne ka muqrar huva ek lakh ghode sawar (cavalry) the aur saath mae Imam ne be hisab sona bhi bhej rahe the, Imam ka irada tha ke Egypt ko apna pae takht (capital) banae aur aapke doosre maqasid bhi the

jab fauj rawana hone lagi to Imam ne khud wida karne ke liye tashreef laye

Imam ne Fauj ko khitab karte huve bahut shaandaar khutba diya aur ek khaas baat jawhar ki fazilat mae farmai *"khuda ki kasam agar jawhar akele bhi Egypt fatah karne jae to Egypt zaroor fatah karenge* aur ye ke tum apni chadaraun mae baqaer ladai kiye Egypt mae dakhil honge aur ek khatra bhi khoon nahi behega, tum *Ibne Tulun* ke khandaraun  (ruins) mae utroge aur inshallah wahan ek shaher ki buniyaad rakhi jaegi jiska naam hoga *Qahera* (Cairo) aur woh puri duniya per ghalib aega (owerpower)

phir Imam ne ghode per se jhuk kar Jawhar ke kaan mae kuch kaha aur phir jitne umora (nobles) fauj ke afsar jitne muqtalif shaher ke governors the, sab ko hukum diya ke sab apne ghode se utar jae aur kuch faasle tak Jawhar ke saath paidal unko wida karne ke liye chale sirf Imam aur Janab e Jawhar ghode per rahe

ye thi Janab e Jawhar ki qadar aur manzelat Moulana Imam ki nazar mae

inshallah aage *Qahera Cairo kaise bana aur Ja'me Azhar* ka bhi zikar hoga.......  

⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕⭕

9/4/16, 3:46:45 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲

السلام علیکم

Zikar huva tha *Moulana Imam Maad al Moiz le Deenillah* ka aur Janab e *Abu al Misk Kafur* aur Janab e *Jawhar e Siqli* ka zikar karna baqi hae ke Hamare Imam ne kaise *Jamae Azhar islamic university* aur *Qahera Moiziye (Cairo)* shaher ki kaise buniyaad rakhi aur kaise banaya gaya inshallah in tammam ke zikar se pehle kuch *Hajj e Baitullah* ka zikar karna hae kiyunke *Hajj* ka saamne hae aur un mubarak muqaddus  muqamat ka bhi zikar karna hae jahan *Haji* jate hae

🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲
9/4/16, 3:46:57 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌹🍀🌹🍀🌹🍀🌹🍀

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

*Hajj* ke mausam ki ibteda hochuki Allah taala un tammam ko mubarak kare jinhune ne Hajj se musharaf hone ka irada kiya hae inshallah hamare ikhwan *8 Zilhaja* ki subah ko *Haram e Baitullah* se ahram bandh kar *Mizaab e Rehmat* ke saamne se Hajj ki niyat leker *Mina* tashreef le'jaeinge

*HAJJ* ke maane (meaning) qasd  yane irade ke hote hain magar Islami nukhte nazar se *Hajj* Baitullah e Shareef ki ziyarat ke liye *Mecca* jana aur ziyarat e *Nabi e kareem se Medine Munawara* se musharaf hona hae aur khaas khaas arkaan jo muqrar hain uska ada karna woh *"Hajj"* kehlata hae

Mukhtaser mae arkaan ye hain ke ek maqsoos din mae Ahram bandh kar *Mecce mauzama* mae aana *Khane Kaba* ka saat martaba tawaaf dena, *Safa wa Marwah* ke darmiyan saat chakar lagana, 8 zilhaja ko *Mina* jana aur 9 tareeq ko muqam e *Arafat* per thedna agar mumkin ho to *Jabal e Rehmat* per chadhna, 10 wi shab ko *Musdalefa* mae raat ka guzarna *youm e Eid* Mina mae *Masjid e Kheef* mae ya maidan mae Eid ki Namaz padhnn aur phir jaisa mumkin ho *Zabihat* se qiyam karna aur 11, 12, aur 13 tariq Zilhaja ki Mina ke maidan mae guzarna aur *Jumraun* (teen Shaitaan) ko kankar (pebbles) maarna, un tammam ahkamaat aur lawazimat ke saath jo *Shariat e Mohammedi* mae hukum aaya hae in baataun ko pura karna woh *"Hajj"* kehlata hae

Hajj ke har amal mae badi badi hikmatain poshida hain, usme zahari aur bateeni wujuhaat dono bhi poshida hain har insaan apni aqal wa samajh ke hisaab se usko samajh sakta hae

Ye *Hajj Deen e Islam* ka bahut hi ahem rukun hae, jiske mamsool khud *Rasulullah Mohammed e Mustafa* ki zaat hae

Hajj har ek per farz hae magar iske farz hone ke bhi kuch sharaet hain ;

Pehli baat istetaat ka hona

Doosra raaste ka aman (safety) hona

Teesri baat Safar ki taqat hona zaad e safar yane safar ke lawazimat ka hona

Apne ahel wa ayaal ke liye guzar basar ka intezam hona
(provision for travel and providence for the family back home) tab hi insaan per Hajj karna farz hota hae

*Baitullah e Haram* ki taraf Hajj karna insaan ke liye ek bahut badi nek bakhti hae, woh *Ambia ki zameen* wa *Ausia ka muqam* hae *Ibadat ki sar zameen* hae aur bahut badi saadataun ka hasil hone ka sabbab hae is muqam se badhkar koi azmat wali buzrugi wali jagaah nahi, aasmanaun se fiyuzaat wa barkaat nazil hone ka woh muqam hae

Hajj se musharaf hona aur in muqamat e muqaddasa ki ziyarat karna insaan ko ek behtreen qalib (shape) mae dhal deta hae usme har kisim ki umda khaslatain paida hojati hain, hamdardi, amanat dari, khushu wa khusu, sabar, dayanatdari, ye tammam baatain uske Nafs mae Hajj ki barkat se paida hoti hain

Allah Tabaraka wa taala ne *Ibrahim Khaleelullah* ko wahi *وحي* ke zareeyah ye hukum diya tha ke mera ek ghar banao ta'keh usme meri ibadat ki jae *Hazrat e Ibrahim khaleelullah* samajh na sake keh kahan banae us waqt Allah taala ne do ruqh (two direction) wali hawa chalai jisko *SAKINAT* kehte hain woh Sakinat ki hawa (wind) us muqam per chali jahan kissi waqt mae *Malaeka ملائكة* ne Allah ka ghar banaya tha aur ussi jagah per hazrat e Ibrahim alehe salaam ne *Kabatullah* ki imarat tameer ki

*Hajar e Aswad* (black stone) ya *Hajar e Asad* (mubarak stone) kahein dono bhi sahi, ko *janab e Gibrael e Ameen* ne la'kar diya aur Janab Ibrahim ne us'e nasab (install) kiya, Ibrahim khaleelullah ka banaya Allah ka ye ghar ek bahut muddat tak raha phir usko *Amaeqa (tribe)* ne dobara banaya phir ek muddat ke baad ghar tut gaya phir *"Qabile Jurhum"* ne banaya aur phir ek baar usko *"Qabile Quraesh"* ne banaya

*Moulana Ali ibn abi Talib* salawatullah Alehe se riwayat hae ke *Rasulullah* ne *Hujjat ul wida* (during the last Hajj of Rasulullah) *Arafat* ke maidan mae khade hokar logoan ko teen martaba farmaya *"Ae Allah ki jamaat khush amadeed (welcome) tum woh ho jinko maangne per diya gaya, aur jinke kharaj karne ke badle (in return) mae pura diya gaya aur jinko unke ek, ek, dirham ke badle mae hazar hazar nekiyun se nawaza jata hae*

_Phir Rasulullah ne logoan se kaha ke tum ko ek achi khabar sunau ?_

Sab ne kaha haan Ae Rasul e khuda

Aap ne irshad farmaya ;

_Ke jab aaj ki raat hoti hae, to Allah taala jo log Arafat per aaye hae unse khush hokar bade fakher se malaeka ko khitab karta hae,_ *"dekho mere in bandaun ko jo duniya ke muqtalif muqamat se mere pas pareshan haal ae hain (from all corners of the world)*

*Malaeka ne kha ke woh tujh se apne gunahun ki toba chahte hain*

Allah taala farmata hae ke *"Ae Malaeka mae tum ko gawah (witness) banata hun ke mae ne un tammam ko maaf kardiya ae logoan tum jab is muqam se palto'ge (return) to tumhare tammam gunaah maaf kardiye jainge*

Rasulullah ne farmaya *jo shaqs bhi duniya wa aakherat dono chahta hae woh is makan per zaroor ae, jo bhi banda is darwaze per aega aur maange ga uska sawaal zaroor pura hoga jo duniya maange ga usko duniya bhi milegi, aur jo aakherat talab karega uski aakhrat behtreen hogi*

Phir aap ne farmaya ;

*Ae logo Hajj wa Umrah karte raho dono Gunahun ko dhokar is tarah saaf kardete hain jis tarah pani gandagi ko saaf kardeti hae aur fakhiri ko is tarah mita deti hae, khatam kardeti hae, jis tarah aag lohe ke zang (rust) ko bilkul khatam kardeti hae*

Allah taala tammam *Hajjiun* ko sahet wa salaamti ke saath apne watan apne ahel wa ayal mae wapas le ae aur hamari duain unke Haq mae maqbool ho aur unki duain hum momineen ke Haq mae Allah taala qabool farmae ameen !

*بحق سيدنا ومولانا محمد وعلى آل بيته الطيبين الطاهرين*

🍀🌹🍀🌹🍀🌹🍀🌹
9/5/16, 11:07:55 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲

Aaj 5 Zilhaja youme wafat hae *Hazrat Almansub Moulana Farhat Ali saheb ibne Gulam Husain saheb* ka mae ne aapki seerat e mubaraka per mazmun likha tha jo 3 saal se mae bhej raha hun koi padhna chahta hae to request bheje mae forward kardunga

🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲🔲
9/7/16, 10:37:32 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 💢💦💢💦💢💦💢💦

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*                      
        *بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*
 
      *وَلِلَّهِ عَلَى النَّاسِ حِجُّ الْبَيْتِ مَنِ   اسْتَطَاعَ إِلَيْهِ سَبِيلًا*

Bayan kiya gaya hae ke *Imam Ali e Zainul Abedeen* ke zamane mae *Janab Shibli* naam ke ek shaqs *Hajj* se musharaf hokar Madine munawara wapis aye aur imam ki hazrat mae hazir huve us waqt Imam alehe salaam ne janab e Shibli se pucha

Kiya ae Shibli tum *Hajj* karke aye ?

Shibli ne kha ji haan ae farzand e Dukhtar e Rasulallah

Imam ne pucha kiya tum ne *Miqat* (jahan hum Ahram pehnte hain) per apne sile huve kapde (sewn clothes) utar kar gusul kiya tha ?

Aur kiya us waqt tum ne niyat ki thi ke gunahaun ke kapde utarkar taat ke kapde pehen raha hun ?

Shibli ne kha ji nahi ae Moula aisa to nahi kiya

Phir Imam ne pucha kiya tum ne sile (sewn) huve kapde utarte huve ye irada kiya tha keh tum Riya, (dikhawa) Nifaq (dil mae kuch zabaan per kuch) Shukook wa Shubhaat (doubts) se apne aap ko dur kar rahe ho ?

Kiya tu ne gusul karte waqt ye niyat ki thi ke khata'aun aur gunahaun se puri tarah apne aap ko pak wa saaf kar rahe ho ?

Shibli ne kha ji nahi ae Moula

Phir Imam ne kha Kiya tu ne Hajj ki niyat karte waqt yeh niyat ki thi ke Allah taala ki bargaah mae khalis toba ki niyat se aye hae ?

Shibli ne kaha nahi ae Moula

phir Imam ne farmaya ke tu ne jab Hajj ka irada kiya to us waqt kiya tu ne niyat ki thi  
ke Allah ke siwae jo kuch bhi tere Dil mae aqeeda tha woh nikal diya hae ? (got rid of any pledge with anyone other then Allah)  

farmaya Nahi ae mere Moula aisa to nahi khyal kiya

Kiya tum ne Miqat per dakhil hote waqt *ziyarat*  ki niyat ki thi ? kiya wahan do rakat namaz padhte waqt ye niyat ki thi ke tum Namaz jo sab se behtreen amal hae aur *واكبر حسنات العباد* bande ki sab se badi neki hae ? aur tum ne uske zareeyeh Allah taala se qurbat (closeness) hasil kar rahe ho

Kiya tum *Talbih* (labaik kehna) kehte waqt ye niyat ki thi ke ainda tum har baat Allah ki taat mae khoga aur har masiyat wa gunaah ki baat per chup rahoge ?

Kiya tu *Haram e Baitullah* mae dakhil hote waqt ye niyat ki thi ke ainda tu kissi ki qibat (backbiting) aur na peeth peeche burai karega ?

kiya tum *Mecce Mauzama* pohunche to tum ne apni Dil ki aankh se dekha, mehsoos kiya keh tum Allah taala ki taraf irada kiye hain ?

kaha ae Moula mae ne ye sab to nahi kiya hae

Imam ne farmaya na tum pak wa saaf huve, na ahraam bandha, na Hajj ka irada kiya, na haram mae dakhil huve aur na *كعبه* Ka'be ko dekha  

kiya tum ne tawaf kiya ? kiya jahan tum ko dodhna tha wahan dode (ran) aur jahan chalna (walk) wahan chale

Shibli ne kaha haan Moula mae ne ye to kiya hae

Imam ne kaha jab tum ne *سعي* saee ki to tum ne niyat ki ke tum khataun aur gunahaun se bhaag kar Allah se nasdik ho raha ho aur ye ke woh gayab ka janne wala hae

Shibli ne kha aisa to mae ne nahi socha

Imam ne kaha na tum ne *Safa* aur *Marwa* ke darmiyan saee ki, na tum tawaaf mae chale aur na dode (neither you walked nor ran)

kiya tum muqam e Ibrahim per ruk'ke aur do rakat namaz padhi aur kiya tum ne us waqt ye niyat ki ke har taat ke baat per sabit khadam rahoge aur har gunah ki baat per peeche rahoge aur ye keh tum janab e *Ibrahim Khaleelullah* se taluq qaem kiye ho, aur shaitaan ko zaleel wa ruswa kiya jisper Allah ki lanat ho

Tum ne *Hajar Aswad* ko chuma (kissed) woh aisa hi hae jaisa ke tum ne Allah taala se musafah kiya hae aur is musafeh ke saath tum ne ek mohaida (agreement) kiya aur tum yaad rakho ke haram kamai (illegal means) se us ahed wa misaak (agreement) ko tod na do

Kiya tu saei (Safa wa Marwa ke darmiyan chalna) karte waqt ye niyat kiya tha keh tu gunahaun se bhaag kar Allah taala ki taraf panah leta hae

Kiya tu ne Safa wa Marwah ke darmiyan chala aur bhaga bhi ?

Kiya tu ne us waqt ye khyal kiya keh tu raza e elahi aur khoof e bari taala ke darmiyan chal raha hae

Shibli ne kha nahi ae Moula aisa to nahi khyal kiya tha

Ae Shibli kiya tum Zam Zam ke kuwe (well) per gaye the aur kiya wahan ka pani piye the ?

Kiya tu ne Zam Zam ka pani pete waqt ye عقد aqd e niyat (firm commitment) ki thi keh tu apne dil se was'wasaun aur bad'gumaniyun (trickeries of Satan & evil temptations) ko nikal dega, aur tu haram (prohibited) pinne ki chezaun se bachenga (will keep away from haram drinks)

Shibli ne badi mayusi ke saath kha ke ji nahi ae Moula ye sab to mae ne nahi kiya

us waqt Imam ne kha agar aisa hae to, tu ne na Baitullah ka tawaf kiya, na *Safa aur Marwah* mae saee ki aur na muqam e Ibrahim per namaz padhi aur na hi Zam Zam per aye aur na hi uska pani piya

is tarah Imam e Zainul Abedeen ne Hajj ke tammam arkaan ka zikar kiya aur bataya ke ye zaheri arkan ke karte waqt hamare dil ki niyat kiya hona chahye batin mae in arkan ka maqsad kiya hae, Hajj ke mubarak wa ahem farize ke ada karte waqt hamara irada, niyat, soch, khyalaat, Fikar kiya honi chahye usse humko Imam ne waqif karwaya hae

inshallah iske baad ke arkaan e Hajj ke mukalema ka zikar ainda........  

•••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••••

 *Khabro al Shibli خبر الشبلي*    Hazrat Moulana Almansub *Syedi Abdullah Saheb muqaddus* ne Arabi se Urdu tarjuma kiya tha jo kitab ki shakal mae print bhi huvi thi (booklet form) aur *mansak e Haj* ke saath bhi moujud hae Allah taala aapko muqaddus farmae aur aapke nazraat wa barkaat hum sab per jari rakhe

Is dialogue ka English translation bhi Internet per moujud hae inshallah ainda Web address ainda mazmun ke saath bhejunga

💦💢💦💢💦💢💦💢
9/8/16, 12:01:11 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: *SECOND PART*

💢💦💢💦💢💦💢💦

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته
بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم
جمعة مباركة  🌹

                *خبر الشبلي*

Zikar huva tha *Imam e Zainul Abedeen* aur Janab e *Shibli* ka, *Hajj* ke arkaan ke taluq se

Imam ne kha ae Shibli kiya tum *Mina* ke maidan mae gaya the ?

Shibli ne kha, haan ae Moula

Imam ne farmaya Kiya tu Mina ke maidan mae ye niyat ki thi keh tu logoan ko apni dil, zabaan, haath, se aman wa amaan mae rakhega

Kiya to ne *Arafat* ke maidan mae *Jabal e Rehmat* per chadha tha ?

Shibli ne kha haan ae Moula mae Arafat per gaya tha

Kiya ae shibli tu *Arfe* ke maidan mae khada hokar ye qor kiya ke Allah taala ki marefat tammam uloom (knowledge) mae sab se aala aur badhkar hae aur kiya tu ne us waqt ye yaqeen hasil kiya ke tera sahife aamal, (record of deeds) Allah taala ke khabse aur qudrat mae hae, aur woh tere zameer ki poshida baataun se bhi waqif aur ba'khabar hae

Ae Shibli kiya tu ne *Jabal e Rehmat* per chadhte huve ye niyat aur irada kiya tha ke tu har mommin mard aur aurat per rahem karega har muslim mard wa aurat se mohabbat wa ulfat rakhega

kiya tum ne *Wadiye Numra* ke pas ye niyat ki thi ke tum apne *Nafs* ko farma bardari karne tak tokte rahoge aur buri baataun se us waqt tak rokte rahoge jab tak ke woh ruk na jae

Kiya tu ne *Musdalefa* per raat guzari aur wahan se kankar (pebbles) chun kar uthaya aur  *مشعر حرام* *Mashar e Haraam* Mina mae aye aur *Masjid e Kheef* mae do rakat namaz padhi us waqt kiya tum ne ye niyat ki ke tum siwae Allah taala ke, aur apne gunahun ke, kisi ka bhi khoof nahi rakhoge

Imam ne kaha tum ne namaz mae niyat ki thi ke ye namaz shukrane ki hae mushkilaat ko dur karti hae aur tum ko asani aur sahulat pohunchati hae

aur kiya tum *Alamayeen* ke darmiyan chalte waqt apne dil aur zabaan ko seedhe baye janib mael (incline) to nahi kiya ?

kiya tu ne us waqt ye azm aur irada kiya tha ke tu har masiyat (gunaah) jahalat aur bekar ilm aur bure amal se apne aap ko dur rakhega

Aur kiya tu *Jumraun* (3 shaitaan) ko marte waqt ye aqeeda rakha tha ke tu tere dushman Iblees ko maar raha hae aur har gunaah bure ilm wa amal se chutkara hasil kiye ho ?

Aur kiya tu ne sar mundate (hair removal) waqt ye aqeeda rakha ke ab tere sa're gunaah maaf hogae aur ab tu aisa hi be'gunah hogaya jaisa ke tu apni paedaesh ke waqt tha

kiya tum ne *zabihat* karte waqt ye niyat ki ke tum ne *طمع* Tama (hirs lalaj greed) ke gale (neck) per churi (knife) chalai hae, sachi parhezgari se apna taluq qaem kiya hae aur Sunnat e Ibrahimi ki paervi ki   

Phir Imam ne kha Kiya tu Mina pohunch kar kankariyaan mari, kiya sar ke baal mundwaye, apni qurbani ko zabah kiya, masjid Kheef mae namaz padhi, Mecce Mauzama wapas huva aur Tawaf e Ifaza kiya, us waqt tum ne niyat ki ke tu ne Allah taala ki Rehmat hasil kiya, Allah taala ki taat ki taraf tawajuh ki, Allah ke hudood se apna taluq qaem kiya, Allah taala ke bade farz ko ada kiya aur usse qurbat hasil huvi

Is tarah Imam ne sa're arkaan e *Hajj* aur mauqaf (places where *Haji* had to stop for certain deeds) bayan kardiye aur har baat per janab e Shibli afsoos karte rah gae aur kehte rahe, Ae Imam, mae ne aisi tu niyat nahi kiya tha aur aisa aqeeda nahi rakha

Imam ne kha, na tu ne, ahram bandha, na hi tawaf kiya, na hi sa'ee ki, na hi muqam e Ibrahim per namaz padhi, na hi Hajar e Aswad ko chuma, na Mina gaya, na Arafat per gaya, na hi Jumraun ko mara na hi sar mundwaya, na hi teri zabihat huvi

Ae Shibli tu ne in tammam arkan ko ada hi nahi kiya, ja palat ja, tu ne to *HAJJ* hi nahi kiya

Janab e Shibli ne apni sari kothaiyun (mistakes) per bahut azurda (saddened & relented) huve, bahut afsoos kiya, bahut roye aur phir Imam Alehe Salaam ke pas taleem hasil karke dobara doosre saal pure yaqeen aur marefat ke saath Hajj e maqbool ada kiya

Allah taala humko bhi woh marefat ata kar jo Shibli ne hasil ki, takeh hamara bhi Haj e maqbool ho

°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°
_mae ye bayan bilkul mukhtasar mae kiya hun, Imam ka kalam bahut lamba hae_
°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°°
*For link to English translation kindly send a request*

💦💢💦💢💦💢💦💢
9/9/16, 1:14:46 PM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋

*السلام علیکم و رحمة الله و بركاته*
*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

               *يوم عرفة مبروك*

*فَإِذَا أَفَضْتُم مِّنْ عَرَفَاتٍ فَاذْكُرُوا اللَّهَ*

*Jab tum Muqam e Arfaat se niklo (Musdalefa ki taraf) to Allah Taala ka zikar karo (kasrat se)*

Aap sab ko Arfe ke mubarak tareen din ki tabreek pesh hae, Allah taala hum sab ki Duain qabool kare, Duaon mae yaad rakhne ki aap sab se ilteja hae

*Muqam e Arfaat kiya hae ?*

*Syedna Dai Gulam Husain saheb* ne kitab *Qutrun Nida* mae farmaya hae ;

Allah taala ne ek badi muddat ke baad *Adam Alehe Salaam* ki toba ko qabool farmaya jab ke Adam ne *Mohammed e Mustafa Salallahu Alehe wa Sallam* ki shafa'at talab ki aur Allah ne unhe hukum diya ke jis tarah mere *Arsh* ke atraaf tawaaf diya jata hae waise hi tum *Kabe* ke atraaf tawaf do

Adam Hindustan (Sarandeep Sri Lanka) se Mecce Mauzama ki taraf aye aur wahan aapko *حوا Haw'wa* mili jo Adam ki talaash mae Jeddah se wahan ayi huvi thi aur muqam e Arfaat per Arfe ke roz dono ki mulaqat huvi aur dono ka taruf *عرف* huva aur ek doosre ko pehchane isiliye is mubarak muqam ka naam *Arfaat* rakha gaya

aur jab dono *Mina* ki taraf palte to irshad huva ke *"apni kisi tamanna ka ishaar karo"* Adam ne kaha ki meri tamana ye hae ke mujhe maaf kiya jae aur mujh per *رحم* rahem kiya jae isiliye us muqam ka naam *Mina* ya *Muna* jiska arabi mae matlab hota hae *Tamanna ya Arzu* isliye us muqam ka naam *مني Mina* rakha gaya

Adam ko maaf karne ke baad Allah taala ne Adam per *وحى* ki *"ae Adam mae tere liye sara Ilm char kalemat mae jama kardeta hun"*

(1) _Ek mere liye hae_
(2) _Ek mere aur tere darmiyan hae_
(3) _Ek tere liye hae_ aur
(4) _Ek tere aur logoan ke darmiyaan hae_

_mere liye jo hae woh yeh hae_

       *فتعبدني لا تشرك بي شياء*

_Sirf meri hi ibadat kar aur mere saath kisi ko shareek na kar_

 jo baat tere liye hae

      *فاجزيك بعملك ما تكون اليه*

_"Mae tujhe tere amal ka badla zaroor daunga (agar acha hae to sawaab aur bura hae to azaab)"_

_Jo baat tere aur mere darmiyan jo hae_

      *فمنك الدعاء ومني الإجابة*

_"Tere kaam Dua karna hae aur mera kaam usko qabool karna hae"_

_Aur aakhri baat jo tere aur logoan ke darmiyan hae_

       *فإن ترضي للناس ما ترضي لنفسك*

_Tu logoan ke liye wohi baat pasand kar jo tu khud ke liye pasand karta hae_

Allah taala dono manaseeb e kiraam Hazrat Moulana Almansub Syedi *Ibrahim saheb* wa Hazrat Moulana Almansub Syedi *Gulam Hussain* saheb ko sahet wa aafiyat se rakhe aur humko unki taat mae rakhe aur unki duaon mae khususan kal ke mubarak din shareek rakhe, *Ameen !*

🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋🕋
9/10/16, 11:47:46 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: □■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■

السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته🌹
*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*  🌹

*ليلة العيد الأضحى و يوم العيد الأضحئ مبارك* 🌹
 
■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□
 
Jo shaqs ek waqt *Hajj e Baitullah* se musharaf hota hae phir uske Dil mae dobara balkeh mutawatir (repeatedly) har saal Hajj per jane ki khaesh paida hojati hae

Agarche ki *Mecce Mauzama* ki sar'zameen banjar (dry) hae, khud Quran farma raha hae

*رَّبَّنَا إِنِّي أَسْكَنتُ مِن ذُرِّيَّتِي بِوَادٍ غَيْرِ ذِي زَرْعٍ عِندَ بَيْتِكَ الْمُحَرَّمِ*

 Janab e *Ibrahim khaleelullah* ne kaha tha _"Ae Allah taala mae meri zuriyat (aulad) ko aisi wadi (valley of Mecca) mae basaya hae jahan kheti nahi hoti jo tere mubarak ghar Baithullah ke khreeb hae_

jahan koi chez ki paidawaar nahi, na hi khet hain, na hi darakht, na hi nadi wa na'le, magar phir bhi Allah taala ne aisi jazebiyat (attraction) us muqam mae rakha hae ki har musalman ki khaesh hoti hae ke us mubarak muqam ki ziyarat usko naseeb ho

Kiya hi behtreen manzar hota hae jab tammam Haji safaed Ahram ke do kapde pahen kar *Haram e Baitullah* ka ruq karte hain, dil wa dimaag per ajeeb kaefiyat chah'jati hae, jab ke har Haji *TALBIH* kehna shru karta hae aur Mecce ki sar zameen is mubarak alfaz se gunj uthti hae

 *اللهم لبيك، لبيك لا شريك لك، لبيك ان الحمد ونعمة لك، والملك لا شزيك لك*

Ya bada hi rikhat amez (heart touching) manzar hota hae jab ke lakhaun Haji ek saath talbiha kehta huve Baitullah ki taraf aage badhte hain,

Har Haji ko us waqt tak ye char kalemaat 'Talbih' kehte rahna hae jab tak ke woh kabatullah ko na dekh le

Aur jaise hi Kabatullah ko dekh le to usko talbiha khatam karna hae aur ye kehna shru karna hae

            *لا اله الا الله، الله أكبر*

 Aur ye Dua bhi padhte jae

   *اللهم زد هذا البيت تشريفا وتعظيماوزد من شرفه وعظمته*
 
*Ya Allah, to is ghar ki azmat wa sharafat ko aur ziyada kar*

In char kalemat e Talbih woh sunnat e Nabawi hae,

Aur Ahle baet e kiraam ne is Dua me aur isafa (additions) kiya hae

*لبيك ذالمعارج، لبيك داعيا الي دار السلام، لبيك غفار الذنوب، لبيك مرعوب والمزغوب اليك، لبيك ذوجلال والاكرام، لبيك اله الخلق، لبيك كاشف الكرب*

Imam e *Jaffar e Sadiq* salwatullah alehe farmate hain Haji ke liye ke tum har namaz e farz wa sunnat ke baad labaek kho aur jab tum ko sawari lekar uthe, ya phir tum bulundi per chadho, ya phir wadi mae utro, ya phir jab tum neend se bedar ho

Imam e *Jafar e Sadiq* farmate hain ke Allah taala tak pohunchne ke jitne bhi raaste hain unme *Hajj* se badhkar koi raasta nahi, siwae iske keh koi shaqs Allah ki raah mae *Shaheed* hojae

Aur imam e *Jafar e Sadiq* farmate hain ke Allah taala ne *Ibrahim Khaleelullah* alehe salaam per wahi nazil ki thi

*ان طهرا بيتي للطاءفين والعاكفين والركع والسجود*

Is ayaat ke nuzul ke waqt Allah taala ne 170 Rahmatain Baitullah e mubarak per nazil ki

 Usme se *60 Tawaf* dene walaun ke liye

*50 Aakefeen* ke liye (aetekaf baithne walaun ke liye)

*40 Namaz* padhne walaun ke liye

*20 Kabatullah ko dekhne walaun* ke liye, ye Allah taala ki rahimi aur kareemi hae ke Kabatullah ko sirf dekhne walaun ke liye bhi Rahmatain ata ki hain

Haji ke liye Rasulullah ka qol e mubarak hae jab tum tamman Manasik e Hajj ada karlo ab tum ek imarat bana chuke ho, (ek achi roohani surat ki tashkil de chuke ho, image create kiye ho) isko munhaddim (destroy) na karna, ab tum mazi (past) ki fikar na karo aur mustaqbil (future) mae nek amal karo

Allah Tabaraka wa taala ka lakh, lakh, shukur wa ahsaan hae, ke usne aise asbab (factors) banae hain hamare gunahaun ki maqferat ke liye

Allah taala hum sabko ye ahem fareeze *"Hajj"* ke ada karne ki tawfeeq de aur uske karne ki iste'taat paida karde

Walid e muqaddus Hazrat Moulana *Ziaali Saheb* muqaddus ke alfaz kaan mae gunjte hae, Jab bhi aap Haj ke asbaq lete to ye alfaaz se bayan ki ibteda karte

*"Ek mommin ka inteqal karke kafan pehen kar khabar mae jana aur ek Haji ka Ahram ke do kapde pehen kar Hajj per jana dono barabar hain"*

Allah taala hum ko is hikmat ki baat aur uske peeche poshida raaz, uski haqeeqat se waqif karae takeh hamara zahari Hajj, woh batini Hajj bhi hojae.

*والحمد لله رب العالمين والصلاة والسلام على سيدنا محمد وعلى آله الطيبين الطاهرين وسلم عليهم أجمعين*

■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□■□
9/13/16, 4:22:38 AM: Mulla Ishaq Bhai: 🌹🌿🍁🍃🌹🌿🍁🍃

*السلام عليكم ورحمة الله وبركاته*
*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

Allah taala ka bada ahsaan aur karam hae ke *Hajj* mukamil huva aur hamare Ikhwan ki khair ki khabar hae hum bhi har roz Dua e Ratib mae unki sahet wa aafiyat, wa salaamti ke saath watan lautne ki Dua karte hain

*Haji* apne do  sufaed chadar ke Ahram se hil (complete his arkan of removing hair & performing zabihat) huva hoga aur apne roz ke libaas ko ikhteyar kiya hoga

Ye libaas bhi badi hi ajeeb chez hae insaan ki soch, fikar, khyalaat, mood, uska uthna, baithne (actions) sab hi baataun per asar andaz hota hae, balkeh insaan ko saamne wale shaqs ki jo chez sab se ziyada mutazir karti hae, woh uski surat wa shakal ke baad uska libaas hi hae,

Allah taala ki kiya hi badi hikmat aur raaz is baat mae poshida hoga ke jo *Hajj* ke liye hukum kiya gaya keh do safaed kapde pehne aur woh bhi baqaer sile huve ho

Ye baat ek Haji hi batasakta hae jo woh in do kapdaun ko pehen kar mehsoos karta hae, yaqinan, inkesari, bandagi, Allah ke saamne ajisi, ikhwan ke saath barabari wa hamdardi ko mehsoos to yaqinan karta hi hoga, aur uska batin to Aulia Allah hi batasakte hain ki kiya uske saath pesh aata hae is *Ahram* ke pehen'ne se

Shariat (islamic laws) mae libaas ki bahut ahmiyat hae *Moulana Ali ibn Abi Talib salawatullah alehe* jab bhi koi libaas pehnte to ye irshad farmate

*بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم*

*الحمد لله الذي رزقني من الرياش ما اتجمل به في الناس ووارى سوءتى وستر عورتى الحمد لله رب العالمين*

Tammam Hamd wa tareef Allah hi ke liye hae jis ne mujhe yeh kimti libaas ata farmaya jisme mae logoan ke saamne acha nazar aunga aur tammam Hamd us Allah ke liye hae jisne meri sittir poshi ki hae (covered my nakedness) aur tammam Hamd wa tareef us Allah ke liye hae jo sa're jahan ka Rabb hae

Aur *Moulana Ali* ne farmaya ke Rasul e khuda bhi yehi padhte the jab aap libaas pehnte the

Moulana Ali ne ek waqt ek libaas khreeda jab aap ne aasteen (sleeves) ko dekha ke woh wrist se ziyada lambi hain aur issi tarah uski lambai ankle se ziyada lambi hae to aap ne usko kaat dala (trimmed its length)

*Imam e Baqaer Salwatullah alehe* farmate, keh jo bhi libaas takhnau (wrist & ankle) se neeche hoga to woh hissa jahanam mae hoga

*Moulana Ali* hamesha do libaas ek saath khreedte the aur dono libaas mae se ek ko pehle pasand karne ka ikhteyar apne gulam (slave) *Moulana Cumber* ko dete, woh apni marzi se pasand karleta to phir aap doosra khud ke liye rakh lete

Rasulullah ki mashoor Hadees hae

*من اتخذ شعرافليحسن اليه،*
*من اتخذ زوجة فليكرمها،*
 *من اتخذ نعلا فليستجدها،*
 *من اتخذ دابة فليستفرهها،*
 *ومن اتخذ ثوبا فلينضفه*

Jo shaqs bhi lambe baal (long hair) rakhe to woh usko achi tarah rakhe, saaf suthre aur jama kar rakhe (groom the hair)

Jo Biwi ikhteyar kare, yaane shaadi kare to usko izzat se rakhe karamat de (give her respect & keep her dignity)

Jo shaqs bhi juta (shoes) rakhe to woh usko naya rakhe, yaane saaf polished aur bilkul nai condition mae rakhe

Aur jo jaanwar rakhe to ache kisim ka rakhe (keep a good breed)

Aur jo libaas rakhe to usko saaf suthra (neat, clean & tidy) rakhe

Allah taala hum ko libaas ke zaheri ahkam ka paband banae

Shariat e Mohammedi mae libaas ki bahut ahmiyat hae jiska hum khyaal nahi karte hain aur us se hamari zindagi mae jo khrabi aati hae uska humko ahsaas bhi nahi aur na andaza hae

Allah taala hamare tamman *Hajiyun* ko sahet wa afiyat se apne watan wapis lautae

*والحمدلله رب العالمين ولا حول ولا قوة الا بالله العلي العظيم*

💐🌹🍃🍁🌹💐🍃🍁
